An awesome collection of stories. Read the Kindle version and I was not impressed with all the typos in it. Amazon or the books publisher need to do a better job in editing the e-reader versions.
This was a great love story. I think m/m books are so much more than if it was m/f. I think u can fell the love in these books. It was an awesome story.

I usually wear a size small, but I have bigger thighs and a butt for being 5'7" and 125lbs. After reading other reviews I thought it would be best to order a size up and I was right. The M/L fit perfectly and I usually wear a size 4-5. Otherwise they are good quality and super soft!

I picked this up after seeing it featured on Justified, figuring it would be a fun novelty purchase. Turns out it actually holds its own as a legitimate read. I expected something quick and gimmicky, maybe a few laughs and not much substance, but the writing genuinely surprised me. Some sections drag a bit and could use tighter editing, which is why I'm knocking off a star. Overall though, it way exceeded what I thought I was getting. If you're a fan of the show, there's plenty here that connects back to Givens family history and Kentucky coal country. Took me about a weekend to get through it. Not life-changing, but solidly better than your average TV tie-in book.
Arrived quickly in a nice box, fabric feels surprisingly luxe.
Another great short story/novella from Jasinda Wilder. This series is definitely worth the time and money. I highly recommend them.
Great quality for the price. My nephew hasn't put it down since Christmas.

Arrived fast in a padded mailer so no bent corners on the cover. Started flipping through it right out of the box and ended up reading the first few chapters before bed. Syn is a solid character. Not perfect but keeps you turning pages. Curious enough to grab the next one.
Arrived quickly in sturdy packaging. Looks like a solid read so far.

Didn't expect much from a short novella but this completely surprised me. Getting inside John's perspective added so much depth to the main story. Way better than your typical companion book. Cate and John's dynamic just works perfectly.
Thought it'd be flimsy for the price but it's surprisingly sturdy. Fits my two small dogs perfectly and stays put even when they get rowdy.

Honestly didn't expect much from an older film like this, but it completely blew me away. The storytelling holds up better than most modern stuff. Grabbed a copy after streaming it once, absolutely worth owning.
Got this for a steal and honestly it's worth way more. The side-by-side storytelling really pulls you in. Picked it up on a whim and couldn't put it down. Great bang for your buck.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Watched the first episode last night and already hooked. Great quality disc set.

I really liked reading this book because, while well translated, the French think differently, and the French thinking drove the book. I felt like Druon had researched well, and didn't dumb down history for his reader. He came up with motivation for his characters that seemed rational, considering the times, and he gives us a lot of context for understanding those times. It's a fascinating period in French history and a fascinating monarch, Philip IV.
Way sturdier than I expected for the price. I loaded each one up with around 18 lbs of sand and the stitching held perfectly. Great feel and solid construction overall.

Expected these to be my new go-to shoes based on the photos, but the fit is way off. The arch support hits in a weird spot and the sole feels stiffer than I anticipated. They look great sitting in the box, just not practical for all-day wear like I was hoping. Sending back.

This was such a good read from start to finish. The way Caisen stepped up for Farrah had me hooked immediately. If you love urban romance with real emotional depth and ride-or-die side characters, this one's for you. Grab it now.
My kid's been rough on this for months and it still looks brand new.

Per Niccolò Machiavelli, we are invited to distribute his works after his death. This order's books are all well bound softcover full wrapped editions. Good gifts for the symbolic gesture but the full e-version of the same title in previous review is the edition necessary for scheming laughs and academic research.
This shoe is not only beautiful and elegant, but it has a firm structure and feels like a walking shoe. I can wear them all day at work and all evening for a night on the town.

John Grishan is among my favorite authors and I have over 20 of his books in my library. I loved "A Time to Kill" and was looking forward to more of the same. Sycamore Row, while a v ery good read, did not measure up for me. However, as a Grisham fan I wouold still buy it and enjoy it. Just not quite up to mmy expectations.

If you're a meat lover, this is your book. Somehow I did not expect much at first glance but decided to preview it and ended up buying it. It did not disappoint. So many great recipes and meat combinations make this one a winner. Among the best meat recipes I've come across.
Arrived two days early, tightly sealed in a small box. Unrolled it and was instantly impressed by the vibrant pattern. Laid flat within hours. Really happy so far.

I bought the box set with the first 3 books and loved them all. You can read them as standalone or together (I suggest together) as the books intertwine. The Black River Pack alpha's fated mated willing be in danger and hiding from someone. This is what his grandmother told him long ago and indeed when he meets Grace she is in danger and running from her ex. Spencer, the second oldest brother, was told that his mate will walk in dreams. So why is it that being with Eliza is the only thing he can think about, at least until his fated mate arrives. Or can Eliza walk in dreams, no she would have said something, right? Parker, the youngest brother, was told his mate was discarded by her family. This has lead to Parker being a white knight. Knowing his mate is in trouble and not being able to help leads him to help other females in hopes that someone will reach out to his mate and help her. Annora was sold to an evil Alpha that wanted her for a mate since she was young. Her finding out that she is a bear, born to two wolves, sells her to the evil Alpha as repayment for his debt. But fate steps in and brings her to Parker, who now needs to protect her as only a fated mate can and will. Can't wait for the next one, I'm putting it on my wish list and my to be read list.

Bought this as a backup charger for my Up3 and I'm really impressed. The cable length is fantastic, probably six feet, so I can actually use my desk comfortably while the band charges instead of being tethered to the wall. The magnetic connection snaps on securely every single time, no wiggling or repositioning needed. My original charger was finicky and I'd constantly wake up to find the band didn't charge overnight. Haven't had that issue once with this one. Feels well-made too, not flimsy like some third party accessories. Definitely worth picking up if you need a replacement or spare.

Got this on a whim and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. Lyon's protective streak had me hooked from chapter one. The whole cast felt real and I binge-read it in one sitting. For the price, you're getting a seriously solid story. Really hoping for a sequel.
Definitely recommend these to anyone serious about building grip strength.
I really like the series on tv. Now to have the entire collection in addition to both movies makes this complete

I did enjoy this book. I really enjoyed the circle of second chance romance stories. It really brings home that it's never too late. I am not the biggest fan of stories told from multiple people's perspectives, but the author did a good job of it. I think Georgia and Tommy's story was my favorite.
Bought this in a hurry before a cold snap. The adhesive backing sticks well and was easy to apply, but honestly the foam is pretty thin. Noticed minimal difference in drafts near my back door.
Way nicer than I expected for the price. The face isn't too bulky and it goes with everything.

I've been using these shorts for about six weeks now and honestly can't believe the price point. Most padded cycling shorts in this range feel cheap or fall apart after a few washes, but these have held up great. The chamois is surprisingly thick where you need it without being bulky, and the leg grippers actually stay put on long rides. I did a 45-mile route last weekend with zero chafing or discomfort. The fabric breathes well even in 90-degree heat. Sizing runs pretty true to chart, I'm normally a medium and the medium fit perfectly. My only minor complaint is the pocket is barely big enough for a gel, but at this price I really can't knock a star off. Way better than shorts costing twice as much.
Decent hold but the screws sit slightly proud even when countersunk properly.

Expected these to last way longer than a couple weeks. Two burned out almost immediately and the rest flicker constantly. For the price, these are a complete ripoff. Going back to the name brand I usually buy.

Installation was straightforward and the wall adapter works great for power instead of relying on batteries. The programmable collar tag is what I really love, no more stray animals wandering inside like with our old magnetic flap. My only complaint is the motor is pretty loud when it latches shut, which spooked my lab for the first week. Overall solid build quality though and it's held up through rain with no leaking.
I have read the the previous books, love the characters and the plots. I know I won't be disappointed. Very good author. It arrived today, Mothers Day, perfect. Definately recommend.

Honestly I expected a cheaper feel for the price point but this thing is built pretty solid. Way heavier than I anticipated which gave me some confidence right away. It handles everything I throw at it without breaking a sweat and honestly outperforms my old unit from a different brand. My only gripe is the outlets sit pretty close together so bulkier adapters might fight for space. Got it delivered quick and the box arrived intact with all accessories sealed up. Took about five minutes to get everything hooked up and running smooth. For what I paid I'm genuinely surprised at the quality. Would recommend to anyone needing a reliable option.

Got these for winter yard work and honestly the insulation is solid, my feet stayed warm even in 20 degree weather. That part I really can't complain about. But the traction is honestly dangerous. The sole is super stiff and hard, almost like plastic. First time wearing them on wet grass I slipped twice. On packed snow they're marginally better but still sketchy. My buddy has a pair of Irish Setters and the difference in grip is night and day. The leather also scuffed pretty badly after just one weekend of normal use. They look decent enough for the price but I wouldn't trust these on anything icy or slick. Going back unfortunately because I need something that won't send me sliding across my driveway.

A solid watch for the sub-$20 category, I was a little disappointed because I bought it because I thought it looked sleek/cool but when the watch got here and I took a closer look, I realized it was much more plastic-y than it looks in the picture. Most of the knobs and buttons on the side are just decorative and aren't really buttons or controls. There are only 4 buttons on the watch that are functional. That being said, this watch probably does everything you expect from a watch of this price/category. It is waterproof, has 4 different modes, including regular,alarm, stop watch, and secondary watch(displays a second set of time). There is also a weird calendar mode, but the watch essentially tells you the date and day of the week as well. Overall this is a great watch for the price, although it looks a little bit cheap, it really just looks like it's a sub-$20 watch, which it is. I've brought it in the shower and into a swimming pool with me and had no problems, so it seems great for water sports and activities.

I really appreciated how this film doesn't try to be overly dramatic or Hollywoodized. The pacing is what stood out to me, it takes time with the quiet moments, letting you sit with the family's grief instead of rushing to the next plot point. The young actor playing Tyler is genuinely good, not precocious or forced like a lot of child performances in faith-based films. My one complaint is the soundtrack. Some of the instrumental choices feel a bit generic and slightly undercut the emotional weight of certain scenes. A more stripped-back approach musically would've served the story better. Still, it's a solid watch that handles a heavy subject with restraint and honesty. Worth checking out if you want something heartfelt.

6'1", 159 pounds, cyclist build, ordered a Large. The jersey was nearly baggy but certainly wearable. The problem was with the bib shorts - the openings for the legs were so small making the shorts so tight to pull on that I fear the seams would rip within a couple rides. The shoulder strap material also isn't as robust as other similarly priced kits that I own. Mostly returning due to the size mismatch between the jersey and bib shorts.
OMG. These headphones are amazing, they have wonderful noise cancellation and wonderful bass/vibration aspects. Would refer to friends and purchase more. I have always loved skull candy audio.

For the price, this little weather station is hard to beat. Setup took five minutes and the temperature readings have been spot on so far.

Glad I got this on a Kindle Unlimited borrow because I would be demanding a refund otherwise. The pricing on this is insulting for what you actually get. At nearly six bucks for the ebook, I expected a full length novel with some depth. What I got was maybe a two hour read with paper thin characters and a plot that goes nowhere. The dialogue reads like a first draft nobody bothered to edit. Typos everywhere, missing words, sentences that just stop mid thought. I have read self published books for 99 cents that were ten times better than this. Save your money and skip it. There are plenty of other romances in this genre that actually deliver a complete story for the same price or less.

I've been playing Dominion for years and picked this up to freshen up our game nights. The Empires set brings some genuinely creative twists that shake up your strategy in ways the base game can't. Split piles are a cool addition, you never quite know what you're buying into until things get revealed. That said, a few of the mechanics feel a bit fiddly and took my group a couple plays to fully grasp. Not the expansion I'd hand to someone brand new to Dominion, but if you've got a dozen or so games under your belt and want to be surprised again, this is a fantastic pickup. Recommended for intermediate players who want deeper decision-making without losing that classic deck-builder flow.

I absolutely love the collar! The only reason I gave it four instead of five stars was it does loosen like other reviews stated. I use a harness however, when walking my dog, so it's just an accessory anyway.
Great knife for heavy work around camp or around the yard. A little heavy if you are packing in to camp somewhere but will handle about anything. It took a good edge pretty easily....
Great quality but I thought it would be a little bigger, overall it's a great wallet

Had this canopy on my 55g for about two years now. The glass itself holds up great, no warping or clouding like you get with plastic lids. Still looks clean after wiping down. My issue is the rear strip that you cut for filter tubes. It gets brittle fast and cracked on me within six months. Had to tape it to keep moisture from escaping. For the price, the glass quality is solid and will last forever, but plan on replacing that plastic strip eventually. Decent product overall, just not perfect.
Watched all three seasons twice now, discs still play perfectly without any scratches.

I picked this up on a whim looking for something different from typical European fantasy, and I'm really glad I did. The Arabian setting feels fresh and vivid without being overdone. Jones clearly knows his source material, and the bromance between the scholarly narrator and the soldier works surprisingly well, they bounce off each other naturally and keep things moving. The plot has a nice mix of action, mystery, and supernatural elements that reminded me of the old pulp adventure novels but with better writing. Pacing is solid throughout, maybe a slow start for some but it pays off. Finished it in three sittings and immediately ordered the sequel. If you like sword and sorcery with a different flavor, grab this.

"The Facts of Life" is one of those great television shows that defined the 80s. It had comedy but easily tackled issues young people were facing such as drugs, sex, and simply morals and things like self-esteem. This DVD release does what few first season sets don't; it packs in two seasons, includes some actually good extras that includes interviews with some key cast members, and simply gives the fans of the show what they wanted. The transfer to DVD seems okay or decent. The extras, as mentioned, were good... they included interviews of some of the women who played the girls in the first season (and made a few appearances in season 2). I didn't remember the show being as funny and engaging as it was from the start into the second season when the cast was downsized and focused on a select few. The writing wasn't too cheesey and the plots were fresh and still are today. This is one of those shows, and DVD releases, that I'd have to say is a "must own." This was a piece of television history when T.V. wasn't loaded down with reality shows and poor shows. Get this show on DVD, you won't be disapointed.

Ordered the two-disc set and it arrived with the case cracked right down the middle. The discs were loose inside and rattling around, so naturally I was worried they'd be scratched. Miraculously they played fine, but honestly the whole thing felt like a letdown from the start. The slipcover was torn on one corner and looked like somebody had already handled it. As for the movie itself, I'd been curious about it for a while but it didn't really grab me. Pacing felt off and by the halfway point I was checking my phone. The extras on disc two might be worth checking out but I haven't bothered yet. Not terrible, just underwhelming for what I paid. Should've just streamed it somewhere honestly.

This product is awesome! One of the best cases I have purchased to date for both iPad 2/3 (which have been many). It includes a built in screen protector, and looks to be very solid. The case snaps in the the protective case and then is protected by the rubber around the sides. There are slots that are protected for the rear camera and speaker, and all ports are covered. Very nice for the price. Highly recommended! Ipad 2/3/4 Case, Kidspr Ipad Case *New* *Hot* Super Protect [Shockproof] [Rainproof] [Sandproof] with Built-in Screen Protector for Apple Ipad 2/3/4 (Black/Red)
Held up great after dozens of washes, still fits perfectly.

This is a good shifter romance, with a likeable couple that you want to get their HEA. It is a quick read, just over 70 pages, but the characters are well developed for such a short story. If you are looking for a quick, sweet, and sexy shifter romance, this is a good one.
Works, and for cheap memory works well. Used in a test ESXI box hosting 3 windows server VMs and a pfsense box. No issues so far, 3 months of use.

Arrived two days early in solid packaging with no damage. Pulled it out and the build quality immediately felt premium. Sound is great right away, though I haven't dug into the settings yet. Pretty happy so far.

However with this hood I can, most of the time, just use the camera and the shade this hood provides. Arrived in a smashed box but shoes look decent. Fit seems okay so far.
the shoe is larger then the ones I currently have.

I tried them out anyway and the sound is okay but nothing special for what they cost. The cord is weirdly uneven, one side is way longer than the other, which felt strange right away. The ear tips have a cheap rubbery feel and none of them really sealed well in my ears. There was also a weird chemical smell coming off the cable straight out of the package. Get this for the wand alone. The crown is a complete disappointment overall. Its far too small and you can definitely tell its just a cheap plastic crown. If you can find the crown in metal that is also sold on Amazon, go with that instead.
I read dozens of books in 2016. I am a huge fan of this book. This was by far my favorite book of the year!

I literally binge-read this entire collection in one weekend. Each couple brings something totally different, the banter is top-notch and the emotional moments actually hit hard without feeling forced. If you're into sports romance with heat and heart, this is absolutely your jam. I'd highly recommend it to anyone who loves Samantha Young's style or just wants characters that feel like real friends by the end. Already planning a re-read. Grab the whole set, trust me.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little adapter blows away my old one. Getting consistent 700+ Mbps across the house. Super impressed.

I've had these running in my floor lamp for over a year now, roughly six hours every evening, and not a single one has burned out or flickered. The silver top directs all the light upward perfectly for my reading nook. Dropped one on the tile while installing and it survived without a scratch. Way tougher than the generic bulbs I was replacing every few months. Glad I stocked up.
There was a nail protruding up from the heel that was very uncomfortable to walk on. I should have sent them back.
Bought this for my parents' living room and it's perfect. Great sound for movies, easy setup, and the wireless sub adds solid bass. Highly recommend for anyone wanting a simple audio upgrade.
Arrived next day in protective wrap, no bent corners. Cracked it open immediately and the opening chapter grabbed me. Total page-turner so far!

I went into this with pretty high expectations since I loved her previous work, and honestly I was a little worried it couldn't live up to the hype. Boy was I wrong. This might actually be my favorite thing she's written yet. The pacing is tighter than her earlier stuff, and the emotional depth caught me off guard, I found myself rereading certain passages just to soak them in again. What surprised me most was how she managed to keep me guessing. Usually I can figure out where a story is heading by the halfway point, but this one kept pulling the rug out in the best way. If you're already a fan, you'll love it. If you're new to her books, this is a fantastic place to start. Couldn't put it down.
Thought this would be another flimsy pad but it's actually super sturdy. Even my big Maine Coon can't tip it over.
I'm happy with the product size, weight and accessories but be mindful, the output flow is only 400 milliliter per minute which is a little under 16 ounces.

I've been hooked on this series from the start, and Six and Mei-Li's story totally delivered. The dream connection concept is really cool and adds a unique layer to their romance. Plenty of tension and some genuinely surprising twists kept me turning pages way too late. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who enjoys sci-fi romance with strong world-building and steamy chemistry between the leads.
Compact size fits perfectly in my carry-on. Wish the cable was a bit longer though.
Arrived quickly in a sturdy box with no damage. Set it up in minutes and the material feels solid. Took a minute to get both leashes adjusted right, but works well so far.
These are fun, colorful, and sturdy. They have shown no signs of wear or soiling after months of daily use. Fits my Fitbit One perfectly.
Worked great! The dog stopped barking and its own shadow.

I love this thing. I have had it for six months now and it makes doing laundry so much easier. It is attractive, made of quality materials, and the bags are just the right size for a complete load without overstuffing the washer. The basket rolls easily, is sturdy, and I appreciate the rubber end caps on the hooks of the bags that hold them on the rails. Also the bags are a material that does not take up odors or dirt easily, when stinky laundry is removed from the basket to be washed the smell doesn't stick around.

Cathy Johnson was busy helping out the family restaurant and trying out new things to add to the menu to think about the TV production that is coming to their small town in Virginia. The whole town seemed to be pretty much excited except her. Her heart has been broken by her high school sweetheart, a relationship that ended in a disaster. The last thing she needs was to become star struck. Until she crossed path with the sexy and charming Greg Moran who arrives in Dogwood together with the rest of the cast and crew of Bittersweet. They had this crazy connection together, but if Cathy was careful to get her emotions in tangle, Greg can be pretty much fickle minded. He can be all in, and then all of a sudden, he was nowhere in sight. He can be interested now, and then appear disinterested the next time. He had some secrets of his own, that I wanted to know. I would have loved it more if he gets his own POV. But I was stuck with Cathy, and her thoughts weren't that bad. There were a lot of bumps before their happy ever after and there were times when youd just wanted to ask Greg if he really wants Cathy, or if both of them wanted this to work There were times when I got frustrated with the hot-then-cold Greg just about everything seems to be perfect, suddenly theyd be back to square one, but still I found this book romantic and endearing. I love Cathy, and her friend Max and Hal they were a great bunch, and both of her friends are there to catch her every time she falls. Greg was hard to love, but you couldn't resist his charms, so please don't blame Cathy. This is my first Sunday James read, and it was okay. I look forward for the next book in the series and cant wait to read whats next for this two!

Beyond Repair by Susie Tate is a fun book to read. Ms Tate had me laughing from start to finish. This book is well written with amazing characters. There's plenty of drama and just a hint of heat in Sam and Katie's story. The best part of this book is the humor. Beyond Repair is a complete book, not a cliff-hanger. I enjoyed this book and when I post this review to Amazon I'll be purchasing Goodnight next.
Bought this for my niece months ago and it's still holding up great after being tossed in backpacks and read dozens of times. Pages haven't torn and the binding is solid. Great purchase.

Got my copy in record time, shipped in a padded mailer so the corners weren't banged up at all, which I always stress about with paperbacks. Cracked it open the second I pulled it out of the mailbox and basically didn't move from my porch chair for an hour. The cover is even prettier in person, nice matte finish with that subtle texture. First few chapters had me hooked immediately, Molly's voice is so sharp and real, and the tension between her and Silas builds in a way that makes you want to ration the pages but also devour them all at once. Sierra Simone knows exactly what she's doing. Already lent it to my sister but kind of want it back.

I've had this on my Kindle for about eight months now and reread it probably four times. It holds up perfectly every single time. The story doesn't get stale and the characters feel like old friends at this point. Even after bouncing between devices and a couple updates, the formatting stays clean with no weird glitches. A short read but totally worth keeping in your permanent rotation. Grabbed it on a whim and never looked back.
Arrived fast with no damage to the cover. Started reading right away and the story hooked me pretty quickly. Austin is definitely book boyfriend material.

So how have I made it this far in life without reading this book? After finally taking the opportunity to finish it, I wonder how I made it through high school and through a Political Science degree without having read Nineteen Eighty-Four. I chose to purchase this book on audio and loved the narration. I felt as if I could feel Winston's thoughts as he made a journey to question the life that he was living and question "the party." This book reaffirmed my love for the freedoms that I enjoy in so many different ways - the freedom to love, to travel, to have a family and friends, to ask questions, to write and acknowledge my feelings, to READ! This world that Orwell created, and described in such realistic detail, was a nightmare and was in such contradiction to the democratic freedoms that I know. I think that what struck me the most was the love affair that Winston shared with Julia. That it was forbidden was horrible, but the lengths that they had to go to be together and to hide their relationship was astounding. Winston risked everything to trust Julia, and he did so with full force, with everything that he had. The optimist in me hoped for an overthrow of this world that was described in Nineteen Eighty-Four. I wanted the characters to experience the world that I live in, because the alternative that was presented was so unspeakable. This novel was amazing for its ability to make me appreciate what I have, to describe something so very opposite to what I know. I hope that everyone has an opportunity to read it and is able to appreciate their reality just a little more, because they have received a little glimpse of Orwell's alternative.
Expected more versatility for the price. Works fine on standard nuts but struggles with anything oversized. Build feels solid enough, just wish the jaw opening was wider. Decent but not great.

Picked this up after a friend recommended Shinn's Twelve Houses series, and overall I'm glad I did. The worldbuilding is the real standout here, she creates a society that feels familiar but definitely its own thing, and I loved how the language shifts suggest centuries of drift from old Earth cultures. That said, the Moonchildren concept felt underdeveloped. They're referenced constantly and clearly important to the plot, but I never fully understood their origins or how their abilities actually worked. A few more paragraphs of exposition would've gone a long way. The romance subplot was satisfying without taking over the story, and the pacing kept me turning pages. Not my favorite fantasy read this year, but solid enough that I'll definitely check out more of her backlist.
We had our pup on Purina Puppy Complete and he wasn't really eating it - we switched to this and he now can't wait to eat his meals. It has been great for us!

Arrived two days early in a sturdy little box, no damage at all. Slipped it out and was surprised by how solid it feels, not flimsy like I expected for the price. Buttons have a nice click to them and the display is bright and easy to read. Already used it twice today for my coffee breaks and a load of laundry. Great little timer for the money.
Been using this constantly for six months and it's still going strong. Worth every penny.

Ordered the Blu-ray version and it arrived two days earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. The case was in a cardboard slipcover with no cracks or dents, always a win. Disc played perfectly with no skipping. As for the movie itself, I went in not expecting much. The cast is solid and there are some genuinely funny moments scattered throughout. McCarthy tones it down compared to her usual over-the-top roles, which honestly works better here. Jason Statham is hilarious playing against type. The plot gets a little ridiculous in the second half and some jokes fall flat, but overall it kept me entertained the whole way through. Not a cinematic masterpiece but a fun watch for a lazy weekend. Glad I added it to the collection.

I purchased this tub set for my 4 year old niece who loves puzzles. With all of the different shapes and building possibilities, I know she will have a lot of fun with it. I did not get this set for my nephew who doesn't like putting things together, so you have to just keep in mind the personality of the kid you are getting it for. I am excited to hear how she likes this, and know that the possibilities are endless.

I've had this on my Kindle for about six months now and reread it multiple times. The formatting holds up perfectly across devices and the bookmarking never glitches even with heavy use. The story itself grabs you from page one and doesn't let go. Dark, twisted, and impossible to put down. Still works flawlessly after dozens of opens. If you like your reads gritty and boundary-pushing, this one's built to last in your collection.
Love this poop bag holder. Wasnt sure I would really use it but i do all the time
Been using this daily for eight months now, still works perfectly. Brews a great cup every time.

Got these for my two Scentsy plug-in warmers after the original bulbs finally burned out. Was skeptical at first because the price for six bulbs was less than what I'd pay for two locally, but figured I'd take the chance. Really glad I did. Every single one worked right out of the box, and they're just as bright and warm as the originals. They melt my wax cubes at the same speed with no issues. The individual bubble wrap packaging is a nice touch since I only need replacements every few months and the spares just live in my utility closet. At this price point, I'll never bother hunting these down at the store again. Already planning to grab another pack.

My husband and I listened to this on audio during a road trip and we were both cracking up the entire drive. The narrator really nails the comedic timing, which made all the difference. Some parts had me laughing so hard I had to replay them. It's spot-on about how men and women approach relationships completely differently. Short, punchy, and absolutely worth picking up if you need a good laugh.
This was purchased for a Christmass gift. One of many gifts for my sons garage. Safety is important.
Gift for a belated baptism (3 year old). This is a perfect size for her and know she'll enjoy it.

I honestly didn't expect much when I bought this based on the box art alone, but wow, it completely blew me away. Most family games we've tried get stale after two or three rounds, but this one has real staying power. The mechanics are deeper than I anticipated, there's actual strategy involved instead of just rolling and moving. That said, it took us a solid first game to wrap our heads around the rules, and the rulebook could definitely be clearer. Once it clicked though, everyone was hooked. My 9-year-old figured it out faster than my husband did, which was pretty funny. We've played it four weekends in a row now and it hasn't gotten old yet. Way better than the price suggests.

Was hesitant to spend this much on a blender but honestly it's worth every penny and then some. I priced out those fancy name brands and they were double or triple what this costs for basically the same results. This thing powers through frozen fruit, ice, even kale like it's nothing. No stopping to scrape down the sides or pulsing forever hoping the chunks break down. Cleanup is quick too which matters when you're making smoothies every morning before work. The pitcher is a good size for my family of four and the build quality feels solid, not cheap. I've had it about three months now with zero issues. If you're on the fence about the price, just go for it. You're getting pro-level performance without the ridiculous markup.

Loved catching up with Knighthorse in this quick read. I bought this months ago and have reread it at least five times on my Kindle since then. The formatting still holds up perfectly after all those opens. Great little story that keeps me entertained every single time.
Can get them at the local dollar store for less. I could not tell a difference in the quality.

Didn't expect much when I grabbed this on a whim but ended up reading it in two sittings. The whole concept of drift bottles sounds niche, yet the author makes it genuinely gripping. Some of the finder stories are honestly unbelievable, and the science bits about current tracking are woven in without getting dry. Perfect lazy weekend read if you want something a bit different from your usual fiction. Even my partner kept asking me to read passages out loud. Glad I took a chance on this one.

Received shoe rack in a reasonable amount of time. Assembly is easy enough (15-20 minutes). Shoe rack is stable. The finish of the metal tubing is nice aesthetically. The plastic connectors work well, but look a bit cheap and may also remind you of children's connecter toys. My biggest issue with the rack itself is the shelving material. It resembles black weed control paper you'd put under mulch, with a thin plastic layer on top. Will it hold shoes and be pretty easy to clean, yes I think so. Is it a durable material....No. If you think this rack will receive any amount of abuse or rough handling, I might look elsewhere. Now to the sellers service: My rack was missing four tubes needed to complete assembly. I contacted the seller and the following was our (abridged) discourse. Seller:. Can you please take a picture of missing pieces and send (via email) so we can verify what is needed. Me: Pictures sent Seller: These components are out of stock. Can you buy them elsewhere and we will reimburse you? Me: That is unacceptable. You are the manufacturer of these components. Open another box if need be, and please send me what is needed to complete the shoe rack you sold me. Seller: components are out of stock, we are issuing you a refund. Ultimately, I felt like they were trying to get me to drop my request by making things less straight forward than they should have been, but I don't know that for sure, and I do appreciate that in the end they rectified the situation. Take this for what it's worth. It's a utility shoe rack and the seller is responsive and NOT in the business of cheating customers.
Fits my 140 pound German Shepherd, not an easy thing to do.
Got this for my grandson's birthday and he had a blast putting it together. Perfect gift for any creative kid who likes hands-on projects.

Besides Mrs Doubtfire [Blu-ray] this is probably Robin Williams best works. I was so happy to finally have it on Blu-Ray. I have fond memories of watching it as a child and I am glad to have it now so I can watch it whenever I want!

Got this for my dog's third birthday and the prep couldn't be simpler, just mix in water and egg and you're good to go. The batter smelled decent and it baked up fine in a standard loaf pan at 350. My golden retriever loved it, no question there. But here's the thing, I stored the leftover cake in an airtight container in the fridge and by day two it had basically turned to mush. The texture completely broke down, got really crumbly and wet. Not something you can frost ahead or keep around for more than one sitting. For a one-time celebration it does the job and the ingredients are solid, but don't expect it to hold up like normal treats would.
Way larger than the pictures suggest. Doesn't fit standard cat food cans at all.

If you know someone who loves awkward, cringe-inducing humor, this is the perfect gift. I bought this for my brother who normally only watches action movies and he binged the whole thing in a weekend. The writing is incredibly sharp and every episode lands. The situations Larry gets himself into are unbelievably funny and relatable in the worst way. Highly recommend it to anyone who enjoys smart comedy where nothing ever goes right for the main character.

Worst litter I've ever bought and I've tried a lot of brands. The dust is unreal. When I poured it into the box, a huge cloud filled the room and my poor cat started coughing. I checked on her a few minutes later and her paws were completely coated in fine powder, which she then tracked all over the apartment. The clumping aspect is a joke too. Instead of forming solid balls, it just turns into this weird paste that sticks to the bottom of the pan like cement. I had to literally scrape it off with a metal spatula. Ended up throwing out the whole box and starting fresh with our old brand. Total waste of money. Do your lungs and your cat a favor and skip this one.
Very comfortable! I have other Skechers with memory foam - you can't beat it!
Got this for my daughter's birthday and we've already watched it three times. The story is heartwarming and the animation holds up beautifully. Whole family enjoyed it.
Grabbed this on a Kindle deal and totally got my money's worth. Ashley's pacing hooked me right away and I finished it over the weekend. Solid entertainment for under three bucks.
Installed this on my ceiling fan over a year ago. Still works great, no flickering or issues. Solid build and bright enough for the whole room.

Ordered this on a Sunday night and it showed up Tuesday morning in a sealed retail box inside a padded mailer, no crushed corners or leaking tubes. Each applicator was individually sealed and the expiration date gives me almost two full years, which is reassuring. Squeezed the first dose on my beagle's shoulders last night and the liquid dispersed quickly without leaving that greasy stripe down her back like the pet store brand did. No strong chemical odor either, which I appreciate. Too early to judge effectiveness but I checked her this morning and zero fleas so far. For the price compared to what the vet charges, the packaging quality alone convinced me this is the real deal. Will update if anything changes but very satisfied with the purchase.
Been wearing this nonstop for three months now and it's held up perfectly. No shrinking, fading, or loose seams. Super breathable too. Really impressed.
Love the Scottish series, men were men and oh what men!
Love how this brews a perfect pot every single morning. So easy!

I purchased two of these last year, and they are both running well. At the time, I did not realize that "80 plus" meant anything, but it does. I learned about it while reading Green Tech: How to Plan and Implement Sustainable IT Solutions. Per Wiki, "it certifies products that have more than 80% energy efficiency". So I've been saving energy as well. Good product.

The plastic is of very low quality. I mounted the mirror, and rode my bike to the store. When I got there, I noticed the mirror had moved out of position. I thought maybe I hadn't tightened it enough, but when I took a closer look, I could see the plastic had cracked all the way through the support arm. I let the 4 1/2 star review trick me! This is a very low quality product.
Box arrived a little dented but everything inside was fine. Took maybe 20 minutes to build. My daughter hopped right on and hasn't stopped since.

Got this for layering during fall and it's perfect. The quality is way better than I expected for the price. Runs a little big so size down. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting a versatile everyday vest that goes with everything.

I rarely write reviews, but I found this book to be wonderful. It was sad and funny. Although the review I read in a magazine said that the grief felt by the parents for their son was incidental to the funny situations was not correct. I thought the grief the parents felt permeated the book. As a parent, I keenly identified with their shattered lives. The thing I liked best about this book was the gentle and forgiving way the characters were written. Although they were ordinary and had many flaws, the author treated them all with dignity and respect. Often writers who portray "ordinary" characters make them seem pathetic and/or ridiculous. Stuart did not demean them for their ordinariness. The characters were real, and I could identify with them because of their faults. I laughed and cried, which is a cliche, I know, but in any event, it was a wonderful book.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price of three grooming tools, figured they'd be flimsy or cheaply made. Boy was I wrong. These are surprisingly solid with a nice weight to them. The rubberized grip actually makes a huge difference when my Husky decides it's time to wiggle around mid-brush. The deshedding tool pulls out an insane amount of fur compared to my old name brand one that cost double what this whole set runs. Slicker brush is gentle enough for around the face too. Way beyond what I anticipated for the cost.

We did receive this product for review. After receiving our "Jungle Crew Lab Set", we couldn't wait to start our experiments! At first glance, the lab set is adorable. The bright colors and fun jungle animal theme are attractive to my 6-year olds eye. The 6-piece set includes all plastic and rubber pieces, which makes this incredibly kid-friendly. Not to mention the easy-to-use test tubes include easy-to-poor tops that make it effortless to combine liquids. Also included is activity cards. The most appealing part of the set is that all activities use household and basic craft items. This leaves hours of keeping my 6-year-old occupied and interested in learning! He is thrilled to have his own lab set that we can use over and over.

I was hoping for a story for Adam and Cullen, and I got one this is a really good book. The only part I did not like, is the sex outside in front of everybody I just think that's something that should be private.

I picked this up after watching the classic film adaptation and honestly expected a bit more depth. The book is surprisingly slim, you can finish it in one sitting, which is both a plus and a minus. Hilton's writing is warm and gently paced, but I kept waiting for a bigger emotional payoff that never quite landed for me. Chipping is a charming character, but he feels more like a sketch than a fully realized person. The boarding school setting is nostalgic and well-drawn, though some passages read as overly sentimental by modern standards. It's a pleasant, quiet read, but I don't think it lingers the way the movie did. Decent enough for a rainy afternoon, but not the tearjerker I'd been promised.

Funny, but I don't recall the other book leaving out this much information, but then again it was this time last year that I was reading it so maybe my memory's not so fresh. This book is good, but one thing that threw me off was the passage of time; there was no indication of it. "2 weeks later" "6 months later" these are only 3 word phrases, it wouldn't take much to add them. But one minute it was Christmas, then after a separator in the middle of the page - which usually indicates a scene change - it's spring break, then next thing you know it's Thanksgiving. One of the reasons this is a problem is right before the page separator, Adam and JJ were saying they needed to discuss something important, and then after the separator, not only has it been discussed, but the process has been put in motion and they're almost completely done with it. No build-up or anything. This happened several times, which left me scratching my head and wondering "well, what happened in between?" I was glad that they were able to help provide a safe place for Thad, but what happened when they went to talk to his parents? Was there no argument or backlash at all? No obstacles in their way? And how did they decide to get legal guardianship? And why was the situation with Andrea helping out Adam and JJ handled like it was no big deal, just every day happenstance? And what happened with Grace Griffin? And this may be minor, but how on Earth did Thad get a new love interest before Adam's brother, Matt? Too many questions. However, these things are not guaranteed to keep me from reading more by this author, because his books have sweet story lines with very little angst.

Been using this lens attachment on my phone for about six months now and it still looks brand new. Dropped it twice on pavement and no scratches or alignment issues. Photos stay crisp every time. The threads haven't stripped at all either.

These slippers are SO comfortable. If you don't care too much about color click around to see if your size is cheaper in another color. I had originally wanted the light brown color but these were only $70 in the raspberry! So the choice was pretty easy then.
Pleasers are always the best, they fit perfect. I do reccomend if you are a size 8 1/2 to go with a size 8 in pleasers, their shoes do run a little big.
Not great for liquids but perfect for dry pantry storage. I'd recommend these to anyone organizing snacks, pasta, or cereal.
Had this hooked up to my living room setup for about eight months now and it's taken a beating. Switches between my PC and console without issues. Wish the remote was backlit though.
For a few bucks these are worth every penny. Both my kitties go crazy batting them around and pouncing. Cheap entertainment that lasts.

I followed the washing instructions exactly, these sheets made a million fuzzy balls that get all over the bedroom. So, I thought to wash them again and hopefully be rid of the fuzz balls - nope, didn't help. Trashed em and went to Costco, bought a set I am delighted with.

Knockout E. S. did exactly what it was advertised as doing! I was a little (okay, more than a little) skeptical that this product could kill all active flea infestations and keep any infestation from developing for seven months, but it delivered on every promise. I will definately be purchasing this product again next spring/summer as a preventative measure before the fleas have a chance to "drive us all crazy". THANK YOU VIRBAC KNOCKOUT E. S.
Really enjoyed the cinematography in this one. The lighting during the night scenes was gorgeous and added so much atmosphere. Story was decent but a little slow in the middle.

Got these for trimming around my doodle's eyes and paws. For the price, you really can't beat it. Cuts clean without pulling and the rounded ends give me peace of mind when she wiggles. Comfortable grip too. Highly recommend for any pet owner on a budget.
Did a 'kayamping' trip, took this along and had privacy for side of the river stops. It folds up great and flat, stored out of the way.

What really stuck with me was the cinematography during the trench scenes. You genuinely feel like you're right there in the mud alongside the soldiers instead of watching from a comfortable distance. The way they shot the letter-writing sequences back and forth between the front lines and the homefront really tied everything together beautifully. My wife and I watched it over two nights because we needed time to process everything. The acting across the board is solid but the lead absolutely carries the emotional weight of the story. If you have any interest in historical dramas at all, this one deserves a spot in your collection. Glad I picked up the Blu-ray instead of just streaming it.
alot of snaps to attach...does the job once buttoned up...

I though this was just a box of random legos, to my surprise there was a book with directions and or pictures to build several things including a lighthouse, store, flowers, pencil, eraser, car, sheep, donkey and a few others all within this block set. Not easy for a toddler or young child to do alone if you want to make the items pictured. But for freestyle building my 3 year old was fine. Nice set would buy again.

I gave the book two stars because at least the author tried to teach the reader about wool and spinning, but that's about the only entertainment value I could find. I couldn't get into the book. I just couldn't find the rhythm or flow anywhere. The writing style is very juvenile and just odd. I couldn't finish the book but at 35% I couldn't invest anymore time. Here's some text from the last page I read so you might understand what I mean. "Slowly, the lid to the trunk creaked open and just like he knew, Henry emerged from the chest.

Amazon saved me a bunch of money on this terrific radar detector. It will drive you crazy with false alerts unless you disable "POP Mode". Once POP Mode is turned off it stops falsing and it works as well as those $300 dollar (and higher) models. I have been using it for a while now and it has saved me from many unpleasant experiences. If you are looking for top of the line detection at under 200 bucks then this is your unit. Take a look on-line and you will find that this baby has detection capability that rivals the heavy hitters (BEL and Escort).

These wire looms are super easy to bend around tight corners without kinking. Used them to clean up my engine bay and the install took maybe twenty minutes. The plastic feels durable and holds its shape once positioned. Way better than the stiff stuff I bought at the auto parts store last year.
Got these for my garden path and they do the job great. Super affordable and surprisingly bright for how cheap they are. Definitely worth every penny.

Honestly didn't think much of this when I ordered it, just needed something cheap to keep on the counter. Figured it'd be flimsy or leak around the spout based on the price. Boy was I wrong. This thing is solid. The steel has a nice weight to it and the pour is actually controlled, not a gluggy mess like my old bottle. I've been using it for about three weeks now with avocado oil and zero drips down the side. Holds a surprising amount too, I expected to be refilling it constantly but it's barely gone down. Cleans easy, looks way more expensive than it was, and doesn't take up half my counter. Already thinking about grabbing a second one for vinegar.

As long as you have an idea of what size Skechers you wear, I would say that these are in the same size range. They are very cute and comfortable, which is what you would expect in a Skechers shoe. I wanted the red striped ones, but those were sold out.

My Savannah mix doesn't like to take time to eat. She does like to drink, though, so she eats the dehydrated without rehydration then drinks loads of water. Not the prescribed way to eat, but it works for her. I can also sneak it into my mom's underweight cat's wet food to beef up his caloric intake. My other cats ate the frozen raw version, which they loved, but these two don't like the raw so dehydrated it is. Please make sure your cat get enough water if you offer it dry. It's not the intended way to serve.
Expected much better quality for the price. Mine arrived with a lopsided lid and uneven edges everywhere.
I use one of the u3 hv boards as the cornerstone of my Home automation system. http://www. instructables.
Actually, I liked the movie. It's hokey and fun and clean. Makes sense to me.

I love when a beautiful love story comes from a man's mind...and Jeremy Asher is one of the best in my opinion. All of his books draw you in and make you a part of the characters' lives. When one story ends, it never really ends. You have to find out what happens in the next chapter of their lives. He has a way of drawing you in, not just into the women's minds but the men's minds also. I love his work and am looking forward to the one I just bought today. Thanks for a beautiful read. I definitely recommend this one!

Ordered this on a Sunday and it arrived by Wednesday in a sturdy little box with no damage at all. Honestly didn't expect much for the price but the build quality is surprisingly solid. It has some weight to it and doesn't feel flimsy like the cheap plastic ones I've seen at record stores. Popped it onto my turntable spindle and it sat perfectly flat right away. Already played through a stack of my old 45s with zero wobble. Super happy with this purchase.

Glad I bought it, perfect for around the house, would not use it on a construction site though, as it is a little light weight. But it all works fine. Drill has nice feel to it and saw plows thru wood with ease
I'm a Christian romance fan, so I loved the sweetness of this story - enough that I purchased all three books in the series.
Finally a Calvin Klein polo for big men. Nice fit.

I thought they would be made out of wood like they used to be. I was sad to see they are made from some kind of rubber. They're still very nice and comfortable. The latch on mine is functional, not Velcro, as others have stated here, and I'm happy about that.
my cat loves it. but for the price, the quantity is very less. hence feels expensive product.

These are the perfect size for my Chihuahua puppy! She loves that they're extra bouncy. They are about the same size as a KONG Air Dog ball in a size small. These do not squeak, but it's okay because my pup loves to dig the squeakers out of the squeaky ones. Overall, great product and will probably order again when we lose this batch to the mud or the dog park!

You're little one will probably want this regardless, but note that for the price, this is more of an accessory rather than a pony play house. There aren't any places to really play inside - it's more about playing dressup with the included pony, which includes shoes, skirt, crown. The set assembles fairly easily and for the most part stays together. We use it more as a decoration to store her ponies on the shelf nicely. Since it is so flat, the ponies can go in front of it. The 'bridge' stays down without the other palace playset and is unusable - kind of silly not to have it at least be a ramp up.

The original edition of 'Leaves of Grass' published in 1855 contained twelve poems only. The subsequent editions beginning in 1856 were to greatly expand the work. Thus I would recommed that anyone who wishes to know the true range of Whitman's work find another selection of his work of which there is a larger share of his great work. Whitman is the poet who Emerson prophesied, the American visionary poet who sang of the complex greatness of the society, and connected his own soul with its expansive facts of life.

To be fair, I need to say my daughter does really enjoy this, however, I am very unhappy. We have owned it for just over 1 year and the net as well as the padding is COMPLETELY falling apart!!! I contacted the company and they told me I can buy a replacement but there is only a 90 day warranty. We payed close to $200 for this little trampoline and feel like it should last longer than a year. I personally can't recommend it.
Nice and bright when in spot mode, but still has those wide angle LEDs for basic work around camp. Overall good light.
Funny read but the Kindle formatting got glitchy after months of rereading. Still chuckle at parts though.
I love this mouse... took a bit of time to get use to it (different hand position than any other mouse I've used... but boy is it comfortable.

I now have four out of the five colors these pants come in, and I'll buy the fifth (white) during the next sale. Just great pants. I have a dozen and a half linen garments - shirts, T's, pants, shorts - and these are my favorites. Great material, great cut, and I even like this color. I'd read a contrary review on the darker of the tan shades, but this is nicer than the lighter of the two browns. I wish they came in even more colors; I'd buy them.
Honestly exceeded my expectations. Holds way more than it looks like it would. Super happy with this purchase.

I've had this paperback for about two years now and it's been passed around my whole book club. The spine is still holding up great despite being read at least six times. Susan Mallery really nails small town romance and Angel's story grabbed me from page one. The chemistry between him and Taryn feels genuine, not forced like some romance novels. I packed it in my beach bag last summer and even with sand and sunscreen abuse the pages stayed intact. Definitely worth picking up if you want something that lasts through multiple rereads.
Surprisingly decent for the price. Wore them all day with minimal rubbing. Not premium but solid budget sandals.

Picked this up to go under my benchtop planer and honestly for the money I don't think you can beat it. A lot of stands in this price range feel wobbly or use thin metal, but this thing is solid. The legs are heavy gauge and once you bolt it down it doesn't budge even when running wide hardwood through. Assembly took maybe 25 minutes and the hardware was all there, which is a nice change. The height is comfortable for feeding boards without straining your back. My only minor gripe is the shelf is a bit high for storing larger items underneath, but for what I paid I'm not complaining. If you need a mobile base for a planer or drill press without spending crazy money, just buy it.

Got this on sale for under ten bucks and honestly it's worth every penny. The picture quality on the Blu-ray is surprisingly sharp for a film from 1960 - colors pop, especially Taylor's wardrobe and that iconic opening scene. Harvey plays the stuck-up socialite pretty convincingly, though some of the dialogue feels dated now. The storyline itself is a bit melodramatic and takes a while to really get going, but once it picks up it keeps you hooked. Wish there were more bonus features included - just a basic commentary and trailer. For the price though you're getting a solid classic film with decent restoration work. If you're into older Hollywood dramas this one belongs in your collection without breaking the bank.

Bought this for my husband who works outdoors and he absolutely loves it. The blade holds an edge through daily use and the handle feels solid in hand. Would highly recommend to anyone needing a reliable EDC knife, especially tradesmen or hikers. Worth every penny.
Perfect for DIYers. Great quality and works exactly as expected.
Arrived super fast in a nice box, looked great right out of the package.

These boys pajamas are great for my toddler son now that the summer heat is approaching us quickly. These pajamas are made of 100% cotton and wash nicely. They are not the softest pajamas I have purchased for him, but after a couple washes/dries they have already gained a more comfortable feel. They're nice and lightweight for the summer heat. I purchased size 3T for my 34", 30 pound 18 month old and they fit great with some room to grow in. He typically wears 2T-3T in clothing, so I'd say these are true to size. The shirt is long and narrow - it has a nice fit on my son. I like that this shirt is tag less - my kiddo often tugs at shirts with tags, as his skin is quite sensitive. The shorts come down to his knees and are a "fitted" style but a little loose on my boy. I like that in pjs - I feel that would be more comfortable during his sleep. My son enjoys wearing his new pjs and actually pulled them out of his pajama draw to wear when it was time to get ready for bed. He approves! I was fortunate to have received this product at a discounted price. All of the information provided and opinions and experiences expressed in this review are that of my own. I rely heavily on quality reviews when I choose products for myself and family. If you have any questions on this product, I would love to help. Please feel free to ask me. I hope this review has assisted in your decision making.

Usually, there's a point where a show can't get more complicated. That never seems to be true of this one. This season definitely had some unforeseen shocks and twists to keep the viewers wanting more. It set up the upcoming ending of the show every well. I'll be anxious to see what the writers think up next.
Swapped out the old sensor on my motion light and this one fired right up. The dual-bright dimming mode works awesome. Super happy with how it performs.

Book arrived with a bent cover and the spine already cracked. Whoever packed it just tossed it in a flimsy envelope with zero protection. Flipped through the first few pages and honestly the writing is painfully bad, clunky dialogue and no real hook. Didn't even bother reading past chapter two. Returning it today. Don't waste your money on this mess.

I've been following this series since the beginning and couldn't wait for this installment. The pacing felt off compared to earlier entries, some scenes dragged on forever while major plot points got wrapped up too quickly. That said, the character development is still top notch. I'd recommend this to anyone already invested in the series, but newcomers should absolutely start from book one or they'll be completely lost. Hoping the next one finds better balance.
Bought this for my daughter's first birthday. The light-up keys are a huge hit and keep her giggling every time she presses one. Solid build too!
A very brief slice of life, a lot missing in terms of background to explain motivations but still worth watching.

This case has saved my phone many times over the (approx) 2 years I've had it. I'm not exactly a klutz, nor am I wreckless, but this has saved my phone from surprisingly bad accidents. Worth every cent I paid for it (which was much less than a phone insurance plan would have cost by now).
What a great little gadget for the indie filmmaker. This is the kind of assistance needed when out in the field.

I went in expecting a fairly standard mockumentary and ended up pleasantly surprised by how sharp the writing actually is. The fake interviews and behind-the-scenes moments land way better than most comedies in this vein. The cast fully commits to their roles, the lead singer in particular nails that perfect balance of delusion and sincerity. My only real complaint is the pacing drags slightly in the second act when the band goes on tour. A few scenes could've been trimmed. That said, the music itself is genuinely catchy, which says a lot about the production. I caught myself humming one of the songs the next day. Not a perfect film, but absolutely worth tracking down if you appreciate dry humor and music industry satire.
Got this for my son's birthday and honestly for the price you can't beat it. Fits snug, feels durable, and looks way more expensive than it was. Super happy with this purchase.

I've had this poetry collection on my Kindle for about eight months now, reading it constantly, and it still holds up great. No formatting glitches or download issues. The fantasy themes really grow on you. Totally worth keeping in your permanent library.
Great water filter. My ice maker made more clear ice than I'd even had before.

Happy that my daughter enjoyed these pretend play toys. But only things she keeps making the baby go potty which I have to order some soon. And it stick on right and fits doll great even up to 18inch dolls too
Arrived next day in sturdy packaging. Looks solid and well-built out of the box.
Very nice product just enough light for safety and it looks good
not perfect as a style, but the tech is good
Bought in 2002. still works great but if I had to buy again I'd go LED

I went in expecting the typical shifter romance but this actually surprised me. The world-building is more developed than most indie wolf packs I've read lately and Roman's situation pulls you in immediately. William as a mate is written well, not just the generic overprotective type. Their connection feels earned instead of rushed. My only complaint is the story ended way too fast and now I'm stuck waiting for the next part. Honestly way better than I anticipated for the price. Grab it if you like mpreg wolf stories.

This is a nice silicon mat, it helps minimize the damage my dog makes while eating or drinking. However, my puppy is a sloppy drinker and there is still plenty of water on the floor after he finishes drinking. The mat is easy to clean and holds up (so far) to my puppy's attempts to chew it up.

I was looking to add variety to my breakfast with egg, ham and English muffin sandwiches. I went for the silicon rings as I'd tried a metal egg ring my daughter loaned me and wasn't happy with it, size or clean up. These rings work GREAT! The are perfectly sized to make sandwiches using either English muffins or regular slices of bread. Cleanup is fast and easy unless you let them sit for a few hours (won't do that again) in which case it still takes minimal effort. Packaging was fine although when I first opened the box and packaging I noticed the rings didn't lay flat. However, the instructions say to let them sit 30 seconds on the hot pan which lets them flatten out. Had no issues with seepage. I also wasn't impressed with the suggestion to add some water and cover them while cooking, but I tried it and now do it every time. My only negative is the "Free Bonus" eBook which is essentially a poorly thrown together slide show with unimpressive links. As I didn't buy the rings for the free book, that didn't impact my rating. BTW, my daughter asked for the link so she could order a set.

Bought this for my 70lb shepherd mix who blew out her ACL last spring. Surgery was successful but she still hesitates jumping into my truck bed. The rubberized surface is what sold me and it genuinely works, even when wet. My dog doesn't slip at all and the grip gives her confidence to walk up without me needing to lift her back legs. The ramp itself is heavier than I expected, which is a double edged sword. It stays rock solid while she climbs but hauling it around gets old. I just leave it in the truck bed full time though so that solves that. Holds steady with zero bowing. Worth every penny if your dog has mobility issues.
Works perfectly. No danger of me cutting my hand with a knige trying to get out the inner seeded core.

Got this tank with the hair band as a little treat for myself and honestly I'm obsessed. The fabric is buttery soft and breathes really well in the heat. I grabbed a large after reading the sizing tips and it fits exactly how I wanted, slouchy and relaxed without looking like a sack. Washed it twice now and no shrinking or fading issues. The included hair band is actually decent quality too, not some flimsy afterthought. I've already worn this top like four times in two weeks. Threw it on over leggings for errands, dressed it up with jeans and sandals for dinner. Versatile and comfortable. My sister tried to steal it from my closet yesterday so I'm ordering her one. Highly recommend.

Been using this feeder for about eight months now through rain and heat, and it still looks brand new. Zero ants, and the sturdy plastic hasn't cracked or faded at all. Seriously impressed with the quality.

Bought this for my kid's birthday thinking it'd be kind of flimsy for the price, but it's actually held up pretty well. The controls aren't super responsive and it drains batteries fast, but way more durable than I expected.
I am a 36 dd typically. In my strapless I go down a cup to 36 d. This was a good idea in this one. Great fit.
Helps organize clothes very well. Zippers stick a bit because the material is so thin. Webbing helps see what is where.
Good collar, wide enough to prevent discomfort. Fit my heeler perfectly.

I was honestly shocked by how soft and stretchy this material is. I'm 5'4", around 160 lbs, and a 34C, and it fits like a glove. The ruching on the sides is my favorite part because it actually stays in place instead of riding up every time I move. I wore mine under a cardigan to work and then by itself for drinks after, and it held up great both ways. The v-neck sits perfectly, not too low that I'm tugging at it all day, but low enough to be flattering. My only tiny complaint is that the armholes are a bit snug, but nothing uncomfortable. Washed it on cold and hung it dry with zero shrinkage. Already ordered the black one. Definitely size-friendly if you're on the fence!
Slow but gets there; wish this story could be true somewhere- two main characters truly come across as made for each other- now that's hot.

I've worked with kids in and out of centers for 18 years, and the no-spill paint cup is a necessity. It cuts down on the clean up and inevitable spills associated with young ones learning to paint. Instead of hovering and saying "be careful!" all the time you can let their creativity flow. You can also leave the paint in and cover it for the next time.
I am 66 years old, and I LOVE this movie! Very inspirational in so many ways, and beautifully drawn, directed, acted, and executed. A good watch for any age.
Arrived two days early in a compact box with no weird chemical smell. Unfolded it and the material feels seriously durable. My lab immediately claimed it and passed out. Super impressed so far.

Smart, funny, awesome - you know, all the good stuff you want in a story. Loved the relationships between the characters and the sense of humor present even while trekking a truly touching story. Good stuff.
Not for me. Not a fan of this type of relationship. Could not finish.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging with no dents. Slid right into the box, flush against the wall. Super clean look for my entertainment setup.

Honestly picked this up thinking it would be another basic lifestyle guide with recycled advice, but it blew me away. The depth of research here is impressive without feeling like a textbook. I expected vague recommendations and instead got specific, actionable protocols backed by real science. The sections on metabolic health and brain function connected dots I hadn't seen other authors make. Already ordered a second copy for my dad. Way more comprehensive than I anticipated, easily worth twice the price.

Bought this for a weekend fishing trip and honestly couldn't be happier. I'm a bigger guy and was worried about it feeling flimsy, but it holds up great with zero wobbling. The seat padding is decent, sat in it for about six hours straight without any back pain. Love that the armrest has a built-in cooler, fit four cans no problem and they actually stayed cold. All the side pockets are handy for keeping tackle, sunscreen, and my phone within reach instead of digging through a bag. Folds up quick and slides right into the trunk with room to spare. For what I paid, I figured I'd be replacing it after one season, but it's held up through three trips now with no signs of wear. Definitely recommend.
I was able to upload photos on my laptop from my microchip. Pro: It's affordable, ANKER has the best customer service and 16-months warranty! Con: Make sure it's inserted in to read the card.

I got this item during a lightning deal. It is awesome!!!! The packaging, the quality, the instructions, I haven't a complaint. And it came with an extra shot glass as a free gift. It is really well made and the coffee is fantastic. I have made regular espresso and also Expresso Americano (add hot water to expresso) and they both turned out great. Haven't used it on milk yet but I plan to. I am very impressed by the company. They clearly take pride in their product. I told my mom about it and she was bummed that the price was higher than what I had paid. But I honestly think it is worth the price. I am no expresso expert but definitely a coffee snob. This makes a great cup and is fun to use. I would recommend this item.

This one sat on my shelf for months and I wish I'd opened it sooner. Helprin writes with this gorgeous, sweeping prose that just pulls you into Alessandro's world completely. The war sections are harrowing but what really got me was the quieter stuff, the romance, the grief, the small moments of grace. I'd hands-down recommend this to anyone who loves literary fiction with real emotional weight. Fans of All the Light We Cannot See or The English Patient will eat this up.

I picked this up on a whim and ended up finishing it in one sitting. The emotional opening hooked me right away, and watching the relationship develop felt genuine rather than rushed. The baby added such a sweet dynamic without being overdone. My only tiny complaint is that I wanted a longer epilogue because I wasn't ready to say goodbye to these characters. That said, the journey was worth every page. If you enjoy heartfelt romance with real stakes and characters who actually grow, this one delivers. Already recommending it to my book club.
Arrived fast and in sturdy packaging. Popped it in right away, great picture quality for a classic!
Bought this for a Halloween party and got tons of compliments. Fit runs slightly large which was nice for layering. Would definitely recommend to anyone needing a fun, low-effort costume.

so glad that so many books about the atrocities committed against Poles by the Soviets and Germans during WWII are available in English now. There were precious few available when I became interested in the subject back in the early 90's.
My husband and I love this - gives us so much room in the cabinet!!
My pup eats them without issue but I haven't noticed any real change in his energy or coat. They're just okay for the price.
I assumed purchasing this light that for the price it would burn out immediately. Not only has that not happened but I have owned it for over a year now and it is as good as new. Buy with confidence.

Works okay for basic desktop monitor setups but I ran into handshake problems connecting my Dell laptop to an older Vizio display. Build quality feels a little flimsy near the connectors too. I'd recommend this for simple office configurations, but skip it if you're trying to drive a home theater rig.

Got these for our patio setup and they've been great. The shorter profile actually makes them super stable on uneven surfaces like pool decks and picnic tables. No tipping over when someone bumps them. They hold ice well, dishwasher safe, and after three months of heavy summer use they still look brand new. Definitely recommend for outdoor entertaining.

All though the movie was not to great it wasn't aweful either. The 3 stooges are not really suited for a 2hr movie, but they 3 new stooges would be good doing TV remakes of the originals. In 10-20min sets. The Jersey bunch was funny but annoying as well, as is thier TV show. A Very slap stick comedy movie. But done okay, will I purchase it NO, but I may rent it again if the family wanted to see it. When you want silly comedy its a good one. Just don't expect to much depth to it.
Comfortable and cute! The wedge heel makes them easier to wear all day and the leather holds up great in the rain.

Product works Great!!! I seriously came home seeing a box and I was like, what the hell is this? Then after opening i couldn't believe this part was already at my door!! It was seriously there like 12 hours after i ordered it. Wicked Fast...
Wish they were a bit cheaper but otherwise these are the real deal! Hope they stay good till the zombie apocalypse! We will be getting more as the budget allows!

Ordered this Fintie case for my iPad Pro 12.9" and it arrived a day earlier than expected. Packaging was just a simple cardboard sleeve, no frills, but the case inside was in perfect condition. First thing I noticed pulling it out is how surprisingly lightweight it is compared to my old Logitech. The exterior has a nice matte feel that doesn't show fingerprints. Snapping the tablet in took a little firm pressure, which actually gave me confidence it's seated properly. All the port openings lined up right away, and the Apple Pencil charged fine with the case on. My only minor complaint so far is the front cover flap doesn't lay completely flat when folded back. Otherwise solid build for the price. Four stars.
This is a great little ball, and very soft and quiet.
