There is something to these Himalayan salt lamps. This is the second one I have purchased. When I purchased the first one, I wasn't expecting anything but a cute night light. We normally keep them on all day, until we go to bed. The first thing we noticed was that is seems to attract our pups. They've never tried to eat it or anything crazy. They just want to lay next to it, usually with their heads very close to it. Then I noticed my husband turned it on as soon as he got home every evening. He isn't into hokey gimmicks that may or may not have healing powers or whatever. I'm convinced that there is SOMETHING to this rock! We call them our Zen Rocks:) Maybe the amber glow is relaxing, maybe it's more. When they are not turned on, the pups don't spend much time on that side of our couch. When they aren't on, I keep thinking, I need to get off my lazy behind and turn them on, like they're calling for me;) I LOVE OUR ZEN ROCKS! In comparison with the other one I purchased, the color is pretty much the same. They both have a wood base and you insert the bulb into the bottom. They are both a bit oddly shaped and imperfect, which I love. This lamp doesn't have a simple on or off switch. You can turn it all the way on or only light it dimly. The reason I didn't give this lamp five stars is because it arrived in a squished box. I kept my finger crossed, but my heart sunk when I realized that the switch had a big crack in it. Luckily it works despite the crack. I wish it had been wrapped better.
Been using this on backpacking trips all season and it still looks brand new.
We purchased this with a kitchen set and very well together..

Bought this for my son's second birthday and it's been in heavy rotation for over eight months now. Honestly didn't expect the discs to survive this long given how rough he is with everything, but not a single scratch or skip yet. We keep them in a binder near the TV and he picks out episodes himself every morning. The content is genuinely solid, he's picked up counting and actually uses some of the Spanish words around the house, which caught me off guard. My only complaint is I've heard the songs so many times they're permanently stuck in my head. Worth every penny though. We've gotten way more mileage out of this than any streaming subscription, and it's nice having something that doesn't require wifi.
I have only used it one time but it worked great
Took this on a three-night backpacking trip and was surprised how well my back was supported. The textured top layer kept my sleeping bag from sliding around at night.
Noticed today top I'd bubbling up where a glass was set

Picked this up on a Kindle deal and honestly it was worth way more than what I paid. The story grabs you pretty quickly and the pacing stays solid throughout. I liked the mix of humor and tension, the author balances those tones well without it feeling forced. Some of the dialogue had me actually laughing out loud, especially the mirror scenes. My only minor complaint is that the middle section drags just a tiny bit before picking back up. For the price though, you really can't complain. I read it in about two days during my commute and lunch breaks. If you're on the fence about spending the money, just go for it. Definitely got my money's worth and already looking at what else this author has written.
It was great seeing the original version of this movie. I love the Del Toro remake and the elaborate house it is set in, but there is something really creepy about the original.

I love Emma Hart and her books so it wasn't a though decision whether to read this one or not. Especially after The Call series. And this prequel novella definitely didn't disappoint. It is so hot and steamy that it could easily melt your panties and it definitely got me craving getting my hands on the first book in the series. So if you liked The Call series you should definitely check this short read and get ready for Wild Temptation when it gets out;) Definitely a recommended read:)

For what these cost, I honestly wasn't expecting much. Figured it'd be a throwaway item that maybe lasts a month before something breaks. Surprisingly, it's held up pretty well so far. The plastic feels a little cheap and the seam where the two pieces come together isn't perfectly flush, but it hasn't popped open on me yet. I keep mine on my keychain and it's taken a fair amount of abuse being tossed around in my pocket every day. Battery life is decent, lasted about three weeks before I had to recharge. Range is okay, works from across the room but struggles once you go outside. Not gonna say it's perfect, but for the price you really can't complain. Gets the job done without breaking the bank.
This item came in perfect condition, and was just as described. My kids all fought over who was going to get to keep this one it's so cute.
Nice unit for the money. Easy to use on all the batteries it checks.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this ring completely blew me away. The sparkle is unreal and it looks way more expensive than it was. So happy.
Bought this for my niece six months ago and it's held up great through tons of wear. Still looks brand new.
Broghter than expected.. very nice will use it at work and home perfect size for your pocket..

I got this ball for our over 100lb German Shepherd that's ball crazy and these Chuckit Balls last him so long that these are the only balls that we buy for him. He loves them and the balls last him about 6 months. So that's money well spent! As long as Chuckit keeps making them we will continue to buy them.
Bought this for my team at work and everyone loved it. Perfect for managers or anyone working with international colleagues. Totally changed how I communicate.
Solid belt for the money. Stiff enough to support my sidearm without sagging. Stitching looks clean. Wish the buckle was a bit beefier but can't complain at this price.

Bought this little box about two years ago and it's been running basically nonstop since day one. My toddler has knocked it off the shelf more times than I can count and it still works perfectly. Streams everything smoothly, never overheats, remote still clicks like new. Honestly the most reliable piece of tech I own. Worth every penny and then some.
Beautiful picture! I like puzzles hard and this one fit the bill pretty much. Love Ravensburger puzzles and this wasn't a disappointment.

I used this to install a new crank set. This is big enough to allow me to get some torque on it to secure the external bearing BB. I didn't experience any slippage when torquing it down, but I can say if a person is not careful it could slip.

Arrived quickly in a sturdy tube so the wand wasn't bent at all. Both my kittens went absolutely crazy the second I took it out. Feels well-made and the string attachment seems like it'll hold up to rough play.

I bought these for a specific reason, I build and fly R/C model planes and I have an engine mount made of unobtainium with a steel 4-40 socket head cap screw broken off below the surface. The smallest one removed it easily saving me a lot of grief. Great addition to my toolbox.
This is a very nice pet bed. I bought it for my 10lb chihuahua and she just loves it. She loves playing in it.
Perfect for everyday wear if you like minimal jewelry. Mine arrived without backings, but they haven't slipped out. Great gift for teens.

I got this originally because I was into the Lorelei's Grasp based on reviews I read. I'd never seen a Naschy go this way or that way, and ended up watching Horror rises from the Tomb first and really dug it. If you're still harboring prejudice against Spanish horror films from the 70s based on the old bad dubbed VHS cropped dupe days, well, arise and be free. The film looks great and is full of wondrous stuff for Eurosleaze fans - a great mix of Gothic trappings, lurid horror and Naschy writing in scenes where he gets to paw his actresses' naked breasts every five minutes. Oh Paul, what are we going to do with you? Ironically I like it better thah Lorelei, the reason I bought the set! It can be frustrating: a slimy rubber glove claw hand is offing nubile babes at a boarding school, one by one, and all the local polizei (it's German) can do is treat the girls like idiots and send them back to their rooms, then shake their heads in disbelief when they're murdered two minutes later... "we did all we could". Some people like movies where cops are staking out a school being attacked nightly by a monster, and then one of the girls complains there's breathing in her room and the cops just think she's imagining it and then act surprised an hour later when she's dead -- oh those hysterical women! At least that's how I remember it. You get the idea though. Eventually there's a twisted dark reflection of THE LITTLE MERMAID's trans-species / terrain love affair and a cool underwater cavern lair.
Perfect for renters wanting a reliable disposal without spending a fortune.
Way better than I expected for the price. Dries super fast.
This is very nice. I like it a lot, and hope to wear it on occasion in the future. It would especially go with a red and black outfit, probably any tones of red. It stretches to fit.
Thought it would fold up quicker than it does. Works fine once set up but takes some fiddling.
Runs shorter than I expected and the torso feels weirdly small. Fabric is decent but the fit is just off for me.
Four books for this price? Solid deal on a fun series.
Not as good as Troy flip ups but what do you expect. I hate the rear small opening (dot). But that's just me. They work fine.

Didn't expect much going in but wow, this completely blew me away. The emotional walls the main character builds felt so real and relatable. Way steamier than I anticipated too. Picked it up on a whim and ended up finishing it in one sitting. Definitely buying whatever this author publishes next.

Excellent power strip that meets many needs. Specifically: Wide spacing between plugs with two extra wide transformer receptacle. Variety of USB power ports (2 ports for 2.4 A; 1 port for 1 A; and a auto regulating 0-2.4 A) Six foot cable is a convenient length for a power strip.
Fit is spot on and the material is super comfortable. Love it!

Works perfectly. My only qualm is that it has more ports than I need, but it was the best value of the options I reviewed so the extra ports don't bother me. Who knows, maybe I'll need them in the future - and not I have them just in case.

Bought this for a poodle skirt I made for my 9-year old. Very very nice. Just know that the picture indicates an extremely wide fluff. Because of it's soft nature, the fluff is a little more than half the photo width. But it was perfect for the poodle skirt...it probably wouldn't be stiff or poufy enough for a clog dancer outfit, for example.

I had high hopes for this litter mat based on the product photos, but honestly it falls way short of what's advertised. The honeycomb pockets are nowhere near deep enough to actually trap granules the way the listing suggests. My cat steps right over it and the litter just bounces off onto my floor anyway. For the price, I expected something a lot more heavy-duty. The material feels thin and flimsy, nothing like the thick, durable mat they make it out to be. I will say it's easy to shake clean and doesn't smell weird out of the package, so it's not completely useless. But if you're picturing the magic litter-catching solution from the photos, prepare to be underwhelmed. I've had cheaper mats that performed about the same.
Pretty good overall. My two cats finish their bowls every morning without issue. Wish the cans were a bit bigger for the price.

Recently we upgraded to this cable modem in order to satisfy Suddenlink's requirements for their unlimited internet service. The modem was relatively easy to set up and has performed as expected. We have a couple of laptops, two i-Phones, and two Roku receivers that access content through the modem. This is our second SURFboard modem and we have been happy with both.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but I've been pleasantly surprised. The wooden board feels solid and the laces are holding up way better than I anticipated. My almost three-year-old stays occupied for a good fifteen minutes before losing interest, which is more than I can say for most of his toys. My only real complaint is that there are only two laces included, we already lost one under the couch and now we're down to a single string. Would've gladly paid a couple bucks more for extras. The holes are spaced well for little hands and the wooden pieces don't have any rough edges. Better quality than the similar ones I've seen at craft stores. Just wish it came with a storage bag.
Great price for what you get. Installed it in my camper and it handles phone charging and 12V accessories without breaking a sweat. Solid little unit.
Got this on a Kindle deal so can't complain too much. The twist with the two exes caught me off guard but the middle dragged. Decent enough for what I paid.

Bought this for my apartment balcony since I work long hours and can't always take my pup downstairs. Honestly didn't expect much for the price but I'm genuinely impressed. The grass feels thick and realistic, not that cheap plastic-y stuff I've seen at pet stores. My terrier took to it right away with zero training needed. Drainage works well too, I just rinse it with the hose every few days and hang it over the railing to dry. No lingering smell so far after about six weeks of daily use. The backing seems durable and hasn't curled up at the edges like my last one did. For what I paid, this is an absolute steal. Already recommended it to two neighbors.
God's Name used in vain ruined it for me. Totally unnecessary that hollywood use our Lord's Name in vain.
Bought this two years ago and the disc still plays perfectly even after my kids watched it dozens of times. Hilarious movie.
My 9 year old golden moves around so much better on this stuff. Way cheaper here than at the vet's office too.

Paid over $300 for this cart and honestly it's not worth half that. The frame bends under my 40lb dog's weight, and the wheels wobble constantly. Straps are cheap nylon that frayed within a week. My vet said the angle is all wrong and could hurt her spine long-term. Tried emailing the seller twice about getting a refund or exchange, crickets. For this kind of money I expected something sturdy and adjustable, not a flimsy contraption that scares my dog every time I put it on her. Total waste.
Attractive and comfortable, but not enough room in the toe box to accomodate morton's neuroma. I typically wear a 9.5, a size 10 was ok with thick socks, 10.5 was definitely too big.

Good for labs, beagles...all furr kiddos with droopy ears. 7f you don't have this in your veterinary supply kit, you should. We got a new pup who kept scatching his ears, this sure soothed him until we got him cleated up.
I installed this LED light strip under the kitchen cabinet. Looks really cool and provides a nice glow.
Watched this five times now and the Blu-ray still plays flawlessly. Powerful story about the early AIDS crisis that holds up on repeat viewings. Glad I own it.
I want to join a MC club. I love this book
Cute design and decent materials, but they definitely need some breaking in. Fine for short outings, not all-day wear.
I bought a couple of the duvet covers and they are so nice, silky and soft.
Good grip on the handle, but the strap could be a bit longer.
Grabbed this for camping and it's been incredibly useful. Strong, holds up great in bad weather, and knots easily. Definitely keeping a spool in my truck from now on.
Downloaded instantly to my Kindle with zero glitches. The cover art looks gorgeous on my screen and the formatting is clean. Jumped right in and was hooked by page two. Great start to a series.
A little pricey for what it is.

Arrived two days earlier than expected which was a nice surprise. Box was well sealed with no crushing, and the fixture itself was wrapped in a layer of foam plus a plastic sleeve so there weren't any scratches or scuffs. Out of the package the build quality feels really solid, metal housing has a clean finish and the mounting bracket is thicker than the one I was replacing. Included hardware bag had everything needed and the wire leads were pre-stripped which saved a few minutes. Knocked one star because the template included for the cutout seemed slightly off from the actual unit dimensions. I'd recommend dry-fitting before you commit to cutting. Overall though, for the price point this is a solid buy and I'd order again.

Honestly didn't expect much from these considering how cheap they are, but my golden retriever has been absolutely obsessed. Most plush toys last maybe two days before they're destroyed and stuffing is everywhere. These have held up way better than anything else I've bought. The squeakers being in the limbs is actually genius because even when she punctures one, the rest of the toy still works fine. We got the giraffe and the elephant. Both still intact after a month of daily fetch and tug sessions. Definitely stocking up on more.
High Quality. Works well on herbs. Nice cover for safety. Good for buying for self. Comes in very minimal packaging, would not give as a gift.

Ordered this used paperback and it showed up two days earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. The packaging was solid, bubble wrapped inside a padded mailer so the corners weren't all dinged up like you sometimes get from third party sellers. Spine wasn't cracked and no dog eared pages either, honestly in better shape than some books I've bought brand new. Started reading it that same evening and couldn't put it down. The story picks up right where the last one left off and the characters feel consistent, which is something I always worry about with series. Zane and Chance both get great moments and the pacing just works. Really glad I grabbed this one. Already ordering the next in the series tonight.
Arrived in two days, nicely shrink-wrapped and undamaged. Opened it right away with my toddler and the illustrations instantly grabbed us. Already a bedtime staple.

I liked the first book but wasn't sure the sequel could keep up the momentum. Turns out this one actually blows it out of the water. Cam and Marco's dynamic is electric from the start, and the Mexico setting adds a whole new layer of tension to the elemental magic storyline. What surprised me most was how the arson investigation weaves into the bigger plot without feeling like filler. I expected a typical second-book slump or unnecessary drama, but the pacing stays tight and the world-building expands naturally. The romance builds in a way that feels earned, not rushed. If you're on the fence after book one, definitely keep going. This is the rare sequel that makes you appreciate the series even more. Already dying for the next installment.

This is a replacement for my last Cuisinart 12 cup coffee maker (which was probably 6 plus years old); it is almost identical; the only upgrade is this one comes with a little metal coffee filter; you have the option of removing this metal cone and using the paper filters. From what I have read, I have decided to just use the paper ones as they remove more sediment and oil. I like a mild, bitter free coffee (so I use a Chemex whenever I have time--BEST COFFEE MAKER IN THE WORLD IN MY OPINION--but not a good unit when you are going to work or in a hurry--see my review on it). Anyway, when time is short, this coffee maker is simple to operate, has a small clock (that you can't see very well as it is very small and inconspicuous); the machine is programmable as advertised. The unit has a small charcoal filter that is easily accessible (it's at the end of the plastic piece that fits in the top left corner of the machine where you put the water in), and it is very easy to change (the plastic double piece just pops open and then you can remove the old filter). The controls are pretty much the same as my old unit except there is now an off/on switch (my old one you just moved the dial to brew, and presto it started working). This unit (like the old one) has a 1 to 4 cup brewing option. I guess what I am saying is if it isn't broke don't fix it (or if you have a good product don't make a lot of changes to it--it should last well if you take care of it--like most things in life). I think it is the best electrical unit on the market for the money.

For the price I am not sure it can be beat. I have used it during several rounds and it is within a few yards of much higher priced range finders and GPS watches that my friends use. Pin lock will at times lock right on with the same reading each time. Other times, it will take a bit and give me a different reading each time but never more than 3-7 yards of variance. Different readings each time is a pain but I am not that accurate with my irons anyway so it is not a deal breaker for me. As long as this unit lasts I consider this a huge win.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little strainer really delivered. I've been using those cheap disposable paper bags for years and finally wanted something reusable. The mesh is way finer than I anticipated, no random bits floating in my cup like with my old one. The leaf-shaped handle seemed a little gimmicky in the photos, but it's actually super practical. Way easier to fish out of a hot mug than those tiny chain loops. Cleaned up pretty fast too. Only thing is you have to fill it carefully or grounds spill out the seam, but that's common with this style. The little saucer that comes with it is a nice bonus. Overall, beats what I expected for the price.

Definitely worth $10!! I bought this hat for a New Years Prohibition Era party and it was perfect!! My wife has decided that she likes it so much that she is going to wear it, in fact, she wore it to work today. For $10 I am extremely pleased with the quality. It's not high end by no means but the materials are nice and all the seams are tight. I wear a 7 5/8 fitted hat and the L/XL fits almost perfectly. There is a small amount of room which lends to how comfortably the hat fits.
All Sandford's books are fun to read. They're fast-paced, with interesting characters, good plot development and humor, and lots of twists to keep you guessing. "Chosen Prey" was classic Sandford.

Best pair I've owned in years. The slight stretch makes them incredibly comfortable for all-day wear without sagging in the seat. Washed them three times now and the dark wash hasn't faded at all. Fit true to size.
When I have to read the description of the book to give it a rating it was most likely not worth the read. If you want to kill time and spend $2.99 to do it it's your choice.
I bought the dinosaur set and it's super cute but runs extremely small! I bought a size up but wish I bought 2 sizes up because I don't think my daughter will be able to wear them for very long.
It's a ruler that lets you measure spokes, and it was cheap.
Way bigger than I expected and the tune is surprisingly clear. The characters look hand-painted. Super happy with this purchase.
It was really hard to see and find a message in this story. In one of the scenes it really seemed like a porno.
I have a student who loves Scooby-Doo. I gave him the movie as a gift. We watched the movie together. I can honestly say the movie was cute and funny.

It's so handy to have a second charging cable. Now I can charge my Up3 either at home or at work. This one actually seems to work better than the one that came with the band. Maybe it has stronger magnets or something because I have a high success rate of connecting on the first try whereas the original almost always requires some "finagling" to get it to connect. The long cord is a huge convenience too. I have it plugged into a USB wall wart which easily reaches my desk top when I'm ready to charge the band. Couldn't be more pleased with the product.
Bought one for myself and one as a gift and both of us love it! Works great!

I've had this box set for about two years now and it's held up beautifully. My kids aren't gentle with discs, but these have survived countless viewings without a single scratch or skip. The packaging is sturdy too, none of that flimsy cardboard that falls apart after a few opens. The show itself grabs you from the first episode and doesn't let go. Even after watching the whole thing three times, I still catch details I missed before. Worth every penny and then some.

Good case for the money. Fits my gear snugly and has survived a couple drops already. Just know it won't keep water out if submerged, that pressure valve gives it away. Fine for rain and splashes though. You'd pay triple for something fully sealed, so I'm satisfied with what I got.

Been wearing these constantly for about six months now and they still look brand new. No stretching out, no fading, stitches all holding up perfect. Worth every penny for how tough they are. Seriously impressed with the quality.
Really enjoyed Cash and Billie's dynamic, the slow burn paid off big time. My only gripe is the ending felt rushed. Still hooked on this series though.
Absolutely one of the best brands out there for chewers.

Absolutely totally captivating story!!! Jack and Abi are truly relatable characters! I can't get enough of these characters they seem so real and was laughing and gasping all through this book!! I cannot wait for more this series with just the first book is 100X better than FSOG!!

Got these for my 8-year-old's rec soccer league and they're perfect for the price. The sleeve design means no fumbling with straps before games. They stay put during play and wipe clean easily. Not bulky at all, which she prefers. Hard to beat for under fifteen bucks, I'd buy them again without hesitation.
Arrived two days early, packaged really well. Pulled it out and the build quality feels solid.

The box showed up looking like somebody played soccer with it. Both ends were crushed and the plastic case inside was cracked completely in half. The tool itself looked okay at first but had scuffs on it, which made me wonder if this was actually a return someone else sent back. Honestly not even worth unboxing fully. Returned it the same day and the whole thing was just a hassle from start to finish.

This extension cord was the perfect length. However, my computer was unable to receive power through it. I disconnected this cord and reinserted the original power cord and the PC powered right up. I added the Tripp Lite cord back and no power again. Maybe I just received a bad cord.
Not worth what they charge. The clasp snapped after two days of normal use. Cute design but cheaply made. Disappointed given the price point.
The warm white finish looks gorgeous in my kitchen and the compact size fits perfectly on my narrow shelf.

Box arrived looking like it got kicked down the stairs, but surprisingly the clay kits inside were fine. Colors are vibrant and the tools seem sturdy enough. Haven't tested the molds yet but overall decent quality for what my daughter paid. Would've rated higher if shipping wasn't so rough.

This is about the size of a deck of cards (bulky in my opinion), construction is OK. For the money, find the VIPERTEK 17,000,000 Micro stun gun instead. Much smaller, bigger punch, fits into hands easier. I have both and like the 17MV one much better.

Finally a sports bra where the straps don't dig into my shoulders. The wide band underneath stays put during jumping jacks without riding up. I'm a 36DD and finding something that actually contains everything without uniboob is rare. Washed mine six times now and the elastic is still going strong.

I've been using this grip for about eight months now, tossing it in my backpack almost daily. It's taken a beating on hikes and still works like new. The joints haven't loosened up at all, which surprised me. Holds my mirrorless solid on fences and branches. Only complaint is the rubber feet started wearing thin recently, but for the price I can't complain much.
Awesome! So easy to get on and off and never snags hair! Color is true to the photo. Came very fast too! Thanks!

Switched from an old programmable Honeywell to this and the difference is night and day. The remote room sensor is the real selling point for me. Our bedroom was always freezing at night because the thermostat was in a sunny hallway. Now the Ecobee3 averages the temps or you can set it to prioritize a specific sensor during certain times. House feels way more comfortable and my gas bill actually dropped the first month.

Great ab wheel. The double wheels give it a lot more control and the smaller wheel size creates the ability to get closer to the ground on the roll out. I have been using the ab wheel for about four months with really great results. This is not strong enough to support rollouts from standing if you are over 185 lbs. I can do them and they work, but the smaller wheel size makes it more challenging. I travel internationally and this is great to throw in your suitcase - weighs nothing and travels great.
It was okay for a rainy afternoon watch. Nothing groundbreaking but kept me entertained enough to finish it.

Bought this as a backup charger for my ThinkPad and really liked how compact the brick is compared to the stock one. That's about where the positives end. Within three weeks it completely stopped delivering a consistent charge. The laptop would constantly cycle between charging and not charging every few seconds. The connector feels flimsy and doesn't seat properly in the port. Spend the extra money on a genuine OEM charger. This one isn't worth the hassle.

Arrived in a ripped up box with zero padding so the thing was just rattling around loose. Pulled it out and couldn't believe how light and tiny it felt. Looks like something from a dollar store. Definitely not worth what I paid.
The motion sensor is surprisingly responsive. Wish it came with more game modes though.
Although according to the actual record, this was not actually written by Tom Clancy, it is outstanding and I couldn't put it down. Brilliantly written.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this little mouse blew me away. Way more responsive than the Logitech it replaced. Fits my hand perfectly and the battery just refuses to die. Three months in and still going strong on the originals.
Took this on a four-day backpacking trip and it performed flawlessly. Cranks out solid light for cooking and reading, folds flat in my pack, and the battery lasted the whole weekend. Super impressed.
Patterson delivers again with this one. Finished it in two sittings because I couldn't stop reading.

Picked this up on sale for my son's birthday and honestly it's been worth every penny. The triple water blast feature really does make a difference - you actually soak your target instead of just misting them like cheaper soakers. The crossbow style is a nice touch too, makes it feel different from the standard blaster shape. My 8-year-old has no trouble cocking it back and running around the yard. Only knocked off a star because the water reservoir is pretty small, so you're refilling constantly during longer battles. Takes maybe 30 seconds to refill though. For under twenty bucks you're getting a solid summer toy that'll last. Way better than those flimsy dollar store ones that break after a week. Would buy again.

Honestly better than I expected for the price. Feeds pretty smoothly most of the time, though mine did get stuck twice during a skirmish. Just don't manhandle the release lever and you'll be fine. Solid little unit overall.
This is a cute little letter rack! I love it. Well put together too!

"Disclaimer: I received a free copy of this book, as part of a promotional tour, in return for an honest review." I read this one as a free read on Bec's own blog during the holidays. Great one, you learn how Rip and Esme long for each other and finally get their HEA *happy sigh* all though they have to get through a lot of action and suspense. Something is targetting Blade's family and alliances and Rip investigates, alone at first so Blade and Honoria can have a quiet time together, but soon the problem has grown to big for him and he needs help. When Esme gets abducted, all bets are off. Love this Steampunk world and can't wait for the next one in the series.
Arrived quickly in a decent zippered bag, no wrinkles. Material feels thicker than expected and a little scratchy up close. Fits true to size overall though.
The diffuser softens the light perfectly for portraits. Super easy to set up too.
The silver is already coming off I've only had it for a month bought it in June 2017
It's fine for what it is. Does the job adequately.
Arrived in a battered box with crushed corners, but the toy itself looked decent. My kid played with it happily for about an hour before moving on to something else.

DO NOT BUY THE SANDALS! At least SNAKE COLOR. THIS IS NOT CLARKS! Made in China. Very bad! I could not walk around my room in apartment, very slippery sole! When I was walking, I felt like I could fall down easy. VERY UNCOMFORTABLE. Another disappointing moment is they are made from synthetic material, but on Amazon they are made from "leather"! Additionally, it takes 3-4 weeks to get the money back, you lose 8 dollars to sent them back.

Ordered this late Tuesday night and it showed up on my doorstep by Thursday afternoon, which honestly shocked me. The packaging was solid too, no bent corners or damaged spine like I've gotten from other sellers. Cracked it open right after dinner and basically did not move from my couch for three hours. The writing pulls you in immediately, and I found myself texting my sister quotes by chapter two. The characters feel like real people you actually know, making dumb choices and dealing with the fallout. Had to force myself to put it down and go to bed. Already ordered a second copy for my book club. Seriously could not put this down.

Very pleased....I have been using the straw Camelbak for the last 7 years and the last couple I bought broke in some way or another or leaked so I switched to this one and just received it a few days ago and I like it a lot. Very sturdy, does not leak, keeps water cold

I buy (subscription) other Beyond canned foods but when I opened Beef & Spinach and I thought it must be spoiled. It had such a rotten smell, I opened 2 more cans to compare. They, too, smelled rotten - like a decayed tooth. My dog didn't seem averse to the smell, but she's a rescued dog & will probably eat anything. With some trepidation I gave her some. Several hours later she had terrible gas, followed by diarrhea. She has no problem w other flavors. Also, I agree w those who have complained about packaging. Several deliveries have come damaged: light-weight boxes torn, 3 cases per box so heavy postal person couldn't carry them to the house. Last week the cans were so dented some actually were bent in the middle.
seems alittle dull, Ill try it again to make sure.

Total waste of money. The plot made zero sense, characters were flat, and the writing felt rushed. I kept waiting for it to get better but it never did. Couldn't even finish it. Don't bother with this one.

Installed this in my main panel about 18 months ago after a neighbor's AC got fried during a summer storm. For what this costs, it's really hard to beat the peace of mind. I'm no electrician but the install was straightforward, maybe 15 minutes once I killed the main breaker. Fits perfectly in my Square D QO box and takes up just two slot spaces.Recently we had a transformer blow on our street and several houses lost appliances. My TV, fridge, and computers all came through without a hitch. Knocked off one star because the indicator light is pretty dim and hard to see unless you're right up close to the panel. For the money though, this is cheap insurance for your whole house. Would definitely buy again.

Bought these for my kids about six months ago. They've been dropped on pavement countless times and only have minor scuffs. The spout still works perfectly and no cracks anywhere. Pretty solid bottles overall.

The brow piece on this helmet (by the photo) is TOTALLY inaccurate. The brow piece on a typical Roman style Imperial helm (pick whichever century you want) has the brow guard AT THE BROW, about 1 inch up from lower edge and goes around the helmet stopping above the ears. The brow guard on this helmet is flimsy looking, a bent piece of metal that would easily get smashed off and offers no protection to the forehead. I would not own this helmet if it was given to me freely. Term it "scrap metal".
Junk... I purchased several of them and the screw on the top is a joke. I want my money back. The number of stars says it all...
Very good product. I keep it in my refrigerator - it's very cool and soothing to my old dog's gums. helps with brushing.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Opened it up and was immediately impressed with the quality. Slipped it right onto my pup with zero fuss. Great buy!
Love this figure! I gotta tell you, I have nothing bad to say about this figure. Finally, this is IMO the best snake out ever! Get it while the price is low because I see this going up.
Way tougher than I expected. My pit bull can't shred this thing.
Birthday Gift for my Pre-teen Grandson. He tells me he loves it.

Couldn't put this one down! Shades and Skylar have such intense chemistry that jumps right off the page. The whole MC backdrop adds so much tension to their already complicated history, and watching them navigate their way back to each other kept me hooked from start to finish. What I loved most was how both characters actually grow throughout the story instead of just falling back into old patterns. The supporting cast is fantastic too, especially Rusty, who brings some really fun moments to the mix. The pacing is spot on with plenty of emotional punches mixed in with the romance. If you're into MC romance with real depth and characters who feel genuine, grab this immediately. Already planning to reread it!

I'll be honest, I had high hopes for this one given the cast of classic literary figures thrown together. Sean Connery does his best with what he's given, but the script is a mess and the CGI has aged like milk. The plot lurches from one explosion to another without ever making you care about what's happening. I watched it with my brother who loves cheesy early 2000s blockbusters and even he was checking his phone halfway through. That said, I'd actually recommend this to fans of so-bad-it's-good movies, there's enough nonsensical action and over-the-top moments to make for a fun riff night with friends. Just don't go in expecting anything coherent or faithful to the source material. Two stars for the camp value alone.

Picked up two of these for squaring up steel tubing before tacking and they do the job well. The floating center jaw is the real selling point, it self-adjusts to whatever thickness you're working with so you get a true 90 every time without fussing around. Threads move smoothly with no binding so far. My only gripe is the jaw opening maxes out around 3 inches, which has limited me on a couple larger projects. Build quality feels solid for the price point. I'd definitely recommend these to hobbyist welders and small fabrication shops. If you're doing heavy industrial work with thick stock you might want something beefier, but for square tubing, angle iron, and sheet metal fixtures these are hard to beat at this cost. Would buy again.

I've had this guide on my Kindle for about six months now and I keep going back to it whenever I'm prepping for the season. It's become my go-to reference when I'm dealing with a surplus from the garden. What I appreciate is how straightforward the instructions are, no fluff, just practical steps for pressure canning and dehydrating. I successfully put up thirty jars of tomatoes last month using the timing charts from this book and every single one sealed properly. The freezing section is a bit basic compared to the canning chapters, which is why I'm knocking off a star. Still, for someone who wants a reliable manual they'll actually use repeatedly rather than read once and forget, this one holds up. Glad I grabbed it.
crystals are smaller than we expected, this is an okay kit

I purchased this product (DealYard) on 12/26/2013, and received it on 1/2/2014. Was packed well, and arrived in good condition. I used it for the first time on 1/7/2014 and it performed very well, I vacuumed a few bags and tried out the containers and they sealed very well. My next attempt to use was on 1/8/2014 on a couple of the Gal. bags, after a couple of seconds of vacuuming the machine started making a load clicking sound and shut off as though it was done. The problem was it had not removed all the air, and when I repeated the process the same thing happened. Fearing if I continued to try I would irreparably harm the machine I stopped and called the number on the warranty / registration card. I was told that they have not sold this product for over 3 years, and I would have to take it up with how sold it to me. That would be fine if they did not require that the buyer had to pay to have it shipped back to them, half the cost of the product in the first place. WARNING... Before you buy any Foodsaver product make sure you contact Foodsaver and find out if they are going to warranty that particular model at the time you are buying it!!!!!

This is an awesome product! I got this because I was training my puppy to be okay with car rides and she was having accidents so I got this. Was thing this is a real pain because of the Velcro but make sure you wash on cold and gentle/delicate. I washed it like normal because it seemed so sturdy and nylon but the hems seemed to have shrunk from the warm/hot water. That was my bad for not thinking about the cotton parts of this.
I liked the story, so romantic, I disliked that is not much realistic, but I had a good time.
Great bang for your buck. Snaps together fast and looks awesome on the shelf.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this little dongle has been rock solid. Picked it up to connect my wireless earbuds to an older desktop and it paired instantly. Range is better than I anticipated too. Definitely exceeds expectations.

My 4 year old daughter just loves this, she even put her sea shell collection in with the mermaid. This is hours of fun for indoors and out. I highly recommend this for anyone's child. Update: It is now March 2016 and now my third child who is almost five plays with this same sandbox. Still looks like new and all items that came with it are in perfect condition. If you want an indoor sandbox buy one from My Little Sandbox as they last for years.

I wanted to love this movie, I really did. The soundtrack is genuinely fantastic and there are a couple of scenes where the visual effects team clearly went all out. But man, the editing is a complete mess. Scenes jump around with zero flow, and it feels like at least thirty minutes of important story got left on the cutting room floor. You never get enough time with any character to actually care about what happens to them. The big showdown at the end looked amazing visually but had zero emotional weight behind it because the buildup was so rushed. I watched it twice thinking maybe I missed something the first time around. Nope, it's just a poorly assembled film with neat effects.

As stated by the title...this product is NOT FOR TALL PEOPLE! The zippered opening does not allow for someone much taller than about 5'11" to get into it. If you are short, you can get into the costume easily feet first. If you are tall, you must go in head first, lay down and cross your legs and get someone to help you put your feet into the correct places. I could BARELY bend my legs enough to fit them into the leg openings, even having wiggled my shoulders up into the head area as much as I could. Now as long as you're under that height I mentioned, your weight doesn't matter a bit. It's a very forgiving costume and would be very easy for a plus size person to wear. I don't know what the limit would be, but we were able to get my ~300lb friend into it with no trouble. The fan makes an annoying sound...so it's not like you could wear this to work and sit at your computer quietly. But changes are...you're going to be running around like an idiot at a party in this thing so nobody will care about the fan whirr. It does get hot inside and you will fog up the thing. There's no way for this really to be avoided. Costume feels super cheap when you take it out of the package and you'll need to find somewhere inside the suit to secure the fan. I'm unable to wear this costume without having someone help me get in and out of it, due to my height, but if you're shorter you should be able to manage ok. You can run, walk, bicycle, drive, sit, dance, all very easily. It's very light and if you bump into something, it just deflates that part and fills right back up quickly. Fun to run around in and scare children.

I received this pack today, 2 days after ordering it. Sold and shipped from Amazon, and I paid $75.79 for the silt gray in small/medium. I was planning on writing this review after using this pack. But I'm so impressed by its design that I want to shout it out!:) I plan to use the Raptor 10 for long road bike rides in the Colorado Rockies. I usually stuff my bike jersey pockets with snacks, chap stick, cell phone, small wallet, warm gloves, warm synthetic hat, reading glasses in eye glass case (so I can see what I'm doing to change flats!), inhaler, and I tie a long sleeve bike jacket around my waist! Wow!! I'm looking forward to using the Raptor 10 on my next ride! I'll update my review soon. Update: July 24, 2012 So far, I've used this pack on two long road bike rides, where I spent a good amount of time climbing out of the saddle. It is still a 5 star item to me. Love the design of the water system! The pack felt comfortable against my back w/o any noticeable water sloshing. Everything came out of my back jersey pockets and into my Osprey. Sweet!!!! More back comfort! On my first bike ride, I found the straps were so easy to use that I made ALL of my strap adjustments while riding!! What a well designed pack. It's too small for day hikes though, but perfect size for bike rides!!! Planning to get another Osprey pack that's big enough for my day hikes.

Got this to digitize a pile of old VHS-C tapes sitting in my closet for years. Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but the results were surprisingly solid. Audio synced up fine and everything ran smoothly on my Windows 10 laptop. If you've got aging family footage you want to preserve before the tapes degrade, grab this. Perfect for non-techy folks.
I remember the first time I saw this movie, it took such unexpected turns. That's what makes it interesting. Def does a good job reminding us about the things that really matter.

Bought this for my son's first birthday and he really enjoys rocking on it. The cow design is adorable and it's held up surprisingly well after six months of daily use. The wooden base hasn't loosened up at all and the plush fabric is still intact even with spills and drool. My only complaint is the sound button in the ear is completely hit or miss. Sometimes it moos, sometimes it doesn't do anything. Not a dealbreaker since my kid doesn't really care, but for the price I expected the electronics to be more reliable.

Does the job. Plenty of room for backups on both my and my spouse's computers. I would prefer a cable with standard USB on both ends. I do not like the rather flimsy dual mini connector at the drive end. I've had this type of connector before and it failed to make a reliable connection after less than a year of use on another brand backup drive.

Can't believe something this bright costs so little. I do night rides on rural roads with zero streetlights and this thing lights up everything ahead of me. Battery lasts my entire 45-minute ride on the highest setting without dying. Mount was easy to attach to my handlebar and it stays put over bumpy gravel. Friends paid triple for similar setups and mine outperforms theirs. Definitely grab one if you ride after dark.

I needed white balloons specifically for a birthday party craft. When these arrived, I was a little concerned because they looked very yellow. I decided to give it a try and blow one up. They're pretty much clear balloons with a yellowish tinge and a little shine. If I held the balloon near a book I could comfortably read through the balloon. I don't know if I was accidentally given the wrong color but the sticker stuck to my bag claims they're white pearlized balloons. Honestly, I don't know what I would call the color and I don't picture anybody going to a party store and voluntarily choosing this color. They look like they should have been clear balloons with a bit of shine to them but they look aged and yellowed.
My little guy doesn't have to feel scared any more! He feels comfortable when he sprays this! Easy to refill with choice air freshener!

I tried a few of these to keep around as extras if I lose my good one or is I have people training with me that didn't bring gear. Pretty thin and flimsy, also quite small. OK enough for a temp or for weightlifting but not something I would want to spar hard with at all.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these exceeded every expectation. I've been using poster board and cookie sheets to sort puzzle pieces forever and finally decided to try something made for the actual purpose. These trays are way sturdier than I thought they'd be. The stacking feature is what sold me and it genuinely works well without pieces sliding around between layers. I'm working on a 1500 piece landscape right now and can easily separate edges, sky, and foreground across the trays. They nest together compactly when not in use which is great since my puzzle space doubles as the dining table. Totally worth it.

I've packed these into a suitcase on a cruise ship and hid in my pockets at a F1 race with no problems. I easily fit a fifth of liquor into two of these. I don't particularly like the graphics advertising, but don't think it will show up on an x-ray. If security sees the pouch they will know what it is without the markings anyway. The small spout makes them difficult to fill and even harder to dry out, the smell of liquor inside doesn't go away.

Got this for my 8lb Yorkie and it's been great. The padding is decent, buckles feel sturdy, and the reflective stitching is a nice bonus for evening walks. She doesn't pull much but the chest plate distributes pressure well when she does get excited. My favorite part is the handle on the back, super helpful when I need to grab her quickly. For under fifteen bucks I honestly wasn't expecting much but this rivals harnesses costing three times as much. Definitely ordering a second one as backup.
NEW BALANCE IS PRETTY ON THE MONEY IN SIZING. I WEAR A 10 1/2 WIDE BUT GOT AN 11 BECAUSE ITS A MEDIUM WIDTH. THESE SHOES FIT PERFECT AND ARE LIGHT AND COMFORTABLE TOO.
I used to use AS5 for about 10yrs, I've switched to this and haven't looked back. Great Stuff.

The first pair I received had a missing battery cover; I called the customer service # in the box and the service was outstanding. I received the replacement within 2 days. I was impressed by the service. However, the lanterns themselves are a bit fragile, quality not so hot, one of them doesn't stay lit all night, even though I charged them both fully and equally. I like that they clip onto the umbrella, and I like the glow out on the deck that they they create alongside my rope lighting along the deck.

I've had this on my Kindle for about six months now and it's become one of those books I keep going back to. The pop culture references hold up on repeat reads, I keep catching little jokes I missed the first couple times through. My only gripe is the pacing sags a bit in the middle section and I found myself skimming a few chapters. That said, the characters are genuinely fun and the world-building is solid without being overwhelming. It's held up better than most stuff in this genre that I've reread. Still enjoy it just as much on the third pass, which says something. Knocking off a star because that middle stretch really could've been tighter. Worth picking up if you're into nerdy humor though.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but these have been solid replacements for my original battery. Holds a charge almost as long as the name brand. The included car charger works fine. Overall, decent value.
Bought this as a prank for my brother's birthday. Everyone at the party lost it.
Better than I expected for the price. The print showed up a little less vibrant than the listing photos, but fit is spot-on and fabric feels decent. Withstood three washes so far without fading.

Worth every penny. I was skeptical spending this much on a kid's water bottle, but after six months of daily use, it still looks brand new. The push-button lid is super convenient and my son actually stays hydrated now. Best part? You can order spare straws and valves straight from Thermos instead of tossing the whole thing. Seriously the best value I've found for a durable kids bottle.
Gave us the impetus to get rid of lots of stuff. House is much cleaner now!
Really like the reinforced stitching on this one, feels way more durable than my last. Fit was spot-on for me. Wish the zipper pull was a bit bigger though.
I bought this after my husband's kayak went under a log and he lost his paddle - which we thankfully recovered. He uses this all the time now. The length is great and there have been no issues since.
Expected way more for the price. My dog had this torn apart in under ten minutes. The seams came loose immediately and stuffing was everywhere. Total waste of money.
Fell apart after two weeks of normal use. Flimsy stitching unraveled everywhere. Total waste.

My wife is very particular about "her things", and when her tea kettle was starting to rust out, she hinted that she would like a new one for her birthday. So I found this highly reviewed kettle on Amazon and thought it a good deal for many years of service. When my wife received it for her birthday, she was not completely satisfied, but over the past two months she has "gotten used to it". Here are her complaints: 1. Difficulty getting water into it. - with my wife's old kettle, she filled it through the spout. The spout on this kettle is a bit narrower than her old one, so at first water would spill down the side and get the outside wet. She also tried to use the filling lid on top, but the lid has tight tolerances (so steam doesn't escape or rattle around), and the handle doesn't move, so there is no clear path to the pot without getting the outside wet. 2. Difficulty eating water out of it. - as you can see from the picture, the spout protrudes from the upper quarter of the pot. This means she has to hold the kettle at an almost 90 degree angle to pour her hot water, and dousing her hand with a good bit of hot steam. With filling the kettle a bit fuller than she is used to, we are able to get around that problem. Now that she's had two months of kettle ownership, she is much better at aiming water into the kettle, and doesn't have so many problems. She has also noticed that with the flatter and wider bottom of the new kettle, it does heat faster, and it is easier to clean with the nice enameled finish. However, I think next time that we need a new kettle, I'm just going to install a hot water dispenser at the sink.

Bought these for work and they're unbearable. Every step makes an obnoxious noise that echoes everywhere. I tried breaking them in for two weeks but nothing changed. Had to swap shoes in my car halfway through the day. Totally unusable and not worth the money.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy shrink-wrapped roll, no tangles. Cut clean right out of the package. Solid thickness, holds knots tight. Impressed.
Love Kimberly Rae Jordan's books! Filled with great story line, how God's works in lives, and every book is an enjoyable read! Especially enjoy the series...
Bought these for my workshop shed and they're super bright. Definitely recommend to anyone needing outdoor lighting.
Did the job! Lasted most of the night and some of them into the next night.
Very easy to install, color was as described (hard to find a grey elongated seat).
Was easy to install in gkids bike Still working great
I have a Rottweiler and she loves this toy, and hasn't been able destroy it at all with all her strength!
Does what it is suppose to do. Hot water in a flash
These are fantastic. The brushed nickel finish looks high-end and the longer size was exactly what I needed for my heavy velvet curtains. Solid construction too.

I'll admit the action sequences are top notch and Craig brings a grittier edge that I appreciated. What bugged me though was the pacing. The middle act drags badly with long exposition scenes that killed the momentum for me. By the time the third act ramped up again I'd kinda lost interest. Judi Dench is great as always and the cinematography looks fantastic on blu ray. Just wish they'd trimmed about twenty minutes out of the middle and tightened things up. Decent Bond film but not one I'll revisit often.
Got this for a hallway update and it works fine. Not the most heavy-duty switch out there but you really can't beat it for the price. Decent pick.
Good drama with Jax and Mitch dealing with all that family betrayal. For under three bucks, definitely worth picking up. Quick entertaining read.

Kylie Mitchell is one of the few humans left on earth after a nasty experiment took out half the population. She runs a vampire bar in a town filled with supernaturals. There is a council that matches soul mates. Kylie never anticipated being matched by The Council of the Wise because of her human status but she was matched. Christian a werewolf and Michael a Vampire are Kylie's mates. Kylie has no wish to be mated at all but she cannot deny the blazing attraction between her and the two handsome men. While Christian and Michael can barely stand each other they both have intense feelings for Kylie. When the council pairs the trio, Christian and Michael are willing to do anything including working together to win Kylie's heart and body. Can they capture their soul mate or will they lose her to an evil fate first? The Twisted Kiss is a hot and thrilling novella. A First Rate Madness: Uncovering the Links between Leadrship and Mental Illness is a book you might want to read. Some will find the historical illustrations thin while others may find the analysis provided a stretch in place, but Nassiar Ghaemi has published one interesting book. Ghaemi is the director of the Mood Disorder Program at Tuft Medical School. Using available historical and medical evidence, he argues that various mood disorders can be linked to success in leadership situations. In individual sections he takes up creativity, realism, empathy, and resilience. He finally takes up treatment and mental in general. Along the way, he illustrates his views using the lives of well known persons including Bush, Blair, Nixon, JFK, Roosevelt, Martin Luther King, Lincoln Churchill. Just the character sketches that Ghaemi uses is worth the price of the book. This is one of the more thought provoking books that I have read in the past couple of years. Readers will approach leadership differently after completing this volume.

Why do I love this show? I want every character on this show to be my best friend (except Robin). They're funny, caring, and awesome. The actors truly have tons of chemistry, providing a quality show in a half-hour block. This is no generic sitcom. Sure, it's got a laugh track and some of the banter is cliché, however, most of it is incredibly witty and heartfelt. Ted is engaged in a genuine search for love, and I'm completely wrapped up in it. I fell in love with the Cake Girl (Victoria, played by Ashley Williams) and was sad to see her go (it's probably why I'm not a huge fan of Robin). This show has continuity and a compelling storyline; it simply amazes me. It's very quotable. I find myself quoting with friends I've talked into watching it (who get equally hooked). The cast is brilliant, as well as the director and writers. Bloc Party's song: `This Modern Love' at the close of Season One clenched it for me though, dramatically building up a powerful finale I won't soon forget. It joins the hall of fame for greatest season finale songs with the likes of The O.C's: Imogen Heap `Hide and Seek' and Grey's Anatomy's: Snow Patrol `Chasing Cars'. Hands down, this is the best sitcom I've ever seen. Buy it, watch it, love it. DISCLAIMER: Though the writers are good at what they do, don't listen to any of their commentaries. They are exceptionally boring, lackluster, and have slightly soured my enjoyment of the show. It's that bad.

We bought this for our new puppy. He's a Pyrenees, lab, mastiff mix and he's huge. We knew we needed to help him learn quickly so that he doesn't accidentally hurt himself or someone when he gets excited. He's ten months old now and 120 pounds. This collar has features that I really appreciate. It has a vibrate and a beep as well as the shock feature. I've actually only used the shock once and that was when he got out and was running around in the road. I tried snacks, toys and everything else I could think of. I was terrified he was going to run in front of a car so after the beep and vibrate didn't work, I used a very light shock. It scared him and he ran inside. You can pick the intensity that is used. I just used a 2. For other issues, like his crazy barking, we use a beep. That usually gets him to stop, if he doesn't we use the vibrate feature. I have the vibrate turned up because he doesn't like it and he knows he needs to stop if he gets buzzed. The beep works great as an attention getter. He knows when he hears it that he needs to look at us to see what he needs to do. I'm very happy that we bought this. I was completely against a "shock collar," but we really just use the other features on it for training purposes and with some patience and persistence, it has really worked.

Dead Wake by Erik Larson is an engaging account of the sinking of the Lusitania. Using both primary and secondary sources, Larson tells the story from all sides. Once finished, the reader better understands not only what happened on board, but inside the U-boat that sunk her, as well as the broader historical context. This is the first book of Larson's that I've read, and it officially made me a fan. His narrative style is smooth and entertaining. He was able to tell the story of a huge event using the little moments that better help us connect to history. Another great feature of this book was getting to understand what was happening not just on board the Lusitania, but also on U-20, the U-boat that sank her. Learning about that particular tour reinforces one of the themes of this account - that a million little things happened that led to the sinking. If just one of these many things had changed, on either side, the Lusitania would simply be the name of another ship from a bygone era. Anyone interested in history, WWI, maritime history, U-boat history, or the politics of war will enjoy this book. It is extremely well written and just as important, accessible to the average reader. Blogging for Books provided this book to me for free in exchange for an honest review. I was not required to write a positive review. The opinions I have expressed are my own. I was using a mechanical keyboard that made me have to type at an angle, and the keys had some resistance going down. I didn't care until I noticed that I was having some hand pain. Fearing it might be carpal tunnel, I ended up doing a bunch of hand stretches, and also replaced by keyboard with the amazon basics keyboard I was using before. I think the stretches helped fix damage that was done, and using the keyboard prevented any further damage from building up. My room mate was also developing hand problems, and I brought an amazon basics keyboard for him and told him to use it to help with his hand problems. He said his hand problems are gone too. So, I'm not going to claim that this keyboard fixes hand problems because it could have in fact been a coincidence as me and my room mate were both trying other things to fix our hand issues. But shortly after we switched to the amazon keyboards, our issues were gone, so it *could* be the case that this keyboard helps prevent hand issues for some people.

I bought 1 of these to compare against other bulbs because it had decent reviews. This one was ok, but not as nice as the G7 Power G7GU10300WW for the same price. Please consider trying the G7 bulb and read my review of it. UPDATE Dec-31-2013: HitLights has sent me the updated bulb for 2014 to compare with the older bulb, and I'm pleased to say it is much improved from the old design. I'm also pleased they offered to send my a new bulb free of charge to try. Thats good customer service! First off the height of the bulb is now normal. It will not stick out of the fixture you place it in, like the old bulb did. The bulb looks exactly like what they have in the current pictures. I measured the new bulb as consuming 3.9 watts, which is more efficient than the old model (4.4 watts) and the same as my old favorite, the G7. The new bulb is a lot brighter too. I measured it at 5100 lux @ 1 foot away, compared to the old model @3860 lux. Its still not as bright as the old G7 at 7200 lux. But its acceptable. It comes on instantly and has a fairly linear dimming ability with a standard Lutron dimmer. It does have a little bit of yellow fringing at 1 foot away, but over several feet onto my dark brown granite countertop, it was mostly unnoticeable. Since the G7 is not available now, I would not hesitate to give this bulb a try. G7 however has redesigned their GU10 style bulb and it should be available soon. I always prefer products made in the USA, like the G7. I'm pretty sure this HitLights is still made in China.

Eve Fortescue is back in Bellefleur, Lousisanna in hopes to convince Brent Bellefleur, groom-to-be, that she is the one he should marry ~ not Honey Moreau. As a guest of the upcoming nuptials, Eve also has the uncomfortable pleasure of attending the pre-wedding dinner being held at the Bellefleur Country Club. Here is where Eve is going to strike while the iron is still hot. As she enters the country club, she latches onto the first unpaired male she can find and requests him as her date. And she walks right into the web of Brent's cousin, Rainer Delacroix. He makes her an offer she doesn't refuse and her seduction of the groom-to-be takes a different turn in the road. Eve Met Her Match has a wickedly seductive kissing scene that leaves the reader breathless right along with the characters involved. There are also some very swoon-worthy actions that make reading this short novella quite enjoyable. The descriptions of each scene were adequate and well-written. They don't bog down the story with useless details or babble. At first, there is a bit of disdain for Eve. I mean, she's only coming to the wedding to try and steal the groom away from a woman Eve used to call her friend. Many of the secondary characters (guests that also attend the pre-wedding dinner) have no trouble seeing through Eve's charade. It's perfectly clear what Eve's intentions are that evening. Fortunately, she lands in the lap of Rainer, who does a sexy wicked job of seducing Eve and getting her to open her eyes and really take a look around. This novella is sweet, sexy, and wickedly fun. Review Copy Courtesy of: The publisher, at no cost in exchange for an honest review.
