Didn't expect much from such a quick read but it totally delivered. Seeing these rough guys soften up as dads exceeded everything I wanted.
Wasn't sure it'd be thick enough but this thing is solid. Works perfectly in my 6qt Instant Pot and wipes clean in seconds.
Love the curved shape of these, fits perfectly in my hand. The glass thickness feels premium and they've survived multiple trips through the dishwasher already.
Every time I insert this memory card into my PC it crashes the PC leaving me a USB as my only means of data transfer.

Arrived two days early and every can was boxed securely with no dents. Popped one in right away and the light output is seriously impressive for such a compact housing. Super clean look in the ceiling too.
These aren't worth a dollar. Had to invest in a real salinity tester
Been using these for organizing my fishing tackle for about six months now. They've held up great through being tossed in my boat bag. Latches still work perfectly. Solid purchase.

I really liked this knife when I first got it. Pro: It was my first spring assisted blade and I really enjoyed it. Fast to open, with practice you can operate with only one hand (open and close), I like the feel in the hand and in the pocket with the provided clip, and I like the construction of the handle. Very sturdy and has good texture to keep it secure in the hand. Con: Steel did not keep much of an edge. Too much of the edge is wasted on serration (I know this is easily discernible from the picture but in the field I only used the serrated section once. Usually it just got in the way). Too much play in the blade. Others have mentioned this in their reviews. But even after tightened there was a little play and it seemed to get loose pretty easily. But the thing that really bothered me is that the spring (as in the one that assists in opening) broke. And since that happened, the lock does not stay engaged either (I assume that they are connected). So now this thing is going in the trash. The blade literally just flops back and fourth. I do not even trust it to use as a tool in the always open position because the lock is unreliable. Long story short, save your money, and buy a better knife. I thought Gerber was good quality. At least they seemed to be when I was growing up. But I will probably not own another one. Life expectancy should be more than a year an a half. EDC tools should be more reliable. My EDC of choice now is a Spyderco Endura 4 Wave that I also bought from Amazon. Will post a detailed review of that soon.
Super comfortable for all-day wear. The waistband doesn't dig in at all.

Solid modern take on a classic western. The desert cinematography is stunning and the cast delivers. I'd recommend this to anyone who enjoys slow-burn westerns, though diehard fans of the original might be slightly picky about the plot changes.
Installed this in my garage about eight months ago and it's still running strong every single day. Survived temperature swings and humidity without a hiccup. Really solid build.

I love Garmin products but continue to be less enthusiastic of their bike mount systems. This one slips regularly for me, but I do want to share that my Cannondale's handle bars are tapered, and it's challenging to keep any mount in place. It's still far better than mounting your Garmin Edge product on the handle bar stem. The Front Mounts provide much safer visibility during rides, where you need to keep your eyes on the road. For on our rough wine=country roads between Napa, Sonoma and Marin County roads, this mount slips dropping my Edge 1000 point straight down at my front tire. I've been using a third party solution that is much more reliable for me.
Arrived in a nice sealed bag. Fabric feels solid, but definitely runs snug.
Really enjoyed this one after following the series for a while now. The payoff was worth the wait, though a couple of slow chapters dragged a bit. Still a solid read overall and glad I stuck with it.

I hated this neck pillow! It was so uncomfortable and I couldn't even use it. It's too round and bulky, so your head is too far away from your seat so you have to lean forward. And the opening/curve is so shallow so it fits awkwardly around your neck. I essentially carried this pillow around Japan for 2 weeks just so I could return it when I got home!

My first Gaiman novel and now I'm hooked. The way he blends mythology with everyday life is incredible. That scene with the nanny genuinely gave me chills. I'd recommend this to anyone who loves dark fairy tales or authors like Holly Black. Perfect for a rainy weekend read.
Not Patterson's best work but still entertaining. Perfect for longtime fans who want a quick beach read this summer.
Honestly didn't expect much, but these actually work surprisingly well.

Ditch the rolling pin or heavy plates or whatever else you use to flatten out tortilla dough. I sandwich the dough ball in this press between 2 layers of parchment paper, flip the handle over and press it down--it's quick and effortless. Sopes or thin tortillas, I can easily control the thickness and always get a nice, round, uniform shape.
Another solid Virgil Flowers adventure. Sanford nails the pacing and keeps things moving with sharp humor and a genuinely twisty plot. Finished it in two sittings. Already grabbed the next one.

Got the full series box set for way less than I expected to pay. Honestly, it's a steal considering how many episodes you get. The picture quality is solid and having every saga in one place beats tracking down individual seasons. My kids are hooked now and I get to relive the Cell saga the way it was meant to be seen. Worth every penny for any DBZ fan.
Typical for Triple K Leather,,it's excellent. Good heavy leather, good stitching, and color. It fits my knife perfectly.

Bought this lantern three summers ago for our annual Boundary Waters trip, and it's been absolutely abused since then. Knocked off picnic tables, rained on constantly, packed loose in a dry bag with sharp tent stakes, you name it. Still works like the day I pulled it out of the box. The housing has plenty of scratches and dings to show for it, but the actual light output hasn't changed a bit. I was worried the diffuser would crack after a bad drop on granite last July, but not a single issue. The bail handle is solid metal and hasn't bent or loosened up. I've got fancier rechargeable lanterns that died after one season. This thing just refuses to quit. For thirty-something bucks you genuinely cannot do better.

I have watched this movie over 10 times and it still hasn't gotten old. Its special because Disney put a lot of thought and comedy into the "typical" romance and made the characters realistic and relative. Ever 2 seconds I would think to myself, "thats exactly how I act!" XD It was just the most adorable movie and I will treasure it and pray that Disney continues down this path.

I liked the idea of this toy but once I received it I left it in the packaging and re-gifted it to someone else. It seemed way to complicated for a baby and overall isn't something I would have bought had I seen it in the store.
Really enjoyed the chemistry between the two leads. The small-town setting felt authentic and cozy. Wish the ending hadn't been so rushed though!

Wow! I really, really liked this book! This is story has one of my favourite themes-romance laced with a bit of humour. The 'blue demon' is such a loveable character and his 'lady' was a great match for him. Another good character was Rierdane, the valet-he reminded me of an English butler. One reviewer mentioned something about the way Cass spoke-yeah, it wasn't my favourite, but she didn't speak like that all the time and it didn't detract from the story, in fact it made me realise that there are all types of dialects and speech patterns* and it has very little to do with how or with whom one falls in love. This is a lovely story, I will definitely look for more of Ms. Story's book (I read her Willing Slave-another excellent story). *Disclosure-As a British-Nigerian married to a Yank, I think may have some experience with dialects/accents:)
Great for weekend warriors. Plenty of power for home projects without breaking the bank. Would definitely recommend.
Got this for cold morning rides and it does the job without breaking the bank. Fits under my helmet fine and blocks the chill nicely. Some wind gets through but at this price I can't complain.

Bought this for my toddlers to use on the back patio and it's been a solid choice overall. The setup is quick, literally snaps together in minutes, and it folds flat enough to slide behind the shed when summer's over. The surface wipes clean easily, which matters a lot when you've got kids who think paint and pudding belong everywhere. My two and four year olds sit at it comfortably for snacks, coloring, and water table activities. It's survived rain and being dragged around the yard without fading or cracking. My only gripe is it's strictly kid-sized. My husband tried squeezing in for tea time and the whole thing wobbled badly. As long as you keep it for the little ones, it's a great buy. Would recommend.
I've reread this three times and the paperback still looks great. Spine hasn't cracked, pages hold up perfectly. Fast-paced story kept me hooked every single time.

Arrived on time and in excellent condition. Coming from traditional desktops and laptops, taking some getting used to operating. Purchased configured with i7 and 16Gb of RAM to replace a six core desktop for portability and to run PhotoShop and Lightroom. This machine is fast and no hiccups with large raw files in Photoshop. Going from a 22" monitor to the Surface Pro's screen is an adjustment, as is using the pen instead of a mouse.
Have this for almost a year and it plays everything I throw at it at max resolution and graphics setting wonderfully!
This is exactly what I was needing - love these! Haven't had any issue and received as expected.

The core ideas are decent but there's way too much filler. I kept waiting for practical advice that actually fits a normal lifestyle, but most suggestions assume you have tons of flexibility. Not terrible, just wish it was condensed into something more realistic.

Started off fine but after a couple weeks the texture completely changed. They dried out and became rock hard, even keeping them sealed in the bag. Had to practically mash them with a hammer to wrap my dog's meds. Before that they were soft and easy to mold around pills, but now they just crack apart and the pill falls right out. My lab won't even touch them anymore. Not worth the money for something that goes bad so fast.
Great story, well written and easy to pick up and start again which is great for traveling. I loved reading about their travels and think this is worth reading.
Fast shipping works as advertised replacement cord for Samsung TV...

Do not mess with witches. Sachi is another one you do not want to mess with. She would just love to put hexes on the people that make her mad. But the story revolves around Mandaline, Ellis and Brad. After being injured in two different accidents, Brad has turned into a psyic of sorts. Mandi has just lost her best friend Julie who owns and runs Many Blessings. Upon her death she leaves everything to Mandi to run and cherish. She is the one that figures what is wrong with Brad and solves the problem. When Ellis realizes that it was the house making Brad sicker, he was glad to move out and get rid of the problem. I like this series and cannot wait for the next one to come out.

Grabbed this on sale and it's worth every penny. Ethan Hawke delivers, and those old film reels are genuinely creepy. Great sound design too. Solid horror pick for a Friday night without breaking the bank.

Great Price for 2 batteries and a charger. Shooting video with a DSLR consumes a lot of battery and having extra ones is imperative. These don/t last as long as the Canon ones but are way way cheaper. I would Highly recommend them.

Picked this up for under ten bucks and honestly it's the best fitness purchase I've made all year. Rodney Yee puts together a sequence that actually makes you sweat but leaves you feeling amazing afterward. The pacing keeps things moving so you never get bored or feel like you're just standing around. I'd say you want maybe six months of yoga under your belt before jumping in though, since he doesn't break down pose alignment. If you already know your basics, this gives you a solid forty-minute flow you can repeat multiple times a week. The production quality is clean, the music isn't annoying, and the backdrop is nice without being distracting. For what I paid, this punches way above its weight. Definitely grabbing more from this series.

Janet Evanovich continues to produce a fun and lively tale of the mishaps of Stephanie Plum. One would think that by the 14th installment, the story lines would get a little stale, but there are no disappointments with this rolicking tale. Evanovich continues to wrest laughter from the reader in spite of themselves as she takes our heroine from one implausible situation to another. Quite frankly, it is the side characters that continue to keep this series fresh and appealing. Fun and easy read. You won't regret the time spent.

I grabbed this during a Kindle sale and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. Impulses grabbed me from chapter one and didn't let go. The way V.L. Brock writes Samantha and Hayden's connection feels genuine, not forced like so many romance novels lately. Both characters carry real baggage and watching them navigate that together had me staying up way past bedtime. The writing is descriptive without being over the top. At full price this would still be a steal, but for what I paid I feel like I got away with something. Already downloaded another book from this author. If you want a story with actual depth and characters who feel like real people dealing with real pain, just get it.

Can't beat this deal honestly. I was pricing out just the circular saw by itself and it was nearly what this whole bundle costs. Getting the drill, battery, and charger included basically makes this a no-brainer if you're already invested in the Black and Decker 20V system. I've been running their weed eater and leaf blower for about a year now and really wanted a cordless saw for quick cuts around the yard without dragging out an extension cord. The extra battery is what sold me though, having two means I can keep working while one charges. Saw cuts through 2x4s without bogging down and the drill has plenty of power for standard household jobs. For the money, you're getting a ridiculous amount of stuff here.
Arrived fast in a sturdy box. Really impressed with the weight and solid feel right out of the package.
Works great, it's Pyrex, I'd expect nothing less from them.
well what can I say It works, i got it fast, not much else really to say.
..i thought it would be just kinda silly tongue n cheek humor like what we do in the shadows but it was clever with an interesting twist.. and hes quite likeable for a killer..

Series 2 really steps up the quality from the first season. The character development is fantastic, especially with the Owen and Tosh storylines getting much more depth. The episodes feel bigger and more confident this time around.
Been using these for six months now and they're still going strong. Great value.

Michael Morpurgo did a wonderful job of portraying WW I through the horse's eyes, giving us, once again the view of the war from both the eyes of all affected by the War. Loved all the language and the landscapes, and I totally bought into the people surrounding this wonderful horse. My one very small issue came at the end, where the author seemed to be compressing rather than extending the tail (no pun intended!) of the story. I do know that you don't want to overstay a solution, but racing makes for a predictably succinct summary, rather than a full bodied landing. Love Michael Morpurgo's writing, and have always enjoyed watching kids work their way through with a real spirit of curiosity.
Seems fitted for Asian physiques. If proportions are correct for arm length and shoulders, chest is too tight. Torso length is also short. Otherwise I like the jacket.

Bag arrived sealed tight with no tears or leaks, which is always a relief ordering pet food online. Shipping was actually faster than the estimate too. Opened it up and the kibble smells fresh, not stale like some bags I've gotten from other retailers. Transitioned my lab mix over the past week and she's already gobbling it down with zero stomach upset. Coat is starting to look shinier already. Really impressed with the quality for the price point.
Read this constantly for months on my Kindle and the digital file holds up perfectly. No formatting glitches anywhere. Amazing story that holds up to rereading.
I used these on a kick scooter and on a umbrella, They worked great for both. I only took off a star because the shoulder pad is weak.

I seems odd to get all excited about a booklight, but this is honestly the best booklight I have ever owned and I have gone through a lot of them, being an insomniac night reader with an early-bedtime husband. The most excellent feature on this little light is the very high quality metal gooseneck. It will move absolutely any way that you want it to go with ZERO bounceback. In addition to moving effectively right and left and up and down, the head of the light twists equally well and stays put. The light itself is pleasing with 3 LEDs, and covers the page nicely from mass market paperbacks on up to hard cover releases (I have used it now for both, as well as a trade paperback.) It is light enough to not bend or damage the book or be falling backwards. The non-skid pad inside the back of the clip keeps it from sliding around the book or falling sideways as so many of my lights with slip on clips do. The only caveat that I would mention is that you have to want a light that takes standard batteries. This takes 3 AAAs, which I love as I can use rechargable batteries. They are easy to change and don't add to much weight, but does make for a larger housing than some people want in their booklights. I'll take that any day to having to dig up expensive and sometimes hard to find "watch" batteries. I have yet to need to change the batteries after three large books worth of reading thanks to the LEDs. The light has a full and dim setting which my husband appreciates when I am reading in bed. If you are looking for a new booklight (and want one with standard batteries) you have found it. I can't recommend this highly enough.
Didn't expect much going in, but this completely blew me away. The story grabs you and doesn't let go. Way better than I thought it'd be.

Gun arrived in a box that looked like it got kicked down a flight of stairs. No bubble wrap, no protection at all, just rattling around loose inside the cardboard. There's a noticeable scuff on the nose piece right out of the package. I oiled it up and ran about fifty nails through it to test, and it fires okay, but the feed is sticky and it jammed twice on me. For what these cost, the packaging and quality control should be way better. Disappointing first experience with this brand.

Tried these for my 7mth old, and they don't stay on his feet. I tried the 12 month size first and they fell right off. Then I tried the 6 month size, which seem to fit perfectly. Within 30 minutes, both had disappeared from his feet. The reviews are so great that it makes me think that I'm doing it wrong.... Not sure how I can do that. Anyway, I'll probably try them a couple more times with hopes that they just stay on.

Honestly expected better for the price. The pieces don't line up right and I had to really force everything into place. My cat used it maybe twice and now completely ignores it. The top perch has this scratchy Velcro strip that can't be comfortable. Taking it apart just to wipe it down is a huge hassle. Looks nice assembled but not worth the frustration.

Just received this set. It is soooo cute!!! We go camping and this will look really good on our picnic table!!! It is a nice size. The mustard and ketchup are smaller than the pair you see sitting on cafe tables...which is nice when you have limited space in the fridge. The salt and pepper shakers are a larger size. The colors on the website and on the box are the same colors as the actual products; including the picnic table. The weight of this set is enough to hold the table cloth down if it is breezy. Another "must buy" for those of us that like this kind of thing!!!!

Bought these for my teenage boy who destroys everything he wears. The reinforced knees are a game changer, still intact after three months of skateboarding and roughhousing. Fit is spot on with room to grow. Seriously can't beat the quality for what you pay.
Arrived two days early in secure packaging. Looks super sturdy up close.

Bought this for fishing trips and it's taken a beating. Sun, rain, being shoved in tackle bags, still looks brand new. The adjustable cord works great for my wife too. Bright color holds up after months of use.

How is this so cheap? 3/4 of the market price. I bought 2 even though I didn't intend to initially due to the low price! Picks up correct XMP JDEC in the bios and runs 1600Mhz CL11. Brought my windows experience index from 7.3 to 7.7 for memory over the 2 x 2GB i had in the machine temporarily as my motherboard did not agree with my TEAM CL9 set I had already. Works fantastic on a Gigabyte GA-B85M-DS3H-A Gigabyte LGA 1150 Intel B85 HDMI SATA 6Gb/s USB 3.0 Micro ATX Intel Micro ATX DDR3 1600 Motherboards GA-B85M-DS3H-A paired with an i3 4170 Intel Core i3 Processor 3.7 2 BX80646I34170. I may buy some more for work as I am an IT Director, and this deal for a name brand set like this, cannot be beat.

Works, with a little indecision on my home panel- useful there. On my son's panel- inserting the transmitter trips the arc fault breakers (which I believe are becoming standard and required in many residential installations)! No use at all there!
It is simple. It is effective. It is made well. It holds on to your screws. What more could you ask for?

Got this as a quick weekend read and blew through it in one sitting. The romance moves fast but hits the right notes. Characters felt real and I genuinely cared about the brothers by the end. Nothing groundbreaking but solidly entertaining. Hoping the author continues the series because I need to know what happens next.

I bought this for my wife, who's been getting into indoor grilling, and she hasn't stopped raving about it. The sear marks on chicken and steak are legit, way better than the grill pan we used to have. It heats up evenly across the whole surface, which surprised me given the size. Yes, it's heavy, but that's kind of the point. I'd especially recommend this to anyone in an apartment who misses outdoor BBQ. Just make sure you season it properly and dry it completely after washing. My buddy borrowed ours last week and immediately ordered his own. For the price, you really can't beat it. This thing will outlive me, honestly.

The device stopped functioning after the first use. Changed battery a few times but would not power on or record audio when attached to the camera. The build felt cheap and I regret not saving a little and going with something a bit more expensive with higher quality.

I'd been hunting for this Leslie Howard classic forever and the restoration quality blew me away. The picture is crisp and clean compared to the blurry versions floating around on streaming platforms. Howard plays a Cambridge professor using an archaeological trip as cover for rescuing people out of Nazi Germany, and the whole thing has this wonderful tension where you're never quite sure who's onto him. It's basically a WWII spy thriller disguised as an academic adventure. I'd strongly recommend this to fans of vintage British cinema, anyone who loves a good espionage story, or professors who secretly wish they could be action heroes. The pacing holds up remarkably well for a film from the late thirties. My history-nerd dad watched it twice in one weekend.

I like it but it's too big for most garbage bags. I have to use an oversized bag for a liner. As in other reviews, it came dented. How can the company keep shipping these without putting them in a decent box?
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Setup was quick and the display looks solid. Wish it had backlighting though.

As usual, a quality product from Anker. Had many other cables that would charge some devices but not others. This cable works for all, and at 6 ft is a convenient length. A velcro strip attached near the end of the "big connector" end is a thoughtful addition allowing you to loop the cord for storage or to neatly reduce the length during use. Definitely recommend.

This is an easy and fun product from rubiks. This is an official Rubik's twist, but that doesn't mean that its quality is fantastic. Its not horrible, but it could be much better. Some pieces click sturdily into place, while others almost spin freely, causing some difficulty. The "stickers" on it are decent quality, have some jagged edges tho. My twist came in the multicolor option, and i do know that some buyers have gotten a blue/white pattern on theirs. Its random which you receive. OVERALL. If you want a rubiks twist and are adding to a collection, or just find that they are a lot of fun, go ahead and get this. Its not the BEST quality, but i don't think there is anything else on AMAZON that is much better. Despite the negative points above, its still fun. 4 out of 5!

Honestly, I figured the sequel would be a letdown since the first one was so good. Most follow-ups just recycle the same jokes and fall flat. I was completely wrong. My kids are obsessed and we've already watched it three times this week. The new characters are actually funny and the storyline caught me off guard with how good it is. Even my husband who usually zones out during animated stuff was laughing. If you're on the fence about buying it, just go ahead. Way better than I expected and totally worth the price.

I absolutely love my Mandala legging and have already ordered a second pair in a different pattern. The fabric is substantial enough that nothing shows through when I bend over, but they still breathe well during hot yoga. What really sold me though is how the waistband doesn't roll down mid-workout like every other brand I've tried. I'm a curvy size 14 and these fit like they were made for my body. I'd highly recommend these to anyone who struggles to find workout gear that actually works for real bodies. My sister-in-law tried mine on after Thanksgiving dinner and immediately ordered her own. Honestly worth every penny and then some. Just wish they had more color options in my size.

Book arrived in two days with Prime, packed in a sturdy mailer with no bent corners. Cover art looks even better in person and the binding feels solid. Only four stars because I'm a few chapters in and it hasn't totally grabbed me yet, but the premise is definitely interesting so far.

Picked these up on a whim and honestly, for what they cost, I'm pretty impressed. The fabric feels decent, not super thick, but it's held up to groceries and farmers market runs without any tearing. The way it tucks back into the little pouch is handy, though it takes a bit of fiddling to get it to sit flat. The carabiner clip it comes with is flimsy, so don't count on that for anything heavy. They wash fine on cold and air dry quick. My only real gripe is the strap could be longer for carrying over a shoulder, it's more of a hand-held situation. That said, you're getting a functional, cute reusable bag for a few bucks each. Can't really complain at this price point.
Initially ordered bulb to have an extra on hand. Just recently installed new bulb. So far so good.

Honestly expected more for the price. The fill is basically cheap packing material that flattens within days of sitting on it. Already half the volume it started at after just two weeks. The cover itself feels okay to the touch and the color is nice, but the filling ruins the whole thing. Wouldn't repurchase.
Seems sturdy enough but LEDs and USB ports stopped working after about a month.
Perfect for road trip lovers who want reliable navigation without fuss.

Honestly expected this feeder to be a bit bigger based on the photos, but it actually turned out to be the perfect size for my counter. The portion control is decent, each slot holds about a cup which gets my lab mix through the workday without issue. The timer mechanism works reliably, though setting it up the first time took some patience since the buttons feel a little cheap. My dog figured out the food dispensing sound within two days and now camps out next to it. The lid latch could be sturdier; a determined pet could probably pry it open. For the price point, it does what I need and beats the expensive smart feeders I was looking at. Nothing fancy but gets the job done consistently.

This is a great series. The character development is excellent and story continuity is spot on. No guessing games from book to book. T.R. Harris is a great writer and storyteller. The Sci-fi is first class and the books are all page turner turners. I'm hooked on the series. Thanks for writing these stories!
Thought this would be another basic memoir but it blew me away. The raw honesty from both perspectives makes it impossible to put down. Finished it in one sitting.

Short and sweet: This book was entertaining and fun, full of interesting characters and it moved along at a thrilling pace. The only criticism I have is over the daughter, Letty who is said to be 14 years in this book (but was 15 in Invisible Prey? Hmm...children do not grow younger as time passes). I found her to be WAY too mature for her age and I'm really hoping that Sandford doesn't consider her a lead character in future books. I did like the references and appearances of past characters like Del and Virgil (can't wait for a new Virgil Flowers book!). The dialog and banter was fun. I recommend this book. Sandford is one of the best writers out there. Good to see Davenport hasn't lost his edge.

WOW, WOW, WOW. I Tried to give it half a star but was unable to. The cinematography was cheesy as well as the acting. Wow really bad. I couldn't get past how poorly made this was to finish watching it. Too bad......the cover showed so much promise.

Got this immersion blender for under thirty bucks and honestly it punches way above its weight. Smoothies, sauces, even mashed potatoes turn out great. Cleanup is a snap under running water. Not the fanciest looking gadget but who cares at this price.

Yes! Saves my ears from wood shop noise as well as yard work machinery. I got a second one for my wife to use for her daily smoothie- the decibel level of that Blendtec is literally painful to my ears and can't be healthy to be regularly exposed to. She actually uses it!

I waited way too long to pick this up. The amount of research and thought that went into the rankings is honestly staggering, and for what you get, the price is a total steal. I've spent hours just flipping to random sections and getting sucked into the player breakdowns and historical tangents. Some of the placements will absolutely start arguments with your friends, but that's what makes it fun. The writing style is exactly what you'd expect if you follow his work, conversational, obsessive, and packed with ridiculous pop culture references. My only complaint is the book is heavy enough to use as a doorstop, but that's because there's so much content packed in. Worth every penny if you're an NBA fan.

After I put the motor mount kit on this, and a Minn kota 30lb trolling motor, this thing moves! Fits 3 but two fishing comfortably. I insist on spending around 50$ extra and putting a wood carpeted floor in this, I made mine one piece and it fit on my car roof perfectly.(09 impala) how thick is it? Its pretty damn tough! I was happy with thickness but I would still use caution around sharp objects. Otherwise excellent comfy and convenient, I mount mine to my car roof partially inflated, works great at 45mph. But I only travel short distances with it like that. And yes invest another 10-15 for a quikfill electric pump if you don't have an compressor, unless hand Inflating for 30mins is your daily workout!

Expected this to be a sturdier organizer based on the listing photos, but the internal separators are pretty flimsy and don't stay put if a slot is empty. The outer material feels decent though, much nicer than those basic plastic bins you see everywhere. My standard red wine glasses fit okay with some room to spare, but anything with a thinner stem rattles around. It does the job for cabinet storage if your glassware is on the larger side, just don't expect rigid construction. Decent for the price but not great.

Great story, a little hard to follow at times due to the number of proofing and editing errors. A lot of words were misused in sentences repeatedly. Otherwise it was a very unique story with good humor miixed in serious human travails and romance. I hope this author gets help with this in her future e-books.
Arrived fast in secure packaging. Tried them in the pool today, love the feel.

I'm a huge fan of the Saucony Jazz sneaker. They're not the most durable, nor are they particularly good for exercise or whatever. They're comfortable, though, and will serve as a basic fitness shoe. Moreover, they are fashionable. They always look classy, and this is a style that I don't think will ever really go out of style. The best part is that they're priced in such a way that I don't feel terrible about replacing them once a year. I blow through a pair of these in about a year, but Amazon usually has one or more colors of them available for a really reasonable price point. This time I went with an all-black style, but I also have some green ones. It's a lot like wearing the converse all stars, but you get a lot more support for your foot. You can buy a bunch of these in different colors, if you want to have fashionable colorful sneakers but you don't want to develop foot and back pain. And let's face it, by the way -- if you're walking around all the time, doing errands and exercise, and all that sort of thing, most sneakers are going to wear out pretty quickly. At least these are lightweight, comfortable, and fashionable -- and they don't break the bank!

Expected a lot more for what my kid kept begging for. The plastic feels cheap and one of the pieces broke within the first hour of normal play. My son was so excited when he opened it and honestly that made it worse. For the price we paid (way more than retail because everywhere else was sold out), this should've been way better quality. Wouldn't recommend unless you can find it at normal price, and even then I'd think twice. Pretty disappointing overall.

I am on my 3rd set. They work well until one of the wires break which only takes a few months. You may ask why I continue to buy them, well, the double the price alternatives don't last any longer, nor do they sound any better. The band on these fit my head better than the more expensive Sleep Phones as well.

I absolutely love these headphones, I am wearing them as I write this review. They may be the best headphones for under $30 on the market. They are not very bassy, but I don't listen to very high bass music anyway. They are great for listening to rock, classical, podcasts, and audiobooks though.
The coverlet is just what I wanted. I have looked at other products since my purchase they may cost less but do no have the same qualty.
Even though I bought the extra-large, it's way too tight. The pocket over the bust would appear very lumpy and awkward under clothes. The weave is very tight and it would be warm to wear.

Absolute blast! Pun intended. Truly fun for all ages. My 2 year old daughter loves this as much as my 6 year old son. Older neighbor kids flocked to it and were not delicate in any way, shape or form, but the stomp rocket survived and is still in great shape!
The seal ripped where I plug my headphones into and so it is now unusable. Good thing otterbox stopped making these.

I've read every book in this series and this one really stands out to me. The way the author handles two guarded people slowly opening up to each other felt genuine, not rushed or forced like so many romance novels tend to do. Grace is such a relatable character, her reluctance to let anyone in made total sense given what she'd been through. And Levi? Absolutely fell for him. He's patient and kind without being unrealistically perfect. The historical setting adds another layer that I always enjoy with these books. I stayed up way too late finishing it because I just needed to see how everything would work out. If you enjoy clean historical romance with real emotional depth, grab this one. Already counting down to the next release!
These cut through my poodle's thick coat effortlessly. The rounded safety tips give me confidence trimming around her face and paws without any accidents.

I bought this unit a couple years ago, and it is great. I use it often (mostly streaming or playing off my phone or laptop). When plugged in to the AC adapter, it is plenty loud. I use it to play songs I practice my bass to, and it's loud enough to keep up with a Hartke stack. I've never tried to play a guitar through it, but I'm sure it would be fine if you don't get carried away. When it's running on battery power, it does get significantly quieter, but still decently loud. While heavy, the carry strap does make it easy to carry around with you. All in all, I'm not sure what all the bad reviews are about. The only thing I agree with, is the radio kinda sucks. No external antenna, so if the signal is weak it will be skipped over. There is also no fine tuning to the radio. If the station isn't strong, it will be skipped over. I rarely listen to radio, so it's not a big deal for me though.

My cat has always been a great cat, and after watching the Animal Planet show, My Cat From Hell, I wanted to get some of the toys that Jackson Galaxy uses on the show. My cat does not respond to typical toys with catnip or sound making toys, or lasers. I tried most everything but I noticed how he always seemed to use this or one other toy and the cats just loved them. I play now more than ever with my kitty kitty and he loves this toy, makes him think he's killed a bird and his confidence is through the roof. Thanks GoCat for a great product and Jackson Galaxy for a great show. What are you waiting for? Go buy this for your cat and let me know if this review was helpful!

This is a couch doctor who majors in quizzical looks and doesn't accept anything on face value. Each episode is a stand-alone doctor/patient exchange without diagnosis or treatment. I just don't have the endurance to see if he really ever treats successfully.

The dial and thermostat are extremely inaccurate and it will not get the water temperature above 76 degrees. When I had the dial set at 78 the heater wouldn't even turn on but when I turned it to 80 it is on continuously but never gets above 76. I'm only trying to heat 60 gallons of water and according to the description 200 watts is more than enough for that amount of water.

I really like this shower rod. It is sturdy and the brushed stainless finish is attractive. The instructions said to fit the rod in the opening, then to remove it and extend the rod one more inch before tightening to lock it. I did this but found that the rod was too loose in the opening. I just took it out again, turned it to unlock it, extended it another inch, turned it again to lock it, and installed it. It is rock solid now! I have several InterDesign products and find all of them of good quality.

Sweet, beautifully written and evocative story of teen girl going on her first date in October. Salcedo uses gorgeous images and poignant moments in her writing, and this was definitely true here as she wove together young love, death, fear, and hope, with a nod to some horror movies along the way. A great short story to read before bed, especially at this time of year.
Price seemed right but you get what you pay for. The latch mechanism feels flimsy and I doubt it holds up long-term. Wouldn't buy again.

I reviewed this movie after seeing it in theaters and gave it 3 1/2 stars. It has grown on me after seeing it a second time. I think it is on par with the first film, but the FF movie series suffers from too much comedy! I like comic book films to be fun but, it took away the drama in this movie and our heroes seemed to be in no danger. When the Thing gets hurled into Mr. Fantastic and they are imbedded in a wall the Thing's states "That Smarts"! and peels Reed off the wall like a cartoon! Although funny, too much of this just made it seem like a parody. The Thing's rocky exterior looks much better this time around and so are the effects. The Silver Surfer is a welcomed addition to the franchise and his FX are done extremely well! I know a lot of people were disappointed in Galactus being presented as a cloud but, I think an armor clad giant with a purple helmet would look ridiculous floating though space eating planets. The film is a bit short, but over all it's fun and captures the essence of the comic book. This film is not perfect, but it is entertaining for fans of the series. I hope there will be a third entry in the series. I would like to address some problem with the Thing. I can see cross over's galore in the future and the Thing as he has been presented in these films wouldn't last one second with the Hulk if they ever do battle in a live action film! Anyway there will be lots more Marvel in the future.....I can't wait! The DVD transfer looks fantastic and there are plenty of extras to keep you busy.
Am using it on a short ultralight rod for artificials on bream and such. Nice smooth reel for light lines.

Arrived two days early in solid packaging with no dents on the box. Pulled it out and was genuinely surprised at how light and slim it felt compared to my old brick-sized backup. Setup took maybe five minutes and it kicked on quietly right away. Already got my PC, monitor, and router plugged in. First impression is great, feels well built and doesn't take up half my desk like the last one did.

This keyboard is very nice. It is sleek, heavy, and durable. I won't go on and on about it, since it is just a keyboard, but I will say that it is very fun to type on. Make sure you know where the symbols are before switching to this keyboard. No writing takes a bit of getting used to.
Read this twice already and it holds up perfectly. Dec and Holls banter never gets old. Perfect cozy winter comfort read.

I was torn between these and a few other options in the same price range, but what sold me was the detachable cable. I've ruined way too many decent headphones by snagging the cord on door handles and desk corners. The fact that I can just unplug it or swap in a replacement is a huge relief. Build quality feels solid without being overly heavy on my head during long listening sessions. Sound-wise, the mids are where these really shine, vocals and acoustic instruments come through incredibly clean and separated. Bass is present but not overwhelming, which is exactly what I wanted. Ear pads are comfortable enough for 3-4 hour stretches without my ears getting sweaty. No regrets on this purchase at all.
Perfect flick for martial arts fans who love a good laugh. Highly recommend!
Worked really well with my Lincoln Mig welder. It came in excellent condition which I really expected from Lincoln.
Best Dog toy on the market my dog plays with for hours

Watched this on a rainy weekend and really enjoyed the vibe. The 70s Stockholm setting feels authentic without being overly nostalgic, and the ensemble cast nails that awkward balance of idealism and everyday chaos you'd expect from a group living arrangement. The kids' perspectives ground the whole thing nicely, gives it heart without getting sappy. My only gripe is the pacing drags a bit in the second act and some subplots don't really go anywhere. Still, the emotional payoff at the end landed for me. The soundtrack is fantastic too, bunch of great period music I hadn't heard before. Not a perfect film but a genuinely warm, funny watch that stuck with me for a few days after. Glad I took a chance on it.
The headphone arrived with left speaker broken. Left side is completely dead.
For the price you can't beat these. Caught three bass on my first outing. Super durable and well-made.

I am so happy that CC has not only written 3,so far, excellent stories but, also kept them at a reasonable price. I'm so tired of being, personal opinion here, ripped off by authors who have a greater opinion of their ability than may be justified. I believe in paying for the author's legitimate intellectual property. However, looking at prices some of the greater authors, ( Niven, McCafrey, etc), some are having delusions of grandeur. This was a very good story and suspense was palpable. If you liked Anneka, Honor, you'll like this. Not so out there as Nova. Cannot wait to see where Sigrid and the girls go because it's a great big galaxy out there. Please keep it up...
Thought it'd be smaller based on the pictures but it's actually a decent size. Super plush and well-made. My daughter carries it everywhere now.

This lamp is replacing a smaller 3xAAA type headlamp. I wanted something more powerful and this fits the bill. Will light up an entire room and perfect for doing work in dimly lit places where you need both hands. The only complaint is that you have to cycle through all 4 modes to turn it off. I prefer some other designs where you can turn it on/off back to the same mode depending on how quickly you pressed the button. One thing i may try is putting in an inline on/off switch on the exterior wiring. I've tested pulling out the batteries with it on and reinserting batteries put the light on back on in the same mode so hopefully the mod does what I need it to do.

I've read a ton of WWII memoirs over the years and honestly, this one stands above the rest. Sledge doesn't try to make himself look like a hero or dress things up. He just tells you exactly what it was like slogging through Peleliu and Okinawa, dirt, fear, exhaustion, and all. If you know someone who's obsessed with military history or has a kid heading into the service, this is the book to give them. It's raw and unforgettable. Couldn't put it down and honestly haven't stopped thinking about it since I finished.
Way bigger than I expected and great quality. My toddler stays busy forever with this thing. Totally exceeded my expectations.

Took me forever to figure out the pairing trick but once connected this thing is awesome. The voice search is honestly the standout feature for me - being able to just speak what I want instead of typing with arrow keys is a game changer for late night scrolling. The mic picks up everything clearly even from across my living room, probably about ten feet away. All the main navigation controls respond instantly with no lag whatsoever. Sure some of the media buttons don't do anything over bluetooth but honestly I never used those anyway. Build quality feels solid and it's lightweight enough to use one-handed. Battery lasts ages too, charged it once two weeks ago and still going strong. Totally worth grabbing one.

love love love my cookware....it's been 2 years since I've had my cookware and I still love it...it still looks great, my food DOES NOT stick to the pans, they are not too heavy and wash very easily. I would buy this set again in a heart beat for someone as a gift.

Shipped fast and arrived with zero leaks, which I was worried about since I've had cleaning products show up messy before. The cap was taped and sealed tight inside a bagged section of the box, so appreciate the extra care there. First impression of the solution itself is solid, the nozzle gives you decent control over where it goes, and the smell is mild, not that harsh chemical punch you get with some brands. I tested it on an older set-in spot on our living room rug and it pulled the odor out within a few hours. Too early to speak to long-term results but so far this stuff seems legit.

Hardly any filling, my 6lb puppy was essentially sleeping on the ground.. Cheap felt feeling cover. Didn't wash well, and my puppy managed to tear a hole in it and shred it in a month. Would not recommend.

I bought this single unit soap dispenser to use next to the bathroom sink when I changed out my sink/countertop and was unable to get a second (but not a third) hole drilled in the top of my non-custom countertop. (My previous countertop had a soap dispenser in the granite top which was wonderful so I'm coming from a place of being used to pumping soap rather than handling a bar.) This dispenser was easy to install and easy to fill. No drilling is required as it comes with mounting tape and silicone. The pump itself was easy to prime (which is necessary when you add a thicker soap for sure). I purchased the dispenser with the satin nickel-like finish; however, the finish is a bit "cooler" than traditional metal satin nickel finishes. Note the pix where I show the "warm" satin nickel finish of my faucet vs. the "cool" satin nickel finish of the dispenser. And, I took a star off because the description indicated I was buying a dispenser with a satin nickel-like finish; however, the pump button itself has a shiny chrome-like finish. I don't know why they couldn't have made the pump button satin nickel finish as well! All in all it works great so functionally it's 5* but cosmetically it gets 4* and the seller gets 1* for not listing the chrome button on its web site.

OMG! What an emotional rollercoaster this book was, I was taken in from the very start and couldn't put it down. Wow I loved Hector he is my new favorite hot bunch guy! This book proves once again that they just keep getting better.
This is a great receiver. I wish it had bluetooth and the ability to stream from an android phone but I knew this going in. Yamaha seems to make a solid product.

This is yet another great addition to the Back-Up series and I loved reading this! The full range of emotions are covered here and I loved how well everything rounded out with this novella. Reading this entire series has been a great adventure filled with complex characters, an incredible storyline and an author that always leaves me wanting more. I highly recommend reading this to anyone and I received a copy of this book in exchange for an honest review.

I've had this on my Kindle for about six months now and I've gone back to reread it twice already. The formatting has held up perfectly through multiple updates and device syncs, no weird spacing issues or missing chapters like I've seen with other indie titles. The story itself stuck with me long after finishing. Theo and Mackenzie's journey hits different on the second read because you catch all the little breadcrumbs the author dropped early on. Definitely worth the purchase. Grabbed it on a whim and zero regrets.

This movie is mean, man...!!! It was clearly made with the best of intentions: a history about a Secret Society and a young man ( Jackson in his worst performance ever ) trying to get out of it. But the execution of the screenplay is so bad that all is lost...
Safely holds my Target-branded 2 burner stove plus a Coghlan griddle inside the main compartment. No banging around so nice protection.
Bought this for my backpacking trips and it fits perfectly. Would definitely recommend to any scout leaders or weekend warriors.

Been using this rack for about six months now on my daily commute and I'm honestly impressed. I haul a full grocery load twice a week and it hasn't budged or flexed weirdly at all. The mounting was pretty painless on my Trek hybrid, maybe took twenty minutes total including fiddling with the hardware. What I really appreciate is how the extenders lock down, they stay put even over rough roads and train tracks. I've got Ortlieb back rollers hanging off it daily and the fit is rock solid. It's also surprisingly light for how beefy it feels in person. Survived a couple of rainstorms with no rust issues so far. Honestly, I'd buy it again without hesitating.

The atmosphere in this one really got under my skin. Loved how the sound design built tension without relying on cheap jump scares. Pacing dragged a bit in the middle but that finale was worth sticking around for.

This is honestly such a great toy! My almost 5yo and almost 2yo have been playing with this for over a year. It's huge! It occupies them. My son always wants to make a fort, so this is perfect. It's 2 pieces that attach together. Downtowns we just use one piece and take the red top part and cover the top. The kids have so much fun chasing each other through this. I love that it stores flat and takes up no space which is great if you live in a small house or apt. I sometimes put those crawl tunnels through it as well, which is another great thing that stores flat. It's easy to put up and take down. Tons of imaginative play!
Been reading this for months and the binding is holding up great despite being tossed in my bag daily. The content is incredibly dense though, way too much detail on every single aspect of the virus.

These glow bobbers work decent for after-dark crappie trips. The light is plenty bright and stays lit for hours. My issue is the clip mechanism, it's too loose on lighter line and slides down constantly when casting. Had to pinch it with pliers to get a snug fit. Once secured they do the job fine, just expect some fiddling before you get them dialed in.
It does what it is supposed to do, it is mobile and gives peace of mind.
these are great puppy pads, they don't leak through and for us are the perfect size for our dog pen.
Arrived two days early, securely boxed. Pulled it out and was impressed by how solid it feels. Works perfectly for my project.
Great price for these track pieces. My kid's train collection needed expanding fast.
Bimetal blades are better than your blades. They last longer and seem to cut through tougher stuff
Greata ngrandson loves his new Elmo, it goes everywhere with him. He is learning how to sing along with Elmo. Great learning toy.
Keeps my babies regular and they love the flavor! I use one packet and mix it in with kitty wet food and place equal amounts on their dish.

Best cake pans on the market! I now have a small collection of these pans in different sizes and they are fantastic! They make a huge difference in the final product. Don't need to wrap the pans in baking strips because the pans are double insulated on all sides as well as the bottom, so everything bakes evenly. I bake a lot including several wedding cakes and countless birthday cakes, everything homemade, and I swear by these pans. Customer service is really great. I had some a question and the customer service representative was so helpful and gave some great advice. This company takes baking very seriously. Between the product, customer service, and the change they made to the sticky labels that come on the product (they come off much easier now), they have a devoted follower in me.

Ordered 3 (in yellow). Rec'd 2 but also 1 different ViewHD product that had a label slapped on it indicating it was what I had ordered... NOT! After explaining this very confusing situation to Amazon's now-barely-English-speaking cust. service, and because this is Amazon Marketplace and not Amazon, I have to keep the wrong thing (for which I have no use whatsoever), wait for a refund, and place a new order for the 3rd. I'm avoiding "the Marketplace" at all costs in the future.
I feel like it's overpriced for what you get. It is nice to get everything in one package but I was able to find plates of the same quality at the dollar store.
Step back after reading this book and take a good look at how you treat other people and by what you judge them.

Picked this up as a double feature and honestly it's the best movie purchase I've made in a while. Both films showcase Johnny Depp at his absolute peak, playing completely different characters that really prove why he became such a massive star. Sleepy Hollow still holds up incredibly well on repeat viewing, the atmosphere, the cinematography, that eerie fog rolling through every scene. It's genuinely creepy without relying solely on jump scares, and Tim Burton's visual style fits the story perfectly. The transfer quality is solid too, no complaints about picture or sound on my setup. My partner had never seen either film and ended up loving them both. If you're a fan of gothic horror or just appreciate great filmmaking, this combo pack is absolutely worth grabbing.

Got this on sale and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. Pratchett takes the whole "girl disguises herself as a man to join the army" trope and makes it genuinely funny without being predictable. The squad of misfit soldiers had me laughing out loud more than once, especially the scenes with the lieutenant who's completely hopeless. Jackrum is probably one of my favorite sergeants in all of Discworld now. Only knocking off a star because the middle section drags a little before the payoff, and I felt like a couple of the secondary recruits could've used more page time. Still, for the price of a paperback you're getting a solid anti-war story wrapped in satire that actually has something to say. Glad I picked it up.
Bought this for my husband's birthday and he's watched it constantly for six months. The disc still plays perfectly even after being left out of the case multiple times.
The Walt Longmire series is great!! I would recommend this series to any one who likes their mysteries with a little Western flair.
A quick and fun read. A Classic tale of a mysterious poor girl being rescued by a worldly older man.

I picked this up on a whim and honestly wasn't expecting much, but the chapter on confronting internal battles really hit home for me. The author does a great job framing everyday struggles like anxiety and self-doubt in a way that feels practical rather than preachy. What I specifically appreciated was how each section ends with reflection questions, actually sitting with those made me think differently about stuff I've been carrying for years. Took off one star because the middle section drags a bit and gets repetitive. The author makes the same point several different ways when once would've been enough. Still, the first three chapters alone are worth the price. If you're dealing with any kind of mental heaviness, this is a solid read that won't waste your time.

Box arrived with a torn corner and two bags were slightly punctured, but the food itself seems decent quality for the price. Kibble size is on the smaller side and the smell isn't as overpowering as some other fish-based brands I've tried. One of my cats nibbled at it right away, the other walked off. Too early to judge long-term, but initial thoughts are mixed.
Perfect for retro gamers wanting a solid backup controller. Highly recommend!

Barbara Devlin has never disappointed me with any novel I have read by her. She engrossed me in another time period and endeared me to characters effortlessly. Another wonderful book by an equally wonderful author.

Used these once and they are relative crap. Why you ask? Because that big, solid panel in the middle turns these into fans, which creates a burst of air that moves bugs (especially the little guys) out of harm's way. Windy Hill, indeed.

What would have happened if I got that letter when I was supposed to? Danny Collins (Pacino) is a rock star who peaked years ago. He is coasting through life playing concerts when he can and playing the same songs over and over. When he is shown a letter that John Lennon wrote him many years before he rethinks his life and career. With a new look at life he heads to New Jersey to find the son he never knew and start writing again. As many of you know by now I am a huge Pacino fan. I think he is the greatest actor working today but some of his recent movies I haven't been a big fan of. He was great in The Humbling but I thought the movie was a little slow. This is a role that seemed like a stretch for him (he does his own singing) but because he is so great he pulls it off and it seems like a role he was made for. The movie is very fun and easy to watch. The cast is great and the writing is funny and heartfelt. Only an actor like Pacino can turn a clichd cheesy line like some dinners are worth fighting for into something that is meaningful. Overall, I am a little biased because Pacino is my favorite actor but this is a great movie and his best movie in a few years. I give it an A.
My small terrier adores these. Perfect size and great value.

These are a huge hit with my two dogs and the dogs at daycare. Apparently great smell/flavor and they are low in fat and natural so the day care people are happy to have treats to share with the other dogs, even the ones that could afford to lose a few pounds. Great price, I will continue to purchase again.
I had this before and loved it this time I can barly get lids off and on-dont know what happened.
Soft fluffy, unlike a lot of stuffed animals on amazon it does not smell like chemicals.
Solid movie. Perfect for fans of classic 80s action flicks.

I've had this on my Kindle for months now and reread it twice. The story holds up beautifully even after multiple readings. The romance feels fresh every time. Milly Taiden never disappoints. Totally worth keeping in your permanent library.

I wasn't sure about dropping this much money on an instant camera when my phone takes better pictures, but the color accuracy on this thing genuinely surprised me. I shot a whole pack of film at a friend's birthday and the skin tones came out warm and natural, not washed out like the old Polaroids I remember. The exposure compensation dial is easy to tweak if you're indoors versus outside, and I got maybe one dud out of ten shots. Film is pricey, yeah, but that's the whole point, you actually think before pressing the shutter. The build feels solid and the shutter button has a nice tactile click. Worth every penny for the keepsakes.

Bought this as a gift for my mom, who grew up watching Jessica Fletcher solve crimes. She's been binge-watching every weekend since. The video quality is surprisingly good for an older show. Highly recommend for anyone who loves classic mysteries or wants a cozy series to unwind with.
The quality is good and I like the soft gray color
Not much here unless you really love basic puzzles. Fine for kids maybe, but got boring after ten minutes and deleted it.
The cooling mat works pretty well on car rides. Wish it was thicker though, my pup tore a corner pretty fast.

Been using this on my ranch dog for three straight summers now and the stuff just works. Before this, gnats would shred the tops of his ears raw by June. One quick wipe each morning and he's good to go. The bottle lasts way longer than I expected too. His ear tips finally grew hair back and stayed healed. Won't bother trying anything else.

Watched it on a lazy Sunday afternoon. It passed the time fine, but nothing really stuck with me afterward. Hudson does her usual thing and the romance feels pretty by-the-numbers. Fine for background viewing.

I bought two of these for my girlfriend, the previous one still works after 6 months but the light stopped working, not a big deal. I recently ordered another one and it stopped working after a week, but the seller was very nice and sent me a new one without even returning the old one. The product itself is good. We never tried it on a person but it sounds powerful and the electrical light looks dangerous. The charger is built into the tazer, you just slide it out and plug it in.

This is a cute idea, but it's not all that much fun. After the novelty wears off, there's not much to it. This is a miniature race track with these cars that you charge up, then let zoom around for a few laps. It's kind of neat. These teeny tiny cars - seriously there are as big as my thumbnail, have batteries and motors in them. The set needs two double-A batteries to work; and you "charge" up the little car, then let it go flying around the track. It's a little klunky, but kind of neat. Once the track is set, you place the car in the charging area and press a lever. The lever sticks these two prongs into the back of the car. The back of the car has 2 little metal pieces where the contact is made to charge the car. Mine didn't work. I had to fiddle with the wires in the back of the car but finally I was able to make contact. When the car charges, it makes a little revving noise which is kind of neat. Then you release the car, and it zooms around the track a few times. It's cute. It's also boring. The novelty of one car wears off quickly. This set claims you can race other cars, etc, but you only get one with this set. Plus, it's not like you can make a bigger or different set with this one. It's pretty limited in how you design or create a track. If it came with two cars, you could "race" them etc, but alone, it's pretty dry stuff. My nephews like to tear stuff up and re-design their own tracks but this is what it is - a single track. At least it doesn't take up much space.
Love it! Worth ever penny. FYI: it's a driver not a drill.
Been reading this on my Kindle daily for weeks and the formatting holds up perfectly. Really enjoyed the story too. Solid four stars from me.
Expected way better for the price. Keys started sticking after six weeks and now half of them don't register at all.
These silicone trays are super flexible, so the cubes pop right out.
Super comfortable and the arch support is way better than expected. Love them.
My husband is very picky about wallets. This one he loves!

Mona was a nut case just like her mother if they couldn't have you the would rather you be dead.... Mona had it all but, she wasn't happy with her husband jordan just had to have her came and eat it too... The came was Mr. Ricardo who was like a dog in heat had a beautiful loving woman named Krystal but couldn't be faithful and it caused her to run into the arms of his best friend Anthony who has loved Krystal since the first time he saw her!!!!! Hopefully the best man Anthony will win but how will he react when he realizes krystals pregnant after she aborted his baby that will be a hard pull to swallow..... Poor Jade did she die or will she make the deceit and lies and betrayal is wild in this book who hasn't Ricardo slept with smh..... Waiting on part 2
Perfect portion size for my kids' lunches. I'd definitely recommend it to parents packing school meals.

I received this Monday. Thursday I went for my walk/jog with it attached to my bag and it fail off somewhere along the way. You cant really walk/run holding the device. The device doesnt have a secure element to attach it to anything while on a walk. The case has a loop which I used to secure it to my bag. I hope to find it tomorrow but in the meantime I wouldnt recommend it for walks, jogs or runs.

This is my first ZELITE knife and it won't be my last. The shape of the handle and blade are great, the fit and finish are a pleasant surprise for a knife in this price point, and it arrived sharp! I will be looking into the rest of their stuff very soon!

This historical review of Elisabeth's history as Queen was nowhere near as gripping as her historical novel describing Elizabeth childhood. Obviously, a real history cannot exhibit the same twists and turns that you can put in a factually-based novel, but this book focused far too much on Elizabeth love life (or lack of it!) rather than the details of what was a highly political period. A good read, but not an enthralling one.
This stuff just works! I use it for cleaning my kegs, coffee mugs, thermos, tile, etc.
Arrived with the box smashed and one leg cracked clean through. Really cheap feeling material. Not worth the hassle of returning.
Glass tube was shattered on arrival. Didn't bother sending it back, just ordered a different brand.

This book wasn't great but it wasn't terrible either. It was a little hard to get through. I felt myself skipping over some of the pages. It didn't grab my attention. The ending was better than the rest of the book and almost makes me want to read the second. I didn't really connect with the characters. I just felt blah about all of it. I wouldn't really recommend this book. Its just a hard read. There isn't too much of a student teacher relationship, well it doesn't feel like that. Its almost like the author got bored writing this book in some parts too.
One would think super hot college girls would be enough to keep me watching a show, no matter how bad. I could only watch 13 minutes; should have quit after 3.

I've been using these carabiners almost daily for about six months now, mostly for hauling gear on hiking trips and securing stuff to my pack. They've taken a serious beating and still work flawlessly. No gate sticking, no weird wobble, nothing. I've had them out in heavy rain and freezing temps and the spring mechanism hasn't skipped a beat. The anodized finish has scratched up a bit on the contact points but that's purely cosmetic and honestly expected with how much I've abused them. For the price point, I genuinely didn't expect this level of longevity. I've paid way more for name brand biners that didn't hold up any better than these. Bought four more last week just to have extras around since I keep finding new uses for them.

Medium is a little too long in the legs for my 3 pound morkie. But she will grow into it. The rest fits her body well. Love the color and very warm. She looks adorable in it! Very happy with my purchase.

I can honestly say I am famous for my mashed potatoes within my family and my husband's family. Every family dinner or get together that calls for mashed potatoes, there's no discussion on whose making it- everyone knows it's me. I'll take the title as the mashed potato master. I have gone through endless amounts of potato mashers and have had handles fall off on me a few times. I just hated the design on them as I would get faitued easily. It's a workout- you'll definitely break a sweat mashing potatoes for 20 people! When I saw this masher and the handle design I had to have it. Upon opening the package, I was so excited when I picked it up and felt how comfortable it was in my hand, and most importantly how strong and sturdy it was. There is no flimsiness to it what so ever. I put it to the test with loaded mashed potatoes (sour cream, chives, bacon, cheddar cheese, the works). You can apply much more pressure with little effort and mash more effectively without tiring yourself out. The consistency also turned out better. This is exactly what I needed! I will use this masher so often and I have no concerns of it failing on me. My family members all want one now too. Thank you for making my job easier eternal chef! I have not yet used the peelers (I have my "go to" potato peeler I will not cheat on). This product was provided at a discounted price in exchange for my honest review.

Been using this belt daily for about three months now carrying a loaded nail pouch and framing bags. My only gripe is it runs a little stiff right out of the package and took a couple weeks to break in properly. Once it softened up though, it became my go-to. Holds up my gear without sagging like my old leather one did.
Got these for my niece's birthday and she loves them. The adjustable tie helps with sizing. Great little gift for kids who like fun, colorful accessories.

Showed up two days early in a sturdy little box with proper foam padding, so big plus there. Plugged it straight into my Windows 10 desktop and it was recognized instantly without hunting down any software. Picture is surprisingly crisp for the price point, way sharper than the dying webcam it replaced. Colors look natural and the auto-exposure handles my bright window setup better than expected. The adjustable focus ring is stiff enough that it stays put once you dial it in, which I appreciate. Build feels solid, not flimsy. Cable length is generous for reaching around to the back of a tower. For a budget option, this punches well above what I paid. Definitely recommend if you just need something reliable for calls.
Took me a few chapters to get hooked but the plot twists really delivered. Characters felt believable and the pacing picked up nicely.
Very nice bag. Fits a Ruger MK3 Hunter with a reflex sight no problem. Good zippers, good material, good size. Highly recommended.

Works perfectly for charging my phone and tablet at the same time. The dual ports are super convenient and both deliver full speed.

Ordered these in the lime green color and they arrived two days earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. Packaging was straightforward, just a simple blister pack, nothing fancy, but everything inside was intact and undamaged. Came with the spare ear tips in different sizes, which I appreciated since the default ones were a bit loose for my ears. Mids and highs come through crisp and clean, though don't expect deep thumping bass. Honestly, for what I paid, I'm genuinely impressed with the build quality out of the box. Loved this musical...I've always been intrigued by children's voices, having directed their plays and choirs. I continue to follow Jean-Baptiste Maunier's career.

Picked this up on a whim and blew through it in two sittings. The characters feel real and the pacing never drags. Really impressed with how the author weaves historical detail into such a page-turner. Already grabbed the first book and pre-ordered the next one.

The best part of this scene is the cannon that swivels on the turret and the Tauntaun. Let's face it-Tauntauns do not grow on trees in the Lego world and are exclusive to this set. The fact that it also comes with two Snowtroopers, the Han Solo and two Rebels means 5 minifigs and said Tauntan for $40+ the other portions of the scene. A pretty good value.
