The disc itself seems sturdier than some other titles I own that started skipping after just a few plays. Picture quality is solid and the story holds up on repeat viewings. My only real gripe is the subtitle situation, English dialogue doesn't have captions available, which made it tough when my mom watched it since she's hard of hearing. Knocking off one star for that, but overall a well-made physical release that should last in your collection.
Didn't expect much when I hit play, but this WWII drama completely hooked me. The performances feel genuine and the storytelling packs a real punch. Way better than I anticipated.
What kinda ending was that? Wasn't really feeling this book, it took me forever to finish, when I usually read 2 a day.
Switched to these a few months ago and the water stays crystal clear way longer. My two cats drink more now and the fountain doesn't get slimy. Great value.

I've had this robe for about eight months now and it still looks practically brand new. Got the red in large for lounging around the house and it's held up way better than I expected. The satin hasn't pilled or lost its shine even though I've washed it probably fifteen times. I always throw it in on gentle with cold water and hang it to dry. The stitching along the belt loops and seams is solid, nothing has come undone. It's surprisingly substantial for the price point. The red is a true bold red, not orangey. Fit wise I'm a 10 and the large gives me room without being swimming on me. Ties securely with no gaps. For a satin robe under twenty bucks you really can't go wrong here.

Both my dogs loved this treat! One of my dogs devoured this whole treat in about two minutes. My other dog savored it for a bit longer, but still didn't last quite as long as expected. One thing is for sure, they both definitely enjoyed it. One thing that is a bit confusing about this treat is that a third of them are corn, and corn is a filler that your supposed to avoid when looking for a dog treats/food. Carrots and celery are excellent for dogs, but corn is just a filler with no actual nutrients. I suppose because it it just that- a treat- that it doesn't really matter. The texture and consistency of this treat is about in the middle of a biscuit and a bone. Doesn't keep them busy very long like a rawhide, but it is more than just a one, two crunch of a typical dog biscuit like a milk bone. I think it is a pretty good treat overall, but it is quite pricey considering all of the other longer-lasting and healthier treats out there. I gave it 4 stars based on the treat itself, but if you factor in the price I would probably drop it down to about 2 1/2 stars.
Loved the courtroom scenes in this one. Connelly's legal details felt incredibly authentic throughout.

Total garbage for what they charge. The WiFi keeps dropping every few hours and the app freezes constantly. I expected way better quality at this price point. Even when it does connect, the video is laggy and pixelated. Returning this immediately.
Pleased with purchase...daughter was happy with it likes to collect these
The mat is soft and nice. It is not plush as it suggests in in the description. This might work better for smaller dogs but my 78 pound labradoodle needs more cushion.

I wanted stainless steel food dishes that sat lower than the standard locking food cups for my ferrets, for use in a Ferret Nation Cage. By mounting the holder rings upside down, this causes the bowls to wedge into the ring tighter, and thus defeats all ferret efforts to spill the contents. They've never managed it even once, but it's still easy for me to remove the bowls for cleaning and refilling. (Because there isn't a tab on the bottom of these bowls they also sit flat on the counter!) I'm much happier with these proportions and this look. I also have two 16 oz versions in our (cat-sized) travel crate. Additional Note- The cups that were sent by HorseLovers are Spot brand (by Ethical Products) and are actually all stainless-steel (no black coating on the ring and clamp, which has eventually rusted on other coop cups), and I like the look of this better. They have a thicker, sturdier ring with a looser fit than other coop cups I've bought, so I had to bend the rings a tiny bit toward oval so that the rim of the bowl jams tight against the metal prongs on the back of the clamp. Not a big deal at all, and worth it for stainless steel and a sturdier make. These bowls look like they'll last a long time.

This red and black sarong is beautiful on the outside, but the inside is blotchy and faded looking because the dyes did not penetrate through the fabric thoroughly. It looks lovely on. I have bought several other 1 world sarongs which are difficult to tell the inside from the outside. The two I bought with the hibiscus pattern are both blotchy on the inside.

My golden retriever used to throw up after every meal from eating too fast. This bowl completely fixed that problem. It's sturdy and doesn't slide around on our tile floor, which is a huge plus. The obstacles are challenging enough to slow her down without frustrating her. Cleanup takes seconds. Honestly wish I had bought this months ago instead of wasting money on cheaper options.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage. The birds look even better in person, super soft and well-made. My kids went crazy opening them. Totally worth every penny.
My two cockatiels have a lot of fun with this!

My book club picked this one last month and honestly I struggled to get through it. The story drags in the middle and the characters feel underdeveloped. I kept waiting for something to happen but it never really did. On top of that, after reading it over about three weeks, the binding already started coming apart. The pages near the center are loose and I was careful with it too. For a paperback at this price point that's pretty disappointing. Two of my friends gave up on it entirely before finishing. Not the worst thing I've read but definitely would not recommend buying it new.

Bought this for my son when he was about 5 months old because he needed something to entertain him during tummy time. He's almost a year now and it's still going strong. The thing has been dropped, chewed on, stepped on by my older kid, and somehow still works perfectly. The batteries actually last a decent amount of time too, which is surprising for a motorized toy. My only complaint is that the music gets repetitive pretty fast and there's no volume control, so after hearing the same tune for the hundredth time you might want to hide it for a few days. That said, my little guy still lights up when I turn it on. Solid purchase overall, just knock off a star for the annoying sound situation.

Ok, so I really liked Now and Then...but I LOVED Now and Again! I actually despised Layla in Emma & Cole's story. I have found that I actually really liked her in her own. Ben was perfect for her & they complimented each other so well! Awesome read! Can't wait to get my hands on Now and Forever! Keep up the great work, Brenda!

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this train set blows the expensive brands out of the water. My daughter plays with it every single day and the wooden track pieces fit together smoothly without fighting to get them aligned. The trains are solid wood and have held up to my toddler throwing them across the room more times than I want to admit. Way bigger than I thought it'd be too. We've already added extra track packs to expand it. Totally exceeded what I was hoping for.

Wasn't sure what to expect for the price but this blew me away. The fabric feels substantial, not flimsy at all. I'm normally a medium but grabbed the small based on reviews and it's perfect. Way nicer than I thought it'd be. Definitely ordering another color.

Guys, these Nest thermostats are junk. Don't waste your money and the lousy support / return policy they have. After trying a variety of these smart thermostats I eventually settled on the Radio Thermostat. It has worked great for many years now without issue. I have several locations and have never had an issue, to date. I hear the Ecobee works better too, but these Nests are a joke. The Radio Thermostat does not have the "sensing away" capability, but that is one of many things that will not work well on the Nest you paid $250 for.

I wasn't too keen on the 35mm focal length because it's a 50 mm equivalent on the Fuji X-E1. However this lens is always rewarded me with gorgeous pictures. It's strange to shoot a lens wide-open and have the degree of control over depth of field that this lens gives you. This is really an awesome piece of glass. The build quality is exceptional, it's an all metal lens,that is fairly light. I know some have complained about it being slow to focus or noisy, however other 35mm prime lens have these characteristics. I have to say I got this as a birthday gift, however if I didn't get this as a gift it would've become a must purchase.

Expected a bit more depth from this one. The concept is interesting but the execution feels rushed and some of the dialogue made me cringe. Not terrible for a rainy weekend watch, just don't go in thinking it'll blow your mind. Pretty average overall.

This series keeps getting better with every episode. The world-building is incredible and the characters feel so real. Balsa is easily one of the best female leads in anime, she is tough but also genuinely caring. The animation is gorgeous throughout and the soundtrack pulls you right into the story. I love how the show balances quiet emotional moments with real tension and action. The storylines involving the spirit world and the political intrigue keep me hooked every time. My whole family ended up watching it together and even my kids were invested in what happened next. If you enjoy fantasy with actual depth and character development, this is absolutely worth picking up. Already planning to rewatch the whole thing.
This is a good algae scraper - but much narrower than I was expecting. Would love this exact item but 3.5 or 4" wide instead of less than 2".
Bought these for my nephew's birthday and they've survived being thrown down stairs multiple times. Joints still move fine after three months. Solid toys for the price.
Got this for my nephew's birthday. The movable joints are a nice touch, lots of posing options.

I wasn't sure what to expect with these given the low price point, but I'm genuinely surprised by the quality. The detail on each animal is way better than what the pictures show, the paint job is clean with no weird smudges or fading. They've got some actual weight to them too, not that flimsy hollow plastic feel I was worried about. The rubber stopper on the bottom fits snug, which is a nice change from other novelty shakers I've bought where the plugs fall out and dump salt everywhere. Holes are sized right for a decent shake without clogging. I've got them displayed on my windowsill right now and get compliments every time someone comes over. Way cuter in person. Would definitely grab these again as a gift.

3 years later these are still my best online purchase ever. I have replaced the ear pads with some from a pair of Audeze LCD-2s and they are much more comfortable this way. After about a year and a half of heavy use, a hair got into the space between the driver and the screen and made a buzzing noise, but that was just a matter of taking it apart and removing it with a tweezer.

I received this item free in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. I love how cute they are! My kids are been choosing their molds for their eggs and pancakes every single morning. They really seem to enjoy choosing their shapes and eat all of their food. My kids needed that little extra push to get them to eat all of their food. The silicon molds are BPA-free and made of flexible yet durable 100% food grade silicone and can withstands temperatures of -20 F to 450 F. They do not stick to your food too much so it makes it really easy to separate your food from the mold. I still sprayed mine with coconut oil out of habit when I use them in the morning. It is very easy to clean and store as well. I keep them in a Ziploc in the drawer. I am sure you and your children will loves these as much as my children and I do.

Finally found a nursing bra that actually works for me! The fabric is incredibly soft and doesn't irritate my skin at all, which is a huge deal. I've been wearing it around the clock and it holds up great in the wash too. The clips are easy to manage one-handed, and the support is surprisingly good for something this comfy. Already ordered two more because I never want to take this off. Worth every penny.

Couldn't put this one down. The way it connects everyday trends to bigger shifts really clicked for me. Some chapters genuinely spooked me with how spot-on they are. Finished it in two sittings and immediately passed it to a friend.
The color nothing like the picture The shirt is small I'm 5'2 120 pnds and Medium didn't fit! The fabric is silk see true Buyer be ware!
Works better than the old one but took longer to install than I expected.
Continued primary characters always new adventures with references to previous story lines

This movie is not easy to sit through but I'm really glad I watched it. The acting felt authentic and the story doesn't hold back from showing some pretty heavy realities. I found myself thinking about it for days afterwards. The pacing does drag a bit in the middle and some of the dialogue feels a little clunky but the emotional impact is undeniable. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who likes films that tackle real social issues without sugarcoating them. It's a good pick for book clubs or discussion groups since there's so much to unpack. Just don't expect a lighthearted watch, maybe save it for when you're in the right headspace. Four stars because it's powerful and eye-opening even with a few minor flaws.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these are way better than the flimsy ones I've tried before. The buttons have a nice solid click that my puppy picked up on immediately. Way sturdier than I anticipated and the wrist straps actually stay on. Genuinely impressed.

I love this bedding for my rats. I have 2 boys. I usually don't go longer than a week without changing the bedding but this product works really well in absorbing and reducing odor. I love that this product is natural, also. I wish it this product was offered as a subsribe deal, though.
Quality is fine. Nice that they included a cord extension. Unfortunately, my Samsung S3 with Otterbox case does not fit in the bag.

Ordered this for my son's birthday and it arrived two days early in a sturdy little box, no crushed corners or anything. Opened it up and was surprised by how tiny the thing actually is, literally fits in the palm of your hand. Charged it right away and it was zipping around the living room within half an hour. Props seem fragile so I'm glad I ordered spares separately. Fun little gadget so far, just wish the battery lasted a bit longer.
These clamps are great. They are strong and are 10 times better than the camps that came with my kennel.

Got this for my 2012 MacBook Pro upgrade and honestly not impressed right out of the gate. The box showed up looking like it got kicked around the warehouse, one corner was crushed and the drive was just rattling around inside with barely any padding. No way that's okay for electronics. Miraculously it still booted up when I plugged it in, butCrystalDiskInfo shows way more power-on hours than a brand new drive should have. Pretty sure I got sent a return that somebody else already swapped out. Speeds are nowhere near what's advertised either, getting maybe 430 read on a good day. I've already started the return process. Spend a little more and buy from somewhere that actually respects their inventory.
The threads stripped out after one use. Cheap metal, wouldn't hold a tip steady at all.

Switched my dog to this from a traditional metal slip collar and what a difference. Super lightweight, doesn't pull fur, and slides on easily. Training walks are way smoother now. Really happy with it.

My allergist told me to encase my mattress and pillows because of my severe dust mite sensitivity. I was skeptical anything would actually help, but after sleeping on this for about three weeks now, my morning congestion is basically gone. No more waking up with puffy eyes and a runny nose. The cover fit my queen mattress easily and zipped shut without a struggle. I was worried it would feel crinkly or uncomfortable like some waterproof protectors do, but honestly I don't even notice it under my regular fitted sheet. It washes well too, I already ran it through the cycle once with no shrinking issues. Wish I had done this years ago instead of suffering through allergy season every single night.

This is a great menorah depending on what your needs are. Traveling during Hanukkah? This will fit perfectly in your suitcase and will be great in a hotel. Small living space? Perfect size. Obviously this is not going to be an heirloom quality piece, but in a pinch it's perfect! Standard birthday candles will fit with this.

I've had this top for almost two seasons now and it still looks practically new. I'm rough on my cycling gear too, lots of trail riding through brush and repeated washes. The material has held up beautifully with zero pilling or stretched out cuffs. I was worried the thicker fabric might feel stuffy but it breathes surprisingly well on long climbs. It's become my go-to for those chilly morning starts where you know it'll warm up later. The sun protection aspect is a bonus I didn't think I'd care about until spending full days outside. Definitely worth every penny given how long it's lasted me.

I don't know how anyone could have a hard time mounting these tires. It took me about 90 seconds without the use of any tools. Some of the reviewers here need to work on some finger strength. My youngest grandson is 8 years old, if he couldn't mount one of these tires in less than 5 minutes I would have to disown him.

I actually love this doll. I purchased this for my 7 year old daughter when I was having my son. We are a biracial family, so that the baby was a boy and a light brown/medium tan, just like her (and her brother). I'm upset because at the same time that I purchased this doll for $25, Amazon also had the white version of this doll for $19. I have a hard time understanding the huge difference. A few cents or even a dollar or two wouldn't be as insulting as paying a 30% mark up for the same doll.

Of the three Tunable White BR30 bulbs I bought three months ago, one is already dead. (That's a really, really short life for an LED bulb!) Even before that, there were a couple of flaws that really bothered me: - Apparently, you can set the default color temperature if, and only if, you have the Sylvania hub. I don't have the Sylvania hub; I'm using SmartThings. With SmartThings, I'm stuck with 2700k lights (at initial power delivery); we wanted something closer to 6500k. I don't really want to purchase a new, dedicated hub for a one-time settings pressing. (This is absolutely a preference thing, but feel like there ought to be some other way to do this; you shouldn't have to buy a hub for a one-time use if they're going to tout compatibility with another hub!) - Pairing mode is too easily triggered. I have a toddler and on multiple occasions now, she's managed to put the bulbs back into pairing mode (which unpairs them from our hub). GE Link bulbs' pairing process was an absolute pain, but we never accidentally triggered pairing with a few off/on toggles like we have with the Sylvania bulbs. - The dimmest setting isn't as dim as Hue or LIFX bulbs (but seems to be on par with GE Link and Sengled). - SmartThings Routines that trigger changes to brightness and color temperature sometimes only do one or the other. Two of the three bulbs still work, but we're not really using them as smart, tunable bulbs because of the flaws listed above.

Needed something basic for my home office and this delivered. The tension knob is super simple to adjust mid-ride, which I love. Display tracks time and distance without being complicated. Seat could use more padding but overall solid for the price.
I bought this for my daughter because the last one I bought had too much lent coming off all over her bed. But this blanket is really soft and no lint.
I really like this call. The hen calls are a good low tone, and the gobble call (watch a video) gets reply calls from turkeys almost every time. For an inexpensive box call, I couldn't be happier.
I, more than my dog, love this. Way too cute.

admittedly, this camera is very inexpensive for the feature set you get. but we needed to change batteries far too often to make this a worthwhile investment. Also the lack of optical zoom means you are essentially buying a 35 mm point and shoot, so great if that's what you want (and u r willing to spend $10/week on batteries for regular "vacation" usage). IF you want greater flexibility, and something u won't grow out of or tired of real fast, u should keep looking for something that may involve extra initially, but you will get more use of. In short, great price, but serious shortfalls w. respect to battery life and camera capabilities. Also, the cycle time between shots (especially when using flash) is painfully sloooooooow.
Eldest cat laid atop it for a day or two, but neither cat show any interest in it. They liked the box it came in though.
Love this camera. Bought for my 8 Year old and she loves it.. light weight good quality. I have always been a Sony fan...
Swapped two of these into our aging PowerEdge rig without any hiccups. Firmware recognized them immediately and they've been rock solid for months now. Great value.

Preggers Jessica Then there's a zombieland Marc Is Sinklair the book? It took me one week To finish Betsy's sad book I'm still crying tears Laura is now bad I'm tired of the same stuff Why am I still here?
This is the Mercedes of home networking routers. Fills my house with a strong signal. the 5GHz band is perfect with my Nvidia SHIELD. Great management interface.
Really enjoyed this one, though I felt lost at times without background knowledge.

Bought this after a coworker mentioned it and honestly wasn't expecting much. Turns out it completely shifted how I think about personal safety. The author doesn't sugarcoat anything, which I appreciated. Some sections genuinely made me uncomfortable, but that's kind of the point. I've already lent my copy to my sister and told my daughter's college roommate to grab one too. Basically anyone who leaves their house regularly should read this. What surprised me most was the final part about letting go of useless anxiety while keeping the awareness that actually matters. Finished it in a weekend and still think about it constantly.
As always, Oakley doesn't disappoint. This is my fourth pair of Jupiter Squared glasses.
Thought it'd be flimsy for the price but it's super sturdy and way more visible than I expected.

Got this for my work truck since I'm on the phone constantly and holding a cell while driving just isn't smart. Honestly expected tinny, cheap-sounding audio given what I paid, but callers come through surprisingly clear on my end. They say I sound decent too, though there's a slight echo if I talk too loud. The FM transmitter feature is hit or miss depending on where I'm driving. Works perfect on rural stretches, gets staticky near the city. Battery lasts me about a week of moderate use which is better than I anticipated. Voice dialing works maybe 80 percent of the time. Not perfect, but way better than the $40 no-name one I tried first and returned. Does the job for daily commuting.

Had this running in my 40 gallon for six months straight and it still works like day one. No fading on the display, suction cups haven't given out, and readings match my probe thermometer every time. Dropped it once during a water change and no issues at all. Solid little unit for the price.

Been buying this for about six months now and the quality has stayed totally consistent. My picky lab mix actually gets excited for mealtime now instead of turning his nose up. The seal on the bag holds up great even with daily use, no staleness issues at all. Coat looks shinier too. Definitely sticking with this long term.

Been carrying this little guy on my belt loop for almost a year now at the warehouse and honestly it holds up like nothing else. I've dropped it on concrete probably fifty times, used the tip to scrape gunk off pallets, and cut through heavy duty zip ties all day long. The blade still takes a nice edge when I run it over my sharpener, and the lock mechanism has zero wiggle in it. Honestly thought I'd need to replace it by now given how much abuse I put my work knives through, but this thing refuses to quit. The pocket clip has stayed tight too, which is usually the first thing that bends out on me. For the price point you really can't ask for more. Genuinely impressed.

I'd been wanting to read Mayhem for awhile since hearing so many great things about it and I'm so glad that I finally did because it was awesome! Rowan and Adam had lots of chemistry and it was interesting to see their relationship develop through the "friend zone" that Rowan kept Adam in. He is the quintessential rocker who shows a tender side when it comes to his "Peach". I would love to have had the story told from dual pov's to get more of his take on things but getting his pov in the epilogue was like unwrapping a tasty piece of chocolate at the end of a meal----it was sweet and satisfying and oh-so-good! I can't wait to read Riot and Chaos to learn more about the other guys we met in Mayhem. Great start to a great series!

Got the 25lb GoFit kettlebell about a month ago and I'm seriously impressed for what I paid. I was between this and some of the pricier brands, but honestly I can't imagine what the extra money would get you. The handle is wide enough for two-handed swings without pinching, and the vinyl coating hasn't chipped or scuffed even though I've been using it on my garage floor three times a week. The flat bottom is great too, I can set it down between sets without it rolling around. Weight feels accurate compared to my dumbbells. My only tiny complaint is it smelled a little plasticky out of the box, but that faded after a day. For the price, you really can't go wrong here. Solid buy.

My daughter likes it. But the first time she used it, one of the colors broke off. Then the inside got wet and softened the other colors. She can still use it, but as soon as the warm water hit it, its like a clay texture. She gets it under her finger nails and it makes more work for me.

Bought this for my niece's birthday and she carries it everywhere now. The fur has this really nice dense quality that makes it feel more expensive than it actually was. My one gripe is the stitching around the left eye came a little loose right out of the box. Nothing a quick thread fix couldn't solve though. Kid doesn't notice and it's held up to being dragged around for three weeks.

I've been collecting Funko Pops for a while now and grabbed this one to round out my display. Honestly, she turned out better than I expected. The face detailing is pretty clean for a mass-produced figure, and the hair sculpt has some nice texture to it that photos don't really capture. My only real gripe is the balance. She's a bit top-heavy and tends to wobble if you bump the shelf. Had to position her carefully so she stays put without leaning. The paint application on the outfit is solid though, with only a tiny smudge near the collar that you'd never notice unless you're inspecting it up close. For the price, I'm satisfied. Not the best Pop I own but definitely a decent addition to the shelf.

Gripping, fascinating science written in a flowing, easily digested style. To say I enjoyed this book would be an understatement. I was utterly enthralled by this book. You'll find the familiar subjects here; Ebola, HIV, etc. But you'll also find viruses you've likely never heard of, learn how biological reservoirs work (as much as they are understood at least), and the vital role of amplifiers in the lives of certain viruses. The various viruses are almost characters in and of themselves as the author delves into how, and why, they do what they do. Even the largely speculative chapter on how HIV might have gotten out of rural Africa and into the cities is fascinating. If you loved The Hot Zone, this is that book's bigger, brainier sibling. If you are at all interested in biology and physical science, you MUST read this book.

Took this camera on a three-week trip through Iceland last summer and it survived everything I threw at it. Got caught in a downpour near Skogafoss, dropped it on some volcanic rock, and it still fires up every single time without issue. The body has a solid, weather-sealed feel that gave me confidence shooting in rough conditions. Image quality is sharp and the autofocus locks on quickly even in low light. My only complaint is the viewfinder feels a bit cramped compared to higher-end models, and the rear screen could be brighter for sunny shooting. Battery life is decent but not great, so grab a spare. Eighteen months of heavy use later and nothing has quit on me yet. Solid purchase.
Honestly didn't expect much but my stiff labrador is moving way better after a month on these. Really surprised it worked this well.
These are very nice! No bulbs to replace and are bright and work well. Look great too.

Bought this for long kayak trips and it does the job pretty well. Ice still floating after six hours in the Florida sun, which impressed me. The lid situation takes some getting used to since it dangles around while drinking. Fits perfectly in my kayak cup holder and most car holders too. Would definitely recommend to anyone spending extended time outdoors in the heat. Not perfect but for the price you really can't complain. Dropping one star because the mouthpiece could be designed better.

Got the medium at 5'9", 165lbs. Jersey fits nicely with good breathability on warm rides, though the zipper feels a bit flimsy. The bibs are where things get frustrating, leg grippers run tight and leaving noticeable marks after an hour in the saddle. Chamois padding is decent for shorter rides but starts feeling thin past 40 miles. Fabric quality seems okay overall, nothing impressive for the price point. Not a terrible kit, but I've had better at this cost. Keeping it as a backup.

This is a very dense bone that is 5.5 inches long by about 2 inches wide. My 80 lb greyhound loves it. It's almost too big for him. I do think it cleans his teeth because he has to work so hard gnawing at it to get even the tiniest chunk to come off the end. He only gets through about half of this bone before he's full and tired. Then I remove it and save it for the next day. The 4 stars are because it's messy. It leaves orangish debris on his bed that is sticky and gross, in my opinion, not his:-) He'd give it a 10.
Took a chance on this one and glad I did. The pacing really worked for me. Would definitely recommend to friends who love fast-paced romantic suspense novels.
Really liked this trilogy. Read all three one weekend. Great characters in all the books. Loved all the Girls and their choices of life direction.
i did half of my polo shirt and almost used half of the tank. It works though so i am good.

For sports fans, some of the best bits & more from the tv & radio show that is on a bit early if you're unemployed. Mike Greenberg takes charge most of the time. Mike Golic is now well into his second career as co-anchor of the show. He was a defensive lineman in the NFL for nine years. He seems chronically grumpy mainly because he has to to put up with "nancy boy" Mike Greenberg. For his next career Greenie wants to be baseball commissioner. He has some new rules for the game that make sense: more day games & bring back double headers which would in turn shorten the season so they wouldn't have to play outside in November in Minneapolis or New York or Boston. Some make no sense. No soup will be served in any ball park. Bring back the troughs in the men's rooms, like in Wrigley field. Ah, tradition. They talk about the unwritten rules of baseball. They are moronic, numerous & as old as the game. I love them & woe be to the player that breaks them. Other sports are covered too. The "sheets of integrity" for "March Madness" college basketball is classic. Golic has no integrity when it comes picking his 64 teams. They have an annual wager that is a highlight & has included in the past Greenie milking a cow on live & Golic getting his rather hairy body waxed. But I almost forgot, this a book review not their show review. There are lots of really good pictures, thus you can read the book pretty quick. But you'll go back to read it again. For the real sports freak it is attractive enough to be a coffee-table book.
cute plates for a birthday party or any occasion. We had extras after my sons' party and the family loved using them when they came over for dinner a few days later!

Been using this for a full season now and it's held up perfectly. Took plenty of foul tips and wild pitches, still looks brand new. The weight took my kid a couple practices to adjust to but no complaints now. Solid gear.

Our 8 y.o. son bought these with his birthday money and he was so excited when he get them. He didn't know that they came in so many colors, that was a HUGE plus! He's beyond happy with his new Nerf ammo!

Got this paperback for like six bucks and honestly it's worth way more than that. I've paid double for thrillers that weren't half as engaging. The military setting feels authentic without being overloaded with jargon, and the investigation moves at a good clip. Brenner is a smart-mouthed investigator who grows on you after a few chapters even though he's kind of arrogant. Some of the middle section drags a little with procedural details that could've been trimmed, but the final act pays off well. I read it over a long weekend and never felt bored. For the price of a fancy coffee this thing kept me entertained for three solid days. Can't really argue with that math. Grab a copy if you like military mysteries with some wit.
Dropped these on concrete twice, still scratch-free. Tough stuff.

The bracelet arrived in just a plain bubble mailer with no real packaging or instructions, which was kind of a letdown. Took me a good ten minutes to figure out the clasp mechanism since there was nothing explaining how it works. Once I got it on, the paracord feels decent quality and the weave is tight. I went with the tan and black color combo and it looks sharp in person. The metal shackle is sturdy but a little fiddly to adjust with one hand. It's a okay survival bracelet for the price but nothing mind blowing. Would be nice if it came with at least a small card showing how to use the clasp. Overall not bad but feels like it's missing some basic presentation.

I've been using this Kestrel 4500NV with ATRAG for about six months now and honestly expected a lot more for the price tag. The hardware itself feels solid and the environmental readings are accurate, but the software side is a real headache. Pairing it via Bluetooth was finicky and kept dropping connection on my laptop. The ballistics features are powerful if you can figure them out, but the interface is clunky and the manual doesn't help much. I also ran into issues trying to get the Gun Library tool working on Windows 10, it just wouldn't install properly. For something this expensive, the overall user experience should be way more polished. It works, but it's frustrating more often than it should be.
I have used Lean treats for years. Love these for my dogs
It's a pretty simple product. Holds your feet together, does its job.

Excellent work. Just a note on the other negative review on this item: It is regarding a Hungarian translation, which is not this edition. Amazon links reviews together and sometimes the review under a certain product is not actually for that product. This is one of those instances. Don't let it discourage you from a great read.

My nine-year-old got hooked on the first book and begged for this one immediately. We read a couple chapters together every night and honestly, I'm enjoying it just as much as she is. The mystery keeps you guessing the whole way through, and Dobby alone makes it worth picking up. I'd especially recommend this to parents looking for something to read aloud with kids who are ready for slightly darker stories. Even my husband keeps asking what happens next. Great continuation of the series.

..... but my kitties won't eat much of it. I like to give my fur babies the best food I can afford, so I tried this. Turns out that to get them to eat it I have to mix it with the cheap gravy-laden stuff or they sample it and then leave the bulk of it on the plate. Sigh.

Lid pops off if dropped. Not spill proof will leak wherever it lays. And worst part is while washing for first use the rim sliced 3 of my knuckles deep enough to bleed profusely. I can only imagine what it might do to my child's mouth if she don't have the lid.
Connections are light duty and can break as mine did. It should come with a power supply as the connector is metric and was a little difficult to find a mate that fit.
At this price I wasn't expecting much but these are surprisingly comfy and hold up great.

When I selected this Barbie doll and horse play set (based on the upcoming movie Barbie & Her Sisters in A Pony Tale) to try, I didn't realize it was remote controlled (it appears to be the only Barbie horse so controlled so far), so this function came as a complete surprise, and once I figured out that it needed 4 AAA batteries not 2 (mentioned on the box of course but surprisingly not obvious in the battery installation instructions), it functioned exactly as it was supposed to. Controlled either by the Barbie doll remote control or by forehead button when Barbie is riding (though depending on the play area you might be able to bounce Barbie's arm activated infrared signal off the wall and make it work that way), the horse walks, stops, bows, and recovers from the bow as intended. In our experience the horse walking worked well on smooth flooring and thin carpeting, but not (obviously IMHO) on thick carpeting. Restarting the horse after it enters sleep mode is a little tedious (holding the button down until something happens) but better than the alternative of running the batteries down. I can see some definite additional play possibilities if and when they start making more of these remote control horses, especially if they speed them up a bit and add unicorns so that they can be made to ram into each other. (When I mentioned this to my 9-year-old daughter, she raised an eyebrow, folded her arms, and said, "Daddy....", then picked up the horse and stalked off.) Maybe it's another one of those differences between boys and girls things. Note: This play set is one way to (start) acquiring horses and dolls for the otherwise horseless and doll-less Barbie and Her Sisters in a Pony Tale RV Vehicle, another remarkable toy in this line.
Been using this for months with my heavy chewer and it's held up great. No tears or damage at all. Definitely worth it.

The plates are okay. We ordered 2 boxes (12 plates total), and both boxes snapped open during shipping, chipping the edge of one plate. The Black circular imprint is well done, but not quite centered in the plates, and each plate exhibits some 'uniqueness' in shape. They are fine for our purpose and the price is certainly nice. Was hoping for more here, but you do get what you pay for.

I brought this book to read on a long flight....you know, the type of location where you are trapped and will read ANYthing. I could not read this disorganized attempt at a story. I left it on the plane, grateful that I packed not one, but two books to read. I tried to like this book. The title and premise intrigued me, but the story was just awful.

For the price, you really can't beat these. My lab is a serious chewer and usually destroys plush toys in minutes, but these have lasted weeks with zero tears. The unique squeak keeps her entertained way longer than her other toys. I bought a couple and will definitely grab more. Great affordable option if your dog goes through toys fast.
Looks great, protects the tool-kind of a bear to put on but it fits nice and tight. Def worth it for the expensive tool its protecting.
Super mini vac. Does all I want. Works great on my bare floors and leather furniture and around my appartment

The paperback held up surprisingly well after carrying it around in my bag for two weeks. Spine barely creased and cover stayed intact. The story itself was just okay though. Took me longer than usual to get through because it never really grabbed me. Fans will probably enjoy it but I expected more intensity. Decent enough way to pass time but nothing memorable.

Picked this up for my 6 year old daughter and she's already asked me to read it every single night this week. The rhyming scheme is honestly what sold me, it flows so naturally and doesn't feel forced like a lot of kids books do. My kid especially loves the illustrations of Harry the beagle in his fairy getup. The part where she gets her whole princess makeover had my daughter giggling. Really sweet ending about family being what matters most. Glad I grabbed this one, it's become a bedtime staple.

I'd heard such amazing things about this book and the series it kicks off, so my expectations were honestly pretty high. What a letdown. The whole angel-demon romance concept had so much potential, but the execution just fell completely flat for me. The pacing drags for the first 200 pages with barely anything happening, and I couldn't connect with either of the main characters. Lilith comes across as trying too hard to be edgy, and Hugh is just... boring. The chemistry between them felt forced rather than natural. I kept waiting for it to get better because everyone says this series is incredible, but I finally gave up around the 60% mark. Definitely not the gripping, smart paranormal romance I was promised. Wouldn't recommend starting here.

I am not reviewing the game. It's the same Chutes and Ladders it's always been. Rather insipid for anyone over the age of 6, I'd say. No strategy, just counting. What I will review is the board, graphics, and pieces. This is a 70's retro design. I haven't played the 70's version (or at least haven't in 30 years or more), so I can't comment on the accuracy. I did like the pictures - they show little morality tales. Hard-working children who do nice things are at the bottom of each ladder, and are rewarded at the top for their labors. Lazy or mean kids are at the top of each chute, and get heir comeuppance at the bottom. My son (who is 4) enjoyed looking at each pairing and discussing how and why they succeeded or failed. That said, the board is rather busy, and it isn't entirely clear to a younger person which square corresponds to which chute or ladder. The game pieces are sturdy, though the plastic brackets are difficult for little fingers to insert the cardboard children into. The spinner works well once you punch it through. Spinning action is easy and can go for more than a few seconds. All in all, it's the same boring game it's always been. This retro edition offers some nice additional fun, but is rather busy compared to a more clean modern design.
Really cute book. Wish it would have a little more to the ending, maybe take it through the wedding and the sister's reaction.

These blocks have been a total game changer for my home practice. The foam is firm enough to provide real support in half moon and crow poses, but still comfortable under my back. Love that the purple color matches my mat perfectly. They feel durable and the grip texture keeps them from sliding on my wood floor. Definitely recommend for anyone looking to deepen their stretches.

Downloaded this to my Kindle last night and honestly couldn't put it down. The instant access was great since I didn't have to wait for anything to arrive, which was a plus. The formatting was clean, no weird glitches or missing pages like I've had with other Kindle books. The cover caught my eye right away and the story grabbed me from the first chapter. Pennie's character felt super relatable, especially the whole book club thing and trying to balance everything on a tight budget. Carter showing up totally changed the vibe and I was hooked. Finished it in one sitting. Already telling my friends about it. Definitely worth the read if you're into romance with characters that actually feel real.

I grabbed this hoping for a deep dive into the immediate postwar period across the continent, and it's decent but not great. The western Europe chapters feel well-researched and move at a good clip, but when the narrative shifts eastward, it gets noticeably thinner. I've read other histories that covered the Soviet-occupied territories with way more depth than what's here. The writing itself is accessible and never bogs down, which I appreciated. I'd recommend this to casual history readers or someone just starting to explore the 1945-1950 era. If you're already fairly well-read on the subject, you'll probably find yourself wanting more. It works as a primer, just don't expect it to be the definitive text on postwar European recovery. Three stars for being solid but not comprehensive.
Bought this as a housewarming gift for my sister who loves hosting. She was thrilled. Honestly perfect for anyone into entertaining, great quality and the price here beat Williams Sonoma by a mile.
Very cute outfit, my niece loves this! Great deal compared to the prices of American girl clothes. The dress is much shorter than I expected.

I purchased the Flitz gun/knife care kit to clean the finish on my 2 month old $3,000 pistol. The polish is advertized to be safe on "factory hot gun bluing". After polishing the finish on my firearm using the polish and a wiping t-shirt I noticed the finish was coming off. I just could not believe it. Because of FLITZ I am now going to have an extremely large repair bill.

Dani O'Malley is just a young girl...but what a strong symbol for any young woman to look up to. She is strong, independent and fights evil with no fear for herself. She defends the underdog. Eventhough her childhood was short her outlook on life is positive. Any young woman who thinks she has it rough should read this novel.

The Disney Descendants 2-pack Evie and Carlos is a great idea. After watching the movie multiple times, my niece loves the movie and immediately asked for more dolls from the show. The dolls are Barbie-sized, with an overly-large head. They don't really resemble the acotrs who plays them. There is an incredible amount of detail to the outfits. The doll's appendages bend and contort - and even pop back into place if pulled out. I love that these come in 2-packs. Even though we already have Coronation Evie, this Evie comes in a different outfit with different hair. Carlos doesn't have as much movement capability and I don't care for the plastic "Ken" hair. Would've been nice to have more realistic hair. Especially since his is cool-looking.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is surprisingly sturdy. My three year old drags it around constantly and it still looks brand new. Way better than anticipated.
Simply put, they are fantastic. Very happy with my purchase! Thank you!

I don't see how we've been able to watch this as many times as we have since purchasing it. But honestly, it's entertaining as heck and doesn't make me want to rupture my ear drums when my toddler wants to watch it every single day.

My title really says it all. This edition was assigned because it was the around which the template for my course was written, and my school didn't care to rewrite the template based on the newer, more relevant edition. This was pure laziness on their part. This edition mentions nothing newer than 2009, which, in the world advertising, is definitely ancient history. However, it's most unbearable trait was that it is wordy; the text could be cut by two thirds and not lose any valuable content. It spends a lot of time going over the same topics that it did in previous chapters. For a marketing text, you'd think the authors and publishers would have done a better job of taking their own skills to task and put forth a book that is more credible, engaging, and likable. It was all I could do just to keep my eyes open while reading it. Tip to those reading it now: you only need to read the first one to two sentences of each paragraph to get the pertinent information. The rest of it is just filler.

Bought this little guy for my toddler's birthday and he hasn't put it down since. Super soft, well-stuffed, and the stitching is solid. For what I paid, I'm genuinely impressed with the quality. He's been tossed in the wash twice already and still looks brand new.

I really couldn't be happier with this lead. It is nice and long, so we use it tied to a stake in the yard to practice "come" and play fetch. I can stay hands-free and, because it's on a stake that sticks out of the ground, it spins around and doesn't get tangled. The metal clip works great and is nice and strong. It has been totally sturdy for us so far - our puppy has reached the limit of this on numerous occasions, yet it looks and feels good as new. She has also grabbed it with her teeth any time she trips on it and no bite marks. You can't tell from the pic and I don't recall it saying in the description but, one end has the metal clip and the other end has a loop like a traditional leash - I just put that around our stake (which has it's own loop at the top so it can't come off) and it stays on perfectly. We leave it out in all weather (rain, sun, wind...no snow yet) and it's still great. It is cotton so I don't know if it will break down over time but I wouldn't hesitate to replace it since it's a great price. It has actually been a sanity saver for me since my puppy seems to love to play fetch - a 10 minute round of this tires her out enough that I can actually get things done in my house without having to always lock her in her crate...and this lead is PERFECT for playing fetch! One of the best puppy-supply purchases I have made so far!

FINALLY! I can't tell you how long I've been waiting for The Alpha King, but I know I've worked my way through a few versions of the Kindle since I first read The First Alpha! I fell deeply in love with this series way back in 2013, and since then I've checked back every week for news on the sequel. Now it's here I know it was worth the wait! I fell in love with Thomas Smith from the first page, but when I realised who he was - and how he works into the world of the Five Tribes - I fell in love all over again. I don't want to give away the twist, but if you've read The First Alpha you'll be blown away when you... well, you'll know it when you see it:) As for the romantic element, LOVE IT! I love a ballsy, take no prisoners heroine, and I love how Evelyn deals with the men she encounters in this male-dominated world of 1912. She's more than a match for 'Thomas' (or should I call him... no, no spoilers), and I can't wait to see how they deal with the Ironclaws now they're a team. Please don't make us wait so long for the next book, K A. I'm already on the edge of my seat!

Scathing, dark, and raucous, "Let's Pretend This Never Happened" is easily my favorite in a long time. Imaging Neil Gaiman and Stephen Colbert narrating your (mostly true) life story, and you'll see the brilliance of Lawson's work. Sometimes it's quick-turn-around funny and other times is a wandering journey without a word wasted. Definitely worth the read.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy mailer with zero corner dents. Popped it in right away and the picture quality blew me away. Totally worth grabbing a physical copy.
Swapped out my old halogen bulbs for these. Half the electricity bill, same brightness. Can't beat the price for this quality.
it works like a champ. i love it. thinking about getting a third

Had these about eight months now and they've held up better than I expected. Dropped them on concrete twice and not a single scratch on the lenses. Frame still feels solid with no loose screws. Wear them every weekend on the boat and the polarization cuts glare perfectly. Worth every penny.

Bought these as a gift for a friend for his birthday and he loved them! They fit great. They were little more red than maroon color shown. I'd only be concerned with how the hold up they didn't feel that sturdy.
Haven't read a book by this author that I haven't liked. Funny, sexy and fast passed. Every time I read a new one it's like visiting with friends I can't wait to see!!

Bought this for my 3 year old's birthday and it's become our go-to before bed. The squirrel tweezers are surprisingly sturdy, she's dropped them a hundred times and they still work perfectly. Love that she's building hand strength without realizing it. Quick rounds keep her attention the whole time.
This works great, unless you allow it to sit in pooled water. The battery compartment will corrode quite quickly. I brushed off the contacts with a wire brush, and elevated it. It now works great!
The wraparound design blocks dust perfectly when I'm grinding metal in the garage.

Blew through this in one sitting after loving the first book. The story really picks up once Benjamin arrives at his parents' place and connects with the new characters. The group dynamic adds a lot to the plot and the war buildup is handled so well. Couldn't put it down and already started the third one. If you enjoyed book one, this sequel absolutely delivers. Highly recommend the whole series.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage, which I appreciated since these things can get crushed in transit. Pulled it out and was genuinely surprised by how thick and dense the cardboard feels compared to others I've bought. The shape is adorable and looks nice sitting in the living room instead of an eyesore. Slid it across the floor for my two kittens and they went absolutely wild immediately. Already ordering a second one to keep upstairs.
Great price for hours of family fun. My kids 6 and 8 love guessing each other's drawings. Totally worth every penny.
The story starts with a punch and continues to grow in excitement. Sometimes it's hard to tell who are the bad guys. The book as usual is much better than the movie.
Playd alot of golf this winter and these gloves are nice if you are riding in a cart but not that practical is you are pusing a cart.
I bought this for my GSD who has an issue with mites when he is stressed. This keeps the mites under control. He hasn't ha an issue since I started using this.

I wanted to like this since the premise is compelling, but the execution falls flat. The lead actress tries her best, but the dialogue feels stilted and rehearsed, like nobody actually talked that way during the war. Historical accuracy is all over the place too, the German uniforms look like cheap Halloween costumes and the timeline gets confusing halfway through. That said, the attic scenes do build some genuine tension and the cinematography is decent for what I assume was a limited budget. I'd recommend this to middle school history teachers looking for something easy to digest, or maybe families with older kids who haven't seen better WWII films yet. Just don't expect Schindler's List or The Pianist and you won't be too disappointed.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Opened it up and was instantly impressed by the quality.

I grabbed this thinking it'd be a deep dive into restoring an old property, but honestly the renovation details felt surface-level and sometimes just plain wrong. The author glosses over the real challenges of working with historic buildings and seems to improvise on stuff that anyone who's actually done a reno would question. That said, if you're just after a light read and don't care about technical accuracy, it passes the time fine. Would maybe recommend it to casual readers who want atmosphere without substance, but anyone with actual construction or preservation experience will probably get frustrated pretty fast.
My daughter loves her. She put her in her lunch box every day so Sophie can keep her company during lunch.
Got these for my niece's birthday and she was thrilled. The little winged figures are super cute and make a great addition to her growing collection.

What can I say? I've heard about this film for years, and I finally got to watch it the other day. It was one of the best cinematic experiences that I have ever had! There isn't much in the way of a plot - a struggling father and husband buys a new bicycle in order to carry out the duties of his new job, the bike is taken away buy a passing thief, and the father and his son go out into the poverty stricken streets of Italy to find it. However, it is a journey that they will never forget, as they bond with one another, and the father's weaknesses are ultimately exposed out of an act of desperation. It is an ultimately heartbreaking ending that caps off one of the best films that I have ever seen. You owe it to yourself to see this one. Thank God that the people at Criterion cleaned it up, and gave it the DVD release that it deserves.

Mr. Putter loves giving presents at Christmas time but although he starts planning in July it always takes him until December to decide what to give his neighbor and friend, Mrs. Teaberry. He knows that she likes salt shakers that walk, dresses for her teapots etc. What he can't believe is that she actually likes fruitcake! SO he decides that this Christmas she needs a "light and airy cake". Only one problem! Mr. Putter doesn't know how to bake a cake nor does he have any of the equipment. Mr. Putter and Tabby, his cat, go to visit Mary Sue, the owner of the Sweet Shop. Mary Sue gladly helps him purchase all that he needs and so on Christmas Eve we see Mr. Putter baking the cake. How many times will it take him before he succeeds? What will Mrs. Teabody think of his gift? What happens on Christmas Day? This is a delightful, well-written and beautifully illustrated book which is one of our young son's favorites. Just adorable! Highly recommended!

I bought this on a whim after struggling to make sense of my dreams for years, and honestly didn't expect much. Most dream interpretation books I've tried are either too fluffy or way too dense to get through. This one hit a really nice sweet spot. It's grounded in Jungian concepts but explained in a way that actually makes sense without needing a psychology degree. The structure walks you through the material step by step, which I found super helpful for actually applying it to my own dream journal. I thought it might be too academic based on the description, but it's genuinely accessible. Way better than I anticipated and I've already gone back to reread sections twice. If you're on the fence, just get it.

This figure is awesome, great sculpt, detail, stellar paint job, nice articulation although somewhat limited on the arms, and the blue paint on the cockpit is a bit lacking, would of been nice if they used a slight gloss application, but all around this figure is a beast! I always preferred this jaeger to gypsy danger, it just looks more mech-like and robotic and not as streamlined as gypsy. I highly recommend purchasing this figure its well worth it, fans of pacific rim or even mech fans in general.
Had this scale about eight months now and it's still going strong despite daily use and a few drops. Readings stay consistent. Wish it had a backlight, but solid overall.

At the very beginning of the book, you get this (way too long) introduction by Randi Fang. Since the name of the character and the writer are the same, at first I thought it was the authors introduction, but it seemed like the story, so I read on. And it's a good thing too, because it was the actual story. Then after page after page of intro, finally came the interview. But before the interview could get started, there was yet more of the unnecessary yakking, where our interviewee sat at the table texting her heart out while Miss Fang ranted and raved about how attractive this vampire was. Now the story finally gets started, and it was exactly what I had expected, but it was quick. Of course, we know by this point, the relationship will not advance, so it was no hardship when you never find out what happens next, the interview is simply over. Then some more dribble about how Miss Fang thinks this Vamp-chick is super hot, and we're done. I liked it, once the story got going, but I am not motivated to read more books because it seemed that there were a lot of wasted pages.

Bought these for my daughter's snowboard season and they've held up great after two months of weekly trips. No holes, no thin spots, and the cushioning is still intact. Washed them plenty of times and they still look practically new. Worth every penny for kids who are hard on gear.

Wore this on a three-day hike in the Lakes and forgot I even had it on until I needed some cord for a makeshift guy line. Cut a small section and the inner strands are legit, not that cheap fuzzy stuff you get from market stalls. Buckle feels solid, no flimsy plastic nonsense. Nice knowing it's there if things go sideways. Not the cheapest out there but honestly worth every penny for the peace of mind alone. Grabbed one for my brother too.
Total pain to put together with all those separate cords. My dog lost interest before I finished.

As a stand-alone book, The Long Earth takes its time getting started, which may put off Pratchett's usual audience. The thing is, it's not a stand-alone. It's the first half of a 2-part series, which may explain they very many apparently random events and characters and why the ending feels so odd: it's not really the end. The Long Earth is equal parts SF and real (and very hardcore) science, with a huge number of callbacks to Sir Pterry's Science of Discworld books. Pratchett and Baxter's world-building is outstanding, believable, and meticulous. Well, aside from the steampunk airship. The humour is far more subtle than most of Pratchett's other work; more like Nation than the Discworld novels. Like Pratchett's Unseen Academicals, The Long Earth has a vaguely hallucinatory feel. This may be intentional, or a symptom of the Embuggerance. For all that, it's a relatively quick and easy read. If you're unsure about buying it, you may want to borrow a copy from a friend.

It is pretty thin stuff. Is not the heavy duty tarp you are used to. But then again have had it out covering my wood pile for a long time now and seems to be as strong and water proof as day one. So, I would say for the price I am satisfied!

A review that helps beyond...it's plastic... I was unaware/didn't think of connections from this to other machine interfaces or blast gates. Make sure you order 4" ID flex connectors or coupling of some form. without something to bridge the connection this will not work with other 4" ports (duh haha). Works great with my powertec hose though.
Perfect solution for sleeveless tops I didn't want to layer under. The lace detail is surprisingly pretty and peeks out nicely. Super lightweight fabric, no bunching underarms. Stays put all day.

This is a strong production filled with beautiful and dramatic singing, and Wixell's playing a dual role tightens the story. Some artistic lapses in the directing are made up for by the exceptional final act.
I own a lot of Chuvora jewelry and have never been disappointed. This ring is substantial but not heavy. Shiny. The size 9 was a perfect fit for my index finger. I really like jewelry from Chuvora.
Does the job for the price but honestly a regular bath towel works just as well.

Bought this after my old garlic press snapped at the hinge. Solid construction so far. Would definitely recommend to anyone who cooks with garlic regularly but doesn't want to spend a fortune on fancy brands.
It's Dr. Seuss, how can you miss??? Great quality hardcover.

For your puzzle-solvers and thinkers, this is the toy series to go. Has multiple 'levels' and different kinds to stimulate their critical thinking skills and puzzle-solving ability. Son absolutely loves these!
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box, no crushing. Opened them up and slipped them on right away. Super comfy from the first step. Love these.
Storyline kept me hooked but the image quality is pretty disappointing for Blu-ray. Lots of graininess in darker scenes and colors look muted throughout.
Looks very cheap and not cute. Some animals need to guess who they are. Just ok for the prise.

I'm using this power supply in my HTPC setup and I love it. It's whisper silent which it great for when I'm watching movies on my TV. My old PSU sounded like a wind machine of some sort. I'm very impressed with this power supply and strongly recommend it to anyone looking for a quality PSU.

Got this for my son's second birthday thinking it would make bath time way more exciting. The little fish bowl holder is honestly the best part and sticks to our tile perfectly. The crayons themselves write fine on wet surfaces, but they shrink down incredibly fast. After maybe four baths, they were already too small for my kid to grip and I had to dig them out myself. He still likes carrying the bowl around as a toy, so I guess it wasn't a total waste. Just expected more longevity for the price. Would maybe repurchase when he's older and less likely to snap them in half.

The light functions are great. However when I set the time, date and temperature and moved the top section to another position, the settings all changed. Happened many times after I reset. The alarm is just to soft to be useful. This is a very sleek modern light and I loved the blue light backing on the functions. Unfortunately, it just would not work properly. Possibly a shorted wire inside.

My crazy cats get litter everywhere even with the CatIT domed and covered litter box (which is the best box ever! Really helps to control odors!). I bought this pan mat to see if it would help. There is about 75% less litter on the floor around the box but still some getting on the floor around the mat. Maybe my cats practicing their long jumps. Maybe they are doing it on purpose because they love to watch me sweep. The mat is easy to clean and durable.

I bought my V1253 a few years ago and have loved it from the first day! I use an SD card and when the cards gets filled up (350 pix for a 1-gb card)I save it and put in another one! Nice screen. Battery stays up for a long time without being recharged! I carry it in my pocket and just love it. I'm very satisfied with it.

Got this for my 40 breeder reptile setup and it does exactly what it needs to. The combo of screen and glass sections is super practical, I can run my CHE on the screen side without worrying and still see in through the glass portion. Fit was spot on, maybe a tiny bit of wiggle room but nothing that bothers me. For what these cost compared to some of the big name brands, you're getting a really solid deal. Knocked off one star because the screen feels slightly thin, but honestly no complaints for the price. Would buy again.

Way bigger than I expected, my mail lady actually commented on it. Sheet metal feels lighter than our old one, but once bolted down solid it stays square and latches fine. Got a couple scuffs in transit but nothing major. For what I paid, this thing is a solid upgrade over a standard mailbox. Would buy again.

I already had a Roku, earlier model, in use so was predisposed towards buying another one. The HD model has a different menu set up than the XL but that's okay. Sort of keeps one attentive. In any event, I do a lot of movie streaming from amazon and Netflix and find Roku delivers quite nicely. It also has many more channel offerings than its competitors. Get one.

Bought this sink about eight months ago for a guest bathroom remodel. Looked great initially and I loved the modern design. Fast forward to last week and I noticed a small crack forming near the drain area. Now there's a slow leak underneath that's ruining my cabinet. I'm extremely careful with this bathroom since it rarely even gets used, maybe twice a week. No heavy objects dropped, no abuse whatsoever. The material just can't handle regular temperature changes from normal hot and cold water use. My plumber took one look at it and said he's seen this same issue with these sinks before. Save yourself the headache and money of replacing your vanity cabinet later. Spending a bit more on a quality sink is worth it.

I didn't want to stop reading this to do anything else. It was that good. Just loved the author's voice and the characters - including the animals. The plot kept me guessing until the end. I usually can tell who the murderer was, but not with this one. And when I found out, it felt "right." I used to love reading cozies, but then they began to feel so familiar, as if I'd read them before. Every once in a while, I'll still give a book that sounds interesting a try. It was wonderful to read this and feel that love again.

Picked this up for my husband who does remote sales calls all day and he won't stop raving about it. The earpiece is super lightweight, he sometimes forgets he's wearing it. Charging dock stuck right to his desk shelf and the magnetic connection is satisfying every time. Call quality is crystal clear according to his clients, no complaints about echo or background noise like his old headset. Battery easily gets him through a full workday plus evening calls. If you're on the phone constantly for work, this is absolutely the one to get. Way better than the pricier brands he's tried before.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but my pup's coat is shinier and he actually gets excited for mealtime now. Way better than the expensive brands.

Awful soap dispenser. I would give it no stars if I could. The bottom is screwed on. Plus it leaked from both the bottom and the top where the seam is. I had to throw it away. Complete waste of money.

Arrived with the cover bent and pages creased, so that was annoying right out of the package. Started reading anyway and honestly couldn't even get through the first few chapters. The plot goes nowhere and the writing feels like it was thrown together. Not worth the money or the wait.
This mask is excellent. It is the best mask that we have used. I have tried a lot of different ones and this is the best.
Great teapot, came in great shape, and this is so neat to use, makes just the perfect tea, and PS, YOU can use it on a ceramic stovetop

Ordained Irreverence is part of a series of four Elmo Jenkins books. I have devoured all of them. They are the greatest. While I am not part of the inner circle of the church politic, that is to say I don't get paid for what I do in the church, I know what transpires and Moody catches the spirit of the church with such good natured delight and pleasure that you can't help but love him and overlook the obvious shortcomings of those who work within the Body of Christ. We are human and how God ever made us the holder of His way forward in the world has got to be one of the great mysteries of the age. Moody captures that conundrum with good nature and good will. I highly commend all four of these Elmo Jenkins books. They are worth your eye sight.
Only four stars cuz I have to wait to read the Actual book!! But it looks like it's going to be a good one.
It is mostly in English, but when they speak Spanish - English subtitles appear, so it is all good.
Ordered a 3x and that's what the shirts says but its no bigger than a large. Miss-marked I would guess.
Decent comedy with some genuine laugh-out-loud moments, but the storyline gets pretty ridiculous halfway through. Enjoyable enough for a weekend binge, just don't expect anything groundbreaking.
These do not have the rattle in them, my kat likes the rattle ones better...

Honestly picked this up on a whim thinking it'd be one of those forgettable indie memoirs. Way off. The author's childhood is wild in ways I didn't see coming, and the writing genuinely surprised me, sharp, funny, and real without trying too hard. I finished it in two sittings and immediately went looking for whatever else he's published. Don't sleep on this one.
