I love that the kids can create sandwiches and pocket sandwiches with these flexible, felt foods. It's not just plastic food that is put on a plate.

Arrived two days early in seriously solid packaging. No dents, no scratches, nothing rattling around inside. Pulled it out and was immediately impressed by the weight and finish. The matte black looks even better in person than in the photos, and every piece felt properly machined, not cheap or flimsy. Came with all the hardware needed and clear instructions tucked right on top. Honestly, the unboxing experience alone made me feel like I got my money's worth. Haven't installed it yet but first impressions are fantastic.

Honestly didn't expect much given the price point and the fact that I'd never seen this brand at my local pet store. Figured I'd give it a shot since my shepherd has a sensitive stomach and we've burned through half a dozen premium brands with mixed results. Way beyond what I anticipated. First off, no digestive upset at all during the transition, which almost never happens for us. His coat looks noticeably shinier after about three weeks and he actually gets excited for mealtime again instead of just picking at his bowl. The kibble size is perfect for large breeds too. I was prepared to donate the bag to the shelter if it didn't work out, but this one's a keeper. Already set up subscribe and save.

These are really wonderful. They are perfect for strawberry hulling neatly and easily. I've owned a dozen. Not because they wear out; they don't. They just seem to wander away when I'm not looking.... Fortunately, they're not expensive, and Amazon seems to alway have them in stock. A must for good homekeeping 101.
Decent backup batteries for the price. Charging time is reasonable and they hold a charge well during long filming sessions.

I figured this would be just another stuffy period drama, but it completely blew me away. The writing is way sharper than I expected, and the way they balance the family drama with the servants' stories keeps every episode interesting. I binged the whole first season over a weekend. Some plotlines drag a tiny bit, but the characters grow on you fast. Way better than anything I've watched on regular TV lately.

I was honestly shocked at how affordable this pen was compared to the ones at my local pet store. Same quality, way better price. I'm using it for my two guinea pigs and it gives them way more room to run around than any standard cage ever could. The panels connect easily and feel surprisingly sturdy once you set them up. My pigs can't push through or knock it over, which was a problem with cheaper wire fences I've tried before. I also like that I can reconfigure the shape depending on where I set it up in my living room. Folds flat for storage too. For what you're paying, you really can't beat it. Would definitely recommend to anyone needing a safe play area on a budget.

Got this for my 5-year-old to mess around on our slight backyard slope. The bindings are surprisingly adjustable and actually hold her boots securely without freezing up. My only complaint is the plastic base scratches pretty fast on bare patches. Still, decent starter board for the price.

Honestly didn't think this would hold my dog's attention but it's become her favorite. I stuff it with a mix of dry food and freeze it overnight. Keeps her occupied way longer than other puzzle feeders we've tried. Washes up quick too.

Been using this station for about three weeks now and I'm mostly impressed. The temperature recovery is surprisingly quick for the price point. I switched over from a cheaper iron and the difference is night and day, especially on larger ground planes. The Hakko tip compatibility is a huge plus since I already had a collection of those laying around. My only real gripe is the hot air wand holder feels flimsy and doesn't always secure the tool properly when you set it down. I've had it pop out twice already and ended up buying a separate magnetic holder instead. For the money though, the soldering performance alone makes it worth recommending. Just plan on upgrading the bracket situation.

Got the 14" version for my brother who does long backcountry trips, and he won't shut up about it. The blade weight gives it real chopping power without wearing you out. He's cleared branches, prepped firewood, and even used the pommel to hammer tent stakes. If you know someone transitioning from basic car camping to serious off-grid stuff, this makes an awesome gift. Comes sharp enough to use right away.

Was hesitant about ordering dog food online, but this came sealed and fresh, way better than I expected. My picky eater actually finishes every bowl now, which never happened with Purina. Her coat looks noticeably shinier after about three weeks. I compared prices at PetSmart and this is honestly cheaper even with shipping. The kibble size works fine for my 60lb lab mix. Didn't think switching brands would make this much difference. Already set up subscribe and save.

I had higher hopes for this based on the listing photos and price point. Assembly took me about two hours solo, and while the instructions were mostly clear, a few of the pre-drilled holes didn't line up right. I had to force a couple bolts in at awkward angles. Once together, it's sturdy enough for everyday use but definitely lighter weight than I expected. The finish looks decent from a distance but up close you can tell it's not super high quality. For the money, I'd say it's just okay, not a steal, not a rip-off. It serves its purpose in our guest room and I'm keeping it, but I wouldn't buy it again for a main living space. Three stars feels fair.

I love this product. The price is great!!! I have always been skinny with a belly because I have 3 kids. I chose the medium size. I'm trying to flatten my tummy. This product is perfect. I love the pink (girly) color. It came on time. It was neatly wrapped. I suffer from lower back pain it supports my back. Feels really good while on. You can make it tighter but I don't want to over do it.... Will likely wear this while lifting weights as well.

I'll be damned if the secrets and treachery wasn't at an all time high. Toni had me confused for a minute but I kept reading to make sure I wasn't going crazy. Brielle, Chelle and Meachy all found themselves caught up but I wasn't expecting the secrets that came about. Blake was just trifling and doing the most. Here I thought he was messing up one situation but so much more came with it. Brielle was wrong but it was nothing she could do to change the way things panned out. I liked Brandon and his boldness at dinner and that really had me cracking up. I was pissed about the lie he told at his office but I guess he was doing what he thought was best. Eliana seemed like a very sweet person and I hate how what she thought was something special was built from lies. Chelle and Meachy had me so confused but once I started understanding what was what it really threw me for a loop. Meachy's role wasn't excused but she didn't have to let everybody else's secrets out to save her own ass. I'll admit I had a wtf look once Chelle found out Brielle's secret because I was thinking how in the world can she be mad when she's no better. Monique was bitter and wanted her cake and eat it too. Her response to KJ let me know she didn't have it all. Once the secrets started flowing it was like they'd never end. So much trust was broken but the very secrets that destroyed so much also had some good to come about. As always great job Toni and I can't wait to see what you come out with next.
I really enjoyed going back and find the beginning of the other books in this series that I have read. I sure didn't get any work done today just read and read.

Censorship and moral codes took the bite out of screwball comedy as the 1930s progressed, but in the 1940s such directors as Howard Hawks and Preston Sturges found ways to revive the genre in very high style. Not only is THE LADY EVE one of Sturge's best, it is also one of the finest in the entire genre, a comedy so potent that even the most jaded will be completely charmed. There is no way to describe the story without spoiling the fun, so suffice to say the plot concerns the heir to a fortune (Fonda)who is beset by a beautiful but predatory card shark (Stanwyck)--and who looses considerably more than his heart in the process. Considered racy for its time, Stanwyck's... manipulation of Fonda is one of the funniest elements of the film, and the movie as a whole abounds with "Garden of Eden" motifs: the name Eve, apples, and (of course) a snake. Everything moves along at a fast pace and with plenty of crackle, so there's never a dull moment, and the exceptional supporting cast includes witty performances from Charles Coburn, Eugene Pallette, William Demarest, Eric Blore, and a host of others. It would be hard to imagine any one who wouldn't enjoy seeing this film at least once--and like the best films, THE LADY EVE does not give up all her secrets in one whack. The story and performances bear up under repeated viewings. Comedy fans will enjoy it again and again!

As a very self-opinionated person, the truthful words of one of the most influential spiritual leaders in the world, Dalai Lama is surely a source of great inspiration and rare one, too. Teaches the most important values, and is of large importance for ones that lost their path in life. Food for your thoughts, most definitely.

The Gentry's, all Gentry's don't have a good rep around town, so instead of trying to make people see that their wrong about them Stone and Conway live up to their rep. Cross starts off with a chapter from Stone writing his feelings from four months ago and then jumps in to the story of what happened. Conway is a little more gentle then Stone. Stone is a playboy where as Conway has a girlfriend Erin who has grownup next door all their life. Erin has some problems of her own that no one knows about, until one day Stone sees her. What happens when Conway sees his brother and girlfriend and assumes the worst? Will it end badly?

This is the exact screen that came with my Samsung purchase of this awesome chromebook. My screen broke and I was contemplating buying a totally new laptop, until I found how easy this would be, to remove and replace the screen and pay only 1/4 amount of the computer, which was such a good buy for the price in the first place. So long as the model # and the brackets match your current (broken) screen, you will be fine. But please, do it yourself, because if you go and pay for someone to replace your screen, you have just given away money. It took me 5 minutes on youtube watching the video, 5 minutes removing my own screen, 5 minutes to order the new one, 3 business days to receive the screen via regular shipping, and 5 minutes to put the new screen in. That's exactly 3 business days and 15 minutes for a perfect solution and a chromebook that works like new!

Ordered the 4mm yellow gold comfort fit band and it arrived two days earlier than expected. Packaging was surprisingly nice, came in a sturdy little jewelry box inside a padded mailer, not just a flimsy envelope. Opening it up, the ring immediately caught the light. Really impressive shine and the polish is flawless for the price point. Slipped it on and the comfort fit lives up to the name, feels smooth all the way around with no sharp edges digging in. Sizing seems spot on based on my usual ring size. I've been wearing it around the house for a few days now to test it out and barely notice it's there. For a solid gold band at this price, honestly can't complain. Would definitely order again.

I love Deborah Bladon's books and this one is another winner I can't wait to read the other parts. Most books I hate waiting for the 2nd or 3rd part but the anticipation of her books I don't mind (I really do but I'm trying to be nice). I also love how she brings back other characters so we see how their lives are progressing and growing. We need to see Noel, and Caleb, Sadie and the others are doing. God just buy these books you won't regret it.

Ordered the 15oz bag for my two rabbits and it arrived super quick with Prime. Box was intact and the hay inside was sealed tight in a resealable bag, which kept everything fresh and fragrant. First impression was great, mostly long strands, very minimal dust, and a nice green color throughout. My bunnies went crazy for it the second I put some in their feeder. Way better than the stale stuff from the local pet store. Will definitely be ordering again on subscription.

This set of books is nothing but poorly written pornography. At least have enough respect to edit your writing. A responsibly placed comma or an appropriate capital letter does wonders. Honestly the poor literary examples and every other page containing porn were more than enough not to complete this over advertised accumulation of pond scum. Not to mention the storyline seems to copy that of a best selling novel and its movie.
These shades have survived three months in my purse without a scratch. Love them.

Recently got this as a gift. I really like the Blue color on it. Simple one button functions for switching from normal mode to sleeping mode. or tracking a activities. No screen to check how your progress is currently but I am happy with it. It don't require wifi or bluetooth connection 24/7 which will kill my phone battery which is a big up for me as I already use alot of battery life doing other stuff with my phone. Only sync when you plug the Jawbone into your phone which is good enough for me as I usually don't need to know how many steps I have taken after each hours. Easy to use food & drink tracking as they offer 3 different method to track for example typing, scanning bar code or taking a photo and enter your own nutrition data. Don't like to wear it to sleep like me? You can enter the sleeping data manually. sitting in chair too long you can set a certain amount of time to remind you to get your butt up and walk around lol. Wish Jawbone Up would release a Blackberry Z10 App to work with the current Up band. As I am running a Android version on the Blackberry Z10. Most feature work great like viewing data and stuff but usually when hitting back button on certain part of the app it would crash other than that I find this jawbone to fit my daily usage very well.

This is a really menacing figure, as befits the guard dog of the underworld of Hades. It's a sturdy figure, but may not be that suitable for smaller children due to the rough edges and fairly sharp detail on the figure. What I got it for was for use in roleplaying games. The figures for those games, of which D&D is a great example, are usually of the 25/28mm or 1/72 scale. In that scale, this figure is huge, the size of a bus. For some reason, that's how I've always pictured Cerberus, so it works for me. If you're looking for something more the size of a large dog, then this won't be for you. Otherwise, it will surely have players breaking into a nervous sweat when it's brought to the gaming table. The sculpt is dynamic and properly fierce looking, and it stands well on its own. The paint scheme is simple but very well-done. Overall, a very good figure for those interested in Greek mythology.
THOR is a great action movie, full of conflict and resolution. The plot is well written and the movie, though a fantasy, is fun to watch. It made me hope for a sequel.

Got this for my black lab so cars could spot him on evening walks. The reflective stitching is okay but nothing crazy, honestly his leash has more visibility than the collar does. Build quality seems solid enough. I'd recommend it for daytime use or as a backup, but if you need serious nighttime safety, look elsewhere.
perfect design. I redid my bathroom and have these on a shelf. I have 12 of them. Would be perfect for the pantry as well. Highly recommend if you are looking to get organized
Saved my old game discs from the trash. If you've got a massive retro collection gathering dust, grab one of these.

Wasn't sure what to expect for the price but these exceeded my expectations. I've had them for about a month now and they've become my go-to glasses for everything from morning juice to evening cocktails. The glass is thick and doesn't feel cheap at all, my kids have already knocked one over on the counter and it didn't even chip. They fit nicely in the dishwasher and don't have that weird lip some affordable glasses have. My only minor complaint is they're a touch tall for my top shelf but they still fit fine. For six glasses at this price point I honestly don't think you can do better. Comparable sets at the department stores run double what these cost and frankly feel thinner. Would definitely buy again.

Watched this three times now and the disc still plays fine, no scratches or skipping issues. The movie itself is pretty middle-of-the-road romantic comedy stuff. Watchable but nothing special. Glad the physical copy held up though.

My son will sometimes play with this ball and it talks back to him. He is 8 months old and isn't crawling yet so it is not as interesting for him as it could be if he were crawling after it but its something he can grow into.

Picked this up on a whim and ended up devouring the whole thing in one sitting. The banter between the two leads is hands down the best part, sharp, funny, and had me actually laughing out loud a few times. The chemistry feels real and not forced like some romance novels I've read lately. Fair warning, there are some scenes that are pretty explicit, so keep that in mind. Definitely grabbing the rest of the series now.

Really enjoyed the chemistry between Nadia and the love interest, those scenes had me grinning. The mystery plot kept me turning pages, though I figured out the culprit about halfway through. Still, the journey was fun enough that it didn't bother me much. The author nails the small-town atmosphere and side characters feel like real people. Knocked off a star because the ending felt a bit rushed. Solid start to a series though, will grab the next one.
Got this for my elderly mom who always burns toast. The hush button works perfectly, just press it and it stops blaring immediately. Highly recommend for anyone prone to false alarms.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these feel way more solid than my old loose ones. The holder actually keeps everything in place and having both measurement types in one compact set is super convenient.
Great Binoculars....small enough to carry in a purse and great viewing.
I can't remember the last time I cleaned a toilet. These are the best back-scratchers ever invented. Keep them hidden from any significant other or roommate who might mistakenly misuse it.

I bought these as a replacement for an older pair of Sony earbuds. I don't know if this pair will eventually present the same problem, but my experience with Sony earbuds has been very mediocre. First the good. The sound is decent, though nothing special, and the fit is pretty good. They are very comfortable and don't fall out, even when I'm jogging and sweaty. My issue with Sony earbuds is that (with every pair I've owned over the last 10 years) the sound in one ear eventually goes out, never to return. Then they're garbage. My friends have all reported having the same problem and none of us has been able to figure out what causes this problem. It does not appear to be something you can control by treating the earburs with special care of any sort. I personally believe that Sony designs them to die on you, so that you'll constantly have to keep spending another $20 to replace them. For my next pair (when these inevitably meet their one eared fate), I'm thinking of going higher end for a pair of earbuds that will last. Do I recommend these as a pair of disposable earbuds that may give you 6 good months? Yes. Do I recommend them for longer? No.

I read the audio edition and the performance by Valerie Gilbert really added good things to the tale. The historical tale has some good research into social and religious customs of the day, and terrors of the known and unknown that we are not burdened with today. It is a romance with suspense and the only complaint that I have is that it is too short.

Expected something way better based on the listing photos. The fabric has zero stretch and feels rough against skin. I'm typically a size 6 and the medium barely buttoned across my chest. The cut through the waist is super unflattering, it bunches up weirdly and clings to every curve you don't want highlighted. Color was accurate at least, but honestly not worth keeping. Disappointed because I had high hopes for this one.
Been running this filter nonstop for six months, still going strong in my turtle tank.

This light is the perfect size to carry clipped in a pocket. I like to carry it in the 5th pocket of my jeans next to my leatherman sidekick with my main EDC knife in my main pocket and I never notice it's there. It's saved my butt a couple times too needing to find things in the dark or the last time I locked myself out of my truck. Bright enough for most utility tasks, solid construction, sturdy pocket clip and a simple single mode operation via a tailcap switch. For me this is a perfect EDC utility light.
Awesome fit and very comfortable..I'm a tall guy and it was a perfect fit.

Loved how Woods weaves the New York City settings into this one. The restaurant scenes felt authentic, and Stone's witty banter with Dino never gets old. Picked this up at the airport and finished it before my flight landed. Classic Barrington fun with enough twists to keep things interesting.

This review is for all four books out so far. Each one is short and reads like a single book broken into parts. However it's worth giving the series a try because it's awesome. The MC is a great antihero, selfish, sarcastic and funny. The characters are such that this is the most "real" feeling fantasy series I've read. Great world building and character development.

I'd definitely recommend this book to anyone who's tired of complicated diet trends and just wants something straightforward. Dr. McWayne breaks everything down into manageable steps without pushing supplements or meal plans on you, which is honestly rare these days. I've been following the guidelines for about three weeks now and have lost a few pounds without feeling miserable or deprived. The reason I'm giving four stars instead of five is that some of the food recommendations get a bit repetitive, and I wish there were more recipe ideas included. That said, if you're someone who struggles with knowing where to start with weight loss, or you feel overwhelmed by all the conflicting advice out there, this is a solid, no-nonsense place to begin. Worth the read for sure.

Really convenient for controlling my living room PC from the couch. Keys have a nice tactile feel and the backlighting is surprisingly useful at night. Wish the USB dongle had a longer range though, starts cutting out past about ten feet.
Bought this for my niece's first birthday and she's obsessed. The songs aren't even annoying. Perfect gift for any toddler learning their letters.
Honestly can't believe how sturdy this is for what we paid. My daughter spends hours out here swinging. Way better quality than the flimsy ones at the big box stores.

Add this book to the growing pile of books to give a child waiting desperately for the next (and final) installment in the Harry Potter series. This may make the wait a little less unbearable, though nothing will be much solace once J.K. Rowling pens the last page in Book 7. There's only so much one can do about that, after all. The Thief of Always is also a great choice for anyone smitten by Lemony Snicket, as it features a similarly dark story line with menacing adult characters. There's none of the wonderful banter between author and reader found in A Series of Unfortunate Events, nor really any of the wickedly twisted humor, but there should be just enough terror and danger to keep most fans of this genre riveted. Harvey Swick is 10 years old and very bored with the long, cold days of February. One day a mysterious man appears, suddenly, in Harvey's room. The man asks Harvey if he'd like to go someplace where life is always fun. Being a self-centered yet somewhat strangely trusting 10 year old, Harvey agrees, and he's led away by the man. The house where the mysterious man takes Harvey is in a land that's always sunny during the day. Halloween and Christmas, those two revered favorite holidays of children, come every evening. Harvey and another boy, Wendell, have all their wishes granted in this wondrous house, but one day Harvey starts to see that all isn't as it should be, and evil lurks beneath the facade of perfection... A quick and satisfying read, this is as entertaining for adult fans of the genre as children.

I bought this to float out in the lake, keeps my shoulders even with the water i weigh 170lbs. Works good for floating in water drinking your favor drink and gives you the comfort if your a bad swimmer like me.
A stone fell out after having it for just one week. and I did not wear it everyday. Not worth the trouble of sending it back

Got this for about five bucks on Blu-ray and honestly it's worth every penny. The story follows a straight-laced couple played by Christian Bale and Kate Beckinsale who end up staying at Bale's mom's place in the Hollywood Hills. Frances McDormand plays the mom, a music producer living that carefree rock and roll lifestyle, and she's easily the best part of the whole thing. The chemistry between her and Alessandro Nivola as her much younger boyfriend feels surprisingly real. The plot meanders a bit and doesn't really go anywhere explosive, but the vibe is chill and the soundtrack is genuinely great. For what I paid, this was a solid pickup. Four stars because the ending felt a little abrupt, but overall a decent watch for a lazy Sunday afternoon.
I bought this for my 8 year old for Christmas. He really had a great time building it with his dad and loves flinging things all over the house. He also had a great time painting his!
A nice idea that my daughter loved, too bad the quality was so poor that it couldn't even last through its Second Use.

I've had this little guy for about four months now and the keep-warm function is what really sells it. I work weird hours and sometimes don't eat dinner until 10 or 11 at night. I'll make a batch in the afternoon, switch it to keep warm, and come back hours later to rice that still tastes freshly made. No crusty edges, no weird smell, just perfect fluffy rice every single time. The three-cup size is ideal for one or two people without taking up half your counter. My only minor complaint is the cord is pretty short so you need an outlet close by. Cleanup is a breeze since the inner pot wipes clean with almost no effort. Worth every penny if you eat rice regularly.

It works as a lift but not as I wanted it for which was to be able to place a dish under it and cook in two dishes at once in my pressure cooker. The legs are no where as long as in the image. Not sure if the product was changed from original images, but the legs are not tall at all. That said, it is sturdy and works so we are keeping it
Works as advertised. Unfortunately I purchased an iPod Touch pretty soon after which obviously relegated the Zen to the junk pile. Poor little fella.

I've had this paperback for about eight months now and it's been through quite a bit with me. Tossed in backpacks, read at the beach, left in a hot car for a week (oops). The spine has held up surprisingly well with only minimal creasing, and not a single page has come loose. I was worried because the binding felt a little stiff at first, but after multiple reads it's softened up nicely without falling apart. The story itself hooked me right from the start, though the pacing dragged in a few spots around the middle section. Still thinking about the ending weeks later. Would've given five stars if the author hadn't rushed the final act. Solid addition to my shelf and it'll survive being passed around to friends.
Does what it's supposed to do: evenly cast softened light. Great size and a breeze to install.

Got this for my 3 year old son actually, as he loves all farm animals - horses included. It's very cute and he just loves playing with it. He has 3 large Breyer horses that fit perfectly in the stalls and he loves to play with his "baby" horses in the fenced in yard. However, the prongs that hold the stall doors in place break VERY easily - 2 of 6 are down for the count within the first month. One broke through play - granted, he is a 3 year old boy and is not exactly "gentle" with his toys - but the other broke during assembly. It was easy to put this barn together so there was minimal force applied. I contacted Breyer for some replacement doors, but was informed that they do not have a parts department. My son probably hasn't even noticed that the doors are missing so I didn't press the issue, but it's till annoying. But again, cute barn, gender neutral, and I would buy it again, considering the price.

I've been using this bird seed for about three months now and the birds in my yard absolutely love it. I get a great mix of cardinals, chickadees, and finches at my feeders every morning. The seed is fresh and doesn't have that dusty filler stuff you find in cheaper brands at the grocery store. My only complaint is that some of the larger sunflower shells end up on the ground underneath the feeder, but that's pretty normal for any seed mix. I'd definitely recommend this to backyard birders who want quality seed without paying boutique prices. It's also great if you like making your own feeder projects, the seeds hold together well with gelatin mixtures. I'll be ordering again once my current bag runs low.
Unit works, but the cover seem to big for my High sierra pack, so it don't fit in flush. The value works good, no spills.
Thought these would leak like my old ones, but they sealed perfectly. Surprised how clear the lenses are too.

Can't believe something this cheap makes restaurant-quality waffles. Heats up fast, cooks evenly, and the nonstick surface wipes clean in seconds. I've been making them every weekend since it arrived. For under thirty bucks this is honestly one of the best kitchen purchases I've made all year.
my 4yr old LOVES this toy and cant wait to use it at the beach

Picked this up months ago and finally got around to finishing it. Took a while to get into but once Harold's situation clicks, the pages turn fast. What surprised me is how well the paperback has held up. I carried this thing in my backpack for weeks, shoved it in glove compartments, spilled coffee near it, and the spine barely creased. Cover's still flat, no loose pages. For a trade paperback that's pretty solid. The story itself is dark and weird in ways that won't work for everyone. Some sections dragged and I skimmed a little. But the ending stuck with me more than I expected. Four stars because the middle could've been tighter but overall glad I stuck with it. Would lend it to a friend.

I am very disappointed in this product. And, I'm disappointed in myself for not calling Dremel within the first year of getting it and complaining. First I'll describe my disappointment when it RAN: -- its heavy -- its noisy - scares both my dogs. The less "sophisticated" pedi-paw is easier to use and not as noisy. -- battery charge didn't last long. Second, when it didn't run: -- I'd plug it into the charger and into the wall. It appeared to charge, but upon using it, within minutes it would lose power again. In the 3 years since I originally purchased this product on Amazon, I have used it only a few times. I just recently saw it in the "dog grooming box" and thought, "Hey, let me try this again, before I throw it out". Plug it into charger and into the wall, and nothing. No light, nada. So I call Dremel Customer service and explain the general problem I've had with this product since the beginning and asked if based on these symptoms, it is the charger, the battery or both? The answer was disappointing too. No idea. You'd think there would be some experience with this set of problems. The cost of replacing both the charger and the battery is more than buying a new one at Walmart. She did suggest sending it into Dremel and explaining and maybe they would do something about it. I considered that, but spending another $5 or so on shipping for a product that really wasn't very good in the first place is just not worth it. Maybe the product I received was a lemon compared to all the other great reviews out there. But still, I found it way too noisy to be useful on an animal. Dang, hate wasting money.
Perfect for first-time cavy owners! Assembly took maybe ten minutes, and both of my girls took to it immediately. Spacious enough for proper zoomies.

I picked the "Small" size. For the review I chose "Fits as expected" but that's not EXACTLY true. The sleeves seem a bit too short for my liking, the body a bit too long for my liking. Perhaps that evens things out! But the overall size is nice, not too baggy and not too tight. Maybe a bit baggier than I'd like - it looks just like the picture - I could go for something a tad more form fitting. The sleeves are a bit short for my liking; raising my hands up pointing ahead of me results in about 3 inches of arm are exposed. The body length is a bit too long for my liking by about 2-3 inches. I was worried this would be very form fitting and thus wouldn't allow for a heavier shirt underneath. But the the small fits me about the way shown in the product picture. There's room for a sweater/sweatshirt. The areas with fleece are warm, soft and comfortable. The sleeves do not have a fleece lining but they too are very comfortable - after all, arms move a lot so having a thinner material makes for easier movement. Nice. I would not mind if it was a BIT more form fitting, it's ever so slightly frumpy (again as seen in the product photo). Aside from the sizing.. it's still very comfortable. Has ties to make it a bit smaller, a nice little hood that doesn't fall over my eyes, the fleece is super soft and comfortable and made me noticeable warmer in a cool room. Has on inside pocket on your left side. Very solid product especially for the price.

Switched to this hoping the premium price tag meant better quality kibble for my two labs. They ate it fine without complaint, but honestly for what this costs per bag, I expected way more. Their coats look exactly the same as they did on our previous cheaper brand, and one of them still scratches constantly. Can't justify spending nearly double when the results just aren't there. Going back to our old food after this bag runs out.
liked the original style I had for years but it finally died. This one works fine.

The Boy on the Bridge is M.R. Carey's long-awaited sequel to The Girl With All the Gifts. As in the first book a plague has swept through the world making humans that contract the fungus "hungries"--essentially zombies whose only purpose is to devour the flesh of living creatures. Rosie, a heavily fortified vehicle, filled with soldiers and scientists sets out from Beacon (the last fortified encampment in the UK) to find a cure. A third type of intelligent life, "the children", discovers them in a village where the scientists have been taking samples of hungries. A soldier attacks and kills one of the children and they return hostilities. The dead child is taken for research, but the rest of the clan follows the retreating Rosie everywhere. The story is filled with action, intrigue, and fascinating characters making for a page turning story. I highly recommend this science fiction book.

Did they really think there would be no consequences to their actions? No, I take it back. That was not the only thing that baffled me. The entire second half of the movie baffled me. ABOVE AND BEYOND is a quasi-documentary true life account of the role that Colonel Paul Tibbets played as the pilot of the B-29 Superfortress that dropped the atomic bomb on Hiroshima in 1945. From start to finish, the focus is squarely on the pressures placed on Tibbets (Robert Taylor) and on his wife (Eleanor Parker) who must endure many months of separation from him, all the while with her never knowing his true objective. Taylor plays Tibbets as a basically decent sort who has to confront early on that it will be his finger that will drop a bomb killing tens of thousands of Japanese men, women, and children. There is a key scene when Tibbets' commanding officer gives him a button to push and tells him that if he pushes it, more than one hundred thousand will perish. Tibbets responds by pushing it. This sets the tone of the movie. Tibbets has to be hard on himself so that the war may end sooner. He understands a brutal paradox of war--that for thousands of his people to live, an equal number of the enemy must die. His wife, of course, does not have the luxury of knowing what he knows and her reaction of resentment is eminently understandable. ABOVE AND BEYOND is not a plot driven film. It is no more than a straightforward recording of the pressures faced by one good man who knows that some sacrifices must be made to win a war. And this is the problem with movies like this. Tibbets and his wife are essentially static characters with no room for growth. Taylor shows emotion by growing surly. His wife becomes stressed out. Yet the war itself seems little more than a backdrop against which one family plays out a series of squabbles. The tragedy of war films in general is that such squabbles are often an inevitable result of the much greater carnage occurring discretely offscreen.

There are tons of restrictions about the placement which make the secondary temperature gauge virtually useless. Who has the PERFECT spot to mount it in relation to the main device? I thought you could mount the temperature gauge anywhere outside but you can not. Can't be in the sun, can't get wet, can't have X number of walls or barriers between the main unit and the other gauge. I actually should have sent it back. Her heaven sounds good enough to me that I might have to reconsider my whole "heaven" thing. Besides, she put dogs in her heaven so the book got an automatic 3 stars just for that. Susie, the murdered girl narrator is believable and without a shred of self pity or angst. Her story unfolds much like you would expect it to as she describes the aftermath of disaster. I loved the grandma, was puzzled by the mother and thought she captured the sister, brother and murderer very well. I was glad she didn't go into any kind of poor murderer he had a terrible life, thing. Ya gotta figure he did. And I'm glad she stuck it to him in the end... She really captured my interest with her portrayal of the father and I was touched by his travels through grief, despair, revenge and losses... Enjoy the book. It's well under the hype radar but well worth it as a good read.

As soon as we opened up our Dizzy Dancers, my 4 year old daughter was having a big time. She could easily use it and we were all amazed how fast and long it will spin on a smooth surface. We took them on a trip to her grandparents who have hardwood floors and she had a grand time with them there. These are quality items, well-built and will give your young ones years of fun. (and us adults are getting a kick out of them as well!)

I picked this up expecting another predictable beach read set in the Sunshine State, but White actually delivers something with more teeth. The characters aren't just quirky for the sake of being quirky, they feel like people you'd actually run into at a marina or a bait shop. What surprised me most was how the plot doesn't rely on the usual Florida stereotypes to carry the weight. There's real tension here, and the dialogue has a sharpness I wasn't anticipating. My only gripe is that it takes about fifty pages to really find its rhythm, and a couple of the secondary storylines feel like they needed another pass. Still, once it kicks into gear, it's a genuinely solid read. Way better than I thought it'd be, honestly.
No complaints, does exactly what it should. Pins are tight too, so no loose connections.
This is one of the first Mariah Stewart books I read & I enjoyed her character development & story telling style.
Crazy Bright. Love the High Quality Aluminum Body and Strong Magnets (on base and pocket clip).

I've had this for about four months now and I'm honestly torn. The motor is surprisingly powerful for the size. I make smoothies every morning and it blends frozen fruit with no problem, which I really appreciate. The chopper attachment works decently for onions and herbs too. My main complaint is the blade guard design. It's supposed to be a safety feature but it's ridiculously bulky and makes it hard to reach into smaller pots when I'm blending soup directly on the stove. Food also gets trapped underneath the guard constantly and it's a real pain to scrub clean by hand. The shaft is supposed to be dishwasher safe but water still seeps inside. It gets the job done but the design flaws are frustrating.

Got this for my iPad after wasting money on a more expensive brand that left bubbles everywhere. The 3M film went on smooth with minimal effort, and the included squeegee helped push out the few air pockets that popped up. Clarity is great, doesn't dull the screen at all and touch sensitivity isn't affected. For what you're paying, you get a solid protector that does the job without the premium markup. Definitely reorder when I need a replacement.

Got this for my daughter's birthday and she was pretty excited until we opened the box and realized there are zero animals included. The carousel itself is actually really cute and sturdy, and the spinning mechanism works smoothly without any weird noises. The paint job and little details are nicely done. But honestly, for the price point, throwing in at least one little figure would make a huge difference. My kid still enjoys spinning it and putting her other small toys on it, so it's not a total bust. Just wish the listing made it more obvious that you're only getting the ride itself.

I fell in love with this story and the Vega Brothers. I am glad Kahn finally was able to be with Bailey, the love he lost so long ago when he was forced to go to war. He had to wait a long time, but he finally got the family he wanted. I hope the government forgets about thee Vega Brothers, they have been through enough. This was a well written story with a great plot. I received this ARC in exchange for an honest review.

Bought these for a recent overnight trip in the Smokies and they were a solid hit. The flavor is surprisingly close to the real thing, sweet, tangy, with a decent graham cracker crust feel. Not quite as creamy as a fresh slice from a restaurant, but after ten miles of sweating, nobody in our group was complaining. For freeze-dried dessert, the price is really reasonable. I've seen similar backcountry treats go for double what these cost, so stocking up on a few packs didn't hurt the wallet too badly. They pack light and rehydrate fast with just a little cold water. My only gripe is the portion size feels a touch small for sharing. I'd say one pack per person is the move. Will definitely reorder for future hikes.
Fantastic design. No debris falls out with the ends designed as they are.
the mysteries that involved a young woman who was homeless after the death of her mother.the trouble she found her self i
3 and 4 year old got a kick out of this. Very cool novelty toy

I loved this panels so much I bought three in my first order then two more to mirror the other side of the room. They add sophistication to my apartment instantly. I used mounting tape to attach to the wall since I want minimal damage. The panels are light so maneuvering them was not an issue. Theyd break under extreme force so don't be reckless. I also used a panel to frame my makeshift mirror for my vanity corner. Theyre very handy.

Perfect fit (I'm 5'10" 165lb - 1.79m 73kg) and chest width, hips and leg length is all good. Materials are great and comfortable. Used on pool training and some miles on the bike and feels and endures just right. Great product for the money is worth.
ordered my regular size and they fit fine. Great look and very comfortable.
Works fine for smaller gauge wire. I'd recommend it to DIYers, but pros might want something with longer handles for leverage.

I was pretty skeptical about trying this since nothing else worked for my two males who kept marking near the front door. After about a week of keeping this plugged in, the tension in my apartment dropped significantly. They're actually hanging out in the same room now without growling, and the marking has stopped completely. I noticed a difference within maybe five or six days, though I almost gave up before that. My advice is to give it time to build up in the environment. The refills last me roughly three and a half weeks before the scent fades. It's not cheap to run continuously, but honestly the peace in my household makes it worth every penny. Just wish they sold larger refill bottles.

I am a big fan of SCREAM 1 & 2... and I was really hoping that Wes Craven might be able to succeed in this TRIOLOGY but as all triologies fall down... Scream 3 was as bad if not worse! The scenes of 3 are much weaker than of 1 & 2... the thrill, suspense and surprises are very low! If you are buying the Boxed set or building Scream library go ahead and buy it... if not don't consider it as it is very disappointing, at least in comparison to the 1 & 2 it failed!

Bought this for my 6 month old and he's obsessed with the spinning shell. The gears on the side are such a cool touch, he keeps flipping them over and over. Really sturdy too, survived plenty of drops already.

Swapped out the old fluorescent tubes in my garage workshop eight months ago and these are still going strong. No flickering, no dimming, just consistent bright light every time I flip the switch. Survived a brutal winter with zero issues. The energy savings alone paid for itself already. Ordering another set for my buddy's shop.
If you love 80s action flicks, pick this up immediately. The extras are great and the transfer looks fantastic on a big screen.
Wow the Walker brothers are just amazing. Can't wait for the story on Braydon's twin. I love Nicole Edwards books!!!
Sound quality is decent but the battery dies after just two hours of use.

Nothing says 'Merica like these bad ass Classic American Patriot Flag Wayfarer sunglasses. These sunglasses are as amazing as the grand finale fireworks show. They're built strong like this amazing country I live in and will get plenty of attention.
Loved the toy....my daughter has nothing like it. We will keep it as the condition is very acceptable.

This movie to me was and is amazing. I saw it (rented it) and then bought it so I could watch it over several times. I read a negative review of it (by a professional critic I think) who said the first part was good, well made, but the 2nd part was not. This person missed the whole point. First she gave the twist in the story so anyone reading the critique would not have this surprise and then she missed a lot of the undertones in the 2nd part. For instance she said "he meets a young girl who happens to be a butoh dancer and that happens to be what his wife wanted to be". That says it all, how the person misunderstood the whole story. In fact the person goes to Japan to find the answer to the death he cannot accept and in the first part we see his wife at a butoh performance in Berlin, the two parts of the movie tie in exactly. Also there is a clear analysis or how people view and deal with death in the east and the west. The young girl (the butoh dancer in Tokyo) has lost her mother and there is a poignant scene where she compares her mother to a duck (!! up and down, up and down) and gives a very sharp clue as to her mother's death. Also she has been rendered homeless from this death, her situation is quite desperate but in fact she deals with death so much better than our character who is trying to understand his loss from a western point of view. This movie was a seminal event for me, maybe because I have had some losses in my family and am a dancer but it provoked a terrific surge of creativity, This movie also made me very happy in many ways..and it's beautiful. Just beautiful.

Decent read for $2.99 but nothing mind-blowing. The Natalie mystery hooked me early yet the wrap-up left too many threads hanging. Fine for a quick weekend distraction but don't expect a polished ending.

Nice and thick, but I expected all different colors, like the picture shows. You will only get ONE of those designs, not all 6 in a package. I had a little trouble with the top being a little too high. It hits the shelf above the rod so the divider does not move freely.
My kittens liked it but it's not very padded and they've outgrown it quickly. It's ok. Great for kittens. Just wish it was more padded. Carpet is better I think.
Love the snug fit and the mesh pocket inside holds my charging cord perfectly. Doesn't add any extra bulk in my bag.

Surpassed what I thought it'd be for the price. Setup took maybe five minutes and the screen is way more readable than my old one. The moon phase feature is a cool bonus I didn't know I needed. Still figuring out a couple settings but honestly pretty happy with this purchase so far.

Picked this up after my puppy chewed through the original cable for my WD external drive. Plugged it in and my computer recognized the drive instantly, no errors or slow transfer speeds. Perfect fit and solid build. Definitely recommend to anyone needing a reliable replacement cable.
Perfect for hiding pills. The soft texture wraps around medication easily and my picky eater gobbles it right down without noticing. Will definitely reorder.

There are several sized baskets among the reviews here; this is a review of the one they call the Medium. The inside dimensions excluding the rounded top lip are just shy of 5-1/2" wide by 15-1/2" long by 5-3/4" tall. The lip adds another 1/4" to each side and the top thus the overall 6" wide, 6" deep and 16" long in the specifications. This is a nice sturdy basket, attractive, well made. It has sides which are pretty straight. Why is that important? I'm picky but for a reason. Those with straight sides are better for organizing; the more slant on the sides of a basket the more it will take up excess room over the usable area, wasting storage space. You see too many of that kind on the market. This basket joins numerous others being used to organize my refrigerator and freezer; everything in its place makes everything easy to find.

It's a fabulous hat. Yes, it is a bit pricy, but it's worth it! It's lightweight and it doesn't fit too tightly. I normally can't wear headbands etc for very long without getting a headache, but I wore this for several hours for my daughter's "Wonderland Tea Party" themed birthday party. My daughter can wear it as well - so it works both for kids and grown-ups AND you slide the hat around on the headband (It doesn't slide around by itself), so you can decide which side of your head you want to place the hat - it's just perfect! PS: I quickly found out that the loose hanging ends of the hat-ribbon/ sash drove me crazy, but it was easily solved by tying it into a pretty bow that instantly stayed in place, and added a feminine touch to it. Awesome product that will last a long time!

Picked this up on a whim and ended up finishing it in two sittings. The pacing really works, just when I thought about putting it down, something else would happen and keep me going. Characters feel like real people with actual flaws, which I appreciate. Some of the twists I saw coming from a mile away, but honestly that didn't ruin my enjoyment. The writing style is easy to follow without being too simple. My only real complaint is that the middle section drags a little before picking back up. That ending though? Definitely left me curious enough to grab the next book. Glad I took a chance on this one.
Bought these for my dog's first birthday and they were a hit. Fit well, bright colors, and none tore even with ten crazy dogs playing.
Very enjoyable. Sad that is was just a novella. Have enjoyed this whole series.
now this movie was pretty good it has a real good crash scene in it as well as action it had a good storyline to and the actors were,nt to bad I would give this movie a 4 out of 5 stars.
Both my picky eaters gobble this up mixed with their kibble. Their coats look shinier and digestion has improved. Definitely repurchasing.
I'm assuming it's supposed to be dried out? My hermit crabs don't care too much for it, however they crawl over it sometimes. It's not harming them so I'm giving it a good rating!
This is a great filter. I had one of these in a previous tank, which is why I ordered this one. It is quiet and easy to clean. It is also very easy to assemble. I recommend It.
Arrived quickly in sturdy packaging. Cracked it open right away and couldn't put it down. Fantastic read.

I wasn't expecting much when I grabbed this during a Kindle sale, but it completely blew me away. Most family drama stuff feels predictable and rehashed, but this actually surprised me. The way the author handles the sibling dynamic feels incredibly authentic, like she actually gets how complicated family loyalty really is. I stayed up way too late finishing it because I needed to know what happened. The emotional depth was way beyond what I anticipated for the price. If you're on the fence, just get it. Easily one of the better books I've read this year and I've already recommended it to two friends.
Fit perfect, rugged, way to go for work wear, last longer great bargain

I wasn't sure these would feel as sturdy as my regular Ball jars, but I'm genuinely impressed. The glass is thick and has some real weight to it, and the handle is attached securely with no weird gaps or weak spots. I expected them to be smaller based on the pictures, but they hold a full 16 ounces comfortably, which makes them perfect for my morning iced coffee. The mouth is wide enough to drink from without spilling, and they wash up great in the dishwasher. I've already used mine every day for two weeks straight with zero chipping or cracking. Way better quality than I anticipated for the price. Grabbing another set for my mom because she keeps taking mine.

My German Shepherd had this thing in pieces within twenty minutes. The outer layer started peeling off in chunks almost immediately, and I had to take it away before he swallowed any of it. For the price, I expected way better. That said, if you have a senior dog or a breed that just gently carries toys around without really committing to the chew, this would probably be fine. It's soft, it bounces nicely, and it has a decent weight to it. But for anyone with an actual power chewer, a lab, a pit mix, a herding dog with strong jaws, save your money. I'd only recommend this to owners of light chewers or dogs who lose interest in toys quickly.

when i got this boxed set, i could vaguely remember the show, and that i thought at the time, it was funny. i still lived in the u. s. some of the time, then. back inswitzerland, there are now a lot of the new shows, and some are even in english, which is great. but "just shoot me" played a while back, and was always dubbed. too much of the humor gets lost that way, so i avoid watching it. anyway, i got the first set, and loved every minute of it! what a fun show (and being a professional photographer myself, i appreciate it maybe even more) i can't understand though, why it's taken over 2 years since the first release of season 1&2, and want to know what the hold-up is. where's season? is it even gonna come out eventually? great show, in any case, great talent and very funny storylines.

I really wanted to love this memoir but the scattered structure made it impossible to get through. Mann jumps between timelines constantly with no clear flow, and just when you start getting invested in one story she veers off into a totally different decade. The inclusion of old letters, teacher notes, and random documents kept interrupting any momentum the narrative had. Instead of adding depth they just felt like filler. I found myself skimming past entire sections trying to find the actual story. A memoir should pull you into someone's life and experiences but this just felt like reading through someone's disorganized scrapbook. Disappointing because the subject matter had so much potential. Couldn't finish it.
This is a good idea IF your saw motor is sealed or set outside the bag. It will catch most large wood dust but it is a pain to set up and take off in order to dump.

Picked this up thinking it'd be another dry history overview. Totally wrong, Harari connects dots across centuries in a way that actually makes you rethink everyday life. Way more engaging than I expected. Already recommended it to three friends.

Honestly expected more closure after investing in this whole series. The buildup toward Hyacinthe's return had me thinking we'd get a detailed account of his journey, but instead it's basically glossed over in a few paragraphs. Madame's storyline wraps up abruptly with a time skip that left me flipping back thinking I missed something. That said, the earlier chapters do deliver some genuinely moving moments and the writing itself is as strong as ever. It's just that the pacing completely falls apart in the last quarter. Not a bad read overall, but definitely the weakest installment. Felt like a missed opportunity more than anything.

I purchase a new ink-jet printer from a very well known computer store... I wonder who that might be... hehe! But getting back to the review... As most of you know, a lot of USB devices don't come with a USB cable. The same thing applied when I purchased my new printer. The clerk who sold me the printer suggested I purchase a USB cable along with my printer... the asking price: $29.95 for a 8 foot long cable. I told him "NO". Then purchased this cable on Amazon for $10.95 which included shipping. The only thing that got to me about this deal was that the shipping cost more than I paid for the USB cable. Oh well! I bought some sushi with the 19 bucks that I saved!
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these little drives are tanks. Way faster and more reliable than the SanDisk ones I've been burning through.

If you are having trouble with the helicopter, pleased read the poster's review giving step-by-step instructions - it was a life saver. Gave this to my son for his 4th birthday and he is in love. He is such an Imaginext fan - particularly in regards to superheroes. Its a really fun set and he plays quietly (sort of...there are lots of voices from the heroes and villains) for hours. The helicopter puts the biggest smile on his face. 2 thumbs up from me!
I didn't buy them for the quality. I bought them because my granddaughter wanted to tie dye a set of sheets. I usually like a much higher thread count, but these were great for what I had in mind

I LOVE LOVE LOVE these headphones! They perfectly keep out the noise (on an airplane, on the subway, etc). I love that it has a switch so you can allow the surrounding noise come in. That way if I'm on a plane I can quickly hear announcements or when I'm working in the office, my wife doesn't sneak up on me and scare me!

These Stanley gloves are brilliant!! The split cowhide is oft enough to be flexible on the hands in addition to being tough enough to get the job done!! Living on a small horse farm there is a lot of work that requires tough flexible gloves to get the job done. Stanley makes a quality product that I can count on every time.

Arrived two days earlier than expected in a sturdy box with no dinged corners or bent covers, which honestly never happens with book orders anymore. The slipcase was shrink-wrapped and pristine. I opened it right there on my porch and thumbed through the first few pages, gorgeous paper quality, tight binding, and the cover art looks even better in person. Really impressed with how carefully this was packed. Already an hour in and totally hooked. Worth every penny and then some.
Great movie at a solid price. Henry Winkler shines in this classic comedy.
Too big for my 18lb dog. I thought that she might be able to bite onto the furry thingies, but there's not much to hold onto. Only recommend it for large breeds.

I've had this immersion blender for about eight months now and I'm pretty mixed on it. The motor still runs strong and the variable speed dial is genuinely useful for not splattering soup everywhere. That said, the build quality shows over time. The connection point where attachments click in has gotten noticeably loose, and there's a small wobble now that wasn't there when I bought it. The whisk attachment actually stopped spinning properly after maybe four months of occasional use. The blending shaft itself still works fine for smoothies and soups, which is what I mainly bought it for. If you just need the stick blender it's decent value. Just don't expect the extra accessories to hold up with regular use.

Bought these for my 8 year old back in March. Worked fine for the first few weeks, but then the rubber seal around one eye started peeling apart. Now they constantly fog up and let water in. Expected them to last longer than two months for the price. Pretty disappointing quality.

Wasn't sure what to expect given the low profile, but this thing genuinely surprised me. Figured I'd have to sacrifice card capacity for the slim design, but everything from my bulky old trifold slid right in. Sitting on it is a non-issue, which was my main concern. The leather feels solid and the elastic band hasn't stretched out after a month of daily use. Honestly beats the premium brands I've tried at three times the price. Wish I'd made the switch years ago instead of dealing with a brick in my pocket.

I stayed up way too late finishing this one and honestly don't regret a single minute of lost sleep. The way the author tracks this couple across decades feels so authentic, not sanitized or overly romanticized, just real. What got me was how the small choices they make early on ripple through everything that comes after. There's no neat bow tying it all together. Instead you get the messiness of actual life, the kind where you sometimes hurt the person you love most. I found myself thinking about these characters long after I closed the book. Already lent my copy to my sister.

Surprisingly solid build for the price. Each one has a good weight to it and the zoom feature works smoothly without feeling loose. Shipped from overseas but showed up a week earlier than expected, and all three were individually boxed inside a padded mailer so nothing got crushed. Threw a battery in one right out of the package and it lit up my whole backyard instantly. Already stashed the others in my glovebox and nightstand.

The idea behind this makes sense, and it sort of works when my dog isn't fighting it. But the moment she starts scratching at it, the whole thing shifts around and feels like it'll snap. It's okay for the price, just don't expect it to hold up to a determined pup.
Works fine, but for installing in a system with onboard LED headers, just buy the LED ribbon segments and save money.
Been using this for a few weeks on my camera lenses and tablet screen. Does the job without scratching. The cleaning brush is handy but picks up lint in my bag.

Got these for my daughter who's in 24 months clothes. Ordered the 2T-3T and they're a bit baggy but work. The fleece lining is surprisingly soft and she seems comfortable. Just wish the ankles had more elastic to keep them snug.

These work but not super easy to use and it may take more than a few to get the job done so on a dollar cost basis the are not very cheap. I can see the utility of them but I could also just see using a chamber brush too.

Really cool concept, but it wouldn't cut my veggies all the way because there was a gap between the board and blade. I added a photo and you can clearly see the gap. Maybe I just got a faulty item? Maybe not. Also, in the video reviews I've seen the safety clip as a red piece but the one I received is black all over. Could be a fake. Would not recommend.
It is a good hub & can turn on/off 3 ports at a time if don't need to use especially I have many printers & external hard drives.

Bought this for my 4 year old daughter who is obsessed with Sofia. We've had it for about six months now and I'm honestly impressed with how well these cards have held up. She plays with them almost every day and they've been dropped, stepped on, chewed on by the dog, and shoved in backpacks for road trips. The cards still look great with no peeling at the edges or bent corners. The tin case got a little dented but that's it. As for the game itself, my daughter went from barely recognizing letters to spotting them faster than me. The matching concept is simple enough that she can play independently once she understands the rules. Great value for a toy that actually teaches something and survives real kid treatment.
Better quality than I expected for the price. The bodysuit runs slightly small so size up. My kid loves it.
Many good comics in the stack. Not all were to our liking but for the price it was a good deal.

These are very sturdy and well made. My daughter loves the faces and we use them to practice making faces and telling what they are. They've been used as hats or balance tools for walking across. So many more uses than I would have thought.

I do love it. It's well-made and compact, but seems like a bottom-less pit. I've only used domestically so far this year, but it goes international in February and will get a workout. It's all I plan to take for a 10 day ski trip and jaunt to Venice - well, and a purse and backpack.

Got this on sale and honestly for the price it's hard to beat. I'm 5'10, 175 and went with a small which fits true to size without being skin tight. The fabric feels decent quality and the stitching has held up through a handful of washes so far. My only real gripe is the breathability isn't amazing on longer rides above 70 degrees, but for shorter commutes or cooler morning rides it gets the job done. The pockets are deep enough to actually hold a phone without worrying about it bouncing out. Not the fanciest jersey out there but you're getting solid bang for your buck. Would buy again at the sale price.

Love this pillow. I am a side sleeper and my hubby steals my pillows usually. This one takes conscious effort to move so it has not been stolen out from under my head in the middle of the night. It stays cool and keeps it's shape well. The outside cover comes of for easy washing. Great pillow. NOTE: If your hubby/partner likes to fold your pillows in half and lay on them then make sure to order an extra one because they are definitely not as nice after that happens. It's like after being squished like that they lose a bit of their soul.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these little brushes have been pretty solid. Used them on my firearm breech and the bristles are way stiffer than I thought they'd be. No shedding after five uses which surprised me. The handle connection feels a little weak where it's pinched together so I'm careful not to push too hard. For what they cost, definitely exceeded my expectations. Grabbed a second pack already.
Works as advertised. Great speed for taking videos with Nikon DSLR.
Great motivation for kids to reward them. Especially if they like trains and thomas. These are good quality stickers and there are tons. This will last a while!

I grabbed this on a whim expecting a light, breezy summer read, and honestly couldn't have been more wrong. The cover totally had me fooled. What you actually get is this slow-building, deeply uncomfortable look at a marriage cracking under years of unspoken resentment. Beatty's writing is gorgeous and she nails that suffocating suburban atmosphere where everything looks fine on the surface but everyone is quietly drowning. The characters frustrated me constantly, but in the best way, they felt real and messy. It took maybe fifty pages to really hook me, but once it did I couldn't put it down. Not a feel-good beach book at all, which threw me initially, but I ended up loving it. Easily one of the better novels I've read this year.
I love this serie! It keeps going nicely and the plots are great! A bit to longish time to time, but a really good read!
Got this as a baby shower gift and my little one adores it. The texture keeps him entertained during tummy time and it washes well after all the drool. Totally worth every penny.

I bought this watch mostly because I was searching for a watch that had a vibrating alarm and this had some other cool features, so bought it. The moon calender is a nice touch also. This has helped a lot since I can now wake up nice and quietly and reliably. My only small complaint is the band smells after awhile and you have to keep washing it and then it will smell again eventually. In a way it is a good thing as I prefer this fabric band over some synthetic chemical band but it is a bit inconvenient at times.
Bought this for my nephew's birthday and it died after a week of play. Wouldn't recommend this to anyone. Complete waste of money.
The carabiner is kind of a pain to use. I like it because it fits well in a pocket when I am not using it. To be honest it is not much better than a cheap leash that costs 5 bucks.

Picked these up thinking I'd found a hidden gem based on some of the hype, but honestly they're just okay. Sound quality is acceptable, nothing muddy, but definitely lacking in bass and the highs aren't super crisp either. My old Sonys in this price range sounded richer. They're lightweight and sit on the ear pretty comfortably for maybe an hour or so before the foam starts pressing a bit much. The cord seems thin, so I'm careful with how I store them. They get loud enough for casual listening at my desk but I wouldn't trust them to stay put during any real movement. For the price I'm not mad about it, just temper your expectations. These are basic utility headphones, not anything to get excited about.

Honestly, we only played it once, but after loving Ticket to Ride (the original), we found this one not nearly as much fun. Almost all the routes are the same value, and you can't take multiple long route cards, the segment lengths between stations are mostly the same, and so about the only thing that seems to determine who wins is who gets the tunnel across Russia.

Expected way more from a big brand like Schwinn. The mounting hardware is cheap and strips out almost immediately. The mirror itself vibrates so badly at any speed above a slow cruise that everything is just a blur. My old no-name mirror from a big box store was half the price and actually stayed put. Had to add my own rubber gaskets just to keep the thing from sliding down every few minutes. Really disappointing quality for the price.
Way too flimsy for what they charge. Expected better quality at this price.

Fast. Borderline ridiculously fast. These cards work decently in Mac Pro systems, with full CUDA support. Adobe products love them. However, the default firmware doesn't display Mac startup screens. Expect an unnerving period of black screen on boot. This also makes dual booting tricky - key commands aren't recognized during boot. I'm using BootChamp to switch over to bootcamp from Mac OS, it works wonders. Also make sure to have your power situation sorted out, these cards require more than the Mac Pro board offers. I'm using a mulex plug adapter in addition to the board power.
Thought this would be stuffy period drama but it's actually quite sharp and entertaining. Hollander nails the lead role perfectly. Could've used an extra episode though.

I don't love it. The writing is a bit convoluted at times and somehow, (maybe this should be good), it seems more like fiction than a real story. When I pick it up, I enjoy it but I don't feel compelled to pick it up. I do believe the author did an incredible amount of work to write it...
Great way to keep your hands warm while hunting, instead of bulky gloves.

I really like this alarm clock so far. It works very well with the iPhone and I've only had a few small issues with it. Occasionally when you put the iPhone in the cradle it will only start charging the phone, but it won't play the audio. I've only had this happen maybe twice since I bought it 2 months ago. I think it's something to do with if you're playing a song already when you plug the phone into the dock. It looks great, and I really like how the dock slides back into the clock for when you're not using it. The dimmer is nice, but I wish it would maybe go one shade darker. The audio quality is superb considering the size. Overall, I'm very happy with the money I spent on this unit compared to the other ones available on Amazon.

It does make some good french fries, but it does not seem to provide the same heat for frying that requires a higher heat, as your stove. It gets to a max of 375F and takes about 8 minutes. Appreciate that the product has a magnetic cord for safety. As a tip, don't dump frozen fries directly into this fryer to avoid splatter. I throw it in the air fryer to dry out the moisture for 5-6 minutes and then deep fry it, and it comes out well.

This movie did everything it could to compensate for not having even a halfway decent script. So with an attempt to dazzle with detail and glitter, it ultimately leads to the all-too-familiar growing and ragging beast who has (once again) sucked its energy from the city power supply and (once again) only becomes more powerful when it's attacked. I couldn't believe I was watching this garbage again.
Works fantastic and best price! I was skeptical, but my 9 year old golden is no longer having issues with his arthritis.

I felt this was a well written story with good grammar and structure. Riley started out as a typical woman who worried too much about what others would think. As the story progresses you see her coming into her own. Jensen was as a typical bad boy in the military. For a short story the author did great giving both characters a nice back story.

Been using this little fountain for about four months now for my kitten and it's held up surprisingly well. The plastic hasn't cracked or discolored even with daily use and frequent cleanings. The pump still runs quietly which honestly shocked me given the price. Yeah it's definitely compact, fits in the palm of your hand, so I refill it every day. But for a small cat or puppy it does the job. Knocked off one star because the cord is really short.

I bought these for a trip to Jamaica. They are attractive and comfortable. They provided protection for my feet while walking on hot parking lot, hot sand, and uneven terrain. They did not work well for climbing Dunn's River Falls. The rushing water gets into the shoe and pulls it off the foot. The band across the instep isn't sufficient to keep the shoe on when you've got a lot of water force. I'd say to size down if you're between sizes. In summary: great for the beach and the walk to the beach but pick something else for climbing falls or other more active use.
The band comes with small screwdriver and fits Garmin Fenix 3 perfectly well. It feels essentially like the original band.

Been running these in my 5 gallon betta setup for about two months now. Water stays crystal clear and there's zero funky odor coming from the tank. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone with small aquariums who's tired of overpaying at the local pet store. They fit perfectly and do exactly what they claim.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Pulled it out and the build quality immediately impressed me. Already used it to hang cabinets, super accurate and easy to set up.

Upgraded from a basic transmitter and honestly wish I had just started here. The gimbals feel incredibly precise, way smoother than anything I've flown before. Programming took a little getting used to since OpenTX is pretty deep, but once I wrapped my head around it, setting up logical switches and voice alerts was straightforward. Range has been flawless so far, no dropouts or hesitation even at the edge of my usual flying field. The build quality is solid, feels like it'll take plenty of abuse at the field. Battery life with the internal pack has been great too, easily getting several long sessions before needing a charge. If you're on the fence about spending the money, just do it. Totally worth every penny.

I purchased this Relaxing Sofa Bean Bag Folding Sofa Chair, Futon Chair & Lounge in white by E-joy and I really like it so far. I ordered it on the 10th and it was delivered on the 17th, so that's pretty good free shipping in my opinion. I was worried I'd have to wait weeks for it, but it arrived in good time and in perfect condition. It comes folded over and has a little belt and clip that holds it closed. Once removed, in unfurled and I was glad it see it looked just like in the picture, a nice cream color, but mine did come with two pillows not one. It did have a slight chemical factory smell, but I've been letting it air out in the living room with all of the windows opened and that's helped already. My only complaint is that the different positions of the recliner don't really click into place. Like, you can hear the click when it's in position, but when I lean back on it, it just goes to the farthest back setting, so it's not really adjustable unless you have it pushed back against a wall to hold it in place. It is really comfortable though and I can definitely see myself taking naps on this in the very near future. I received this product for free or at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. I have received and fully used the product before posting this review. My review is one-hundred percent of my own opinion and not influenced by the seller, Amazon, or any other outside sources. I am not under any obligation to give this product an unfair rating, and all ratings reflect my actual experience with the product and are completely genuine. I have always relied upon the reviews and ratings of others on websites and always strive to provide an honest description that others can use to base their purchasing habits on.
terrible sound, last me about a week, don"t waste your money on this one.

Swapped out my old dumb detectors for these and glad I did. Pairing took maybe five minutes per unit. The app sends instant alerts to my phone when something triggers. Peace of mind for the whole house.

This is one of those marriages of convenience, a trope I often like. The hero is turned off women, resenting his mother and all the shallow, greedy women of the ton she tries to marry him off to. The heroine is distrustful of men because of having the most horrendous, abusive father you could ever imagine. A father who's arranging her marriage to an older ship captain and white slaver, who equals or surpasses the father in horrendous behavior. She runs away from home to escape marriage and he runs away from London, basically for the same reason, except in his case he wasn't really in any desperate situation.
