Took maybe fifteen minutes to put together by myself. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone wanting a compact accent table for a tight corner. Great value for the price and surprisingly sturdy for how lightweight it is.

Been using this for about a month now and the refresh rate is what really sold me. Coming from a standard 60Hz display, the difference in smoothness is immediately noticeable, especially in fast-paced shooters. No ghosting issues at all during intense gameplay. The stand is a little wobbly if your desk gets bumped, but I plan on mounting it anyway. For the price point, you'd be hard pressed to find something better.
Way better than I expected from a Kindle western. Gritty, authentic dialogue and a plot that actually moves.

A little on the small size but as to be expected since it says that it is fitting... its also pretty thin and feels more like costume material which for some reason I didn't expect.. still cute, it'll work!

Got this paperback for like six bucks and honestly it was worth way more. Lauren Oliver nails that suffocating small-town vibe where teenagers feel totally trapped and do reckless stuff because what else is there. The game called Panic is terrifying and I genuinely could not predict who would survive each round. Heather and Dodge both felt real to me, not just generic YA stereotypes. The pacing is solid too, I read it in two sittings because every chapter ends with you needing to know what happens next. For the price of a coffee this book delivers way more entertainment than most novels I have paid full price for lately. Definitely picking up more from this author.

Very nice radio, except I can't see it during the day time. The glare is unbelievable and it's so dim it can hardly be seen. At night it's great, if not a little too bright. The dim adjustments are not adequate for day/night. Other than that it's a great sounding radio with plenty of features.

I wanted to love this one because the premise really drew me in, and honestly the first half had me hooked. The family dynamics felt authentic and the main character's voice is distinct. But somewhere around the sixty percent mark things just sort of stalled for me. Instead of building toward any kind of real climax the story just keeps rolling forward like a journal entry. No real tension gets resolved and the ending kind of just... happens. I kept turning pages waiting for something to click into place but it never quite did. It's not badly written at all, the prose is actually pretty solid, but the whole thing felt more like setup for a sequel than a complete book on its own.

Worked okay for the first month, nothing amazing but it blew cooler air than a regular fan. Then the problems started. The water pump started making this awful grinding noise and eventually just quit. I only used distilled water too so it wasn't a buildup issue. The fan speed buttons got super finicky around week five, sometimes they'd respond and sometimes nothing happened. The cooling pad started falling apart and getting these weird slimy spots even though I cleaned it regularly. For the price, this thing should last way longer than six weeks. Now it's just a loud regular fan that wastes counter space. Going back to a standard tower fan because at least those survive a summer. Don't waste your money.

I've had this sitting on my desk at work for about three years now. It's been passed around to at least a dozen coworkers, thrown in my bag countless times, and the binding is still holding up perfectly. No loose pages or anything. The arguments inside hold up just as well as the physical book. Every few months I find myself flipping back to certain chapters when the news cycles back around to manufacturing jobs. Genuinely changed how I think about the economy. Worth every penny and then some.

My high hopes were not achieved. My feeling is even the mediocre reviews are overstated. The movie is simply way to slow. Virtually no action adventure going on. I had envisioned something like the Three Kings movie.....not even remotely close.

I've had this paperback for about eight months now, tossed it in my backpack for daily commutes and a couple flights. Still holding together perfectly, no spine cracking or loose pages. The story itself grabbed me right away, Fisk is a solid character and the cartel subplot kept me turning pages way past bedtime. Genuinely impressed with how well the binding has held up compared to most thrillers I beat up on the train.

I've had this paperback sitting on my nightstand for the better part of a year now, rereading it whenever I need a comfort book. After multiple passes, the spine has only mild creasing and the pages are holding up great despite being carted around in my tote bag. The story itself centers on Prudence, who's dealing with fallout from a traumatic past, and John, the gruff but tenderhearted hero who sees her real worth. Their connection feels earned rather than rushed. The emotional weight surprised me for a romance novel. Even after reading it four times, certain scenes still hit me in the chest. The physical copy has survived beach trips and bathtub reading sessions with minimal wear. Definitely picking up the rest of the series.

Its always been a struggle for me to find clothes that fits perfectly on me. One that I don't have to do something and alter it or cut the legs to be the exact length for my legs. I am size one and the waist and hips of size one usually fits on me aside from the legs part. They usually are longer and even though I got a size one of thissuper comfy stretch denim five pocket jeans it is still a little big on me especially on the hip and back side maybe because I am not that gifted on that part. The hip is also a bit higher than my usual preference but that is fine since I don't tuck my shirts. I wish that the front pockets are a little deeper. These are the down sides when purchasing clothes online. Even if you got your size there is no guarantee that it fits exactly the same. Others are cut differently and sometimes smaller or bigger on you. I will just have to remedy it since thats what I normally do. Despite that the jeans was well made and the stitches are sturdy. The fabric stretches just like they said it is which is a good thing since for me, stretchable jeans are more comfortable to wear and easier to take off than the denims. This comes in six different colors. I got the black coz back when I got it, other colors doesnt have my size. Thankfully, I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and fair review.

Really enjoyed this quick read! Riley and Jensen have solid chemistry and their backstories add real depth for such a brief book. The romance builds naturally without feeling rushed. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who loves military romance or wants something short to read on a lunch break. Took off one star because I wanted more time with these two, hoping the author writes a longer sequel!

Finally a paranormal romance that actually made me laugh out loud instead of just cringing at the forced quirkiness. The banter between the two leads felt natural, not like the author was trying too hard. I especially loved the diner scene, perfectly timed comedic timing there. Knocked off one star because the middle section drags a bit and I caught myself skimming through a couple of chapters that felt like filler. The world-building could also use some fleshing out. I still don't fully understand how the magic system works in this universe, and it seemed like the author wasn't sure either. But the chemistry? Top notch. The ending wrapped things up nicely without being painfully predictable. Would definitely pick up the next book in the series.

And double your reading fun when Taylor, the less glamourous twin to her sister Sheila, butts heads with Max, who becomes her live-in protector after mis-printing her personal ad to say that she is looking for a "sadomasochistic male." Taylor and Max have great chemistry and the story is sweet, funny and a fabulous read. I highly recommend it!
if I knew what I know now that I know what I didn't knew. I would have gotten a bear canister because these things don't last thaaaat long.
Sturdy shoe. Autistic daughter wore them everyday during the cold months. She hates shoes but tolerated these.

PBS has a habit of running the entire Anne of Green Gables series on Thanksgiving Day (something other than football for the girls, I suspect!) and it never gets old. This is great entertainment (and learning) for the entire family. If you enjoyed the Laura Ingalls Series, the BBC Pride and Prejudice, or any of this genre, this series won't disappoint.

As Zebco's go, these are top of the line. They cast really nice and are easy to use for non-fishermen (which is why I keep buying them for guests to use). In freshwater they hold up well and continue to cast well, but in saltwater they turn into a pile of rust and the coating on the handle and middle section peels off. They do seem to still be working despite that though.
Thank you Amazon Rep for resending this to my niece for Christmas. She got her gift and is very happy with her product. Plus that she got in was a big plus for me and for her for most. Thank you.

I've been using this tablet for about a year. It's a good tablet for the price. There are three problems that may affect your purchase. It does not have enough disk space. I use it mainly to read newspapers, surf the web, read email and play one game. I have Office installed. No other software yet there isn't enough space for updates. The second problem is battery life. This says 6 hours. Maybe on standby but if you are using the tablet, expect that you'll only get 2-3 hours. Lastly the keyboard is awful. I do not have large hands but the keys are so small that I'm constantly deleting text or bringing up a pop up menu. I have a third party external keyboard that I bought to use with this and its a wireless full sized keyboard that works well. But I'm don't always have it nearby. So if you can live with these shortcomings and can get it on sale (I paid 105.00 for it), then it's worth it. Otherwise looking.
Arrived quickly with no dented cans. Both pups gobbled the lamb flavor right away. Seems like decent quality for the price.
Holds it's edge for about a week of my standard usage. Easy to sharpen. Good blade shape. After about a year, the tension bar has started to rattle when open.
Fun game that even my 4 year old granddaughter can enjoy. I had the older version from years ago, and this works just as well.

Bought this for my leopard gecko's enclosure and it's been solid. Heats up quickly and the clamp holds tight on the screen lid. My only gripe is the power cord could be a couple feet longer for reaching outlets. Definitely recommend to reptile keepers who need a reliable basking light without spending a fortune.
The adhesive is decent and holds well on flat surfaces, but forget about curved applications. The strip itself is way too stiff to wrap around anything but perfectly straight door frames.

Arrived two days earlier than expected in a neat little resealable bag, not some crushed box like you get from other sellers. The bra felt substantial right out of the package, not flimsy at all. Lace detailing is way prettier in person than the photos show. I'm normally a 38D and the fit was spot on straight away, no break-in period needed. Straps are wide enough that they don't dig into my shoulders by the end of a workday. The underwire sits flat against my ribcage which is always my biggest worry ordering online. Wore it for a full twelve hour shift yesterday and forgot I had it on, which honestly never happens for me. Already ordered a second one in black. Wish I'd found these years ago.
Too big for cat food cans. Not worth it to send them back.

Picked this up on a whim and blew through it in two sittings. The alien invasion angle feels fresh because it's grounded in military strategy rather than just laser battles. I really appreciated that the author gives enough backstory that you never feel lost, even if you haven't read the earlier books. The island base setting works perfectly and creates this claustrophobic tension that builds chapter by chapter. Character dialogue sounds like actual soldiers talking, not Hollywood stereotypes. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who enjoys authors like Weston Ochse or Myke Cole, basically military fiction with a supernatural or sci-fi twist. Also a solid pick for thriller fans wanting to dip their toes into something weirder. Already grabbed the next one.

My pup had a very dry nose. I purchased this and was amazed at how well it moisturized his nose. By day two, his nose looked normal again. By far this is the best product I have used. I tried things already in my cabinet, but nothing worked the way this did. And yes, he loved the taste, so I had to make sure I fed him, immediately after applying the ointment, to prevent him licking it off.
Watched these discs dozens of times and they still play flawlessly. Great set.

The ingredients list is solid and my golden retriever gobbles it down without any digestive issues. No complaints on quality. But man, this stuff is pricey for what you get. The bag doesn't last nearly as long as I expected, and at this price point I'd hope for bigger portions. It's decent food and I trust the brand, but honestly you can find comparable options at a lower cost. Probably won't reorder.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this rack exceeded my expectations. The metal tubes feel way sturdier than the flimsy plastic ones I've bought before, and it holds my family's massive shoe collection without wobbling. I was worried the tiers would be too narrow for bulkier boots but everything fits fine. Assembly took maybe fifteen minutes tops with no tools required. I actually ordered a second one for the garage after seeing how well the first one held up. Definitely recommend if you're on the fence.
Arrived in a crushed box with cracked plastic inside. Plugged it in and it didn't even turn on. Total junk right out of the package.

My doc has been after me to use Hibiclens for a chronic skin problem I've been suffering with.. Problem was I couldn't afford it. So being a rather resourceful person, I figured it out. If a Vet. grade product that is used on animals is safe, and it is the same basic chemical as Hibiclens (without all the dyes and perfumes) then what the heck do I have to worry about? So I tried it, and it worked. But the real test came when I went back to my doc and told her that although I could not afford Hibiclens, I got a Vet. Grade product of chlorhexidine and used it. Her response? She smiled and gave me a thumbs up! In other words folks, if this stuff is safe for Fluffy it's safe for you too. That is, as safe as any chemical might be. Use your head, read, dilute the stuff (one ounce per gallon). Don't get it in your ears and eyes and please first mention it to your doc that you intend on doing this. They are the professionals, and if it's not good for you they will say so. Always check with your doc. And I don't mean Dr. Google.

This serrated utility knife from Cestari Kitchen is great for a lot of uses in the kitchen. You can use it to cut breads without flattening or mashing the bread or to cut delicate fruits and vegetables like tomatoes. A serrated knife is a must have in the kitchen! This knife from Cestari Kitchen is 6 inches long and comes with a cover for the blade. I love this about this knife because we have another serrated knife without a cover and have cut ourselves on it many times just reaching in the drawer. The cover slides on and off easily but stays on when not in use. The knife blade is ceramic making it very different than any of our other knives. A ceramic blade will not rust so I do not have to worry about leaving it in water. A ceramic blade is also harder than a stainless steel blade which means that this knife will last longer. I have used this knife on a variety of foods in our kitchen. I really like using it on bread because with the serrated blade, it will cut through the bread and make a clean, straight cut. I get more precise slices of bread with this knife. I also use it when making salads and can cut anything from the hardest carrots to the softest tomatoes. Since I can cut so many different things, it means that I can cut everything I need to cut with one knife. This knife is very sharp so I do not recommend letting children use the knife. I keep the cover on the knife anytime it is not in use for safety as well. This knife has been a great addition to my kitchen. Many of our utensils are older and we are slowly replacing them. This knife has already gotten a lot of use! Promotional sample provided in exchange for my evaluation and honest, unbiased feedback.

This is a great little tray for just about anything you'd want to use it for. I use mine in my medicine cabinet to organize my plethora of travel size soaps and sample products until I am ready to use them. I would also aggregator office supplies like post it's, binder clips and other similar items. It's made from clear plastic and has nice smooth edges and a very level bottom. The sides have a low profile that make it easy to access items even if on a shelf. I have found its a great nail polish caddy, and for makeup items and since it fits perfectly in my bathroom drawer I will be purchasing another one or two. Due to the size of the three compartments, its not the best for skinny items that tend to tip over, like gloss, mascara or brushes. It looks now certain enough to use on the counter, but isn't quite big enough to efficiently store perfume bottles. Overall I like it and would make interdesign my new go-to brand for caddies.
I was impressed with the qaulity for the price but it was just way too small.
Honestly better than I expected for the price. They fly straight and fit fine in most of my blasters, though a few were slightly too snug in the clips.

Picked up the SG3 last season and it's become a regular fixture in my bag. The build feels solid and it survives being tossed in the cart without issues. Battery life gets me through a full 18 with plenty to spare, though I'd recommend keeping spare AAs in your bag just in case. Course library is impressive, I've played tracks in Arizona, Florida, and a few small municipal courses up in Ontario, and every single one was available for download. Pinpointing yardages to carry bunkers and water has genuinely changed my club selection. Knocked off one star because the screen can be tough to read in bright sunlight and the unit takes a minute to lock onto satellites at the first tee. Overall, really solid investment for the price.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing handles my external drive, keyboard, and mouse without breaking a sweat. Way faster than my old one. Plug and play right out of the box.
My 8 yr old granddaughter loves this set. She's very artistic and says it has everything she likes in it.

Total waste of money. Worked okay for about a week then completely died on me. For what these cost, I expected way better quality. You're better off spending a little more on a brand that actually lasts. Cheap garbage.
Works better than I expected for the price. Pretty solid.

I've tried probably eight different brands over the years and this one finally solved my tracking nightmare. The granules are heavier than most litters so they don't get stuck in my cat's paws and dragged all over the house. With three indoor cats, I used to find litter everywhere, kitchen, couch, even my sheets. Switching to this cut the tracking down by maybe 80 percent. It clumps solid too, which makes scooping way less of a chore. No weird perfume smell, just clean. The only downside is the bag is heavy to carry upstairs, but that's the tradeoff for dense litter. Honestly wish I'd found this stuff five years ago. My floors have never stayed this clean during litter box season.

I've had these AOR bike lights on my commuter for about six months now, through rain, snow, and everything in between. Still going strong with zero issues. The headlight puts out a seriously bright beam that lights up the dark stretches of my route home, and the taillight is visible from way back. What really impresses me is how they've held up, no fogging inside the lenses, no flickering, no mounting bracket cracks. I've taken some rough trails too and these things just refuse to quit. Battery life is still solid after all this time, maybe an hour short of when they were new but that's it. For the price, you'd be hard pressed to find anything this tough. Grabbed a second set for my wife's bike last month.
Good Organizer for my bunker gear, fits kind of loose but still works like it needs to.

I picked this up on a whim at an airport bookshop, not expecting much from another dystopian YA novel. Boy was I wrong. Saba's voice grabbed me from the very first chapter and refused to let go. What sets this apart from the endless flood of post-apocalyptic stuff is how raw and unpolished the narrator feels. She's not some flawless heroine, she's stubborn, sometimes unlikable, and completely real. The desert setting is brutal and vivid, and the pacing never drags. I found myself staying up way too late on multiple nights because I needed to know what happened next. My only complaint is that I didn't buy the sequel at the same time, because now I have to wait for shipping. Way exceeded my expectations.

So I was thinking that this film would be super hookey and way too contrived, but it was great! The story just takes you in and doesn't let go until the end. You will be cheering right along with them! Yes, you will become that attached to the outcome of the competition! The only reason I gave the movie 4 stars instead of 5 is that the main characters (the students) are just okay as actors. The ROTC guy was the best. George Lopez, Jamie Curtis, and Marissa Tomei were all great in their roles, with Jamie Curtis being the most outstanding of the three.
Grip on these is solid. I can handle small screws without taking them off. Wish they were cheaper.
Ordered these for my wife but they were too large for her to wear while trying to sleep. I returned them and go an instant, no hassle refund. They lookednice, just too large.
We bought this for our IT office. We've had this for just over a year. All the usb tongues have fallen off, its going into the garbage, poor quality.
Picked this up on a whim and it blew past my expectations. The emotional depth surprised me and the pacing kept me glued to my Kindle all weekend.
I love these from an office job to an evening out. They ate very comfortable; especially for a hard to fit wide foot.

Honestly I was skeptical about a tension-style shelving unit actually holding up in a shower, but this thing exceeded my expectations big time. The spring mechanism is way sturdier than I thought it'd be, and once it's locked in, it does not budge. I've got four large bottles of shampoo plus body wash on the top two shelves and there's zero wobbling. The bronze finish looks way more expensive than what I paid. My only complaint is the instructions could be clearer, but honestly it's pretty intuitive once you lay everything out. Definitely recommend.
Good sharpening system but the screws suck they stripped unscrewing it for the first time

Bought this for my indoor tabby who gets bored easily and it's been a game changer. The feather attachment spins unpredictably and drags the base across our kitchen tiles, which keeps her stalking it for ages. Battery life is decent too. Only complaint is she figured out how to flip it over when she gets frustrated, so I have to supervise. Still, for the price you can't go wrong. She's obsessed and gets actual exercise instead of napping all day.

I needed front USB 3.0 access on my older case and this little adapter did the trick perfectly. The install took maybe five minutes, just pop it into a spare 3.5" bay, plug the 19-pin cable directly into the motherboard header, and you're done. What really sold me was how snug and secure the fit is. I was worried it might rattle around or feel cheap, but the mounting bracket holds it firmly in place with zero wiggle. The two ports transfer data at full USB 3.0 speed, I copied a 4GB movie to my flash drive in under a minute. No drivers needed on Windows 10. If your case lacks front USB 3.0 and you've got an open bay, grab this. Well worth the twelve bucks.

Bought three of these to organize my kid's Bionicle pieces and they work perfectly. The best part is the drawers slide out smoothly even when stuffed full. My son loves that he can build onto the exterior with regular bricks too. Sturdy plastic, holds a ton, and keeps the floor clear.
My daughter loves these so much we have bought them twice.

(review by my 14 yr old son): I love how the bow can change draw strengths. This allows me to progress to the full draw weight when I get stronger. I also love the bow's design and that I came with some powerful aluminum hunting arrows. I don't hunt but I do recommend this bow for any youth interested in bow hunting. Despite all the perks there are a few things I don't like. Though the package/carry case is a great way to carry your bow, you're unable to put the bow on it if you've installed the arrow holder and must remove it before putting the bow back on (I just don't use the arrow holder at all due to this). Worst of all the arrow rest strips the arrows' fletching and broke on my second shooting trip after the 14th shot just because I shot an arrow. Now That's just stupid. I'm just glad they're easily replaced by wisker biskets Overall this is a good bow but could do with some design flaw fixes. (He ended up returning the bow.
Very small but works if you don't have a lot of space.

These pills do kill adult fleas fast, no argument there. My cat stopped scratching within a couple hours of the first dose. But you need to know they don't touch eggs or larvae at all, so you'll be fighting a cycle that never ends unless you treat the environment too. For the price, I expected broader coverage. They work in a pinch when your cat is miserable, but I can't see buying these regularly. Decent emergency option, not a real solution.
Thought it'd feel flimsier but holds steady keeping my propagation dome warm.

Our Vet recommended these Pill Pockets for our 4 kittens when we switched from using a topical flea medication to a pill form. When we got home, I placed my order and I was excited to see how this would work! When this product was delivered, I quickly tore open the package to see what it looks like and exactly how it smells. Well, I was bummed when all the pill pockets were smashed together instead of being individually separated into a pill pocket form. However, I did make it work by tearing off a piece, rolling it into a ball and then I placed the pill inside of the ball I made. I would have returned it but, I did not want to wait any longer since the kittens were overdue on this medication. As for how it smells, it really does not smell like a Salmon flavor to me anyways. Out of the 4 kittens, 3 loved the pill pockets and wanted more! Each kitten had their own pill because of their weight so, I kept them separated. My first kitten, loved the pill pocket, she swallowed it with the pill included. I was very happy and thought this would be a breeze! Not so much, LOL! The second kitten ate the pill pocket but, he spit out the pill so, I tried it again and the same thing happened. The exact same thing happened with the third kitten! When I got to the fourth kitten, she ran away after taking one sniff of the pill pocket. So, 3 kittens out of 4 love the pill pocket taste but, where smart enough to know that there was a pill inside. Needless to say, it was a very funny experience! Not to mention what it took us to finally get them to take their pill!

This is a beautiful story about the true meaning of Christmas. The story is told with a healthy does of humor, and my whole family enjoys it. This series is the best, and I definitely recommend this Chrismas DVD.

For once its nice to have a hot breakfast at work. I almost never have time to make breakfast in the mornings so I usually take a granola bar or a piece of fruit. Now that I have this neat little set of Crackin' Egg cookers I can enjoy a hot meal at my desk and it takes less than thirty seconds. Its super easy to use. Just make sure to poke the yolk with a fork so it doesn't explode in the container. I also found that if you spray the container with a little non-stick cooking spray that the egg comes out cleaner. The only gripe I have with these microwave egg cookers is that I haven't been able to make an egg that isn't over hard. I've tried cooking it at thirty seconds instead of the recommended thirty to fourt-five. But it still comes out over cooked. I think I'll be trying the scrambled egg recipe but other than that I still enjoy a hot and nutritious breakfast. I'm thinking this would be great for someone with kids because you could pop it in the microwave in the morning and take it with you in the car. They're very portable. Overall I think these are a cool way to make a super fast breakfast that is nutritious as well as delicious. Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with bubble wrap, so no dents or bent connectors. First impression out of the bag was solid, decent weight, clean gold-plated tips, and the cable feels thick enough to survive being stepped on. Plugged it in and the signal is clean with no humming. Knocked off a star because the RCA ends are a little stiff to push in. Overall a solid buy for the price.
The chapter-by-chapter reflection prompts really made me pause and think. Finished it feeling genuinely refreshed and inspired. Beautifully written.

Bought this for my son's birthday expecting something fun. The egg took forever to dissolve and when the creature finally appeared, it was just a shapeless blob of rubber. Nothing like the pictures on the box at all. It fell apart almost immediately and left residue all over the container. Total waste of money, honestly. Don't bother with this one.
Well, it's a strap. seems to be well made. Not much to say except that it is exactly as advertised.

Smaller than I expected but does the job fine. The lid snaps on securely and each cube pops out without cracking. I use mine for broth and herb-oil portions. A bit flimsy when full so support the bottom when moving to the freezer. Decent quality for the price overall.
Arrived quickly in a sturdy box. Gloves feel lightweight and fit snugly. Seems decent for light yard work.

This trail drive lead by Gavin McCord with help from his brawling cowboy friends take 3,500 longhorns to Missouri but the only buyer who has the money wants Gavin and his friends to push them West by Southwest to Santa Fe. Now they will be on a treacherous drive to earn their money after a 1000 mile drive. I rated this as a great cattle drive story.
Great story. Half a tale about running and ultra marathons, half the story of Gobi and getting her out of China. Wish there was a little more about Gobi's new life in the UK.
Arrived in a crushed box. Feels super flimsy and hollow straight out of the package. Pretty underwhelmed.

I got this for toting my work laptop back and forth, and it is perfect, most especially for the price. There were no noticeable finishing issues. Nicely made, with decent padding in the straps and back. There is sufficient room for a large laptop, cords and cables, some notebooks, and whatever else I need for the workday. It would not have been sufficient for school textbooks and the like, but is more than adequate for work. I'm very petite, and while the bag is small, the straps and overall design are a bit out of scale for me, so if you are small also, you might feel a bit like a tortoise with too big a shell. The straps and the size of the pack are somewhat unwieldy- I'm 5'3" and hover around 125 lbs depending on recent pasta/beer/pie intake. I've read some complaints about the Tannin color- a dark red wine color. It's a traditionally 'feminine' color (whatever that means) - don't buy it if you don't wearing things that are the color of cabernet sauvignon/merlot/syrah and do buy it if you do.
Disappointing fit overall. The waistband digs in uncomfortably and they ride up constantly throughout the day. Expected better for the price.

I bought two of these for my home studio after using them at my gym. They hold up beautifully through hot yoga and regular vinyasa flows. The weave is tight enough that they don't pill or shed, but they're still super comfortable folded up under my knees or hips during restorative poses. I've washed mine probably ten times now and the color hasn't faded at all. They fold compactly which is nice since I travel with one sometimes. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone who does yin or restorative yoga regularly, and honestly even if you just want a sturdy throw blanket for stretching on the living room floor. Way better than the thin ones I see at big box stores. Grab a couple while they're in stock.
Brilliant in depth study of sapiens, the world into which they arrived and how they in a relatively short period of time changed that environment for better and for worse.
Got this for cheap and honestly it's worth every penny. The dessert selection is solid and the instructions are easy to follow. Wish there were photos though.

I thought this was one of the worst films I have ever seen. It was painful to watch this child being bullied by her drunken father. She had no one to go to and had to eat dog food to survive. The scenes where she was having to try to cook her own dog food and gravy dinner, light a stove with a blow torch and within moments it all explodes. She runs for cover and fear, not just from the fire, but the wrath of her father...she hides in a cardboard box. The fire is all around her and one waits for her to be consumed by the smoke and flames. Suddenly her father appears and chases her out. They race through the swamp, she in terror he in a drunken anger. The scenes of all the drunkeness from the men and women and the wildness of the children...I did not find to be anything but painful. The flooding of the Bathtub area was sad and the hundreds of animals drowned was a reminder of how horrific this storm was. How little help was given left me wondering. They tried to give help but the people did not want to leave what they had...I understand that, but I did not find this to be all that great a film. I guess the father taught the daughter how to survive, and as he was dying it was evident he did love her, but it left me wondering about her future. I have been orphaned, abandoned, homeless, and terrified, but I lived in a major city and had three jobs at one time to try to survive. I guess it is a city person trying to understand a backwoods-swamp existence. The hopelessness was not to my liking. This child seemed like a half wild animal running through the swamp, screaming and shouting, and the filth...I just wanted to bath her, dress her in clean clothes and show her there is something better. Ugh, I really hated it!

Bought this thinking I'd be getting the actual film to watch with my family. Turns out it's basically a behind-the-scenes feature with Ernest Lehman talking over nearly every scene. You can barely hear the original audio most of the time. The packaging does mention commentary somewhere on the back but it's easy to miss if you're not looking for it. If you're a film student or a hardcore fan of the production side of things, you'd probably love this. But if you just want to sit down and enjoy the movie itself, skip this version and find a different release.

I found this short history tedious. I could not immerse myself in it and often found myself putting the book down out of boredom so that it took me much longer to read than many longer histories I've read in the past. I believe the main problem is that the author condenses too many characters in the space without rounding the characters out; I do not find myself interested in them because they appear wooden...not enough insight into their personalities and not enough color given to their backgrounds. I feel the author's past as a journalist has influenced her here. She can write volumes of information, but it doesn't seem to engage the reader on a deeper lever than a newspaper story might. I enjoy Christopher Hibbert and Alison Weir more. They convey complex historical events with a gift for giving the reader a feeling for the time and they have an ability to communicate characters on more of a flesh-and-blood level. Too bad. I was looking forward to the book.

As many other reviewers have said, one of the corners did not inflate all the way. It is still compressed to 6" on that side. The rest of the mattress did end up being about 11" tall. I waited a full 72 hours before even sitting on the mattress. This mattress collects and generates an incredible amount of heat. I will wake up sweaty directly where my body is touching it. Overall the firmness is fine and it is comfortable. But is defective and too hot.
great tool....my knives are a sharp as when I purchased them new
Unbelievably plush for the price. These sheets feel like a much more expensive set.

This was a really cute movie probably aimed at teens. It was not meant to be high art, so I'm rating it for delivering a good job for what it was intended to be: a cute and well written story about 3 nice and likeable Texas girls, mostly set in wonderful, romantic European settings, and just a lot of fun overall. All three actresses were quite good and this was a nice afternoon escape film. It was nice to see a teen film that was pretty positive and wholesome for a change, not too old for its intended audience. I saw this in a theater mostly full of mid to late teen girls, and they all seemed to be enjoying it a lot.

The story flashes back and forth between the beginning of the 20th century and today; something I don't like. However, it wasn't too much of a distraction. My problem with the story is development of the characters and the total "disappearance" of story threads (WHAT was the purpose of the body bag on the dock and how did that play out?). There are characters that just don't make sense, like the hostility of the housekeeper (what was that all about?), the peeping tom proclivities of the butler and the bitchiness of the second wife (which wasn't even discovered until the end of the book (WHERE did that come from?) The author needs a good editor to point out the weaknesses in his story-telling. I won't be buying the other books in the series.

I like the concept and that it has the words in Korean and English, but the execution didn't work well for me. The bags don't stand up without the plastic dividers and it's just not convenient to carry them the way it is set up. I may update my review, but I haven't been able to use this. I wish there was one for glass as well.

What an amazing way to end this series! When we first where introduced to Asa, I was not impressed, he was the con man, a bad brother and up to no good. It was in Rome's book that he really started coming around and I really started to like him. I wanted him to turn things around, and he was trying really hard to be a better person. In this book, I just totally feel for him and my heart was at times breaking for him. He was trying so hard, but also so resigned to the fact that he was not a good person, that he was going to screw up and disappoint the people in his life. I loved Royal, she was strong and fierce, she was struggling with some of the same issues as Asa in the beginning, but otherwise, she was a woman that knew what she wanted and was not afraid to go after it, would not comprise who she was and her morals for anyone. She was strong and yet vulnerable. I really loved them together and their potential to be together. Jay did a beautiful job wrapping this series up and giving everyone their happily ever after. I have loved every book, every Marked Man, every woman that has been their match. This has been an amazing series and I have enjoyed being on this wild ride with these guys. I am sad that it is over, but also can't wait to see what she has in store for us next!
A nice read. short and compact. The historical characters do what we expect of them. For once, a Turtledove that was too short.

I decided to purchase a newer canister type filter. The reason for this is my 54 gallon tank had been shut down for 3 months with only the dried up gravel in it. So I started it back up in October of 2014 with my Magnum 350. I decided to test my tank for ph and ammonia levels and found out that the ammonia was 1.0 ppm too high. Of course I immediately dosed the tank with Ammo Lock. Other then that the tank was doing well with no fish in it as of yet. Because of the ammonia I went to my local pet store supplier and purchase the Aqua top CF400UV. Installed it and within 24 hours the tank started to cloud up. I made several water changes and cleaned the filter several times over a period of 2 weeks to no avail. I contacted my local supplier and they replaced it thinking it must have been defective. Well! The tank never cleared even after another 10 days of water changes and filter changes. So I thought I would reinstall my Magnum 350. Within 12 hours my tank was nearly clear. After 24 hours it was crystal clear. So I guess I have to say that I either got two defective filters or the Aqua top 400 UV just could not handle my water condition. I have over 30 years experience with fish and tanks and I am baffled by this. I found the filter easy to use and to be very quiet. Just as an FYI for others who are new to this non self priming filter. You should fill the canister first about 1 from the top and install the cover then fill the in and out inlets. Hook it up and just press the primmer button twice or more and just turn it on and you are good to go.
Larger than expected, which was a pleasant surprise. My 8 year old loves it!
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing blows my old router out of the water. Super impressed.
Case arrived cracked but disc played fine. Odd flick, not what I expected but had some funny moments. Fast delivery at least.

I was a little apprehensive about this one, due to the the comments here. I took the plunge after confirming that it would work with my HP 6540 printer. Setup was easy - but since I run WPA on the wireless side, hooking up to the wired side was a necessity for configuring it (of course - how would it know your key?) The quick start guide was passable, I ended up using the PDF version of the full manual instead. It does run very hot - but since everyone says this about them, I'm sure it's "normal". I'm currently trying to decide whether I will leave it on all the time, or keep the printer and printserver powered off until I need to print.

Arrived two days earlier than expected and came in a sturdy box with no dents or damage. Pulled it out and the build quality actually surprised me for the price, feels solid, not flimsy plastic. Threw in a couple batteries to test it right away and it fired up instantly. First impression was honestly way better than I expected. Didn't even need to dig into the manual to get going. So far I'm really impressed and glad I took the chance on this one.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this bed is surprisingly plush. My lab took to it immediately and it's held up great so far. Totally exceeded expectations.

Took this knife on a three-day backpacking trip in the Smokies and it handled everything I threw at it. Batoned through some pretty thick hardwood no problem, and the edge held up better than I expected. The 5160 steel is tough as nails but you definitely need to stay on top of oiling it, noticed some spotting after the first rainy night even with a wipe down. Handle is comfortable enough for extended use, though my hands are average sized so folks with bigger mitts might find it a touch narrow. Sheath is decent, nothing special. For the price point this thing is a workhorse. Knocking off a star because the weight is noticeable on long hikes and the factory edge needed some work out of the box.

Book arrived two days late which was frustrating since I'd been waiting on this one for a while. The packaging was pretty flimsy too, just a thin mailer with no padding, so the corners got dinged up during transit. Not a huge deal since I'm planning to read it not display it, but still annoying. As for the story itself, I'm only a few chapters in but it's decent so far. Picks up right where the last one left off and Talia's recovery is handled pretty realistically. The pacing feels a little slow compared to the earlier books though, and I'm hoping it picks up soon. Giving it three stars for now because the shipping experience really brought down my excitement. Might update once I finish the whole thing.
I received a used leash, but i still like it. The brass had some scratches, the handle was a tad dirty, and there was some black fur on it.
My dogs love these and they are good for their teeth.

Got this delivered yesterday and the packaging was solid, no bent corners or damage at all. Amazon shipped it fast which I appreciated because I'd been waiting to read this one. Started it last night and honestly couldn't put it down. The whole TV studio backdrop feels fresh and the chemistry between the two leads had me hooked from their first scene together. Julie Huss just knows how to write characters that pull you in completely. Already half way through and dreading finishing it. Grabbing the rest of the series after this for sure.

Total waste of money. I expected way more based on the listing, but this thing barely worked straight out of the box. The connection keeps dropping every few minutes, and when it does connect, the signal is so weak it's basically unusable. My old one from a different brand cost less and worked circles around this. The build quality also feels super cheap, like it would crack if you looked at it wrong. I tried troubleshooting with customer support and they just sent me a generic email that didn't help at all. Really disappointed because I had high hopes for this. Save yourself the headache and look elsewhere. Returning mine today.

I wear a size 32 ddd so I do not.expect much support or easy fit from most bras. I bought a medium and the band is not snug enough, and the cups are ok, they do not compress too much. On me, this.bra does not have enough support to wear with just one layer shirt. I have to wear a camisole and layer shirts to be seen outside the house. While little support, this bra is as comfy as you can get for my size. I love it, and can wear 24 hours straight, but allows quite a bit of bounce for my size. but I will wear to run errands, chores, playing cards. hanging out at home. Also a great sleep/lounge bra if you are traveling, staying at someone's house, etc.
Above average heavy denim jeans (which is all I wear) at a great price. To me, Carhartt is special.

By reputation, Meryl Streep seals her legend in this hardly observed crime who-dunnit receiving no Oscar nod or Academy mention for a performance that is astoundingly real in its exactness in the character of Lindy Chamberlain charged with the murder of her own daughter in the Australia back water, near Alice Springs, along with her husband Michael (Sam Neill), both devout Christians, a case that was solved a year after the picture's release. It is one thing to capture the virtuosity of Streep, but to present the trials and tribulations of innocent, accused parents under the microscope of media and bombarded by innuendo at every turn wearing testimony and beliefs to the pressure point is an extraordinary piece of cinema. If you followed this film with "Silkwood" you would see two distinct individuals played by the same actress. And, of course, Meryl Streep continues to stretch our imaginations. The supporting cast is familiar to those who fancy Australian offerings. However, this film is unique in its documentary feel with artistic touches, like complete authenticity to the decent character of the principals, that heighten its impact. Here, the viewers as well as the lead characters are tested by fire and survive. This is a Streep performance you must see.

The magnet is strong, the tape is easy to read (although it notates the measurement on the tape, meaning at the 3/4 inch mark it is actually written on the tape "3/4". Some people, including myself, don't like this) and I've bounced it off many a concrete floor without any damage. My only complaint would be that the tape itself could support itself a little more when extended (it tends to flop more than I'd like). It's not the worlds best tape measure, but it's certainly good enough.
I can find my dog when shes out at night---I Love it!

Caroline Andrews and Josh Summers were the match that I was looking for in this series. They had different reasons for needing a second shot. Love was not the only reason to need a second chance at something important. Their encountered began with the previous books of the series. Through their secondary interactions with the other leads made for a pleasurable journey for the two of them to finally make that step to creating a relationship in Forever, OR. Josh had experienced loss, confusion, and the desire to want what was once his. He knew this look when he saw it on the face of Caroline. There was this draw to Caroline that he could not deny. Finally getting that chance to make things more was the opportunity that he was looking for. Josh captivated me back a few book and the sweetness continues on. The sense of humor was on point and charming. He was all the dream qualities one wants in a man strong, sweet, patient, kind, and protective. His knack for baking pies makes him well liked. It also provides a connection for him and Caroline. I found Josh to my favorite Second Shot hero. He has my heart. Caroline was truly a match for him. Thank you Sara. Where are we heading next? **This ARC was provided via Edelweiss in exchange for an honest review.
My son loves police and fireman and asked for a fire hose for his 4th birthday. This was exactly what he wanted.
Great value for the price. Material a little stiff even after several washings.

Ordered these on a Tuesday and they showed up Thursday morning, way faster than the estimated delivery. Box arrived in great shape, no crushed corners or anything. Opened it up and the shoes looked even better than the pictures. That mid-top cut is a nice change from the usual low-tops I buy. Slipped them on right out of the box and was surprised how little break-in time they needed. The cushioning underfoot felt solid from the first step, and the fit was true to size for me. I have pretty flat feet so the support was decent enough for an all-day wear without getting sore. Been wearing them to work for about a week now and zero complaints so far. Really happy with this purchase overall.

I grabbed this during a Kindle sale and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. The emotional depth here caught me off guard completely. You've got two broken people trying to navigate something real together and the author doesn't sugarcoat any of it. The addiction stuff feels authentic, not glamorized or preachy, which is hard to pull off. I stayed up til 2am finishing it because once the tension ramps up you genuinely don't know how things will land. The timeline jumps work surprisingly well and everything connects by the end. For under three bucks this is an absolute steal. I've read full priced books that weren't half as gripping. Already checking out what else this author has written because this one genuinely surprised me.

Finally a bra that doesn't dig into my shoulders. The wide straps distribute weight perfectly and I barely notice I'm wearing it. Ordered three more after the first one arrived because the support is great without feeling restrictive. The fabric breathes well too, which matters in summer. Washed them several times now and no pilling or stretching out.
I read all the Dean Koontz books he puts out, He's a great story teller and always look for movies made from his books. This is a good one. Hoping for more of the series.

Got this for under my squat suit and honestly can't believe the price point. Similar shirts from the big brands run $40+ and this does the exact same job for a fraction of that. The compression is solid without cutting off circulation, and it holds up wash after wash without losing shape. I'm 5'11", 215ish and went with an XL based on other reviews, glad I did. Fits snug where it needs to but still comfortable enough for a full training session. Definitely grabbing another one.

Over the last several months, I have received several stainless steel tumblers to test and review. My husband is the hunting and fishing manager for an international chain sporting goods store, so we also receive a lot of stuff that they sell in the stores, to test at home. Some of the first tumblers we were sent to try were from Yeti, and so many other brands have followed... Epic, Kodiak, Magnum Steel, Sic-sup, Rtic, and many more more. This was the most recent cup that we have gotten to try. We live in Texas, so we like ice cold drinks while we sit in the blazing hot sun. After hand washing this cup, allowing it to air dry, it was filled with ice, and topped off with water. Then is was off to the lake for a day in the hot sun! This cup performed very well throughout the day, and was even adopted by my father's girlfriend by the end of our trip. (I usually give them to family or friends anyways, because we have several still) The ice that we put in the cup early in the day lasted until we headed back home that night. We refilled the water a few times, and did top the ice off throughout the day, but it kept the ice and drink just as cold as the other cups like this, that we had taken out there. Not all of these tumblers perform as well as the top branded ones, but a few of them do stand out as being very good investments. This cup is one of them! If it had not already been taken home by someone else, we would have been keeping it. *Disclaimer* I received this product at a discounted rate, in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. This is what I have provided. If you found this review helpful, please let me know by clicking the link below.

I've had this mirror on my mountain bike for about six weeks now and I'm really impressed with the mounting system. The clamp design is what sold me, it wraps around the handlebar securely without any wobble, and the quick-release lever lets me pop it off when I'm throwing the bike in the trunk. Other mirrors I've tried use those flimsy rubber bands that stretch out after a week, but this one feels solid. The glass itself gives a nice wide view of what's coming up behind me on the trail. I did have to tighten the ball joint once after a particularly rocky descent, but that's expected. For the price, you really can't beat the build quality. Definitely recommend to anyone commuting or hitting singletrack regularly.

What a great story. This story was not just about the zombie apocalpse but was a metaphor for what will happen when we allow too much of the government to interfere by accepting the mark of the beast. It also shows what will hapen when the government no longer cares or is invloved in our lives the way we need them to. What happens when we are truly left alone. There are several verses from the bible sprinkled through the book. Each chapter giving us a lesson. Each lesson hidden well enough as to not interfere with the story or turn you off. Eventhough the author uses the bible and speak to a lot of Christian values, this is a book that anyone could grasp and enjoy. I give this book 5 stars.
A lovely piece. I'm very happy with the design and quality and it suits my needs perfectly. Fast shipping as well.
Binged the whole collection with my kids over the weekend. Picture quality is solid and the nostalgia hit me hard. Totally worth it.

These are the real deal! Ive ordered the cheaper ones and even though they say they come with screws they dont. These do and they are much more sturdy. I will buy these from now on and save a trip to the hardware store for screws
I saw this movie at the theater and decided I wanted to have it to watch later to try to figure some of it out, but I have not had time to do so yet
Smaller than I thought but holds my MK3 perfectly and draws fast.

Been wearing this for about three months now and it's held up surprisingly well, no peeling or seam issues. Fits a bit snug through the shoulders and the color fades slightly, but decent for the price.
Enjoyed the twists and turns in the plot very well written kept me in suspense up to the end highly recommend especially FibOnacci fans
Bought this for my son's birthday and it's been played constantly for months now. Disc still works perfectly with zero scratches.

The Intellitune sucks. Often time it will tune to a station with a strong occupied reception. When you manually set the station, it will drop off constantly. The auxillary 3.5mm jack is loose fitting, so much as to interrupt playback while driving. Just had a bad experience with this. Their tech support weren't of help also. Told me to just return it to whom I bought it from and get my money back. They couldn't even cross reference the name of the product to the model number. No model number on packaging or their website, just on item itself, which you'd need a magnifier to read. Only thing going for this item is its looks, nothing else.

In his role as John the divine, Richard Harris plays an excellent character. Although Christians endure unimaginable suffering because of their faith, they never lose hope. John is the only apostle left. And, he must keep the remnant of believers encouraged. Excellent plot, excellent story, excellent Biblical message.

This a decent bag. It's the right size for the tools I have. The shoulder strap was what made this the winner over similar bags. The only thing I don't like is that it does not have internal pockets. Otherwise, I am satisfied with this purchase!
I used them to stuff his treats toy and he would sit there for a while trying to get them out. He loved them.
perfect for my 1lb puppy and he absolutely loves it!

Replaced an ancient, screaming bathroom fan with this Panasonic unit and the difference is night and day. You literally cannot hear it running from the next room. Installation took me about two hours from start to finish, and the instructions were straightforward enough that I didn't have to look up any tutorials. The fit into my existing ceiling opening required a little trimming but nothing major. What really impressed me is how quickly it clears a steamy mirror after a hot shower. We've got a small bathroom with no window and this thing handles humidity like a champ. Been running it daily for about four months now with zero rattles or weird noises. Worth every penny over the cheap big-box options I was considering.

The writing on this is sharp and smart. I especially love how the dialogue flows, feels like real people talking, not scripted robots. The pacing keeps things moving without rushing. Genuinely one of the better shows I've watched all year.
Arrived in a crushed box with no padding. The bag itself felt super cheap and tiny. Sent it back.

These magnets came neatly packaged in four columns within a flat little box. The magnets are about the size of a dime, maybe slightly bigger. One side is plain and the other has a groove in it. I thought only one side would stick, but it works with either side. I mainly bought these for my mom who enjoys sticking photos to her fridge. As a project, I laminated all her photos and then we used these magnets to stick them to the fridge. These were strong enough to hold the one sheet of laminated photo per magnet, which worked out fine for what we needed. However, if you were to add say two or three sheets of laminated photo, the magnets don't seem to be as strong. These are not the strongest magnet, but they are not the weakest either. They can hold up about three to four sheets of unlaminated photos, just to give you and understanding of their strength. So, if your papers get too thick, these magnets will lose their magnetism.
Arrived in a rigid mailer with no bent corners. Flipped through and the poems look lovely.
These lights completely transformed my backyard setup. I strung them along the fence and they give off such a warm, cozy glow every night. Neighbors already asked where I got them.
Good read with some twists. Not as good as Gone Girl but still a good book.
Cute book of poetry. I plan to incorporate some of these poems in my English class.

I like this item a lot. Packs up small, nice little case. I would like to have seen some reinforced grommets but that is a nitpick. The fact I could fold it back up and get it back in its pouch is enough of a selling point for me. Good bit of emergency kit.

Ordered these for my bushcraft kit and they arrived two days early. Packaging was solid, each piece wrapped separately so nothing chipped in transit. Pulled one out and the edge was surprisingly aggressive right away, threw sparks on the first strike. Quality feels way above what I expected for the price. Definitely grabbing a couple more to keep stocked.

Swapped out our old dumb detector for this and really glad I did. The app walked me through connecting it to wifi in maybe five minutes. Last week a candle set it off and my phone buzzed before I even noticed the smell. Love being able to check battery status from bed instead of that annoying 2am chirp. Pairs great with the rest of my smart home stuff too. Solid build quality for the price.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box, not just a flimsy bag. The cable feels solid with decent thickness and the connectors snap in firmly. Ran it across the living room and the picture looks sharp right away. No complaints so far.

Got this on sale and honestly it's paid for itself already in how much soap I'm no longer wasting. The dispenser puts out the perfect amount every time, so no more giant globs pouring out of a regular bottle. Refills run around four bucks which is totally reasonable and they last forever. I cook daily and having clean hands without contaminating the pump has been great. For under fifteen dollars this thing is an absolute steal.

Honestly didn't expect much from these dolls, but they completely blew me away. The quality is way better than typical fashion dolls, the hair doesn't tangle immediately and the joints actually move for posing. The science kit included was a genuine surprise. My eight year old spent a solid hour doing the little experiment without losing interest, which rarely happens with add-on accessories. I figured the educational angle would be gimmicky, but it's actually well thought out. Picked up two more characters for her birthday last month. These are worth every penny and then some.
Honestly didn't think a harness would make this much difference. Walks are way calmer now and no more gagging.
These hold up great after hundreds of arrows. Super durable and bright.

Fits my laptop and some accessories and about 2 slim books. I had to remove the bottom padding in the bag as this bag was bought for someone with a 15in laptop and it was stolen, so they told me to try to make use of it if I could. I have a 17.3in HP Envy and even after removing the padding there was still an a good amount of support/protection for my laptop. It also has great support in the straps making it perfect for travel.

When I received it, I immediately used it. My left hand's little finger had no strength, which was why I purchased it. Within a couple days, my little finger functioned again, and then I purchased a more resistant model. This and the stiffer product, also improved my right hand, which suffers from carpel tunnel syndrome.
Arrived two days early in solid retail packaging. Really impressed with the build quality right out of the box. Fits my cruiser perfectly.

Been wearing these for about three weeks now and they're growing on me. The first few days were rough, pretty stiff and I got a blister on my heel. But once they loosened up, they became surprisingly comfortable for all-day wear. Quality is solid and you can tell they're well-constructed. Not the most cushioned shoe I've owned but definitely supportive enough for daily use. Glad I stuck with them through the break-in period.
Best to go bottle I've ever had, LOVE that it is spill proof if the straw is removed!

Got this paperback for like six bucks and it was worth every penny. Three hours of pure entertainment sitting in my recliner. The Uncle Mo storyline had me cracking up the whole way through, especially the scenes with Grandma Mazur at the funeral home. Evanovich keeps the chaos rolling nonstop. For the price of a fancy coffee you get a solid afternoon of laughs and a mystery that actually keeps you guessing. Can't beat that deal.
Honestly expected something flimsy for the price but this thing is solid. My pup hops right in every time we head out.

Makes a lot great bubbles with just one blow. Even my 2 year old can do it. The only negative is that the blow stick won't hold in the turtle well so if I allow my toddler to use it all by herself she may lose it inside the cup.

It was an absolute pleasure to read the manuscript of this book. The action of the novel's present (the last months of Hari Seldon's life), the hints at events of the deep past and a visionary forecasting of the future of the Foundations and Galaxia finally give us all the missing clues to the questions even Asimov shied from answering. This is really the missing link we have been waiting for! Run and grab it as fast as you can! Attila Torkos
Got these for my brother-in-law. Solid everyday sneakers for the price.

Here it all is in plain sight--the prescription for the endless wars and police states of the twentieth century. It's hard to say whether the Torah, the Talmud, or the Communist Manifesto have been more influential on the lives of the proletarian drones urged to march to battle and destroy each other for a series of overlapping, frequently contradictory reasons. If you google "high arka conductors and artists" you'll see part of a suitable satire on the subject.
My daughter loves this Bieber book. Tons of photos and facts inside. For the price, it's a fantastic little gift for any true fan.
My dog absolutely loves these treats! Two paws up!
Surprised by how dressy this feels for a knit fabric. Based on other comments I braced myself for something skin-tight, but the fit is actually relaxed through the body. Great quality for the price.
Perfect fit for my granddaughter's doll! The little carrying case is surprisingly sturdy and keeps the glasses protected during play.

This cookie sheet is a thin silicone membrane with a silicone covered metal frame and handles that is oven safe to 400 The baking surface dimension is not a perfect rectangle; the width of the edges measure 10 1/2 wide, the center 11. I was able to fit nine 2 1/2 cookies on a sheet; a standard cookie sheet will hold twelve. When you take the baking sheet out of the oven you need to use the handles; if you grab the edges with your fingers under the membrane you will deform it and crack some of the cookies. You do need to be careful with cleaning and storage because the membrane is vulnerable to puncturing. Overall this sheet is well made and met my expectations for a non-stick silicone baking surface. But because of the size, care and storage I didn't find it to be as useful as I hoped. I will use it more as specialty equipment for baking something very sticky like Florentines but continue to use my traditional cookie sheets with Silpats or parchment paper for most of my baking.

I purchased a reconditioned Salton EX 122 about a month ago. I thought I'd be getting a great deal, since my previous experience with reconditioned / refurbished products has been uniformly good. Not so here. The coffee maker came missing several parts, including the espresso carafe and the metal filter basket. Foolishly, I decided that it wasn't worth returning the whole item to Amazon for these two small parts, but as it turned out, these two small parts were impossible to find online. I eventually managed a partial solution, but then I encountered a much bigger challenge (at least when it comes to enjoying a nice cappuccino). On other machines I've had, the steam pressure could be directed either toward the filter basket or into the milk frother. Not so here. The steam isn't emitted through the frothing tube until practically the end of the process. So, great espresso but crappy cappuccino because the milk never gets warm and never gets frothy. The coffee maker works great, though.
Very cute. I made two out of this towel...same design on both sides...crocheted a top with button to hang from oven or refrigerator door handle. Makes two nice gifts.

On a multiple item order, item was received a week prior than all other items order shipped under the same property. It is little oversensitive on the mouse movement. I'm sure there is a sensitivity adjustment but haven't spent the time to look for it yet.
My wife asked me to order this for her and she loves it. I played the DVD through our home theater system and she enjoyed the music and the workout. I guess I will have to try it next.

I actually enjoyed this one more than the first book! Harlow's character really stole the show for me. She's unapologetically blunt and says the most unexpected things at the worst moments, which had me laughing out loud several times. The chemistry between her and the love interest felt genuine, especially during their banter scenes. My only complaint is the middle section dragged a bit with too much internal monologue that repeated the same insecurities over and over. Could have been trimmed down. Still, the spicy scenes delivered and the ending wrapped things up nicely. Solid read overall.
I hunt a lot and that means you shower a lot. Regular scentless soap beats my hair up and makes it dry. DDW shampoo and conditioner helps keep dry scalp in check and is still scentless.

Used this belt on a kayaking trip down the Chattahoochee last weekend and I'm seriously impressed. The clear touchscreen window was what sold me, and it actually works, sent texts and took photos without taking my phone out once. The plastic isn't super thick or cloudy like other dry pouches I've tried. What really surprised me was the adjustable strap. I'm a size 14 and it fit around my waist comfortably over a life jacket with room to spare. My iPhone 14 Pro with a chunky case fit inside no problem. Got splashed plenty and everything stayed bone dry. Only minor complaint is the headphone port cover feels a little flimsy but I never use wired headphones anyway so it doesn't matter. Definitely buying a second one for my husband.

Got this for my 8 lb chihuahua mix and it's been a game changer for vet visits and quick errands. She usually hates carriers but settled right in without any fuss. The structured base holds her weight perfectly with no drooping, which was a big concern of mine. I like that one panel fully unzips so I can easily load her in, and the partial zip on the other side lets her peek out comfortably. No top access caught me off guard at first but honestly it hasn't been an issue at all. Feels well made, looks nice, and does exactly what I needed. Totally worth every penny.

I honestly wasn't expecting much from a required textbook, usually they're dense, dry, and impossible to follow. This one genuinely surprised me though. The explanations are thorough and actually written in a way that makes sense if you sit down and really read them. I figured the diagrams would just be decorative filler like in most books, but they're incredibly helpful for visualizing processes like cellular respiration and the photosynthesis cycles. My teacher assigns a ton of chapters each week and I thought I'd drown, but the end-of-section summaries save my life when studying for exams. It's heavy to carry around, sure, but that's because it's packed with solid information. Way better than I expected for an AP-level bio text.
Decent enough for the price but honestly pretty tiny. Works okay for my cat though.

This could have been great. Unfortunately the most important feature is useless. The belt clip seems tight and springy, but put in your belt and it slips off with almost no effort. Someone suggested taping it, which is a poor (and ugly) fix. My solution was to drill through the metal clip and rivet it. Just insert a wooden block, drill through the clip, remove the block, insert a rivet from the inside, replace the block, add the cap and hammer it home. It doesn't interfere with the tool at all. But, speaking of the tool - While this has become my fave for every day use, the CS4 has tools on the outside and they snag the case when you try to insert the tool. I have a Blast, which I use for work, and a Rebar, which lives in my wife's car. Both tools have their bladess mounted INSIDE the handles. This is a 5 star item now that I've "fixed" it, but as it was, because it's so very easy to lose, 3 stars.
Thought this would be pricier than plain oil but it's not. Conditions my cutting boards better than I expected.

The fit for my P239 is perfect and it looks great. It holds the gun securely and releases when it is supposed to. This is one of the best holsters I own, especially at this price point and I will be looking to Fobus when I need another one!
This comes in very handy if you need to use a lightbulb in an extension cord for going underneath a house dark crawl space.
The dogs seam to like them it helps them both to keep their teeth clean.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box. My daughter's face lit up when she unboxed it. Solid plastic, great size for little hands.

Thought this would be flimsy for the price but it's actually pretty solid. Holds my 27-inch monitor without sagging. Took maybe fifteen minutes to set up. Wish the tilt tension was a bit stronger though.

Bought these for my three year old son after he kept trying to grab his older cousin's regular bricks. The chunky size is exactly right for little hands and the colors are really vibrant. He sits and stacks them for a solid thirty minutes at a time which is unheard of for him. I'd highly recommend this set to any parent of a toddler or as a birthday gift for a two to four year old. Totally worth it.

These were cute, but just too bright to be my style. I guess I doubted how glaringly bright they would be, but after they arrived I just could not see staring at them all day. It would be dizzying. So I returned them. They fit as expected and looked comfy though.

I have seen the first season. Now reading the first novel. It is reeling me in more and more. The descriptive nature of the writing is entrancing. The line from "The Gathering" about the bagpipers relating that the trilling of the chanters above the drones "made the blood itch" made me stop and read again and again. It is the finest description I have read. I feel my skin shivering at the thought.
Bought this for my Harry Potter obsessed daughter and she won't take it off. The wand pocket is such a cool detail. Fabric feels surprisingly thick and warm for the price.

Kate Pearces Retribution is a read that may have triggers for some, so read with caution. Now that being said this book is a really good read. Sacrifice, Book 1, needs to be read before this one so that all of the background information on the tribute program and the world they live on is explained. Kai Mexr was Commander Rehzs right hand man and was supposed to retire when his last mission ended, but he was forced to come back as a trainer for another mission. His new trainee is Aled Price another person with human genetics and stubborn streak a mile wide. Kai and Aled butt heads from the very beginning, but realize that they need each other to survive. They have to deal with the harsh realities of training, and when that is over, the treatment at the hands of the Ungrich. Palk set his sights on Kai and his trainee and makes sure his presence is felt to both men. Aled realizes that Kai doesnt believe he deserves better than being taken roughly and without any choices in how he is taken, but trying to make Kai see that he deserves more may be battle too big for Aled. We see Anna and Rehz in this book as well since the Ungrich seem to have set their sights on human DNA. Both pairs realize that if their secret is not protected then they will be targets for the military to use them. When Aled goes in to get his medical clearance and to finally be free to pursue a life with Kai, he is taken for the Ungrich, as is Anna. Both Kai and Rehz now need to join forces and go rescue their mates. This book ends on a cliffhanger. I give this book 4 stars!
Grabbed this on a Kindle deal and it was worth every penny. The banter had me laughing out loud and the romance was top-notch. Already bought the next one.

Ordered this used copy for my book club and honestly the shipping was faster than expected. Book arrived in a padded mailer which was nice, but the corners were still a little banged up. Listed as "very good" condition and I'd say that's accurate enough. Spine isn't cracked and no writing inside, just some shelf wear on the cover. Started reading last night and I'm about fifty pages in. Russo's writing is solid as always but the story hasn't really grabbed me yet. The small-town setting feels familiar if you've read his other stuff. Not bad, just hasn't clicked for me so far. Maybe it picks up. Packaging could've used a bit more protection for a paperback but nothing major. Decent purchase overall, just not blown away yet.
I would wear this in a minute is it were a size 16. Look fantastic on the American Girl doll.. Good purchase.

Bought a couple packs of these for my garage workshop and they've been solid. I wear them every time I use my miter saw or angle grinder. They sit close to the face without pinching and the arms don't dig into my temples like some pricier pairs do. At this price I just keep extras in my truck and tool bag so I'm never caught without them. Sure they're not going to rival high-end eyewear for clarity but the lens is plenty clear enough for shop work. They don't fog up on me nearly as bad as the ones I had before. You really can't go wrong stocking up on these.
Beaten these up on rocky trails for months and they still look new.
Have not used it yet - looking forward to having this handy while we travel!

Been using these bands for about a month now and I'm really impressed with the door anchor attachment.
