Emilie du Chatelet was a most interesting women for her time, or for any time. A member of the French aristocracy she was adored by her father and taught unwomanly things like sword fighting, riding, languages, literature and mathematics. She also liked to dance, was a passable performer on the harpsichord, sang opera, and was an amateur actress. As a scientist she is remembered as a footnote, if you will, to the other scientists of the day. She did research into fire, and developed theories of what is now called infra-red radiation. In the year of her death she completed the work regarded as her outstanding achievement: her translation into French, with her own commentary, of Newton's celebrated Principia Mathematica, including her derivation from its principles of mechanics the notion of conservation of energy. She also led a life we would consider somewhat scandalous. After dutifully presenting her husband with the children expected of an arranged marriage they agreed to live apart with each taking other lovers. I was struck with the fact that she died in 1749. Had she been born fifty years later, it is likely that she would have faced the guillotine like so many others.

There are so many kitchen gadgets now that look cute, but really don't do what they promise. You end up feeling cheated and tossing them out because they aren't worth the storage space they take up. I'll admit that I figured this would be one of those gadgets. I remember when the only time we had avocados is when relatives visited from Florida. Now the stores here carry them, although they are unripe, so you can't eat them immediately. I had to wait several days for my guinea pig avocado to ripen so that I could test the slicer. You use the plastic "knife" part to cut the avocado length-wise and then you remove the part that isn't sticking to the pit. This is the thing that surprised me, but the two halves came apart quite easily. The instructions say to "press the pitter into the pit." I couldn't get the metal parts to go INTO the pit, but they loosened it enough that it fell out when I turned the avocado over. Job accomplished. Then you position the slicer over the avocado half and pull it through. Amazingly, it removes all the pulp in nice, neat little slices. I've always peeled avocados and then cut the edible part off the pit in irregular slices. It looks messy and there's a lot of waste. Using the slicer is a big improvement. I'm leery of kitchen gadgets, but this one does exactly what it promises, is sturdy, doesn't take up much room in the drawer, and cleans up easily after you use it. It's well worth the modest price. Free sample provided for review.

This review is also posted on my blog: theshortreviewer.blogspot.com I normally enjoy stories that are told through the viewpoint of someone you can feel for--you know, a good guy or girl. Being that I knew this story would be told through the eyes of someone truly evil, then I got past that and found myself both intrigued and utterly disgusted at the same time. I do like a good disturbing thriller after all. And this book certainly delivered on that. Fearlessly written, the author holds absolutely nothing back. This is not an exaggeration. The main character is a serial killer, and you are taken into his sick and twisted mind. The repetitiveness of his thoughts is indicative of how I believe someone like him would think. I had no empathy for this character at all. I found myself hoping this was fiction and not an autobiography in disguise! That is how good of a job the author does with bringing you inside this psycho's demented world. The story is graphic, and many of the scenes are deeply horrifying and troubling. And what is even more terrifying is that there are people out there who do commit atrocious crimes such as this. So even though this is fiction, it is probably more realistic than most of us would like to believe. It often read more like a diary, where the killer tells a lot of his story, and the dialogue is limited. It was a short, quick read, and I do sincerely hope for a sequel. The story did not feel finished as there is definitely more to be told here. I recommend this for anyone who thinks they can take it for what it is - a messed up and gritty story.

This is an excellent documentary about Allen's entire career. There are many, many film clips and they are all choice highlights from his films. Interspersed with these clips are interview segments with Allen present day and during earlier days. There are also clips of mini interviews with the people with whom he has worked, including Tony Roberts, Diane Keaton, Scarlett Johannsen, John Cusack, Owen Wilson, Mariel Hemingway, Gordon Willis, Marshall Brickmann, Martin Scorsese, his sister Letty Aronson, now his producer, Dick Cavett and so forth. Although Mia Farrow is covered, she does not participate in any way since they have never resumed contact in any way. She was, of course, Allen's other major leading lady but he ended up having an affair and marrying her adopted daughter years ago. Even though I have seen every single one of his movies, I really liked the choice of film clips presented here. It was very enjoyable to see them and to learn some of the tidbits about what else was going on while making them. Everyone contributed some major insight about the film clip which was unknown to us before. I also enjoyed the way he present day took us to his old school or walked down the street with his sister and they talked to present New Yorkers. There was even old footage shown of his parents who finally died near the century mark. Although the focus was on the work, there was enough of a human dimension presented here to make this a very important summing up of a creative life while the creator is still around to share it. If you love his work, you need this film in your collection. Visit my blog with link given on my profile page here or use this phonetically given URL (livingasseniors dot blogspot dot com). Friday's entry will always be weekend entertainment recs from my 5 star Amazon reviews in film, tv, books and music. These are very heavy on buried treasures and hidden gems. My blogspot is published on Monday, Wednesday & Friday.

The best thing about this DVD: a chance to be introduced to some of most wonderful music beyond the standard repertory. As someone forever seeking something I haven't heard before, this score was something of a revelation. And this is greatly to the credit of William Christie, and his superb group of singers (Piau, Naouri, d'Oustrac, Piolino, Lehtipuu) who were fully engaged and demonstrated that there is much fine singing beyond the Three Tenors world. However: the staging is just soooo tiresome! It starts off amusingly with white projections that end up built up like a three tier cake with dancers and singers coming and going through them. Unfortunately then you realize that's all it's going to happen, with singers mainly in the forefront while all the dancing and projections are going on in the background non stop. I'm sure in the theater this might have been very distracting. On video at least the camera can focus mainly on the singers and ignore most of the extraneous business during their arias. If you curious of the music you should seriously explore the music on CDs; however if this is your only option, view a borrowed copy to make sure you know what you're getting. It ain't cheap. Were it not for the wonderful music, I would have tossed it out long ago.

The quality of this book is through the roof and I am looking forward to putting my knowledge acquired from this Kindle Book to the test! Thank you so much David you are truly awesome:)

Excellent Product for mounting your cell phone to the wall, plenty of room even if your cell phone is in its case. Can be used for all cell phones. Just make sure you read the directions FIRST. But beware unless you have smooth walls it will not adhere, I have rough stucco walls in most of my house and paneling in another part and it will not stick properly. To over come this problem I used Blank Outlet covers made of plastic and than screwed the covers to the wall and installed this product to the blank covers, this method works good for iPhone 4 & 5 and similar sized phones. I know most homes are just sheet-rocked walls and it will work fine.

This worked out of the box with my HP LaserJet 4L. When I plugged the USB into my Windows 7 computer, Windows recognised it and installed the drivers automatically. When I plugged it into my Iomega ix2-200, it showed up in the list of network printers. I was able to install my HP LaserJet 4L as a network printer in both Windows 7 and Linux by simply following the add network printer prompts. How cool is that! I couldn't be more pleased with this adapter.
Another great book!!! Dated during my growing up years but the story line is very interesting. Hope to read more from the deaf man!!
In away I did like the story but it was just a little to short for my liking but the story line was good

Ordered six cans and three arrived with dents so deep the lids were compromised. One had actually cracked open and leaked all over the box, making a mess of the other cans and smelling awful. The food itself is bizarrely dry and crumbly, nothing like any wet cat food I've bought before. You'd think for the price they'd at least package it properly instead of just tossing loose cans in a cardboard box with zero padding. My indoor cat sniffed it once and walked away. Not wasting money on this again.

This purse is made of extremely strong fabric that will not tear or cut. If anyone tries to rip it or cut it off your body to steal it, they will bet a big surprise. It also has the RFID blocking in certain areas of the purse (clearly marked) to prevent your credit cards from being scanned by cellphone passerbys. Great for travel and every day use. It is also very attractive!!

Got this for under thirty bucks and it's been worth every penny. Both my cats took to it immediately. Filter lasts a good while and refills are cheap. Runs quiet on the low setting. Solid build for the price, way better than the pricier one I tried before.

Used the item once. The lid was unbelievably tight, it wouldn't budge. Finally, I pried it off and gave it a go. Completely underwhelming. I used mini ice cubes and the motor was still strained to the point of smoking. Also, there is no way this should be marketed as a travel cup, the blender attachment is in the bottom of the cup and the cup itself is massive.
Got this for my sister's birthday and she wears it daily. Perfect gift for anyone who loves simple, elegant accessories.

I ordered an XL. My waist is 31 butt and hips 46 i'm 5'7. It was hell getting on. I have a very large bottom so it was difficult getting over the humps but it smoothed everything out and it did not make my butt go flat like some reviews said. My waist line improved but it pronounced my luv handles. If I had a shorter torso I think the cincher part of the waist wouldn't push out the luv handles. I you want to use the pee hole make sure its lined up right and if you do you have to wear underwear over the suit.
bought this for my wife and she was surprised to see how small it was. Had to return it.
Arrived next day, packed securely. Feels solid right out of the box.

I Compare this movie to inception because tht was the last sci-fi action movie I saw that was better than I was expecting (and I was expecting a lot). This is a solid adult sci-fi flick. The first act of the film is intriguing and shows a lot of promise. It plays out a little slower more in a drama fashion or the middle third of the film. And the third act is not as satisfying as it could have been. As a reviewer on Rottentomatoes mentioned, this is like a mashup of other classic sci-fi films. Terminator, 12 Monkeys and Firestarter immediately spring to mind. It's a good movie, do not get me wrong, but I would go with low expectations and you might find that there are some interesting concepts at play (poor Seth). Loved the way the film was shot. The audio mix is good and the editing is pretty great (Pulp Fiction style time structure). This will be a good Blu-Ray no doubt.
Thought these would be thicker based on the photos, but they're actually fairly slim. Still sturdy enough for stirring batter and the dishwasher safe part is a big plus. Overall a solid buy.
This was a very good book; however, it started out a little slow. I wasn't really able to get into it until the middle.

Honestly expected a cheap knockoff but this totally delivered. The face sculpt is spot on and the clothes are way better quality than I thought they'd be. Sure, he's not super posable, but honestly for the price I'm really impressed. My daughter loves him.

Bought these refurbished to save some cash and honestly can't tell they're not new. The retractable cord is the main reason I got them, so nice not having tangled wires in my bag anymore. Sound quality is solid for the price. Only complaint is the ear cushions get a little warm after an hour or so. Would buy again though.

These things are great. Love the 3" size and the brightness is powerful. Also, they dim wonderfully. Would be nice if they were IC (insulation Contact) approved. I do a lot of remodeling and IC is almost always required.
Used to make a gasket for my dust deputy bucket combo.
Awesome sound for the price. Bought 3 more for my wife and kids.

I picked this up thinking it would be a decent travel read for my commute, but it completely blew my expectations out of the water. Bryson has this incredible knack for noticing the absurd details everyone else walks right past. I actually got weird looks on the train from laughing out loud at least four times before I'd even finished the first chapter. What surprised me most was how much genuine insight is packed between all the jokes. He's not just being funny for the sake of it. The observations about cultural quirks and daily life across different countries are spot on and surprisingly thoughtful. I normally find travel writing a bit dry and pretentious, but this is the exact opposite. Already ordered two more of his books.
Very light weight and wheels seem very smooth. Haven't taken it on a trip yet though, so we'll see how it holds up.

Got this as a cheap backup timer for gym intervals and honestly it does the job fine for the price. Buttons are a bit stiff and setting up custom rounds took me longer than expected since the instructions weren't great. Display is readable enough indoors but washes out completely in sunlight. After about four months the start button started getting finicky where I have to press it twice sometimes. For what I paid I can't complain too much but I was hoping for something a little more durable. It's okay, just don't expect premium build quality.

This drying rack is a work of art. Beautifully made of hard rock maple and finished to perfection. All edges are rounded and smooth; no splinters. The dowels are thick and sturdy so no sagging. Heirloom quality; would be great for displaying quilts. And, it is made in the USA. Thank you for making such a beautiful and useful product.

Read this on my old Paperwhite over a few weeks of commuting. The file held up fine through tons of page turns and a couple drops, no glitches or formatting issues. The plot itself is decent, Alex's visions kept me guessing, but the ending felt rushed. An okay psychological thriller, just not super memorable.

This spray was used in conjunction with other flea and tick prevention strategies. I used it to spray bedding that the problem cat would sleep and lay on a lot. In conjunction with this and flea/tick shampoos we were able to get rid of the fleas. I was careful to use very very little of the spray as I am sure my cat was having a reaction to normal amounts. So while this product worked, I did not feel comfortable with using a lot. My cat began to drool a bit and that is a symptom of flea prevention stuff irritating them. The spray bottle is around 6 inches tall and 1.5 inches in diameter. Pros: *Helped supplement flea and tick prevention strategy Cons: *Can cause a reaction in cats if used a normal amount(-1 star) Additional Considerations: Consider other natural means of flea and tick prevention. Whatever you use, you will have to use multiple things in order to get rid of your flea problem. Overall: 4/5 stars (>=.5 rounds up, <.5 rounds down) => 4 stars If you have any further questions regarding the product in my review please leave a comment below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
Grabbed this on sale and it was totally worth it. Great characters, steamy romance, couldn't put it down.

I've been a fan of Jack Black and Kyle Gass for years, so picking this up was a no-brainer. The movie is packed with ridiculous moments and the two of them bounce off each other perfectly. The music is actually legit catchy too, I still find myself humming "Tribute" way after the credits roll. My only real gripe is the pacing drags a bit in the second act and some of the jokes feel a little stretched thin. It's not quite as sharp as Spinal Tap, but it doesn't try to be. It's more of a loose, stoner-comedy vibe that works because JB and KG commit fully to the absurdity. Overall a fun watch, especially with friends and a few drinks. Glad I added it to my collection.
Absolutely love this! Perfect addition to my kitchen counter.

I've been hauling this book around in my backpack for three semesters now and it's held up remarkably well. The binding is still tight, no loose pages, and the cover barely shows any wear despite being shoved next to my laptop constantly. Beyond the physical durability, the content actually makes sense. The way it breaks down quantitative methods clicked for me when my professor couldn't explain them clearly. Still referencing it in upper-level courses. Worth every penny.

Did it again! This author is awesome. I have not been disappointed by any of her books. I loved Ignited and am constantly looking for any new materials she puts out. I cannot find a single thing to complain about other than I wish Book two came out like yesterday. You could feel the build up of the chemistry between Heath and Allison. He comes through for her when others have let her down and she brings out another side of him that most do not get to see. I am shipping these two all the way.

I've read most of this author's work and usually enjoy them, but this one feels like a rough draft that got published by mistake. The formatting issues are everywhere, missing quotation marks, random line breaks mid-sentence, and whole paragraphs that seem copied and pasted twice. The actual storyline had potential but kept jumping around so much I lost track of who was talking. I'd only recommend this to die-hard TJP completists who need to check it off their list. If you're new to this author, start with their earlier stuff instead. Two stars for the concept alone.
My arthritic tabby couldn't jump onto the couch anymore. Two weeks on this and she's leaping around again. Definitely recommend to anyone with a stiff, aging cat.

I had high hopes for this retelling, and visually it does deliver. The sets and costumes are gorgeous. But I expected more memorable musical numbers, and honestly those scenes drag the whole thing down. The two leads have decent chemistry, which kept me watching. Still, compared to other Bollywood adaptations I've seen, this one felt a bit flat overall. Watchable, but not something I'd revisit anytime soon.

Pretty solid thriller overall. The action moves fast and I finished it in two sittings. Some of the gun stuff felt off and a few characters could've used more depth, but the central mystery kept me turning pages. Not perfect but definitely entertaining enough for a weekend read. Would read more from this author.

I read this the first time so many years ago, that I do have to admit I had forgotten so much about the many side stories and characters. Why that should take away from a novel for some readers is beyond me, but everyone has their favorites. I would only say, so many stories in books and movies these days are so pat. I always tease my wife for rushing through her novels, and she's always teasing me for insisting on reading every. single. word, and doing so at a pace I think the author may appreciate. If a book's an easy read, I'll motor through it in a couple hours, but a more dense novel filled with beautiful writing, well, I'll happily go at a tortoise's pace. I bring this up to say, this novel stuck with me for so many years for a reason. Why let yourself get frustrated if the author chooses to take his time? I read this as a child and over the years have loved apocalyptic stories. Some of the more recent blockbuster movies in the genre have greatly disappointed. Lucifer's Hammer was brilliant in that it showed how so many outstanding plans, crafted by sharp people, dedicated to detail, can all fall to, well, you'll see. The guy made homemade beef jerky, stocked his jeep with all the necessary gear, and backup gear of the most important stuff, and was absolutely prepared for the coming disaster.

Got this for my senior lab who was starting to struggle bending down to eat. The elevated design has made a huge difference for his digestion and he doesn't cough after meals anymore. What I really love is the rubber ring around the base. My dog is a messy eater and used to push his old dish all over the kitchen floor. This thing stays completely put even when he gets excited. The bowls are deep enough to hold a generous serving of food without spilling over the sides. Cleanup is simple since the whole thing is molded plastic with no seams where gunk can build up. Wish I'd switched years ago.

Excellent book for basic practice. I gave only 4 stars because the glossary often doesn't contain words that are used in the text....really, a minor objection since there are excellent sources on the web; and because rarely the translations are wrong...but in those cases it is obviously a misprint. Again very minor objections. Because of this book I am buying many of the of other PMP series. On the more important positive side, it has a lot of exercises with answers in the back and is very thorough. By the way I bought this used and it was in great condition.
Picked this up for twelve bucks and honestly couldn't be happier. The stand works perfectly for Netflix in bed and the fit is nice and snug. Solid purchase.

Beginning was choppy. The first-person perspective choice got in the way of character introductions. Novel doesn't get going until page 50ish. Disappointed at how the mutiny plot thread was resolved. Middle was creepy, suspenseful, and had some horrific images. It also had sermons and discussions about religion that I skipped. Was more interested in the actual mystery than the author's repeated return to philosophy where he kept asking 'what is the unknown' through various guises. Ending was scattershot, and it did not resolve anything in terms of character inter-relationships. Author wrote a super-slow beginning where he painstakingly laid down a hierarchy of relationships, and the ending made no effort to build on or resolve any of that. I wasn't into this one much. Russo did have a big success in that the unknown aliens were actually unknown, alien, scary and incomprehensible. The book over-focuses on the human characters who were little more than talking heads with personal neuroses. Three stars, parts I liked, parts I didn't.
Bought this for my daughter's birthday and she won't stop riding it. Battery lasts way longer than I thought it would. For the price, you really can't beat it. Totally worth every penny.
My heavy chewer hasn't destroyed this after three months. Impressed.

I love my Vellux Blanket and have had them in the past. I like that they are also great for allergies. That it is light weight, yet warm for the winter and light enough for the summer. I will always have a Vellux.... Thank you, Kathy from California

Arrived two days early in a rigid mailer with no bent corners, which I always appreciate. Started reading the moment I opened it and barely looked up for three hours. The writing grabs you instantly. Already recommended it to two coworkers.

It was a good period story and a good read and rendered good conversation. Our book club is varied ages and from all over the country and England. It was fun to hear what was going on with everyone during that era.
Awesome, sexy, sassy, but most of all just heart warming.
Sweet love story for under three bucks. A few plot holes but totally worth it for a cozy weekend read.

Wasn't sure what to expect for the price but honestly this case is a steal. I've got a scoped 10/22 and a Mossberg 500 in mine and there's still leftover space for another long gun if I wanted to push it. The padding is decent, not hard case rigid but definitely enough for range trips and general transport. Zippers feel smooth and the stitching has held up perfectly after about four months of use. My favorite part is the backpack straps, they make carrying three guns way easier than it has any right to be. For what other double cases cost, this thing gives you way more bang for your buck. If you need to haul multiple long guns without dropping serious cash, just buy it already.

I admit i was excited to read this, i'd seen teasers and read the blurb and couldn't wait to get my hands on it. I loved Tyler from the start, Dean not so much. He has to be the weirdest, nicest stalker ever!! He turns her car around for her and even puts the toilet roll the right way. Then he starts visiting her on a night, starting a relationship of sorts with her. Only Tyler has no idea Dean's after something. By the end of the book i was definitely on Deans side. Hope there's going to be a book two. This book did keep me guessing, for the most part, and i will definitely be reading more from this author.

It works pretty good. Doesn't heat my bigger candles to the point of filling the room with an aroma even close to lighting it. The smaller candles smell wonderful using this candle warmer though, without any combustion or smoke, so that's great. Buyer beware though, this is made of plastic which means it is very unsafe to use more than a couple of hours or the plastic may begin to melt. Most companies have moved over to ceramic candle warmers to avoid this issue, but if you just want something cheap and you are not a forgetful person then this candle warmer is stellar and sits at a great price.

This dear man could well be the hope of a hurting nation. I expect to see him rise to a position of considerable power and influence. The book details his struggles and victories. He shows us all that we only have the limitations we place upon ourselves.

A fantastic historical romance that I absolutely loved, What a Wallflower Wants was a delight of a read. It was sweet, romantic, and managed to surprise me and I really enjoyed it. Prudence was a great heroine. She was resilient and stronger than she gave herself credit for. She was definitely likable and I thought she was lovely. John was wonderful as well. Sweet and protective over his loved ones. He was definitely chivalrous, determined to not only protect the women in his life, but also teach them to protect themselves. He definitely had some secrets that I didn't expect. He was just great and I really liked him as well. The romance was delightful. Prudence and John were perfect together. I loved how John help Prudence be more confident in herself and move past what happened to her during her first Season. Their romance was both sweet and spicy and I thought they were great together. The plot was fast paced and I was hooked the entire way through. There were definitely a few surprises along the way that I never saw coming. I really enjoyed the story and the ending was perfect. What a Wallflowers Wants was a wonderful historical romance that I really loved. It was sweet, romantic, and held a few surprises along the way. Romance lovers, this is a book you won't want to miss. *I received a complimentary copy from the publisher in exchange for an honest review
Did the job just fine. The connections fit, the length was just right, I did not have any problems and my drives worked.
I love the British shows and this is very good. But why do we have to wait 18 months for a new series?
My older dog kept dragging her pee pads all over the house. This holder solved that instantly. Sturdy, easy to clean, and totally worth the money.
Great product. The quality of the fabric and the construction are good. They fit well, and they are as advertised. I've had good luck with Docker's products, and this one is no exception.
I wasn't too impressed with the quality and functionality of this book, so I returned it and have one made through a lady from etsy instead:)

Picked this up on a whim and honestly couldn't be happier. I own a couple of microbrand divers and a Seiko Prospex, and this holds its own against all of them at a fraction of what I'd normally spend. The 300m water rating gives me real confidence, and the finishing on the case punches way above what I paid. The sweep on the second hand is incredibly smooth, way nicer than my quartz divers. Lume is bright enough to actually be useful at night, which isn't always the case at this price point. Sizing is spot-on for my 7-inch wrist too, not some dinner plate like a lot of modern divers. Bracelet feels solid with no rattles or squeaks. Genuinely can't believe what you get here for the money.
this is a really little shirt, certainly not a dress! I'm 5'4 135 and the small was too small.

I grabbed this on a whim thinking it'd be another generic street lit read, but man was I wrong. K'wan actually knows how to build real characters instead of just throwing together cliches. Rio's climb from small-time corner hustler to major player had me hooked way more than I expected. Usually books in this genre lose steam halfway through, but the pacing stayed solid the entire time. The dynamic between Rio and Prince is what really sold me, you can feel the tension and ambition practically jumping off the page. Some of the plot twists genuinely caught me off guard too. Finished it in two sittings because I literally couldn't put it down. Way better than what I anticipated picking up. Definitely checking out more from this author.

I wasn't sure what to expect going in since I don't usually pick up historical suspense. Honestly figured it would be another generic romance with a thin mystery tacked on. Pleasantly surprised. The tension builds gradually and I actually didn't figure out who was behind everything until fairly late. What worked better than I anticipated was the relationship between the two leads. The class differences felt real rather than just a plot device. A few sections dragged in the middle and I caught myself skimming once or twice. Also the ending wraps up a bit too neatly for my taste. That said, I read it over two evenings which says something. Not perfect but solidly entertaining. Would check out more from this author.

Quiet,strong,handsome,shy when it comes to women, has trouble making decisions and the inability to say "NO" to anyone describe this Hot, Hunky, Cowboy version of a tarnished saint. James Taylor sold his ranch in Texas, ended a 3 year relationship to a women he did not love and came home to raise his horses. Mindy MacAllister has made mistakes and paid the price. She wants to find someone who will love her despite of her past and raise a family. When the Taylor brothers Aunt Cappy talks her into coming home, she jumps at the chance hoping to see the one Taylor brother that has held her heart since she was a child. Nothing worth wild is easy in life and the budding relationship between the two characters is a prime example of this. Aunt Cappy's meddling, the other tarnished saints not so helpful help and the past that does not want to stay in the past make for an entertaining reading experience. James has a big heart and a lot of love to give and is the first tarnished saint that I have read about who has an almost perfect halo. If he could just learn to say no and make decisions he could probably ascend and become the first Taylor saint.

Not entirely successful in keeping my cats from scratching other things up. They still love the toy after they ripped it off the first day. Since I've got 1+ year old cats, they are a bit too big for it, but sometimes they still cuddle up on it.

Stories that impart to the reader the feel of the Code of Conduct that once prevailed in the nature of western American culture. I enjoyed reading all 9 novels and recommend this set to those who like a good western.

I've gone through plenty of cheap pen lights working on HVAC systems, and this one finally feels like it'll last. The throw on this thing is impressive, it reaches deep into dark attics without washing out like a flood beam. Threaded connections are clean, pocket clip holds tight, and it survived a drop onto concrete without a scratch. If you work in trades or just want a dependable EDC light, this is the one. Worth every penny.
Expected way more based on the hype. The concept grabbed me right away, but the middle section really drags and the conclusion wrapped up too conveniently. Decent poolside read, nothing special.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this turned out to be one of the best indie reads I've grabbed this year. The story pulls you in right from the start and the characters actually feel like real people with real baggage. I stayed up way too late two nights in a row because I kept telling myself "just one more chapter." The writing is solid, way better than a lot of the pricier stuff I've downloaded lately. There's enough tension and emotional depth to keep things interesting without getting bogged down. For a buck or two this is an absolute steal. I've already recommended it to two friends and honestly would've paid five times as much. Grabbing whatever else this author has published.
just not what I was looking for. Wanted something that had more to it. More movement and talking through it.
Great quality and have a comfortable grip to hold the cup, keeps drinks cool for a little while, it isn't that insulated where it will stay cool all day long but probably an hour or so anyways.

Picked this up on sale and still feel ripped off. The humor just doesn't land for me, and a couple episodes were plain uncomfortable to sit through. Not worth what I paid, honestly. Glad I didn't spend full price on this one.

Took this on a two-week trip through Europe and it held up nicely overall. The hard shell survived being tossed around by baggage handlers without a single crack or scuff, which honestly surprised me given the price point. Wheels roll smooth on most surfaces, though they got a little sticky on carpet and cobblestone streets. Interior space is solid, I managed to fit a week's worth of outfits plus souvenirs using the two-sided packing system. My only real gripe is the handle feels slightly wobbly when fully extended, makes you wonder if it'll loosen up more over time. Color is exactly what I expected and easy to pick out at baggage claim. For the money, it's a decent buy and I'd probably recommend it to a friend.

BEAUTIFUL TRANSFER! Nice war time musical. Carmen shows her comedy side in this film and of course her over the top outfits! I won't go into the story line. If you're a Miranda fan, you'll enjoy this FOX TECHNICOLOR MUSICAL. Michael O'SHEA looks a little too old and his uniform is a few sizes too small...to bad they didn't cast PERRY COMO in this leading role. Also O'SHEA is not the best singer either...most all other cast members do a great job...EXCEPT...PHIL SILVERS who is loud and ANNOYING! Carmen has two colorful production numbers, the first, typical Miranda, the second and last is Carmen in a totally different appearance THAN WE HAVE SEEN IN THE PAST, a different 'short'costume than usual showing more leg...the lighting in this number is somewhat over the top...however, looks great in this pristine transfer. Only problem I had is in the EXTRA FEATURES: The "STILL GALLERY" feature in my copy doesn't allow my access to it...used two different DVD players and both had the same problem. The Film, Scenes, Trailer, and the SUPERB DOCUMENTARY are no problem. The documentary is in four parts...great interviews, vintage still photos and live performances, both candids and her FOX production numbers make this one of the best Documentaries out there...the Documentary is worth the price of this DVD ALONE! I give it 5 STARS...the 'still' problem may be in MY COPY ONLY...(don't let this deter you from puchasing this film). A MUST HAVE for the CARMEN MIRANDA FAN! THANK YOU FOX!!!

Box arrived crushed and one of the pouches had busted open, spilling charcoal bits everywhere. Managed to hang the intact one near the cat box anyway. Honestly can't tell that it's doing much of anything in there.

Absolutely love this little jar! I bought it on a whim and it's become one of my favorite pieces on the counter. The quality feels solid and the lid fits snugly, which keeps everything fresh. I've been using mine for loose tea bags and it holds plenty. Yes, it's compact, but that's honestly what makes it so charming. Doesn't take up much space but still adds a nice decorative touch. Would definitely grab another one in a different color.

Got this for my toddler's birthday and honestly didn't expect much for the price. It's way better in person! She drags this thing everywhere and it holds up great. Much bigger than I thought it'd be too, practically life-sized for a two year old. The poseable limbs are a nice touch. Totally exceeded what I was expecting.
This classic monster movie spoof has all the cliches & bad dialog that I adored in the 1950s-60s science fiction horror movies.
love him, the dvd, the quality of the product, PLANNING TO GET MORE OF MARTIN LAWRENCE MOVIES HE IS A GOOD ACTOR.
Arrived two days early and packaging was secure. These look incredibly sharp right out of the box. Can't wait to see how they perform this fall. Solid construction all around.

Bought this on a whim after a friend kept bringing it up. Man, what a ride. The story pulls you in right away and doesn't let go. I'd recommend it to anyone who thinks anime isn't their thing, this one changes minds. Already planning a rewatch with my brother.
its heavy and performs well wife travels and I feel confident with her having a quality covering
Arrived quickly and sealed tight. Opened the bag and my dogs went crazy instantly. Great purchase.

Love the brush-style opening on these. It lets me run multiple HDMI and speaker wires through the wall without any pinching or bending. Painted the plate to match my living room and it blends perfectly.

Ordered this as a gift and honestly pretty underwhelmed right out of the box. The packaging was a joke, just a thin bubble mailer that did nothing to protect it. Corners are dented and there's a crease running down the front cover. Not exactly gift-worthy at this point. Flipped through the first few pages and the story seems fine I guess, but I was expecting something with more pull right from chapter one. It just kind of ambles along without much urgency. Maybe it picks up later but I don't have the patience to find out right now. For the price I paid plus shipping, I expected at least a readable copy in decent shape. Disappointed overall and probably returning it.

Arrived two days earlier than expected and the box was in perfect condition, no dented corners at all. Opened it up and the pieces feel sturdy, not flimsy like some preschool games. Colors are bright and engaging. My kids couldn't wait to try it. Only knocking off a star because the instructions could be clearer, but we figured it out quickly enough.

Ordered this for a trip coming up next month and shipping was fast, arrived in two days with Prime. Box came a little beat up on one corner but the camera inside was fine since it had plenty of bubble wrap. First impressions are mixed honestly. The camcorder feels lighter than I expected, almost cheap in the hand, but the screen is decent and the menu is easy enough to navigate. Recorded a quick clip in my living room and the footage looked okay, nothing mind-blowing. Indoor low light is kinda grainy but for the price I guess that's expected. Still figuring out all the settings so maybe things will improve once I mess with it more. Three stars for now, will update after the trip if it holds up.
Lots of drama in this story. Plenty of twists and turns but could do without some of the characters. Overall it was interesting, just busy. It is worth reading though.
Dissolves stubborn coffee stains from my thermos in minutes. A little powder goes a long way.
My 6 yo feet are XXXW or XXXXW and these actually don't horrendously pinch his toes
Does the job for what I paid. Adhesion started lifting at the edges after several months of pocket use. Not amazing, but decent budget option overall.
Perfect size for my toddler's little hands!
Great protection from cuts and abrasions, well made and put together. Good grip and ridges on fingers provide better than expected grip and hand protection.

Grabbed this on a Kindle deal and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. The worldbuilding pulled me in immediately and I stayed up way too late reading. Rebekkah is such a compelling protagonist. Can't wait to continue the series!
My boy has been wearing it since he got it.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this bowl is surprisingly sturdy and well-made. My golden eats slower now and makes way less mess. Really impressed.

My two cats come running the moment I pop the tab on these cans, so palatability is definitely not an issue. The gravy texture is the real selling point here, there's enough sauce to keep them hydrated, which matters since one of mine barely drinks water. That said, I'm not thrilled about the ingredient list. Meat by-products and wheat gluten are pretty high up there, and for the price per can I expected something slightly better quality. I've settled on using these as a topper mixed with a premium dry food rather than a standalone meal. Decent product for picky eaters, but if you're strict about nutrition you might want to look elsewhere.

Been carrying this one daily for about eight months now and it's held up better than any knife I've owned. I work in a warehouse so it gets used hard - cutting strapping, opening tough pallet wrap, all kinds of abuse. The edge still bites after all that with just a quick strop every few weeks. Lockup is rock solid, no wiggle or play at all, which honestly surprised me given how much I've put it through. The G10 handles have taken a beating too but barely show any wear. Dropped it on concrete twice and the tip is still perfect. Fit and finish are top notch. For the money I don't think you can do better. Grabbed one for my brother and he's equally impressed.
The best targets I have found anywhere, and the price is right.
Worth every penny. Picked it up on sale and my whole family loved it. Great addition to our collection.
Good for a few times, but takes a lot of pumping, it ultimately failed after doing a lower unit, and 4 differentials.
Thought it'd be dry history but couldn't put it down. Totally exceeded expectations.

I went into this expecting another typical romance with the usual formula, but Mousseau completely caught me off guard. Liam and Quinn's story is heavy in the best way possible, these characters go through some genuinely rough stuff and the author doesn't sugarcoat any of it. What surprised me most was how invested I became in both of them as individuals before they even get to the relationship part. The way their history unfolds keeps you hooked even when the timeline jumps around. Honestly I was worried this would be one of those books where the angst feels manufactured, but everything that happens to these two feels earned and real. Read it in one sitting because I literally could not put it down. Way darker and more emotional than I anticipated.
Scott sounds amazing and certainly should get some reward for his patience with Jason. Thank God for Liz or they would be no more.
Flimsy and cracked after one day. Might work for older, gentle kids but definitely not rough toddlers.
Been beating on this thing for months and it still looks brand new.

Really enjoyed the secret writer angle and how it drove the plot forward. The chemistry between the leads felt genuine, especially during their witty newspaper office scenes. Took off one star because the villain's motivation was pretty thin and resolved too quickly. Still, a fun weekend read with enough tension to keep me turning pages.
Our two dogs really go for it. Always looking for healthy foods and both dogs enjoy this product.
Another great one, I am loving this whole series, they can be read separately but best enjoyed if you read them in order

Cute. Grandson loved them. They are just a bit larger than matchbox cars. They seemed a bit pricey since you can get a regular matchbox or hotwheel car for $1, but these do seem to be a bit heavier and well built, and of course, they are the Avengers, so Grandson loved them.
Did not like very much. To much cussing in that movie.
Decent figure but skip it unless your kid specifically wants the armor pieces.

At first I thought this book was taking place along time ago, because being from the USA, it's hard to think women are not even close to being equals with men, in many parts of the world. It was shocking when the story was talking about planes and phones, that I got a wake up call this was a romance story for now. I personally thought Hajar's reaction to his trauma was right on. People had a hard time looking at him, so of course, he would feel like the beast. I also liked the spunk of Katherine. My heart ached for her, on the reaction of her father, just because she was a women. I truly can't believe this book is free, I liked it that much. There is love making, but not the erotica type. The romance builds, which I also liked, they just don't fall head over heels for each other and have sex right away.
If you get old age chestnuts on your bum then these are for you. They have the padding right where the chestnuts (boils) catch fire. Glory be.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little filter completely changed how our tap water tastes. Installation took maybe five minutes. Way better than I thought it'd be. Totally worth every penny.

Got this for my daughter's fifth birthday and it's been a total hit. The texture is really satisfying, it sticks together nicely and doesn't crumble into a million tiny pieces like regular sand. We use it on a baking sheet and cleanup takes about two minutes. It never dries out, which is a huge plus because she leaves it open all the time. I'd honestly recommend this to any parent with kids ages three to eight. It's great for sensory play and keeps little hands busy while you're making dinner. Way less messy than clay or dough. We've had ours for three months now and it's still as soft as day one.
Short and steamy, but felt rushed toward the end. The chemistry was decent though, and I'm curious enough about the next book to probably grab it.

Been using this for about six months now for work travel and it's held up great. Zippers still smooth, no torn seams anywhere. Rolls easily through airports. Knocked off a star because the padding could be thicker.

Bought this for casual lake fishing with my kids. The push-button mechanism is super smooth and my 8-year-old picked it up in minutes. Great for beginners. My complaint is the drag system, it sticks badly when fighting anything over a pound. Had a decent bass on and the line wouldn't release properly, almost snapped my rod tip. Fine for panfish but don't expect it to handle bigger catches. Decent reel for the price though.
Look good fit fine. Color and finish look good. Heavy quality. Sound like a rain storm when the air blows through them, a little loud.

Been wearing this for about three months now and it's holding up pretty well. No rips or loose threads yet, which surprised me given how thin the fabric feels. Fits slightly boxy but works fine for layering.

Excellent........ Knivio BTD-400 Bluetooth 4.0 Adapter. Plugged into my Windows 8 Desktop Asus computer and it quickly installed without additional software Adapter. Very easy to installed with no problems. This unit was plug and play in both a Windows 8 PC and an Asus eeePC Net-book running Ubuntu 12.10. No extra software install was involved - just using what was already in the systems. Also I connect it to my Bose Soundlink Mini Portabler Speaker System BT bluetooth and it works great! easy install and easy to operate.
Very pleased with the quality of this short and the ease of care.

Arrived two days early and was boxed really well with no dents or bent pieces. First impression is solid, feels durable and setup took about ten minutes. Our dog hasn't figured it out yet but seems curious. Pretty happy so far.

I'm an Oprah junkie, so I absolutely loved this. Her whole background is so tragic. I knew quite a bit about her before reading this, but I definitely learned more details. I had no idea she had a brother that died and that was a very sad story. The last chapter on life lessons from Oprah is worth keeping somewhere for inspiration. Great intro read into Oprah world.

My cat loves it and has become her to new way to approach the patio door ("stealth kitty") when there are birds out there. When she's not sneaking up on birdies our new playtime involves rolling the ball of yarn thru the tunnel and she pounces on the yarn as I pull it thru. Best toy I ever got her besides her condo/perch.

Works well, Two issues. It is impossible to focus on higher magnifications without having the object being looked at up inside the opaque plastic cone. Also the light is not dimmable and is sometimes too bright.
Story was okay overall but nothing memorable. Finished it in a couple days and don't regret reading it.

Both of my kids love Playmobil. I purchased this firetruck for my son. He loves this toy but also it'll frustrate him. First of all, the front-window-compartment is very difficult for the kids to take off. The only way, to place a fireman on the drivers-seat is to take off this window-compartment. Second of all, the ladder comes off every time, my kids just touch it. A grown-up has to install it back on the firetruck. I don't know, why Playmobil couldn't come up with a different solution for this, but it's very frustrating for the kids, that it won't stay installed and they can't fix it themselves. The ladder won't stay up plus falls off the truck. The rest of the firetruck seems very sturdy and has bright colors. Love the sound-effects on it. Not too loud.
The third book was just as hot as the first two. I can't wait to read the next book.

Got this pug mask for a costume party and it was a huge hit. The rubber material is decent quality for the price and the face details are surprisingly realistic looking. People were cracking up all night. A few things to note: it does get pretty warm and sweaty inside after wearing for a while, and the eye holes could be positioned a little better since my vision was slightly limited. The smell when I first opened the package was strong but faded after airing it out for a day. Fits my average sized head fine but might be snug on bigger heads. Breathing through it takes some getting used to. Overall a solid buy if you want laughs at your event. Not perfect but definitely worth what I paid.

I've been running this converter in my living room setup for about eight months now and it's held up great. I needed something to split the audio from my new cable box to my vintage sound system, and this little box does the job without any fuss. What impressed me most is how it's survived being bumped and moved around behind the entertainment center multiple times. The housing feels solid metal, not cheap plastic, and none of the ports have gotten loose or wiggly on me. Audio quality is clean with no humming or interference that I can detect. Knocks one star off because the included power adapter cable is pretty short, so you'll probably need an extension cord unless you've got an outlet right there. Overall a solid buy.
As it happens I have a friend who is going through this exact situation and her husband is a therapist and we know he is on the low - what a trip
I am glad I watched it - it was good, clean fun. Shows that movies CAN be made without bad language and still be good!
Been wearing these almost daily for four months now and the soles still look brand new.

I picked this up on a whim and ended up reading it in one sitting. The whole auction storyline had me laughing out loud, especially the awkwardness of a regular teacher getting pushed into the spotlight. Riley is exactly the kind of book boyfriend you want, famous enough to be exciting but grounded enough to feel real. The chemistry between him and the main character builds naturally instead of feeling rushed, which I appreciated. There's plenty of banter and some genuinely sweet moments that gave me butterflies. My only complaint is that it ended too fast and I wanted more of them together. If you like rock star romances with humor and heart, definitely grab this one. Already checking out other books by this author!

I bought this right after launching my consulting firm and honestly it paid for itself in the first week. The hardcover has held up beautifully after months of being tossed in my bag and passed around to two employees. Still no loose pages or spine damage. The advice inside is just as sturdy, practical stuff that actually works for small teams.

Bought this for my daily commute and it's been fantastic. Fits my 15" laptop plus charger and a couple notebooks without feeling bulky. The reinforced bottom gives me peace of mind when I set it down on rough surfaces. Straps are comfortable even when it's fully loaded. Really happy with the quality for the price. Would definitely recommend to anyone needing a solid everyday bag.

Great little backpack to tire your dog out while on walks. My Pomechi is a high energy dog and needed something to exhaust him during his walk. Since he was so small, we could only fill the pockets with baggies of quarters. Do be careful with the straps being too tight. They did rub on his armpits and irritated the area, but after loosening the straps, no longer had this problem.
Not Elvis's strongest film, but the scenery is gorgeous and the soundtrack has a few real gems. Fun, lightweight watch for a lazy Sunday afternoon. Glad I picked it up.

great stuff; tastes like fresh cut vegetables in my hiking soups and chicken cous-cous mixes. Even the chicken-ish, beef-ish and ham-ish tvp protein is decent (I didn't have high expectations about tofu meat substitutes). Bring your spices and salt since these are not spiced up (which is excellent since it is easier to add a little salt or spice than to over come excessive flavoring by someone else). The fruit is nice; eat as is or add to breakfast ceral or desert mixes- hydrates fairly fast.

Paid four bucks to rent this and I'm genuinely annoyed. The acting is painfully stiff and the plot goes absolutely nowhere for 90 minutes. I get that it's a small production, but that doesn't excuse the terrible pacing and dialogue that sounds like nobody rehearsed it. Couldn't even finish it. Don't bother throwing your money away on this one, it's not worth a single dollar.

I recently got this HTC Portamate PM1000 mobile base and a Delta 50-345. The HTC comes with everything you need to assemble the base, while you have to provide your own hardwood for the Delta. The HTC is adjustable to the nearest inch, making it a bit looser fit than the Delta (so, you still need some wood to shim your machine tight, or attach your tool to the stand). I think the Delta would be harder to assemble if you didn't already have a drill press or some similar means of drilling a perfectly squared hole. The rolling action of both is pretty comparable. Overall, I'd probably choose this HTC over the Delta if I needed a third mobile base.
Decent quality for the price. My pup tolerates it better than expected.
Clever techy stories, though sometimes the technical facts do not agree with the writer's imagination. Really like actors and characters they play. Charlie is our favorite - what a nice nerd.
The world-building grabbed me right away. The political intrigue felt realistic and the pacing never dragged. Highly recommend.
Held up perfectly through three winters now, no issues.
Way more powerful than I expected. Handles everything I throw at it without breaking a sweat.
I give this to Chase every morning. He is healthy happy and the vet says he looks good! Dr Mercolas products are great!!
Not that easy to put on. If your doggy has a big neck, forget it.

I purchased these to help me make my boos stand tall and to avoid kinds and creases in tall boots. These inserts do the job. Just fold them and insert into the book shaft. They even work on my soft over-the-knee microfiber boots. I do, however, have 2 minor issues. The "hook' mentioned in the description, is actually a loop of plastic. You would still need something like a hook to hang the boots off of a rod or another hook. The insert is also pretty slick and easily slides out of my boots, when I hold them by the loop.... so hanging from this loop may not be possible, to begin with. (Maybe I'm doing something wrong?) I ended up buying separate boot hangers and attached those to the boots AND inserts.

I was looking for a nice pair red leather gloves to match a jacket when I came across these I couldn't resist and glad I didn't. Theses gloves are a very vibrant red they are very soft, stylish, flexible and warm. I usually wear a small or medium in women's gloves my ring finger is size 61/2 these did give a size they arrived in size 8 which fit perfectly. They have a very soft fur lining from the finger tip to the wrist and they match my jacket perfectly so glad I found them at such a great price.

Great, big bag! There is a weird zipper at the bottom of the bag, that unzips the bottom of a larger side pocket. Why?! No clue. Also, the strap needs to be longer! It feels a little too high (I'm 5'7"). I would also like to have an inside zipper pocket in this purse. Other than that, it's great.
Arrived two days early in a bubble mailer, no bent corners. Flipped through the first chapter right away and I'm already pulled in.

Picked this up expecting a solid budget mouse and honestly it delivers for the most part. The ergonomic shape is way better than I anticipated, my wrist doesn't cramp after long work sessions like it did with my old Logitech. Click feel is satisfying and the tracking is accurate on most surfaces. Where it falls short is the battery situation. I figured a brand like this would have decent power management but I'm charging it every week or so with moderate use, which is more frequent than I'd like. The scrolling wheel also has a slight wobble that bugs me occasionally. Build quality is otherwise good for the price point. Would I buy it again? Probably, just go in knowing the battery won't blow you away.
Perfect for anyone who loves western romance. I bought copies for friends.

Expected way more for what they charge. Syncing took forever and the build feels flimsy, definitely not tough enough for trail runs. Battery barely lasts a full workout. There are better options in this price range.

These are tiny. The product description says "11/2 inc", which didn't make much sense to me. I now realize that it's supposed to say 1 1/2 inches. They are more like one inch, small enough to pose a choking hazard. They are too small to be much fun. The papers they come with are just regular tissue and quickly destroyed. The box is cardboard packaging, not something to keep them in. My daughters, very into pretend play, don't play with these at all.

Arrived two days early in a massive box with zero damage. Everything was wrapped tight in bubble wrap and the cardboard corners were reinforced. Honestly the best packaging I've seen on a pet order. Assembly took maybe ten minutes and all the hardware was sorted in little labeled bags so nothing got mixed up. The moment I had it together both my cats ran over to investigate. My larger guy immediately jumped on top and it didn't wobble at all. The sisal posts feel super sturdy and the carpet is way softer than I expected. Way better quality than the overpriced one I sent back last month. Super impressed right out of the box.

Second chance romance is my weakness so I grabbed this one immediately. The chemistry between the leads is genuinely electric and Rai writes tension like nobody's business. What worked for me was the emotional baggage they carry from their past, it made the reconciliation feel earned rather than forced. I also appreciated that the family drama subplot gave the story some substance beyond just the romance. My only small complaint is that the middle section drags slightly and I wanted a bit more from the resolution. It wrapped up a little too neatly for my taste. Still, the banter is sharp, the spicy scenes are well done, and I finished it in one sitting. Solid pick for anyone who likes their romance with some real heart.

Expected this sensor to be a game-changer for my pantry lighting setup, but it's been nothing but headaches since day one. The detection range is incredibly inconsistent, sometimes I'm waving my arms around like a crazy person trying to get the lights to kick on, other times it triggers when my cat walks past the doorway three rooms over. I've spent way too much time adjusting the sensitivity dials and repositioning the unit, thinking I just needed to find the sweet spot. Nope. For what this costs, the reliability should be way better. My old-school motion switch from the hardware store worked flawlessly for eight years straight. This fancy upgrade can't even make it through a week without acting up. Sending it back.

Picked this up to adapt my 67mm polarizer onto a 72mm lens and it does the job without any vignetting in my shots. Build quality is decent, nothing premium but threads are clean and it seats properly. I'd recommend this to anyone doing a single size bump. If you're trying to bridge a massive gap like 82mm down to 52mm, maybe look elsewhere because stacking gets bulky fast. Solid value for straightforward step-down needs.
Got this for my teenager three months ago and it's held up great. He wears it constantly, even in the shower, and no tarnishing or broken clasp yet. Solid quality for the price.
Perfect size for my kitchen. Easy to assemble. Very happy with this cart!

Bought these for our guest room and everyone comments on how comfortable they are. Great for hot sleepers. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting breathable, affordable bedding that holds up after washing.

This is a book about a young man with a dark past and a young woman with a future on which she placed all of her faith. Lucas hadn't known Jacqueline, but he had watched her from a distance. Jacqueline didn't even know that Lucas truly existed until one night he saved her from a horrible incident. Now it seems as if she keeps running into him. Jacqueline can't get him out of her head. Lucas is the "bad boy" with the tattoos to go along with that stereotype. He is sexy in every way. He's good looking, has tattoos, is mysterious, and knows how to teach a girl how to defend herself. Jacqueline can't seem to keep herself away from the mystery of him. This book is full of angst and passion, and takes you through the journey of falling in love and lust. I fell in love with this book! I enjoyed the mystery that surrounded Lucas and the love/lust that Lucas and Jacqueline shared. This was a book that was written to emulate real life, which was a nice break from all the fantasy I have been reading. I thought this book was going to just be a love/lust book with not much else going on, but there was an adventure presented by the incidents that happened as well as deception. I was entertained through the whole length. I found out that there will be a second book, Breakable, being released May 6, 2014. You better believe that I have already pre-ordered it! I rated this book 5/5 stars and highly recommend it.
Good quality, fits good, have bought several colors in long sleeve and short. Looking for short sleeve white.

These are decent backup sights for the price. Deployment is smooth when you press the release tab, and they lock firmly in both directions. Mounting was straightforward on my rail, though I did notice a tiny bit of wiggle even after torquing everything down. Not a dealbreaker, but don't expect premium precision. Windage and elevation adjustments clicked positively and held zero through a couple hundred rounds at the range. The front post is a little thick for my liking, covering more of the target than I'd prefer at distance. I'd recommend these to budget-minded shooters or anyone building a truck gun that might get knocked around. If you're running high-end optics and want flawless backups, spend more. For a range toy or secondary rig, they'll get the job done fine.
Bought this for camping and the diffuser wand attachment is a game changer. Lights up the whole tent evenly instead of blinding everyone. Battery lasts forever too. Totally worth the money.

This crate is awesome! It's a great alternative to the hard plastic offered for pets. I bought two of them, one for each cat. They have been getting in it on their own. It has tiny mesh windows that can be covered with the roll down shade and a mesh door that zips. I wouldn't say that it would be great to carry around all day because it's softer than a plastic carrier, but great to transport. The bottom sags a little when lifted, but I plan on taking a 16X20 art canvas and slipping it in the bottom to make it more sturdy. This will be great during hurricane season if an evacuation is ordered and I need to bring my pets a long distance.

Bought this for school and it handles my daily tasks without any issues. Startup is quick and the screen looks sharp. Battery could last longer but it gets me through most of my classes. Solid machine for what I paid, no regrets on this purchase at all.

I hate getting sweat in my eyes while running and biking, so I am always looking for a good solution. I had the Halo headband for two years and it worked okay in mild weather (70s), but in the middle of summer (high 80s and 90s) it would soak through quickly and let sweat in my eyes and down my nose. I finally got sick of it and found this. I like the idea, it looks stupid on me, but if it keeps the sweat out, great! It does, but the little hair tie looking things that come with it to size it are too different. The smallest one is tiny while the next size up is nearly four times the circumference. If I put the smaller one one it squeezes my head and make my forehead look purple, if I use the next size up it constantly slips down my head and lets sweat through (although less than a saturated Halo did). I am going to look around to see if I can find other options the little circular connectors. I love the concept of it and if I could get a good fit, I think it would be perfect.

Purchased this saw blade for a miter saw that takes an uncommon 8 1/4" saw blade. I used it to cut pine and red oak trim as well as to square up red oak plywood. Cuts are very clean with no splintering or tear out. Blade is still sharp after numerous cuts.

I own several of these and all I can say is that they work great. I've used them for over a year and have had no issues whatsoever. I use them for camping hunting fishing and just everyday use, never disappointed. They hold color, don't bleed in wash, and have many no traditional uses, whatever you can think of using it for, it doesn't disappoint.

We have even used these art smocks as a bib with messy foods and they work great!! It says you must hand wash and we were initially dismayed by this BUT it is easy to get stuff out of these by rinsing in the sink, so no problem

I have friends who are SCCA corner workers and others who are EMTs and Firefighters. Both are jobs that can involve cutting, prying open, grabbing hot or sharp things, etc. I saw this as a good tool to keep in my car to use "just in case" I had a chance to be a hero, like my friends. But first, I brought it to church to show my firefighter friend and get his thoughts. Here's what he said: He thought it was a little heavy to carry but he thought he would be able to substitute it for a couple of other tools he carries. He liked the combo pliers/wire cutters and saw how they could be used to turn, bend or cut through wires or grills. He immediately recognized the key slot that could close gas valves. The pry bar end too could be useful to open stuck doors or smash windows. Finally, and the reason for only 4 stars, the fire hose tightened isn't very useful since he say that you really need two to snug up the joint. Quality build, several useful tools, a little heavy, worth a try for the heros in your life!

Arrived two days early in a sturdy little box with clear instructions tucked inside. The cable itself feels surprisingly tough for how slim it is, and I had my own three-digit code set in under a minute. Threaded it right through my luggage zippers with zero hassle. First impression is solid, doesn't feel cheap at all. Already ordering a second one for my gym bag. Can't beat the price for this kind of peace of mind.
Bought my third pair already. The lace detailing doesn't itch at all and the waistband stays put all day. Super flattering fit.

I liked both Taylor and Lucas. Lucas was a strong, honorable man from the west and Taylor was a fine lady who wasn't only what she appeared to be. I really enjoyed the story and felt there was a lot of action in this one. I was a bit annoyed by both Taylor's and Lucas's reluctance to confide in each other and their ridiculous resistance to the marriage, but I do understand it was expected due to their backgrounds. I wish we'd been able to meet Lucas's brothers. There was a nice little mention of the Emerald and Black Harry from the Crown's Spies Series. Overall, very nice story.

I'll be honest, I picked this up expecting it to be the "lesser" Austen, something to read just to complete the set. Boy was I wrong. Northanger Abbey is laugh-out-loud funny in a way Pride and Prejudice never quite reaches. Catherine is such a believable teenager, obsessed with spooky novels, reading danger into every shadow at the abbey, making spectacularly wrong assumptions about people. The parody of Gothic fiction tropes is sharp but never mean-spirited. Henry Tilney has become my favorite Austen hero hands down; his dry wit had me highlighting half his dialogue. The pacing drags slightly around the Bath social scenes, but once Catherine arrives at the abbey everything clicks. Way better than I anticipated and honestly might be my go-to Austen reread from now on.

Unacceptable touchpad. The touchpad is not responsive in many areas, especially around the edges. you do not know how frustrating it is to be click and nothing happens. there is no sound or visual indicator that a click was successful. also the keyboard is too small. sorry i love chromebooks and we desperately needed an ips 1080 display at a reasonable price point, but this touchpad, and to a lesser extent the small keyboard, ruin the experience Update (2015-04-10) I got used to the keyboard and the touchpad. It's was just frustrating downgrading in performance, but you do get used to it after a while. and the other benefits make up for it

Got this for my daughter's sixth birthday and she's been obsessed ever since. She loves doing everyone's makeup now and the colors are actually pretty decent for a kids product. It washes off easily which is a huge plus for me. My only complaint is the little containers don't seal great so I'm paranoid about spills. I ended up putting everything in a small tackle box to keep it organized. She's had hours of fun with it though and that's what matters. Would definitely recommend for any kid into glam play.
Perfect for range days and hikes. Comfortable fit, holds everything I need without bouncing around. Genuine camo print, super happy with it.

Arrived a day early and the packaging was seriously impressive, each glass was individually wrapped with foam inserts, so no chips or cracks. Pulled them out and immediately noticed how solid they feel. Nice weight to them without being clunky. The double-wall design keeps my cold drinks cold way longer than expected and zero condensation on the outside. Only used them a couple days so far but really loving the look and quality. Will update if anything changes.

Honestly felt like a rough draft that needed another few passes. The plot races through major moments without letting anything breathe, and nobody feels like a real person. Might work for younger teens just getting into reading, but anyone expecting real depth or decent prose should pass.

Got these for my 8-year-old and he's obsessed with the light-up sole feature. The grip on the bottom is really solid for playground use. My only complaint is the laces come undone constantly, so we swapped to elastic ones. Fit is true to size and they seem decently sturdy after three weeks of rough wear.

Picked this up after a friend recommended it and honestly didn't expect much from what I assumed was just another expat story. The real surprise for me was how Paul weaves the music side of things into the daily grind of living in Shanghai. His descriptions of jamming with local musicians and navigating the language barriers at gigs felt genuine and not romanticized. I knocked off a star because the middle section drags a bit with some repetitive domestic details that could've been trimmed. Still, a solid, engaging read that sticks with you.

Got this for my preschoolers and it's been a hit at bedtime. The illustrations keep them engaged, and I love how each story points back to the actual scripture. Sturdy pages hold up well to my kids' rough handling. Totally recommend.

I've been reading S.E. Smith's work for years now, so I honestly thought I knew what to expect going into this one. Figured it'd be a fun weekend read, nothing too crazy. Well, I was completely wrong. This blew every expectation I had out of the water. The world-building is way more layered than her usual stuff, and Rune might be one of the most compelling characters she's written yet. Usually her leads are great but somewhat predictable, not here. The emotional depth genuinely caught me off guard. I stayed up way too late on a work night because I kept telling myself "just one more chapter." If you're already a fan, this is some of her best work. If you're new to her books, honestly, start here.

The picture posted for this item is a fraud. It shows 3 pots and 2 pans with 2 lids. What you actually get are 3 pots and 2 lids. It is very deceptive and this company should be ashamed. To return it you have to pay a 20% restocking fee. Very disappointed.

Got this as a download to my Kindle Paperwhite and it showed up instantly, no issues there. The cover art actually caught my eye first, really nicely done and looks way more professional than a lot of indie stuff I've downloaded lately. First chapter pulled me in pretty quick. The writing is clean and the characters feel like actual people, not cardboard cutouts. I knocked off a star because around the middle section it dragged a little for me and I found myself skimming a couple chapters. Picked back up toward the end though and the last few chapters were genuinely hard to put down. Overall a solid read for the price. Would definitely check out more from this author down the road.
Had this disc about two years now, plays perfectly every time with zero scratches or skipping. Dino's serious role still blows me away. Solid purchase.
Got this on sale and honestly worth every penny. Setup took maybe twenty minutes. The keypad feels solid and responsive, and the finish matches my front door hardware perfectly.

I picked this up after hearing good things about Depue's career in behavioral analysis. The memoir sections covering his childhood and family background are pretty engaging, and you get a real sense of how his upbringing shaped his approach to law enforcement. Some of the case files he walks through are genuinely fascinating, especially the profiling work. That said, the middle section really drags. He spends way too much time on administrative details and internal politics that probably meant more to him than they will to most readers. I found myself skimming for a few chapters before the narrative picked back up. It's also fairly dated at this point. Worth reading if you're into true crime or FBI history, but don't expect it to move quickly the whole way through.
This is the second pair of these that I get. They are great and this new model is even better than the first. They have added spring hinges now! Awesome set of polarized shades!
Got this for my senior chihuahua who can't always make it outside. The pad stays put underneath the grate, so no more shredded messes on the floor. Perfect for small dogs or apartment living.

My cat was eating Purina Indoor Cat Chow. He was throwing up 1-5 times a day. He had already gone to the vet and they found nothing wrong with him, so before taking him back I thought I'd try switching his food. I bought him Purina Cat Chow Gentle and Purina One Sensitive Systems and this food won. He hasn't thrown up once since he started eating it in the last week. He used to eat a very expensive cat food and he threw that up too (though not as often). I was able to cancel his vet appointment for now and save another $200+ vet bill. I'm glad amazon had it because my local stores only carry at 3. 5lb bag for $8. I have 3 cats to feed so I need large bags. They will eat what he eats.

I bought this rug pad to replace a open waffle-type rug pad that I had used for many years. My, how crappy the waffle-style pad is in comparison! This is easy to trim down to size with decent scissors, and it feels great underfoot. Also, there is absolutely zero slippage.

If you're into slow-burn historical romance, this one is a must-read. I picked it up on a whim and ended up finishing it in two sittings. The chemistry between the leads felt genuine, not rushed. I'd especially recommend this to anyone who enjoys Elizabeth Hoyt or Tessa Dare, similar vibe with the banter and emotional stakes. Really hoping the next book comes out soon because I need more of these characters.
Love this shoe! Size is perfect, color is exactly what I wanted for spring. Even my fashionista daughter liked these!!
Got these for my daughter's birthday and she's obsessed. Great quality, super fun, and keeps her entertained for hours.
Expected a lot more based on the trailer. The plot drags and the acting feels flat. Pretty disappointing overall, wouldn't sit through it again.

After receiving Thank You for Your Service by David Finkel, I was curious about what it can deliver since its been ingrained in me toof coursebe thankful for the men and women who serve our country. Instead, the sadness and depression, the mental toughness being questioned, and the realistic thoughts of suicide permeate many of the service men and woman who come home.
