The author shares a completely different side of our troops. Are we at home ready to not only thank them, but put them into a position to get on with their lives. It may never be normal again, but they have lives to live and the supporting cast at home is just as impacted. I took away a message that long-term and sustained help is required for many who need it badly. I cant imagine what many of the soldiers saw and just knowing that they have to live with in their memories is upsetting. The after-wars lingering effects can be haunting and I thank the author for bringing this to my attention. Thomas B. Dowd III, author of The Transformation of a Doubting Thomas
If you have dogs or cats I can't suggest these, they are magnets to hair! Its VERY frustrating. I'm finally giving them away.

Got this for my parents who make huge batches of cheese every fall. The slicing attachment slides on securely and doesn't wobble during use. Cleanup takes about two minutes. If you process a lot of food for gatherings or preserving, this is absolutely worth adding to your kitchen setup.
Honestly didn't think a lens this cheap could produce such tack-sharp images. Figured I'd be returning it, but the bokeh is buttery and it focuses fast on my Sony. Way beyond what I paid.
It's ok... I didn't realize it wasn't ratcheting, if you have a 100 pound grip, you'll do fine, After my 10th cut in 3/4" CPVC, I was done with this tool... I'll stick with the ratcheting style.
Used for a project at an airport for indicator light and worked great. Had enough room to fit a CFL inside too.

I assembled it with my kids this weekend and you had a lot of fun. Not only it's really easy to build (not so many parts, that come organized in different bags, easy instructions), the result is a beautiful, well-constructed toy that you can actually play with!

This is our second set of these bases; the first set lasted for years. They are very durable! My boys (ages: 16, 13 & 10) play baseball everyday. My youngest son always has his friends over and these bases are used over and over. We just leave them out in the yard. They lasted for years, before I finally needed to purchase a new set. Definitely worth the purchase!
Joshua Graham's words really hit home. The short length made it easy to finish in one sitting, and I found myself tearing up by the end.
These wipes are a steal for the price. I keep a pack in every room for quick paw and face touch-ups. Soft, no weird smell, and they do the job perfectly.
Couldn't put this down. Started reading before bed and stayed up way too late. The ending caught me completely off guard.
Great product, I use everyday on 4 dogs to help in addition to brushing their teeth to remove plaque build up and keep their breath smelling fresh.

Bought this for my 1 year old daughter to go with her new kitchen for Christmas and she absolutely loves them! We have bought Melissa & Doug products in the past and they are very well made and I would highly recommend them to anyone. I think its wonderful that there is a company who makes toys from wood and that are made with such good quality. It seems like you just don't see that as much anymore. I know they will keep my daughter busy and happy in her new kitchen for many years to come!
Arrived quickly in pristine condition with no bent corners. Started flipping through right away and got hooked pretty fast. Solid pickup.

I've had this cutting board for about six months now, using it almost every weekend for everything from breaking down whole briskets to slicing roast chickens. It's held up incredibly well. No warping, no deep gouges, and the juice groove still does its job. I treat it with mineral oil every few weeks and it looks as good as the day it arrived. The rubber feet are still firmly attached too. Honestly the best board I've owned in years.
Perfect upgrade for my TIG torch. Fellow welders, grab one of these, you won't regret it.
Sturdy, so cute and my 1 & 4 year old love it!!

Really enjoying this series so far and book 3 doesn't disappoint. Daryl's story grabbed me because he's the older member of the band and you can feel his loneliness in the early chapters. The dynamic with Matt and his family adds some real tension, especially once the grizzly shifter stuff comes into play. I liked that the conflict isn't just romance, there's actual stakes with Matt's dad and the secrets Matt's been kept away from. My one small gripe is that the ending felt a bit rushed and I wanted more time with Alison. Still, the chemistry works and the Tennessee Honey band world keeps getting more interesting. I'd recommend this to anyone who likes shifter romances with a bit of family drama mixed in. Starting book 4 tonight.

I love this figurine it's beautifully detailed. I accidentally ordered two of them but I decided to keep them both and have them be brothers there are many stories that can pertain to them. I painted one to represent fire and the other one for ice. I will try to upload pictures for those interested in how they look complete. Both of the figures I received are metal not plastic.

Bought this as a stocking stuffer for my teenage daughter and she never takes it off. The storage capacity isn't huge and transfer speeds are nothing special, but as a cute wearable backup for school files, it's perfect. Great gift for students.
Cute dog coat runs small in size my dog didn't wear it much disappointed.

This is an excellent addition to a Thomas and Friends wooden railroad set. I remember watching Thomas the Tank when I was a kid. It was a fantastic show then and is still a big hit with kids. This quarry mine tunnel adds an interesting addition to any track.

I bought this novel for my book club, but have yet to read it. I absolutely adore the binding and only purchase hard backs, so if you're like me this is a must buy for your hard back collection or library and before you know it you'll be buying the other Penguine Classics as well as they're just beautiful.
Really liked the frontier setting and historical details. The romance felt a bit rushed toward the end, but the characters kept me hooked throughout.

Very nice. The metal in the base is not of the best quality, but is serviceable, and only to be expected in such an inexpensive light. BTW, I mounted mine on the wall of my porch, and it worked fine and looked okay that way too. Just be aware, if you want to have a pull switch on it, which I did, it must be purchased separately. I bought one the cheapest Amazon sold, and it worked well.

I figured this would be another cheap DC animated cash grab, but it genuinely surprised me. The fight scenes with Doomsday are brutal and intense, way more violent than I expected from these releases. They actually took their time building the stakes instead of rushing through the storyline. Voice acting is solid and the animation looks sharp. Easily one of the better DC animated movies I've watched in a while. Worth picking up.

I'm rating this item with one star, not for the quality of the product which being RCBS I'm sure is excellent. However, the company from which this product arrived from " Optics Planet" really, really sucks. Their communications level is terrible and they had to be threatened by Amazon with cancellation before the item arrived thirty seven days after an online purchase. Furthermore, this is only one of several products from Optics Planet that I have been totally unsatisfied with. I shall henceforth avoid all contact, communications and any dealing with them and shall refrain from any and all complimentary words for their terrible service. If you ask me again, I'll really tell you how I feel.

I absolutely loved watching these old Ian Carmichael adaptations. The production has that wonderful, slightly stagey BBC period feel that you just don't get anymore. What I really want to praise is the picture quality, they've done a fantastic job cleaning up the original broadcast prints. Colors are rich and the image is sharp, way better than the faded VHS copies I grew up with. Carmichael nails Wimsey's foppish exterior hiding a razor-sharp mind. My one small gripe is the lack of subtitles. Some of the 1920s British slang goes by pretty fast, and I found myself rewinding a few times to catch what was said. Otherwise this is a must-have for any Sayers fan. Really hoping they release the remaining novels soon.
Got these for my waitress sister and she swears by them now. Super supportive for long shifts. Runs slightly small so size up.
These are very easy to use, easy to clean, and being able to freeze and microwave is a great boon

Really cute in theory. But as others mentioned no instructions came with it and it didn't fit together well in any manner I tried. As time was running out I had no option but to use it but it was very wobbly/unbalanced in the only way I could get it together, and I had to rig a way to make it stand somewhat straight by tying plastic strips tightly around the bottom stem. I don't know why the manufacturer doesn't correct these flaws numerous people have informed them of since it is a really pretty design. Just makes you think they don't care, and if they don't why should anyone else?
Perfect ending to the series. Ms. Shaw kept us hooked until the very end. No more cliffhangers, mysteries solved and a forever romance is born.

Been reading this on my Kindle daily for about three weeks now and it holds up amazingly well on rereads. The story layers keep revealing new details I missed the first pass through. Nicky and Jill's separate arcs weave together so naturally. Even after finishing it twice, I keep finding fresh angles in the contest scenes. Great value for the price and definitely worth keeping in your library for another go later.

Really enjoyed this second installment following the two amateur sleuths. The friendship between them feels genuine and reminds me of my own neighborhood buddies. They keep stumbling into mysteries and the small town setting is perfect for a cozy weekend read. I picked this up after finishing the first book and finished it in two sittings. Giving four stars instead of five because there were some typos that pulled me out of the story a few times, and the pacing dragged slightly in the middle. Still, the ending paid off and I already grabbed the next book. Fun characters and a decent mystery make this worth checking out.
I absolutely love this ring! I haven't taken it off since I got it (a few days ago) and it seems to be holding up well. I may buy another one.

Been using this holster for about three months now and couldn't be happier. My Sig sits tight with no wobble, and the draw is smooth every single time. Comfortable enough for all-day wear. Honestly, beats out holsters costing twice as much. Highly recommend.

I am new to loose leaf teas. I like that the handles fold in when storing. The mesh is fine and I barely get any tea leaf floaties in my tea compared to an old tea ball infuser that I once had. The seller sent a nice e-book with recipes and tips that I found to be very helpful.

I liked the case,but the green color was not as bright as online. It was more of a lighter green and I wanted a brighter green. Just a matter of preference. Also,it was smaller than I thought. It didn't look as if it could hold much,not that you should pack as if going on vacation,but I'm just saying! So,with that,I returned it. Other than that,it was a nice small bag.

Bought this for my 6 year old grandson's birthday and he went absolutely nuts over it. The rev-up mechanism on the back is super simple, even my 3 year old figured it out within minutes. Those glowing exhaust flames are a really neat touch that sets it apart from other RC-style trucks we've owned. It takes a beating too, already been crashed into the baseboards plenty of times with zero damage. I'd highly recommend this to grandparents shopping for a gift, or any parent with active kids who need something engaging for indoor play. Worth every penny.

Ordered this on a whim and it arrived next day in a sturdy mailer with no bent corners, which I always appreciate. The cover art is even better in person and the spine didn't crack when I opened it flat. Started reading during lunch and honestly didn't want to go back to work. The writing pulls you in immediately and the main couple had me invested by chapter two. What surprised me most was how natural the dialogue feels, nothing forced or cheesy. The pacing hits that sweet spot where you keep telling yourself one more chapter. Even the secondary characters left me wanting more. Already preordered the sequel. Solid shipping, beautiful physical copy, and a story that actually delivers.
Nice product that will add a lot of production value. Only complaint is that the wheels came with the manufacturing ring still around it. You will need to sand the "extra" rubber down
This is one I hope never ends! The author is gifted, her stories come to life and they've managed to take over mine lately!

Works better than expected and pockets, lots of pockets bot inside and outside the bucket. Its a little tight on my homer bucket andi don't know If my bucket is taller than other 5 gallon buckets or Im using it wrong but I have about 4 inches of clearance before reaching the bottom of the bucket and unlike in the photograph. Yeah, I recommend this to everyone and its even better than the bucket liner I got from the Home D.
Solid earplugs for the price. Would recommend to any casual swimmer.

Box arrived crushed on one end and two of the three lights were already cracked. The plastic feels incredibly flimsy, like it would snap if you looked at it wrong. One unit had a loose rattling piece inside. Tried charging them anyway but the solar panels looked scratched up. Returning immediately. Don't waste your time, spend a few extra bucks on something that actually survives shipping.

Works extremely well. Previously I had crappy ones from Walmart (constantly deleted my files, never working, etc.). This works perfectly. I have had it for a few months - not one issue. The boxing it come in is super professional (it looked like it was from Apple lol). Very high quality feel, design, and performance.
Still holding up great after months of reading. Good story that keeps me coming back.

I grabbed this expecting another low-budget creature feature with rubber ears and bad CGI, but man was I dead wrong. The practical effects alone are worth the price, there's a scene about forty minutes in that had me literally pausing to check if what I saw was real. The two leads have genuine chemistry, which is rare for indie horror where everyone seems like they're reading off cue cards. The pacing moves quick without feeling rushed, and the kills are creative without being gimmicky. My only complaint is the audio mix gets muddy during the outdoor sequences, had to crank my soundbar way up. If you're tired of mainstream horror playing it safe, this one actually swings for the fences. Already pre-ordered Ferrin's other stuff after finishing this.
It works really great as it is a replacement for an old Walkman. My wife loves and it sounds amazingly good. the radio is pretty good, too.

I enjoyed reading this book as a follow up to " me before you". I enjoy her style of writing and didn't want to put the book down until I finished. I have picked up several more books by Jojo Moyes to read in the immediate future. I always appreciate finding an author I enjoy reading.

Needed a serious leash for my 75lb lab mix who pulls like crazy on walks. Most leashes I've tried stretched or frayed within weeks, but this one is built like a tank. The hardware is solid metal, not that cheap plated stuff that rusts. At this price point I honestly wasn't expecting such good quality. The handle is comfortable too, doesn't dig into your hand when the dog lunges. Honestly worth twice what they're charging. Already ordered a second one to keep in the truck.

Ordered this on a Tuesday and it showed up Thursday morning, way faster than the estimated delivery. Box arrived in perfect condition with no dents or crushed corners, which honestly surprised me because the outer shipping box looked like it had a rough trip. The card itself was snug in its foam padding and anti-static bag, no issues at all. Swapped out my old GTX 960 and slotted this in without any problems. Fired right up on first boot. I've been playing Warzone at high settings and getting buttery framerates compared to before. Temps stay in the low 70s under load which I'm happy about. Fan noise is noticeable but not obnoxious. For what I paid, honestly can't complain. Great upgrade for 1080p gaming.
There is nothing to dislike about this almost magical classic. Engaging characters dish out comeuppance, snide one-liners, and ultimately, redemption.

Once upon a time I dreamed of being able to pick my future husband out of something like the Sears catalog. I mean they'd invent it before I was adult, right? Seemed so obvious to me. I couldn't understand why they hadn't done it already. So it was to that kind of place to which this book took me back, certainly as the character Cherie describes her desire to order up the perfect man, and then goes on a funny and insightful journey of eroticism, rejection, conflict, confusion and pulling it all together again. This book was a very enjoyable elixir.

Got this for my router table fence setup and it does the job well. The clamping pressure is solid and the adjustment knob lets you dial in different stock thicknesses without fiddling around too much. My only minor complaint is the knob feels a little cheap compared to the rest of the hardware, but it hasn't stripped or loosened up after several months of weekend projects. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone building jigs or upgrading a factory fence. Great value for hobbyist woodworkers who need reliable workholding without spending fortune.

I bought this Chromebook mostly for light schoolwork and it's been a mixed bag. The keyboard is actually really nice, keys have a satisfying click and the layout feels comfortable for long typing sessions. That said, the screen is pretty disappointing. Colors look washed out and viewing angles are narrow, so if you're not sitting dead center everything gets dim. Battery life has been solid, easily getting me through a full day of notes and lectures without needing a charger. Boot time is fast too, which I appreciate when I'm rushing to class. But the limited app selection gets frustrating when I need to do anything beyond Google Docs or basic browsing. For the price it's acceptable, just don't expect it to replace a real laptop.
Arrived quickly with no damage. Sturdy and looks great in person.
Thought a cheap case would feel flimsy but this one's solid. Fits my HD 7 perfectly and all the ports are easy to reach. Really impressed.
I've been using this for about six months now with three messy pets and it still works great. The spray nozzle hasn't clogged or broken like other brands I've tried. Solid product overall.

Surprisingly, this flat piece of plastic (with silver inlays) actually works, bringing in all 19 available channels in my area. However, you really do have to find the sweet spot on your walls for it and that might require a longer coaxial cable than is provided with the antenna.

It does a good job of filtering the water but even a new filter is so slow! And you have to fill the upper container twice to get it to 2/3rds full. Don't fill it any farther or it won't filter the rest that's in the upper part. It just sits there. When you try to pour it the unfiltered water in the upper part is what comes out first. The upper container needs to be bigger. I think they made it that way so you can try their filter out and then go out and buy their filter that attaches to your faucet like I ended up doing.

a bit technical to set up and I am a techy person, but they do the job and work great for the room heaters I have around the house. Saving money since we were running them too long when we weren't home or in the rooms. Now I don't have to worry about them.

Glad to add this one to my party games collection. Some of our party participants backed out after finding out that you actually have to think during this game but after playing a few rounds and finding out how funny it is to see what everyone else wrote, they were back in! Nice game for middle schoolers and up although I did find that the scoring was a bit confusing.

My son has been playing with this nonstop for three months now and it's still holding up perfectly. No loose pieces or broken parts despite being dropped multiple times. The build itself was quick and painless. Really impressed with how sturdy this thing is for the price.

I honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this thing seriously delivered. My carpets were in rough shape after a messy winter with two dogs and a toddler, and I figured I'd need to rent one of those heavy commercial units. Decided to give this a shot instead, and it pulled up stains I thought were permanent. It's way lighter and easier to maneuver than I anticipated, which was a huge plus since I have a bad back. The water tank is a decent size, so you're not constantly refilling, but it's also not so big that it becomes heavy to push around. Drying time was faster than expected too. For a home unit, this exceeds what I thought it would be capable of. Definitely recommend.

Once my daughter saw this at her 3rd birthday, she was not interested in anything else. This helps teach fine motor skills and my daughter caught on right away. She's doesn't quite understand to go from hole to hole in order - she wants to skip all over the board. Also - this is a great relaxing activity for a tired mom to sit with their child and point to which hole to go into next to teach the child. There are pictures on both sides of the board and the board is sturdy. The animals that come in this are: dog, cat, turtle, rabbit, fish. Some cons that I've found just in the day we've had this are: the holes are NOT smooth so when the lace goes through the hole, it gets frayed a little and is sometimes difficult to pull through the hole. The lace doesn't get frayed enough to dissuade me from purchasing this though. Also, I think that lace should be a little longer. There is barely enough lace to go around the entire animal and with a toddler who doesn't understand to go from hole to hole, a longer lace would be nice. Overall, I am happy with my purchase. My daughter loves this and it keeps her occupied for 30-45 minutes at a time and is great for a quiet activity at church or wherever. She loves the pictures and the wooden (rather than cardboard) pictures are perfect so we can get a lot of use out of this. Hope this review helps!

I bought this for my wife for Christmas. I'm blown away with the quality of this bag. It's real leather, and thick quality leather! My wife loves it btw. It comes with a nice letter from the seller with detailed care instructions on the reverse side. We will definitely be purchasing from this company again!

Well, this was just a wonderful book. I've read a few of Kenny Wright's stories now, and really enjoy his light and bouncy style, and the fantastic suspense that just keeps you captivated - and unable to keep from turning to the next chapter time after time. This is his first full-length novel, and it's a real treat. It is a self-contained sequel to a short-story entitled Rediscovering Danielle, and you don't have to read that at all to enjoy this one - although I'd recommend reading both, the short story nicely sets up the characters and their backstory and is a highly entertaining read in its own right. Just Watch Me takes Dean and Danielle to exotic Hawaii, where the atmosphere lends itself well to taking their little marital game of hubby-watching-wife-flirting-in-a-bar a little further, into the saucy realms of actually (gasp!) seeing her with other people. The story is well-paced and explores the whole risk-and-reward dilemma of a married couple very much in love challenging themselves sexually with the tickle of jealousy to fan their passions - it's naughty, it's spicy, it's so hot with scenes that will lodge firmly in the memory, but Kenny Wright plays it just perfectly in teasing out the nervous energy without piling on the pain, and leaving you with a satisfying HEA.
Bought this for my kid's birthday and honestly for the price it's a solid deal. Keeps him entertained and the quality is better than I expected.
Awesome if my dog didn't eat my first one. My dog is clearly a dolphins fan.

After trying three different collars that either died fast or fired off randomly, this one actually does what it claims. The rubber port cover seals tight so water and dirt stay out, which was a dealbreaker for me since my Lab swims daily. I really like the progressive correction on level 2, it gives my dog a fair chance to back off before anything intensifies, and she learned the boundary within a week. The remote reaches across my whole yard without lag. I'd strongly recommend this to anyone living near neighbors with a vocal dog, or folks with stubborn breeds who've had no luck with sound-only trainers. It's fair, reliable, and built to last. Worth every penny compared to the cheap models I wasted money on first.
Bought this for my nephew's birthday and he plays with it constantly. Perfect gift for any kid ages 4-8.

Arrived two days early, double-boxed with zero damage. Pulled it out and was immediately impressed by the sturdy plastic and thick rubber gasket. Latches feel solid, not flimsy. Way better built than I expected for the price. Can't wait to use it.
Bought this for my kid's birthday party and the material is surprisingly thick. Survived a dozen toddlers jumping on it all afternoon.
Capture lots of dust and dander and fit in furnace perfect. Highly recommended.
I love this movie. Subtitles are not my favorite but there are some parts where they speak English. Funny and exciting.
Bought this three months ago for my two rats and it's holding up great. No tears or scratches yet despite daily rough play. They zoom through it constantly.

such a fun card game, so easy to learn, and each game lasts 15 mins. its a lot of fun watching people play with you as you try to not get the exploding kitten card. plus there are a lot of cute little cards that just make you laugh while playing. again super easy to learn and super fun to play

So far I'm really liking this hard case. I got it for my AK-47. I initially was looking for a soft case in the 25 to 35 dollar range, but had trouble finding one that could hold the long 30 round AK mags in their pouches. I opted for this case instead and was pleasantly surprised to find that I can fit my rifle with scope and a magazine inserted into it's well. As my picture shows, there is room for extra mags also. One thing that I like is that when it's closed, the soft foam really compresses around the rifle and holds it in place. I have shook the case and swung it around and upon reopening it, everything was still in the the original positions that I had placed them in. You also get nylon straps that you can screw into the case with the provided screws to secure your rifle. Honestly, I don't think that i will put them in because of the aforementioned reason, although it certainly wouldn't hurt. There are four plastic locking tabs that keep the case closed and there are also places to put pad locks on if one should choose to. Overall, pleased with this case as it serves my purposes.

For the price you really can't beat these cleaning patches. I've been using them for a few months on everything from my 9mm to my buddy's 12 gauge and they work flawlessly every single time. The material is absorbent enough to hold a good amount of solvent without falling apart halfway down the bore. I was spending way too much on name brand patches before finding these and honestly I can't tell any difference in quality. The bulk count means I'm not constantly reordering either which is a huge plus. They thread through my bore snake adapter easily and one patch usually does the trick for a standard range session cleanup. If you maintain multiple firearms like I do grab a pack of these and save yourself some money.
nice job by Grisham. different story lines. noticed he is inputting his political and social views heavily in his books lately but i still like him.

Picked this up for my 12-year-old daughter who's been wanting to get into archery. The adjustable draw weight is honestly the best feature here, we started her at 15 pounds and she's already worked her way up to 25 in just a few weeks. Makes it way more practical than buying something she'd outgrow immediately. The build quality is decent for the price point and it feels solid in her hands. My one real complaint is the arrow rest. It's a cheap plastic self-adhesive one that started peeling off after the first range session. I ended up swapping it out for a better rest from a local shop and that solved the issue. For the money, it's a solid starter setup. Just plan on upgrading that rest right away.

Great gloves. I'm large in Black Diamond gloves, but the mechanix are a bit larger, so I guess I must be medium. Great finger and hand rubber protection. I use these for wood work, bike ridding, weight lifting and chin ups. Only down side is that they don't come with kevlar protection. Good buy.

Bought a two-pack after reading decent things online. Big mistake. The desktop app crashes every single time I try adding a second camera, and the mobile app is even worse, constant disconnects and laggy feeds that freeze for 10+ seconds. I spent an entire weekend resetting routers, port forwarding, switching from WiFi to Ethernet, and nothing made a difference. Night vision is laughable too. Grainy and dark. I honestly cannot recommend this to anyone, unless maybe you're a developer who enjoys troubleshooting as a hobby. For normal people who just want a security camera that works out of the box? Skip it. Returning both units and going with Reolink instead. Don't waste your weekend like I did.
Decent lights for occasional use. I'd recommend these to anyone needing quick, temporary outdoor lighting.
Bought these for my kid months ago, still holding up great.

These are comfy cotton knit pajamas. They are not super-warm winter PJs. I find fleece too warm for sleep, and these are just right under my quilt. They are nice and soft. A good price for a basic PJ.
Watched it five times already, disc still plays perfectly. Pretty funny.
Works way better than the expensive stuff from my vet. Cleared up my dog's yeasty ears in two days for cheap.

Got this on a whim during a Kindle sale and honestly it's worth ten times what I paid. The characters are so well-drawn that I felt like I knew them personally by the third chapter. What really got me was how the author balances humor with genuine emotional depth - nothing feels forced or contrived. The pacing is spot on too. I stayed up way too late two nights in a row because I kept telling myself "just one more chapter." For the price of a coffee you get something that'll stick with you long after finishing. Already ordered a physical copy for my mom's birthday. Can't recommend enough.
My dog has chronic yeast infections and Zymox does the trick! So thankful to have found this!

How many drawbacks can you think of when one man only thinks about himself and controls most of the government? Think about a life where water is rationed and that water is suddenly gone. Where that one man decides the fate of all who live in those areas when water no longer available. Exiled is a great story with many strong, likable (and hated) characters in a realistic, future world. What starts out as a normal day for Brooke and her two children soon turns into a race to leave their home when she realizes that something is not right. The story jumps across the United States, following this corrupt man and his opponents as he pushes through a vile piece of legislation dealing with the waterless area. Within this story are parts of really interesting storylines that will hopefully be explored and expanded. My hope that this one man gets his due will keep me reading until the end!
Started leaking after three weeks. The seams along the toe split right open.
Couldn't be any better! A terrific book. Something happening every page. One book that is hard to put down. Love the "Prey" books. I've read them all up to #25.
My dog just loves these. I have tried other brands and she turns away.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this harness blew me away. The padding is way thicker than other brands I've tried and the buckles feel solid, not flimsy. My Chihuahua pulls hard on walks and this holds up great without chafing her chest. Super easy to put on too. Way better quality than I anticipated.

Got this for my brother about six months ago and the disc has been through heavy play sessions since. No scratches or loading issues at all, which surprised me because he's not gentle with his games. The case held up fine too. Gameplay itself is solid with nice set pieces and decent combat. Took off a star because some of the climbing sections feel repetitive after a while. Overall a worthwhile pickup that stands up to regular use without falling apart on you.
GO TO PLAY STORE TYPE IN PSTEC 8 MIN TO GET RID OF A BAD MEMORIE YOU WONT BELIEVE IT

If I'd followed the fit guide they would have been a mess. Good thing I've lived with my petite self for so long I knew the larger size wouldn't work for me because I've got short hands. The smaller size is a bit snug, but not too tight. The length of palm from bottom of fingers to wrist is too long for me. They will be too long for any true petite leading to extra bunching in palm and thumb crease area. If you've got "normal" length fingers/hands they'll probably be fine. The seam on the palm between the forefinger and thumb is fine on the left hand, but stiff, sharp and uncomfortable on the right hand. The padding doesn't seem like much, and there is still discomfort while riding, but post ride there is significantly less lingering discomfort than wearing none. The padding is in a great place to protect the meaty part of the lower palm. It seemed the middle of the palm didn't have much. There are two very large tags in one glove, but I make sure they are folded up to the upper part of the hand vs. the palm and they haven't bothered me. The grey color is nice and the white parts help for hand signal visibility. They were the best out of the 10 I tried on in a store, but there's room for improvement. Still surprised that companies don't make goods in petite and tall versions of things. All the rest of the clothing fashion community can manage it, why not cycling? Overall they're pretty good. If they were destroyed I'd get a pair again until I figure out that magical illusive well-fitting, perfectly padded pair.
Nice little mount. Serves its purpose as the tv that it is supporting is pretty light weight.
Got these for a fraction of what name brands charge and they pair up fast. Contact sensors have been rock solid. Motion detector lags sometimes but for the money, can't complain.
Not too many people are using this system I'm thinking, but I do, good product, sturdy & holds up in the outdoor elements, reliable...

Really happy with how sturdy this feels once put together. The butcher block surface is genuinely thick and handles knife marks well without denting easily. Wheels lock firmly in place too. Knocked off a star because the drawer slides are pretty sticky and could use better hardware. Still worth the money overall.

Bottle arrived cracked and leaking all over the inside of the shipping box. Whoever packed this just tossed it in a padded mailer with zero protection, so by the time it got to me half the product had soaked into the cardboard. The cap wasn't even taped or sealed shut. What little I managed to salvage smelled awful, like chemicals mixed with artificial mint. I tried putting a few drops in my golden retriever's bowl and she literally backed away from it and refused to drink for hours. Ended up pouring the rest down the drain. Between the terrible packaging and the fact that my dog wouldn't go near it, this was a complete bust. Won't be ordering again and honestly wouldn't trust the seller to ship anything breakable.
For the price, this is a steal. Fits my soundbar and cable box underneath perfectly. Sturdy, easy to assemble, and freed up a ton of shelf space. Highly recommend.
The retention strap snaps tight and holds my folding knife securely even during hikes.
My son loves this, and it's very cute. Hasn't broken yet, though it's only been 2 months.
Can't beat the price on these. Sound comes through clean with no static, and the cable feels sturdy. Picked up two and both work flawlessly.
The face looks nice enough but the build quality feels super cheap for what they're charging. The ticking is insanely loud too. Wouldn't buy again.
Really enjoyed the Chicago setting, the neighborhood references felt authentic and added a lot. Story dragged a bit in the middle but the ending tied everything together nicely.

Been wearing these for about three months now doing daily 5Ks and weekend trail hikes. The cushioning holds up way better than I thought it would and my feet never feel beat up afterward. Genuinely the most comfortable athletic socks I've owned.

I was honestly pretty skeptical about ordering shapewear online since the sizing is always a gamble and I've been burned before by brands that promise way more than they deliver. I'm 5'4" and around 140 pounds, grabbed the medium, and it actually does what it claims. The compression is legit without feeling like I can't breathe. I wore it under a fitted dress for a wedding and stayed comfortable the entire six hours, which exceeded what I thought was possible. My only complaint is that the bathroom situation takes some getting used to, but that's pretty standard for bodysuits. The material feels sturdier than I expected for the price point. Way better than the department store stuff I've been settling for. Genuinely impressed and already considering a second one.

Really wanted to love this pen. The build quality is solid and it feels great in hand, but there are some frustrating trade-offs. The cap makes it unbalanced when posted, so I end up taking it off every time I write, which means it gets misplaced constantly. The bigger headache is the refill situation. Mine ran dry after maybe three weeks of moderate daily use at work, and tracking down a replacement was a chore. The manufacturer's site is useless and I ended up guessing based on random forum posts. When it actually has ink, it writes smooth with no skipping. It's just hard to fully recommend something that becomes this much of a hassle to maintain. Decent pen, poor ecosystem.
Got this for my sister's baby shower. Cute little chime, decent quality. She seemed really happy with it.

Always looking for something new to read. When I read the description on this and realized there were additional books by the author Parnell Hall, thought I would read The Baxter Trust to check out the writer's story line. Sheila Benton; has a trust account that says if she embarasses the family name she will loose her money. The story opens with Sheila and her boyfriend (who by the way is married) doing drugs. He leaves to discuss divorce settlements with his wife and Sheila just knows that she will not be able to do without the drugs while he is gone. Meanwhile checking the mail she finds a threatening letter. Lying to her Uncle who monitors her money, gives her $100....off to buy her drugs and returning to her apartment she finds a dead body in her living room. Panic of course sets in as she is in possesion of drugs. so the story takes off. Shelia doesn't want her Uncle to control her life so looks in the yellow pages for lawyers and finds Steve Winslow, an actor who graduated from law school but had never practiced law. The story at times is funny, this lawyer who has never even been in a court room in a high profile trial. Well many twists and turns, then a side story about finding out who is Shelia's father. Without telling the end of the story and trial, the search for Shelia;s father is unclear....would I read another book, yes probably.
Great price and works fast. My dogs stopped scratching within a week. Definitely worth every penny.
Used this on my kitchen cabinets and bathroom shelves. The light grip holds everything in place but peels off cleanly when you want to switch it out. No sticky mess left behind. Totally worth buying.
Bought this as a backup for my Toshiba and it's been perfect. Charges fast, packs small for travel, and stays cool even after hours of use. Totally worth it.

Bought this for my nephew and within a week the side mirror snapped off and the decals started peeling. It's fine if you just want a display piece, but skip it for kids who actually play with their cars.

This is a perfect balance between weight and size. Penn has always done well for me, so I will stick with them. It is not as smooth and "finished" as some of the higher priced brands out there, but the average person can afford these. I like the 4.3:1 as well, it can be useful on fast moving fish. These are fun to use, and they fit and look great on my rods.

I am a first time owner. I read that it is best to feed a puppy higher quality foods instead of the big commercial brands. After reading a lot of positive reviews, I decided to try Wellness Super5 for Puppies. Worst mistake I ever made. My little bully's stool was never firm. It did however make his coat very shiny. But he developed a very bad case of diarrhea. He stopped eating and drinking for a day. I was so worried about the lil guy. After an overnight stay (& a very expensive vet bill), my lil bully returned home full of energy. The vet recommened that he would have to eat canned Purina EN for the rest of his life. Realizing that they really just wanted my money, I decided to switch his food. I decided to go with Canadae ALS. During the transition, BlackJack was still having a loose stool. After more research, I finally decided on Cal Natural Lamb & Rice. I started mixing this food and BJ developed a very bad bloody diarrhea case. I started the "at home remedy" of pepto bismol and a bland diet. The pet store clerk recommended some canned pumpkin as well. BJ fasted for 24 hours. After feeding him boiled chicken & rice for a few days, the blood gradually disappeared. I slowly started mixing the Cal Natural Lamb & Rice. All i can say is BJ is feeling 100% better and his stool is solid!!! This was the result I wanted with Wellness, but I was very disappointed. IF YOU WANT A HEALTHY PET AND A FEW BUCKS SAVED FROM A VET VISIT, PLEASE STAY AWAY FROM THIS FOOD!
Nice fit and comfortable for my pet. Thanks for the quick shipping.
Beautiful slippers! Very cute and stylish. A great gift, from a great designer. I will enjoy giving them this Christmas!
I liked this book a lot, and want to read it again. It's impossible not to be emotional reading this story. Powerful and well written. I will recommend it to my book club and others.

Didn't expect much going in since litRPG stuff is usually pretty hit or miss for me. The concept of flipping between the real-world players and their actual NPCs sounded gimmicky, but the author pulls it off surprisingly well. What really impressed me was how the two storylines eventually weave together, that's where a lot of similar books lose me, but this one sticks the landing. My only real gripe is that the first few chapters drag while everyone gets introduced. Once the plot kicks into gear though, it's a genuinely fun ride. The editing is solid too, which honestly isn't always a given with self-published fantasy. Way better than I anticipated. Would definitely pick up the sequel.

The two main characters interact well. The plot is a bit contrived, things just happen, but for the most part that's OK, too. I did not care for the obvious misspelling, poor grammar and the wrong homonym used in several places. Please get an editor, or at least a beta reader. Just because spell check says the word is spelled correctly does not mean you have used the correct word.

This is a relatively brief but quite helpful book on how to write a nonfiction book specifically tailored to Amazon's Kindle. It's an encouraging book with lots of concrete information and specific resources. The author's style is breezy and clear. The book is best paired with other Kindle titles authored by Corson-Knowles, including The Kindle Publishing Bible and The Kindle Formatting Bible. All are reasonably priced and provide expert help.
Her chapter about Hollywood red carpets had me cackling. Funniest memoir I've picked up in years.
Very cute playset. Would have been nice to be a little less expensive however.
My dog is obsessed with these. Super durable and the seller threw in a freebie. Will buy again!
Great read. Makes you wish you lived in Nantucket.

The book, Sherlock Holmes by Arthur Conan Doyle is written very well but there are too many stories within the story which makes the book too long and keeps me from reading other shorter books. It's more of a mystery book and I didn't expect it to be,even though it's about Sherlock Holmes. As you can tell, I'm not too fond of mysteries.

I have 2 boxers that I felt needed a little warming at night, even though they sleep in the house. The fit is true to size and the length is appropriately long. Washes well and my dogs don't mind them.
Been using these constantly for three months and they still pop out perfectly. No cracks or warping yet. Solid quality.

Loses connection and goes red after a couple days. Reconnected this thing 5 times and every time it works for a few days then loses connection and have to set it up on wireless again. Other wireless devices in the home work fine (hue hub, skybell, homeboy, nest, etc.). Whenever I really need it working it's not.
very stylish and well-made- the heel is a nice height for work.
Knuckle padding is perfect, keeps my hands from getting bruised. Fit is snug but not too tight.

I was skeptical about switching to a compact keyboard for my home office setup, but this combo really surprised me. The keys have a satisfying tactile feel and aren't as mushy as I expected at this price point. Mouse tracking is smooth and responsive on pretty much any surface I've tried. My one gripe is that the keyboard layout takes some getting used to, the arrow keys are cramped and I still find myself hitting the wrong one when I'm typing fast. Battery life seems solid so far after three weeks of daily use. Connection was plug and play with zero issues on Windows 11. For the money, it exceeded what I thought I'd be getting, even if it's not perfect.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no damage to the packaging. Opened it up and was genuinely surprised by how thin this thing is. Slips right into my dress pants pocket and basically vanishes. The action on the blade is crisp right out of the box, and the fit and finish are impressive for the price. Already replaced my bulky daily carry at work.

I struggled with how to rate this one. The first half of this book is one of the most fascinating stories I have ever read. Like Kaiden, I was completely immersed in Serena and Elodie's world. The writing style is so compelling, and the pace of the story is perfect. The progression of the sexual tension is also incredibly exciting, even when it's one sided. That is an astounding accomplishment on its own. The author created amazing chemistry between Kaiden and Serena right from the beginning. I realize now that part of that was due to what a unique character Serena was and how fascinated he was by her. Unfortunately, Serena later loses her uniqueness and becomes a regular girl in love. Considering the physical prowess she displayed in the first part of the story, I was expecting her to become an amazing athlete or to do something extraordinary. I still highly recommend this book for the thrilling first half of the story, but the end didn't fulfill the potential of these characters.
has a rubbery feel and and is just the right size for the ipod 5.. a gloss back color.. can be taking on and of with no problems..

Bought this for my 5-year-old's birthday and she's played with it almost daily since. The detail on the figures is impressive and the accessories are a nice touch. A couple smaller bits fall off during active play, but nothing a quick snap can't fix. I'd definitely recommend this to parents of kids who enjoy imaginative small-world play. Great gift option too.
Dropped mine on pavement twice now and not a scratch on it. Solid case for the money.

I went into this expecting the same energy as the first book and it's... different. Not bad, just a shift in tone that took me by surprise. There's a lot more focus on the characters processing trauma and less of the action that pulled me through book one. Some of that interior stuff works well, but it drags in the middle and I found myself skimming. That said, the world-building is still solid and a few of the later chapters really deliver. I'd recommend this to readers who care more about character development and emotional arcs than fast pacing. If you're here mainly for the plot moving forward, you might get frustrated. Three stars because it's well-written for what it is, just not exactly what I was hoping for.
Expected this to blend a full gallon easily. Nope, barely stirred one. Total waste.

Finally got to finish the Ori storyline and it was worth every penny. The visual effects look incredible on DVD, way better than what we got on TV. The space battles alone are reason enough to own this. My only gripe is that RDA is barely in it, and honestly the movie feels a little different without his humor balancing things out. Still, the team carries it well and the plot ties up loose ends nicely. If you watched season ten you basically need this to get the actual ending. Glad I added it to my collection.
Finally a cone our dog could eat with, sleep on, and not damage the entire house running into things in! Did give him a light snore when it was too inflated, but hey, that's just our dog.

Awful shoe covers. Difficult to put on and twice as difficult to get off. Not very waterproof and lined with a microfiber fleece that is basically a sponge for any moisture that comes into contact with the sole of your shoes. I got the XXL and it barely fits on a size 8 1/2 shoe without breaking the zipper. If you thinking of thrifty shoe covers go with a plastic bag. You'll be better off.
Lovely. I learned the hard way that the outside is glass. Not used to that on an LED. Very elegant light and look to fixture. These are in the powder room for all the visitors to see.
Thought it'd be too flimsy for my mastiff but holds up great.

Paired this with my Galaxy S8 in about ten seconds and haven't had a single dropout since. The heart rate monitor is surprisingly accurate compared to my chest strap. I love that I can glance at my wrist during runs instead of fumbling with my phone screen. Battery easily lasts through a full week of daily workouts. Really impressed with the build quality for the price.
Love the brushed interior, keeps me warm without sweating. Fit is true to size and the waistband doesn't roll down. Wish the drawstring was a bit longer though.

Savannah Martin has not had an easy time of it. At fourteen, her mother abandoned her and, despite being fostered as part of a caring family, the scars still run deep. Returning home after breaking away from an abusive relationship, the heartache is not over. The patriarch of the family has been murdered and the family is reeling from the loss and the continuing threat to their business and their lives. Jared Corbit is her sister Lexis boyfriend and she wished she felt brotherly thoughts towards to him. What was she going to do? Told from Savannahs point of view, her emotional turmoil feels so real. There seems to be one punch after another to herself and those around her and the anguish and she feels cannot be hidden. The author knows just the right thing to say to convey the mood, the feelings of uncertainty, pain and love. And there is a lot of love in this story despite tackling the serious issues. Abuse and its ripple effect, abandonment and its life-long consequences are at the center of Savannahs struggle as she tries to deal with her family and the situation she finds herself in now. Jared is more than she feels she deserves and the roller coaster of events that happen don't ease that feeling. Surprising twists and still a lot of uncertainty has me eagerly looking for the second part of this two-book storyline.

I am familiar with shapewear, having worn other brands for years. I have mainly used Maidenform in the past, however their smallest size I can find is a small, and I need something smaller at this point. I am 5'6" and weight 152lbs currently, and I ordered this Vedette body suit in a Small. I am pleased with the fit. Yes, you have to work to get it on. But that's the mark of good shapewear. I chose to move to Vedette because they have several smaller sizes once I lose additional weight. My natural measurements are currently 38-30-38. In my small Maidenform I am 37-29-38. In my new size small Vedette I am 37 - 27.5 - 38.5. I was actually surprised that it made my hip/butt measurement larger. I can definitely tell that it lifts everything up, and my jeans were more filled out. The Vedette is a much thicker material. Especially in the stomach. The material does not breathe really at all, so your skin will sweat if you wear this for 12 hours. I didn't realize I was sweating until I took it off this evening, and my skin was damp beneath the body suit. The body suit itself was not damp, so I was surprised. But this did not bother me, and hopefully it will aid in losing inches. I was able to wear this comfortably all day beneath my jeans and shirt to my office job and driving to several appointments. It was comfortable, and I could tell that it was providing more compression than my Maidenform ever did. I am excited about the upgrade.
Expected way more depth but it's basically just him bragging for 200 pages. Total waste of money, couldn't finish it.

Got this on a Kindle deal and honestly it was worth way more than what I paid. The Heather storyline completely surprised me - I went from hating her to actually rooting for the woman. The emotional punches kept coming and I stayed up way too late finishing it. Knocking off one star because the middle dragged a bit and I had to push through. Still, for under three bucks this was a solid grab. The Mitchell brothers series keeps getting better.

Loved getting individual chapters for each couple! The holiday theme worked perfectly and catching up with everyone felt like coming home. The shorter format actually made the emotional moments hit harder. Total comfort read for December.
Arrived quickly and packed securely. Looks even better in person, sturdy glass, perfect size.

Ordered this for my Kindle last night and it was on my device instantly, no download issues or formatting glitches at all. Really impressed with how smooth the whole purchase process was. Opening it up, the text rendered perfectly with no weird spacing problems or typos, which I've sadly run into with shorter digital titles before. As for the actual story, I was hooked right away. Grant packs so much tension into this prequel, and seeing the outbreak unfold from the very beginning gave me chills. It's a quick read but every single page hits hard. Perfect way to jump back into the Newsflesh world before starting the main books. Already telling my coworker she needs to grab this one. Five stars all the way.
Arrived two days early, nicely boxed. Opened them up and was genuinely impressed with the quality.

I have to agree with the above posters. When I saw the price for these I cringed but my hearing is more important than 50 bucks so I ordered these and slapped them on. Yes, they are really great, no more gaps that let in unwanted sound when I turn my head. Only thing that makes me a tad upset is why the heck didn't these come with these sealing rings on them already. My brother bought a pair of Howard Leight R-01526 Impact Sport Electronic Earmuffs and I tried them on and the earcups have a lot of gaps that let in sound and don't even have the option to upgrade the cups 8(, Pretty sad when those earmuffs cost $50. I own a pair of 3M Peltor Tactical Sport Hearing Protector, MP3 Compatible $97,99 which I purchased here on Amazon. I bought these gelpacks for them and now I'm satisfied with the protection. Sad the manufacturer's for most of these headsets use inadequate cups out of the box. Anyways, these gelpacks will provide a much better seal and help save your hearing. Be well, be safe.
Great quality for the price. Sturdy, looks expensive, and took five minutes to put together.
This mystery was enjoyable to read. A lot is going on in this plot and there is a puzzle to be solved. Interesting and suspenseful.

Been using this thing for about six months now with two adult cats, one of whom is pushing 15 pounds. It's held up way better than I expected. The carpet covering is still mostly intact with just a little fraying near the top level where they launch off. Posts are still solid after tons of scratching. I will say the little circle attachment up top is kind of pointless for full-grown cats. Mine just use it as a chin rest. I mounted the top platform differently than the instructions suggested because it seemed unbalanced the intended way, and that's worked out fine. Assembly took maybe 45 minutes by myself. For the price, I'm genuinely impressed it hasn't started leaning or coming loose at the joints yet. Would buy again.
Great series and enjoying watching it several time a year.
Good quality product. I mostly transfer files to it of 1GB or less.

Our 12 year old LOVED putting this together. Of course, we do live in NYC so have a vested interest in putting it together properly. But the whole family enjoyed going through the different steps--first the jigsaw puzzle, then the placement of the buildings. Perhaps it would be less interesting--and more challengiing--if you hadn't visited or lived here--but we definitely give it 5 stars.

I can't believe I have to wait for the next installment I really enjoyed this second installment as much as I did the first one. Good character development and believable and well paced plot and story line. Unlike much of the prepper fiction I read, this author distinguishes himself with proper grammar and tense usage and good vocabulary usage. Can't wait for volume 3!

I really enjoyed this historical novel even though much of it had to be purely speculation on the author's part. Michelle Moran did well in bringing the historical characters to life as she always does. It was an interesting read with enough true facts to inform the reader about ancient Egypt as well. This book really sparked my interest in the current prospects that there may be much more to be found within King Tut's tomb that might relate to Nefertiti.
I have not used this yet but I like the quality of the item, I purchased it to keep shrimp chilled in during our card parties and do not think I will be disappointed.
I USED THESE TO WASH MY WINDOWS AND WHAT SUPER NICE CLOTHS, NOT A BIT OF LINT AND SO HANDY AND WASHES UP GREAT... NOW MY WINDOW SPARKLE...

I can't tell you how much I love these tips! I haven't even experimented with all of them yet, but I love the ones I have played with. One thing to know - some tips require a stiffer frosting and some less stiff. It seems the ones with the little round holes need to be less stiff because if it's too firm, it won't come out of those tiny holes. The best advice I can give you is to wrap your frosting in some plastic wrap, snip off the end, and place that open end down into the bag inside the frosting bag, nestled in the frosting tip. That way, you can change frosting colors simply by taking that plastic wrapped frosting out of your bag and put in a new one, without the big mess of washing out all your bags and tips. Using a frosting coupler inside the bag and having the Russian tip on the outside of the bag helps too, so it's easy to switch out tips! I hope these handy tips help you! Have fun!

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing actually feels pretty solid in hand. My kid has been swinging it around nonstop for two weeks and nothing has broken yet. The blade is brighter than I thought it would be, though the sound effects get old fast, there's no volume control so it's stuck at max. Wish it came with a stand or clip too. Overall though, it's been worth every penny and way better than the flimsy ones you'd find at a big box store.
Took forever to inflate but still holding air after three months.
I had bought this for a class and fell in love with the book! It is a great tale of life love and sacrifice in order to save the only world these young people had ever known.

If you are frustrated by the limited options of having one keyboard and mouse control multiple machines, this is a must-check-out device. The JUC400 effortlessly allows me to use one Mac or PC, and control two machines simulatenously from it. I can use my PC laptop to control my Mac mini behind it, and effortlessly drag my mouse from one machine to the next. It just works. No need to configure, use complicated server/client setups, none of that. You simply plug the device in to each machine, and a virtual CD appears that automounts and automatically launches the software. It also handles software updates automatically, including updating the device's own firmware. You never need to load a web site to check for drivers or updates with this device, it handles all of that for you. Other features like iPad compatibility, and file transfers that really do work at USB 2.0 speeds, are added bonuses. Even without them, this device is totally worth the money, and totally worth five stars.
Nice jacket but I had to return it since it was incredibly small for a 2X (I suspect it was mislabeled in manufacturing).
these are mesh which wasn't what I was expecting, but I do like them non the less, they work good for keeping cool!

Arrived two days early in a sturdy padded mailer with zero corner dents on the slipcover, which I always appreciate as a collector. Popped in the first disc right away and was hooked within minutes. The animation style is bonkers and the humor hits immediately. Already planning to rewatch the whole thing with friends this weekend.

I have an Android phone (HTC Evo 3D) and tablet (Nexus 7). The headset works near perfectly on my phone. My issue is that I found that the headset won't work the Netflix app, and I suspect there will be other apps as well that aren't compatible. For example, all the controls work great with Pandora, Stitcher and YouTube, but the pause/play doesn't work with Netflix. Oddly, the headset doesn't work as seamlessly with the Nexus 7. I'm sitting right next to the tablet and the sound sporadically cuts in and out. Now on to the good things. The sound is pretty good, so far nobody has pointed out to me that I must be on a Bluetooth! That is awesome, usually the person on the other end can tell that you're wireless. The distance is good as well. I like that I can walk 20 feet away and it's still connected. I plan on trying a further distance soon. I also like the volume level. I'm glad that it can go very loud if needed. The battery life is pretty decent. I had to charge it after a day and a half of heavy usage. I also noticed that after my second day or wearing it, I often forget it's there. It's not heavy and you get used to it being there really fast. Other than the few issue I pointed out, I have no other complaints. It works well with my phone and that's most important to me. It's a good headset at a good price. As I use the headset longer, if I find more Apps that it won't work with, I'll come back and update my review.
You get what you pay for and this should work just fine for its intended purpose.

Arrived two days late and the box was pretty beat up, but the jig itself was intact inside. First impressions are decent, feels solid enough and the markings are clear. Haven't tested it on a project yet but it seems straightforward. Not blown away but no complaints so far either.

I own several Gerber knives, and overall I like the them, Gerber makes a solid knife. However, like most Gerber knives the steel used in this blade is average, 440 high carbon. It does not hold an edge that well and dents/chips fairly easily. The added features, i.e. sharpener/whistle/fire starter are nice. Although the fire starter is crap, it broke on the first use with minimal force used. The sheath is fantastic, more impressive than the blade in my opinion, very durable. The grip of the knife is also quite nice, comfortable and sturdy, no slip at all. All in all if you are an occasional outdoors man and looking for a decent affordable survival knife this is a good buy. But if your looking for a blade thats made of better steel (Aus8) and overall durability and blade retention quality and still at decent price, I would suggest the SOG Seal Pup. No bells and whistles. Just the blade but it's a fantastic knife and if purchased from amazon not much more expensive than the this knife. Basically if you want a knife that if your life depended on it, I would not go with this Gerber, go with an SOG or maybe a Kabar. Bear Grylls is a badass and there is no way he would trust his life to this blade.

As always, Grisham delivers very captivating story line. Rather than last me for a while as an "occasional" read, I blew through this one in just a few short days. Character development is spot-on, and the depth of information about the challenges faced by Appalachian Miners is very revealing. I was left somewhat disappointed by the fact that the author didn't take the story further and wrap-up more of the storyline. I was also disappointed as I expected some follow-up editorial information/direction regarding the plight of the miners. Was it fully fact-based, an entertaining, yet trumped-up piece of fiction, or something else entirely?
It was beautiful to watch but didn't keep my attention.
Heel is taller than I expected from the photos, but surprisingly comfortable. Wore them all day at work with no issues.

Got this for my gym's old sound system and the transmitter mode works flawlessly. Paired in seconds with my old iPod classic. Battery lasts way longer than expected too. Super impressed with the range.

I picked this up on a whim and ended up reading the whole thing in one afternoon. Susan May Warren really knows how to write characters that feel like people you actually know. The romance builds naturally without feeling rushed, and I appreciated that the faith elements were woven in organically rather than feeling preachy. What got me was how relatable the struggles were, the characters deal with real doubts and insecurities, not just fluffy conflicts. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who enjoys clean romance with substance, especially if you're part of a book club looking for something that actually gives you something to discuss afterward. My sister-in-law is getting a copy for her birthday next month for sure. Already downloaded another book by this author.

For what you pay, this stand is a steal. Fits my Morrell bag perfectly and doesn't wobble at all even after daily shooting. Assembly took maybe ten minutes. Way better than spending double on a name brand. Totally worth every penny.
Great barefoot-style shoe for the money. Super lightweight and flexible with a thin sole. Been walking in them daily and they're holding up nicely.
My picky golden retriever loves the grain-free formula. Her coat looks noticeably shinier since switching.

After dealing with endlessly smelly plastic pans that absorb urine odors no matter how much you scrub them, I finally gave these a shot. The stainless steel surface is absolutely the game changer here. Nothing seeps in, and a quick wipe with vinegar gets it spotless. My older cat has a tendency to pee high along the sides, and these tall walls contain everything perfectly without any splashing over the edges. They're surprisingly heavy duty too. My dog used to easily flip the old plastic boxes looking for "treats," and he cannot budge this one at all. The included bags fit snugly and make daily scooping way less of a chore. Definitely worth every penny if you're tired of replacing scratched up plastic every few months.
Not bad for the price but the switches are stiff and my kid loses interest pretty fast.

I've had this paperback sitting on my nightstand for the better part of a year now, and it's been through quite a bit. Took it on two beach trips, stuffed it in carry-on luggage multiple times, even dropped it in the bathtub once. The binding is still holding strong and not a single page has come loose, which is honestly rare for a book this thick. Safire's storytelling holds up just as well as the physical copy. The political intrigue kept me hooked from start to finish, and I found myself going back to reread certain chapters. The historical detail is impressive without feeling like a textbook. If you're into early American political drama, this one's worth picking up. Just don't be surprised if you finish it faster than expected.

Showed up next day in a sturdy box with zero damage to the retail packaging, which I really appreciate as a collector. Pulled it out and was honestly blown away by the paint apps and how substantial it feels in hand. The light-up feature works perfectly and the sculpt is crisp. Way better than I expected for the price. Total no-brainer pickup.

This little thing is so much better than any multitool pliers I've ever used. I stopped carrying a multitool because they are usually just a collection of inferior tools. These small pliers pack a punch. Built tough, and I use them all the time.
If you have a rotator cuff strain or injury these are a great way to rehab yourself.
Ok, but not the quality of orbeez. They fall apart easily and do not hold up. After 48 hrs in a bin they started to smell
Had mine six months, worn it constantly, still looks new. Tough material holds up great.

Poppit what?! Cheap and doesn't work. The clay does not pop out of cheap plastic bottle like picture shows. There isn't even all the tools that it shows on package. My daughter used the clay and decorations and could have just bought her molding clay. There should be a law against selling toys that don't do what they say on package. Would give 0 stars if possible!!

thank you, Mr. Grisham, for the realistic portrayal of a child torn apart and manipulated not only by the mob but by the federal government. it just goes to show that us kids are still the most vunerable in life. scary for me as a young girl, but exciting and eloquent. again, thank you.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no dents. Smaller than I expected for the price, but the pieces look solid and my kid dove right in.
Decent activity for a rainy afternoon. I'd recommend it for ages 6 and up, anything younger and they lose interest fast.

Billy Elliot is an 11 year old who does poorly in the boxing ring but surprisingly well in ballet class (meeting with the boxers because of building shuffling needed during a coal miners strike). This is the classic "family doesn't initially understand," "teacher believes in him," "screws up audition but spirit carries him through" type movie. It's put together quite nicely, and you never really know how it is going to turn out. The transition from ballet dancing to tap/jazz seemed to happen in one day, which seemed jarring. The beginning of Swan Lake, with Billy as the lead and family and friends in attendance, 10 years or so later, was a real "feel good" part of the movie.
I appreciate the variety and new recipes this book offered but it just wasn't what I expected so maybe my expectations where too high or different to appreciate what was offered.

Fantastic product. A lot of complaints about wrinkles, but I have never opened a fabric item package and have it come out looking ironed. You will have to iron creases. Very good quality. I would buy again.

Binged this in one sitting! The world-building is incredible, every detail feels vivid and real without bogging down the pace. The cliffhanger ending caught me off guard though. Need the next installment ASAP!

Everything went without a hitch with the seller but I just wish this mat was bigger than what it is. Probably my fault for not paying attention to the size but I hate when I get out of the tub and I stand on it and it doesn't cover all the water dripping off of me on the mat. Other than that I like how absorbent it is.
Very impressed with the quality. Its a great size bag and durable.
Terrific and easy to use thermostat. I really like the touch screen functions. Very easy to set up and use and change if needed. Has worked flawlessly for several years.
This cable does not work as an Oculus HDMI headset extension cable. The headset flickered. I ended up having to use a different cable.

Cute, functional, and fits easily in my car. I have two of these Sherpas. My dogs seem to prefer traveling in these versus a larger crate in my car. These bags must be comfortable for 10 pound dogs, because my dogs were very quiet and calm while riding in them for six hours. No whining, crying, or Benedryl.... These bags are very easy to carry, very easy to load the dog into, and appear to be well made. The purple color is crazy cute, too.
Perfect size for my growing pacman frog. He's only a few months old but he loves his new pool. Will likely fit fine as an adult, but we'll see

Arrived a day earlier than expected and the box was in great shape, no dents or crushed corners. Inside, the thermometer unit was snug in a molded tray so nothing was rattling around. First impression out of the box was decent, the screen is a good size and the probes feel sturdy enough, not flimsy wire. Buttons have a positive click when you press them. I plugged everything in and it powered right up. The preset temp options for beef and poultry are handy. I've only used it once so far on a roast and both probes gave consistent readings within a degree of each other. Wish the cord length was a little longer for my deep oven but overall I'm satisfied with the purchase.

I've had this ebook on my Kindle for about eight months now, reading it on and off during commutes and trips. The digital formatting has held up well through countless page turns and syncs across devices, no glitchy chapters or weird spacing issues that plague some indie titles. The story itself is decent. The romance builds naturally and the writing style is easy to follow, though the pacing drags in the middle section. I found myself skimming a few chapters around the 60% mark. The ending tied things up nicely but felt a bit predictable if you've read much in this genre. Not a bad way to pass time on a flight, just don't expect anything groundbreaking. I'd probably read more from this author down the road.

Oh, gosh, I can't believe it's taken me this long to write a review. Thought I had. I've searched endlessly for a toy my dog wouldn't destroy (an entire stuffed monkey arm and a big red clown-like stuffed dog nose emerged intact from his butt, scarcely changed by the journey and thankfully without having harmed him. Thought I'd found an answer with a couple of Tuffy toys, which he wouldn't touch and I had to give away. But he's had this football for months and he plays with it from time to time and enjoys sucking on it. I guess that's the most I can hope for.

Got this for my daughter's bedroom and she's obsessed. Holds a ton of cosmetics and the mirror is a nice size. Took maybe twenty minutes to put together. Would definitely recommend to anyone with a big makeup collection.

This was book #2 in the Grass Valley series and just as wonderful as the first! Half the time was laughing my butt off and the other half I just wanted to hug poor Trent. A wonderful love story I very much loved reading.

OMG!!!!! This ballerina doll is beyond precious. It even looks better in person than it did online. The perfect size, so soft, and her little outfit is perfect. My 3 1/2 year old granddaughter loved it. She takes it to ballerina class with her.
Perfect for us. One granddaughter loves pink, the other granddaughter loves yellow. That leaves blue one for grandmas house. Great for timing tooth brushing!

These work perfectly alone or joined together. The unit has a metal piece that is removable on the back so when you are taking your food out you can sit the lid on it. Not needing to put it down on a counter. Very easy to clean. Very well made nice quality construction. The only negative thing I can say is on the dial there is only an indentation to mark if you have it on low warm or off. I quickly resolved that by putting a little bit of white out in the indentation and that is working perfectly. These are available in different sizes. I have purchased many Bella products and I have always been completely satisfied. Always a good price for great quality.

Bought this for my grandson's birthday and he plays with it every single day. That was eight months ago and it still looks brand new despite being dropped on the floor constantly. Really impressed with the quality.
For the price you can't go wrong. My kids haven't stopped playing with these.
They work fine now for 6 months, would give 5 stars but recipes are horrible.

I bought my first set of these headphones about a year ago. I was able to look past the annoyingly long right ear wire because they do have excellent sound quality. I used them mainly at the gym and noticed that after being on the treadmill for a few minutes that the combination of sweat and the weight of the cord would pull the left earpiece out. I tried all 3 rubber sizes but was constantly pushing that left piece back in. Also, when lifting weights I run the cord under my shirt and found that the thick rubber piece where the right and left earphones split would catch my shirt and again pull the left earpiece out, even more often than while running. This was annoying, but I would still have rated these 4 stars because walking my dog or listening in bed these were the best phones I ever heard. I bought 2 other pairs as Christmas presents last year, and now all 3 pairs have failed in one ear. I tried re-soldering the wires and got 2 of them to work again, who knows for how long. I have switched to a pair of Ultimate Ears and the quality is even better, hopefully these will last longer.

Got these for night rides and they've been solid. Super easy to stretch over my seat post and they stay put even on bumpy trails. The beam angle is angled just right so cars can actually see me coming. Lightweight enough that I forget they're there.
Perfect gift for any sci-fi fan who loves character-driven drama.

It isn't easy for Zac, coming of age in a small Missouri town in the 1960s. People think hes slow. Thats not true, but he would rather they thought that than know the truth. While the other boys are discovering the charms of the opposite sex, Zac realizes he has it bad for a slightly older neighbor boy, Rory. Zac escapes into his own world of drawings and fantasies. Art of the Heart is a bittersweet coming of age story.
