Occasionally she'll just kind of pick it up and shake it. She's hit into it more times than she's actually played with it so it's probably done more harm than good in the 2 months I've owned it!

Mine is the Night by Liz Curtis Higgs is set in historic Scotland in the 1700 circa and based on the book of Ruth. I had not read other book before reading "Mine is the Night", but I really don't think it mattered. I had a hard time getting into the book at first. It took me several chapters before I really started enjoying it, but once I got into it I loved it and had a hard time putting it down. Now it may have just been me and not having a lot of time to put into it at first and not just the material itself. The author did an excellent job of researching the area and the subject material. It is a true love story: a daughter-in-laws love for her mother-in-law but mostly her love of God. She devoted her life to God and He led her paths and because of her devotion she was blessed beyond anything she could imagine. The characters were real and believable, the setting was beautifully described and the story was wonderful. The book was pretty long to read and took me a while to get through it but part of that was the limited amount of time I had to spend on it. Although it was long after the first few chapters it kept my attention and drew me in. This is the first book I have read by Liz Curtis Higgs but it will not be my last. She is truly an amazing author. If you love historical romance novels you will love this one and you must put it on your list of great books to read. This book was provided to me by Waterbrook/Multnomah for free in exchange for an honest review.

I was hoping that I could pin my baseball jersey to the inside. There is no felt to pin the jersey down and had to use the hanger...not a fan of that look. However, the frame is nice and well made. I wold buy this again if I wanted the jersey to hang at the top.

The read speeds on this thing are seriously impressive. I regularly move 30GB video files for work and it handles them without breaking a sweat. My one gripe is the physical size. It's wide enough that I can't use my adjacent USB port while this is plugged in, which is annoying on my laptop where ports are already tight. Had to buy a short extension cable just to work around it. Great performance though, just plan around the bulkiness.
So many facts of a time in the UK if done differently could have lost the war and of the man who saw it so clearly and was right. Well worth the time to read.

Seems bright on max and at that level should work well for plants. But the 24/7 option is ridiculous. You'll have light on your tank for like 16 hours at some level or another and half the time the light is dim. Cant beat the price though.
Sharp is an understatement! Didn't realize I cut my self taking them out of the box. Shoot great fly just like my field points.

None of my 3 cats likes these Lysine supplement chews. They are definitely NOT soft and need to be broken up into smaller pieces. I threw the product away and will stick with the Lysine gel and an empty syringe (just ask your pharmacist for one...they're usually free).

The premise hooked me but the execution really let me down. Way too much time spent on unnecessary background and scenes that went nowhere. I kept waiting for the plot to actually move forward and it just... didn't. By the halfway point I was honestly only finishing it out of stubbornness. The dialogue had its moments but not enough to save the overall experience. Wouldn't recommend unless you have a lot of patience.

The hero of this novella was perfect. He was romantic, masculine, loving, etc. and so I read this story mostly to get to his happily ever after. The heroine was annoying. I'm a little tired of the cliche storyline where the woman doesn't want to get involved with cop/firefighter/generic hero because of the possibility of future loss. It's a bit over the top and has been done many times over. My biggest issue with the heroine is that she would leave her husband without any explanation. Who would do that? And why would he want her back. But, this is a romance so the play acting that they have to do in front of the heroine's family is funny and there is a happily ever after.
Fits well. Just a plain black pump. Not especially stylish but fits my need for a plain black pump.

Stellar product. Bought for use with a Surface Pro 4.. had to futz a bit with the video drivers on the surface.. but once I fixed it, this has worked flawlessly. the quality is amazing. Theoretically, any Miracast capable device, i.e. an Intel processor with video of recent vintage (<2 years) should work with it, but I have yet to test this. Basically, your device creates a direct WiFi connection over 2.4ghz to the device itself.. thus the connectivity is a dedicated network using a streamlined protocol..the result is, or Screen Sharing, it runs circles around Chromecast, DLNA and even AppleTV which all attach to the network and packets/data are pushed over tcp/ip.

Came fast I think I ordered it early in the week and it was here by the end. I ordered mine with the 100g weight for recalibration. I feel for the price I paid this thing is great and with the test/recalibration weight even better I also like how it has all the instruction right on the lid. I have owned others and the where about the same, I've used it from everything from rocks, herb, mail, and anything else I might have needed it for. What I was looking for the money.
I SPECIFICLLY PURCHASE WILD LIFE CONSERVATION CRITTERS AS THEIR VERY WELL MADE AND MENTION IN A PARAGRAPH ABOUT THE ANIMAL.

This is a great ball for all ages - I purchased it for a four year old's birthday and it was a hit. I have to say, I went looking all over the ball for directions and you don't need any. Just throw the ball and it flips to the different colored side as if by magic. And it makes a very satisfying sound. It is light enough for a kid to throw and there isn't a requirement to twist or turn any special way, so they won't get frustrated.

I'm disappointed with this 3pack of batgirl cycle,Batcycle, &Batmobile I feel I over payed too much for little vehicles the Batcycle I already have it and I only paid $10 for it the, so how can this 3pack come out to $117 is unbelievable just because it has a backdrop of a batcave its not even THE batcave of the tv series the batgirl cycle it's only worth about $15 if they sold it separately.the problem I have with this 3pack it didn't even say the scale so I fell for it,but now I know better to be more careful how I pick my items
THIS is a very good second book to the series. I am anxiously waiting for the third.

Love these pants! So comfortable with lots of room. I have purchased 4 pairs of these pants over the last year or so and they are by far my most favorite dress pants. They look great right out of the dryer and sheds wrinkles easily. The expanding waist is very comfortable and the pleats are very professional looking. These pants also breathe well and stay cool on warmer days.
Arrived two days early in neat, resealable packaging. Pulled it out and was impressed by how soft and well-stitched the material felt. Slipped right onto my pup with zero fuss.

Used these for a kitchen pantry overhaul and honestly didn't expect much for the price. The soft-close feature is what sold me, and it actually works really well. No more slammed drawers in the morning. Installation took some fiddling since the mounting holes didn't line up perfectly with my old ones, but once I got the first drawer dialed in, the rest went quick. I've got six heavy drawers loaded with canned goods and these slides handle the weight without sagging or sticking. The full extension is great too, can actually reach the back of the drawer without doing that awkward reach-and-grab thing. Been about four months now, no issues. Definitely recommend if you don't want to fork over the ridiculous prices at the hardware store.

Got this mainly because my old shower speaker died and I wanted something that could actually handle the steam without cutting out. The suction cup mount is surprisingly solid, slapped it on the tile once and it hasn't budged through two weeks of hot showers. Sound quality is way better than I expected for the price. Bass won't blow you away but vocals and mids come through clean even over the water noise. Battery life is the real standout though. I've been using it daily for about nine days and still haven't charged it. The controls on the front are easy to hit with wet hands, which sounds minor but trust me, it matters. For under twenty bucks this thing punches well above its weight.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this stuff is legit. The insulation is thick and strips easily without gunking up, and the copper strands are solid, not that flimsy stuff that snaps when you look at it wrong. Ran it behind my cabinets to link two runs of LED tape and there's zero dimming at the far end. Local big box wanted double for similar gauge. Showed up next day which beat standing in the aisles. Way better than I anticipated and I'll probably grab another spool for the basement setup.
Good product for the cost. Good sound quality, folds easily and can be used a variety of settings.

This is part of the Families War? series. War in the far future with a slightly strange group of heroines. A fast pasted and interesting story. A neat series of technologies that make everything sound possible.

Picked this up not expecting much and was genuinely surprised. The banter between the leads had me laughing out loud more than once. Way better than most stuff in this genre lately. Finished it in one sitting.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no crushed corners. My daughter ripped it open immediately and hasn't put it down since. The colors are vibrant and it feels solid. Just wish the hinge clicked into place more securely.

I bought three of these Clementine Designs fan pulls for my screened-in porch and I'm genuinely impressed with how they turned out. The colors are super vibrant and the detail on each one is way better than I expected for the price. They feel solid, not flimsy or cheap like the big box store versions I've replaced. The gold chain is a nice touch and actually looks great against my bronze fan hardware. Installation took about two minutes total, seriously easy. I'd absolutely recommend these to anyone decorating a beach house, sunroom, or kid's room. They add such a fun personal touch without being tacky. Already planning to order a couple more for the ceiling fan in my guest bedroom. Really happy with this purchase overall.

These have been out of print for years and the US editions currently cost around $200. It's nice to find the imported version going for a reasonable price. This has all of the Magnificent World 1 & 2, which is a light hearted comic anime series. It was popular enough to spawn two other series: El-Hazard The Alternative World and El-Hazard The Wanderers; but it's Magnificent World that started it all. This version is an imported edition, so don't expect the fancy box or slip covers that came with the US version, but the content inside on the discs is the same. This is all 11 episodes from Magnificent World 1 & 2. (1 was 7, 2 was 4)

that's all I can say. love erotica. love all kinds. this was just dumb. Tacky and trashy came to mind and not the fun kind. forced myself to speed read through it to get to the other stories in the boxed set.
Bags are way too heavy. This product should be made in 28 lbs or less. I could. Arely pour it in the catbox or move it.

Bought this GPS puck for use with my laptop running navigation software while surveying rural properties. The real standout is how fast it locks onto satellites, usually under ten seconds even in heavy tree cover. I was expecting dropouts walking through dense woods but the connection stayed rock solid the entire time. The magnetic base clamps tight to my truck roof and hasn't budged at highway speeds. Plug and play on Windows 10 with no driver headaches. Worth every penny.

This is simply the best religious film, and one of the best films of any kind ever made. It is far away the best treatment of Jesus' life on film. I like the dubbed version because of the excellent quality of Enrico Maria Salerno's voice as Christ. This film has one of the most effective uses of music on film, and the direction is pure poetry. It also remains faithful to the words and emotional feel of Matthew's gospel, and it captures nuances from the other gospels as well. I have been disappointed with other transfers of this film to DVD, but this one works the best for me.

Bought this to connect my work laptop to an older Dell monitor that only has DVI input. Set it up in seconds and it worked immediately with no drivers or fiddling around. The picture quality is sharp with no flickering or signal drops, which I was worried about since my monitor is 1080p. The cable feels sturdy and the connectors fit snugly into both ports without any wobbling. Length is perfect for my desk setup too. Definitely cheaper than buying a new monitor just to get HDMI. Been using it daily for about two months now with zero issues. Highly recommend if you need a reliable adapter cable.

Great story about changing your life for the better! This is a total different character set from Hustle Me, so reading order doesn't matter. Many tears, lots of laughs, and the desire to kill the soon to be ex husband! And now a bit about the story.... Ramsey has lost his family to a horrible accident and wishes he would have died with them. Vessa has just found out her husband not only cheated again, but has been doing it since they got married and now he has some young woman pregnant. After losing her temper for the last time, she withdrawals their money from the bank and moves it to another bank before heading to her aunt's house. On the way she encounters a tractor trailer on its side and a collision follows. When Ramsey gets called to the accident that mirrors the one that took his family he isn't sure he can handle it! Enjoy as fate steps in to help these two move on. Favorite passages: - She told me that this life on earth was just a test for us to go to heaven. She said that the true at heart die young because they don't need to live the trial like others. - This trip was about being able to forgive myself. - With you by my side, each day hurts less than the one before it.
For what I paid this was a total steal. Hilarious and raunchy without going overboard. Already watched twice and sharing with coworkers tomorrow.
Bought these six months ago, still look brand new despite daily toddler abuse.
Our 4 year old Batman loving nephew was very excited with this Batman book. The presentation and cover are very exciting - great book and gift!

Got this for my three year old's birthday and she's obsessed. The size is great, not too tiny like some sets, actual kid-scale cups she can hold properly. Spills happen but that's expected. The pink floral design is really pretty and feels sturdy enough to survive drops on our kitchen floor. My only complaint is the lid on the teapot pops off super easy, which frustrates her. I'd absolutely recommend this for kids 2.5 to 5 who are into pretend kitchen stuff. Good gift option too.
Thought this would be another restrictive fad diet, but the recipes are actually doable and the grocery list is super practical.

I bought this for weekend hiking trips and it's been solid so far. The filter clicks into place pretty securely, though I do keep an eye on it since it's not threaded. Water tastes clean and the flow rate is decent for a filter bottle. The carry loop on the lid is convenient for clipping to my pack with a carabiner. My only real concern is the lid material feels a bit brittle if it took a hard fall on rocks. I'd recommend this to day hikers and backpackers who want a lightweight filtration option without spending a fortune. Just don't be rough with it and you'll be fine. For the price, it gets the job done.

Expected this to fully waterproof my suede boots based on the listing, but it's more water-resistant than anything. Light mist beads up fine, but heavier exposure still soaks through after a bit. Coverage is decent, I got two full pairs treated with one can. Drying time was quick and didn't leave any marks or discoloration, which I appreciated. The spray pattern itself worked okay for me, no major issues there. Overall it's fine for everyday wear if you're not planning to stomp through puddles. Just don't expect full waterproofing. For the price, I think it does an acceptable job, just temper your expectations before buying.
I guess you get what you pay for broke after it fell maybe two feet once. My own fault.
I use these in my salon for applying eyelash perms and tints. I love the blue one it's so cute and matches my salon!! Just wish it had an off button. But doesn't die quickly.
A must read for anyone. A lovely story indeed, even if the writer is not Pullitzer bound.

I literally could not put this down and blew through the whole thing in two days. The dynamic between the three main characters is so layered and complex that it puts most romance novels to shame. It's not for everyone though, if you're easily shocked or looking for vanilla romance, skip this one. But if you're someone who loves emotionally intense, boundary-pushing fiction with characters who feel like real people, this is absolutely for you. I've already bought copies for two of my friends who I know can handle it. The writing itself is gorgeous, sharp, funny, and heartbreaking all at once. Just go in knowing what you're getting into. Already counting down to the next installment.

Great movie... years ago I bought the DVD of these movies, they had 5.1 sound. I bought this for the 1080p quality but these are only 2 channel... What happened...? I would not buy this if you are like me and want the HD experience...
Perfect fit for my remote. Lasted months without needing a swap.

The sole started separating from the toe box after barely three weeks of light walking. For the price, the build quality is unacceptable. Even cheap drugstore sneakers hold up better than this. Saving the box didn't help with the flimsy construction.

Picked this up on a Kindle deal for like two bucks so I can't complain too much about the price. The premise had promise and the world-building kept me going for the first half. Somewhere around the middle it started dragging and I found myself putting it down for days at a time. The writing is decent enough, just pacing issues really. Finished it over a long weekend and the last few chapters actually surprised me in a good way. For what I paid it was an okay way to pass the time. Would I buy the sequel at full price? Probably not. But on sale again, maybe.
Bought this for my home theater setup and couldn't be happier with the performance.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing blew me away. The dual thumb studs make it super easy to open one-handed from either side, which is way better than the single-sided setup on my old EDC. The rubberized handle feels solid without being sticky or catching on my jeans when I pull it out. The seatbelt cutter sits right where your palm rests so it's not in the way but instantly accessible. The glass breaker pokes out the end and feels like actual steel, not some flimsy afterthought. Blade came sharp enough to slice paper right out of the box. Torx hardware lets you adjust tension which is a nice touch at this price point. Way better than I expected.

While this is a great book for young readers, especially boys, the plot is taken directly from Shogun. While the names have been changed, and the main character is now the son of a pilot--instead of the pilot himself, it is a retelling of Clavell's novel. Don't get me wrong, I like it, I've just read it before. The books are quick to read, fast paced, but not great literature and not in the same class as harry Potter. Enjoy them, they are good clean fun.
This is great. Good reception of AM or FM and muffles the sound of my riding lawn mower so hearing damage is minimized.

This stuff is the worst quality I ever had. I am a sider (construction worker), and it last about two hours, before it get holes.. Similar gloves I get from Chinese store (for half price) last for 1 day. Don't waste your money!!!!

Arrived two days early in perfect condition with no damaged corners on the box. Pulled it out and immediately fell in love with how soft the fur feels. The rolling action works great right out of the package. Adorable little thing.

I do! The right size, the right features, excellent quality. The knife itself is solid and is not threatening in a tactical knife sense. People are fascinated by this whenever I produce it from my pocket for use. The unique appaerance of the blade is really quite cool, and also as you know (I hope) quite a functional plus. It is light enough and has a profile slim enough to sit in the pocket unobtrusively. I like the fact that you can open it via a flipper motion or by the thumb stud. I also found the same knife with a black handle and with the Damascus steel blade because I like this one so much.
It will be for a present, but look comfortable and ok about the size

Couldn't believe the price on this compared to OEM replacements. Fits my Milwaukee perfectly and locks down solid with no play at all. I like that they throw in all the mounting hardware so you don't have to guess which version you need. The construction feels sturdy enough for daily job site abuse and I haven't noticed any deflection even when ripping wider stock. For what these cost you really can't go wrong. Saved myself forty bucks over the factory part and honestly can't tell the difference.

I'd recommend this biopic to anyone who loves martial arts films or just enjoys a good true story. It does a fantastic job showing the personal struggles Bruce faced while trying to break through Hollywood's ridiculous racial barriers of the era. The fight choreography is surprisingly good for a drama, and the chemistry between the leads feels genuine. My husband and I watched it over the weekend and were both completely absorbed. If you only know Bruce Lee from Enter the Dragon, this gives you a whole new appreciation for what he actually went through.

Bought this on a whim and ended up reading it in one sitting. The mystery kept me guessing the whole way through, and I loved how the wedding subplot tied everything together. Characters felt real and the pacing was spot on. Definitely recommending this to my book club next month.
Good size, a few different settings, and even has a little light to it which helps out at night.
Does what it says for the price. Nothing fancy but works fine.

I really enjoyed the slow burn between the two leads. What grabbed me most was how the author handled Emma's backstory, the way her past catches up with her felt realistic rather than forced. Aleksander's protective instincts didn't come across as overbearing either, which I appreciated. The pacing in the middle dragged a bit for me. There's a chunk where not much happens before the tension ramps back up. But once the suspense kicks in, it's hard to put down. The last few chapters had me staying up way too late. Not my favorite in the series but still a solid addition. Would recommend reading the earlier books first for context.

This book is awesome!! I would recommend this book for any and everybody to read. For this to be her first book, I think that she did a great job. Karma was a handful and I can't wait for part two. King is Bae!!! You did Great Azari!!!! I couldn't put this book down no matter how hard I tried.
Totally exceeded my expectations. Battery lasts forever and it's super convenient to toss in my gym bag.
This was a cute story but at times the writing made me feel they were younger than they were written. Just my opinion.
Shirt is awesome. I used this brand before but feels a bit short. I'm 6ft, felt like it was 1-2 inches too short.
Way overpriced for what you get. The leather feels paper-thin and there's zero hardware to actually connect it to anything. Total waste.
Excellent Danish series! Great characters and good plots. Wish American TV crime drama was this good.

Bought this for my morning commute and it mostly does the job. Holds a decent amount of coffee and looks great on my desk. The outside does warm up quite a bit with hot liquid inside, so keep that in mind. Lid fits securely and hasn't given me any trouble. Overall pretty satisfied with it.

Just as described, this little penguin is a perfect worry-free plush toy for baby. I do not have to worry about any buttons, glass eyes, plastic pieces, etc, being chewed off, and the smaller size is safe, comforting, and also easy for transport. My baby loves it.

These are very nice and as close as I could find to a beloved pair of ACORN slippers that I bought a few years ago. These are not as sturdy feeling as that paid but still this is a great slipper. It feels almost like a shoe, so you are not shuffling around in it like floppy slippers.
Got a flat on my commuter bike and didn't want to spend a fortune at the shop. This tube was cheap and took me five minutes to swap in myself. Been riding two weeks, holding air perfectly.

Got this collection for practically nothing and it's worth way more. Seven quick reads about couples navigating spanking dynamics, some made me laugh out loud, others got pretty steamy. Each story wraps up properly with no annoying unresolved endings. Perfect for reading on your lunch break. Wish they were a bit longer but can't complain at this price point.
Box arrived slightly crushed but markers were intact. Nice variety of shades, though way too many light pinks and yellows. My kids seem to like them okay.
Very nice. I was sure glad to get this product. My dogs were scratching me terribly!

I own a Marines Airsoft SR01 Spring Powered Rifle by Crosman, and have owned a Soft Air Foreign Legion's Famas Spring Powered Airsoft Rifle (piece of junk, don't get that rifle), and decided to get this to replace the Famas, which broke. This gun feels very flimsy.....it's working fine, but I wouldn't give this gun to a kid, I don't think it'll handle abuse well. While other reviewers claim this gun is powerful, mine isn't, at least compared to my Crosman. I can penetrate cardboard with my Crosman from a few yards away; this gun can only penetrate cardboard at point blank range. Also, the hop up in this gun is crooked, so all my shots deviate to the right. It's consistent, but still kind of irritating, considering that my Crosman, which costs about the same, shoots straight. Overall, the Crosman Marines airsoft rifle is the best one out there in the cheaper/entry level airsoft guns, so if you're getting one, get the Crosman and pass on this.

OMG 19 books later & still no where, who writes this & more who actually proof reads it? I'm no literary genius, but it's written from a teenagers perspective or at least that is how it appears to me I have gotten to the point of no return I cannot possibly read one more. I have to be left, just hanging total "waste" of money & time, I am ashamed to my core, DONE!!!
The author tried to make the mystery/romance novel cute, but I could not really get into the book. Would not really recommend.

Had this paperback for about eight months now, read it twice and lent it to two friends. Still holding up great, spine isn't cracked or falling apart like a lot of music bios tend to after heavy use. Lydon's storytelling is sharp and funny throughout. Really enjoyed the PiL chapters especially, loads of studio details I hadn't heard anywhere else. Wore out my last copy of Rotten years ago, this one's built to last. Glad I picked it up.
Worked right out of the box. Better quality than I expected for the price.

I needed a 2-in-1 for work and didn't want to spend Surface money, so I took a chance on this Acer. Really glad I did. The keyboard clicks on securely and the kickstand holds steady on my lap, which was a concern. Performance has been smooth for everyday tasks and even some light photo editing. Battery gets me through a full workday. Screen looks crisp and colors are accurate. For the price, you're getting a lot of machine. No regrets at all.

Once again I enjoyed another part of this story from Jennifer Malone Wright. A good twist in this book, I did not see that coming at all. I'm not going to leave any spoilers in this review, I'm simply going to reiterate that I really enjoy these books. There were very few errors in this too. Looking forward to The Arcadia Falls Chronicles book #2! Bring it on! Review by Sarah, Owner/Manager of Fae Books

The images themself are fun, but the printing is poor. It appears they were printed in layers of blues, reds and yellows to make each ocean animal image, but the printing didn't overlap perfectly to make a crisp picture. You can see a bit of each primary color around the edges of each animal, thus making the finer details (like eyes and little fins) fuzzy. There were also thin black lines streaking thru the images. Also, these 13 images are printed on two large plastic sheets (like a plastic table cloth), so you need to cut them apart with scissors. I thought I was getting a ready-to-use product, and it added unanticipated time.

Couldn't believe the quality for what I paid. Local shops wanted triple the price for the exact same part. Took maybe ten minutes to install and it's been running flawlessly since. Honestly wasn't expecting much at this price point but totally proved me wrong.

I upgraded my desktop computer because the video card I was using was considerably outdated, and I couldn't even burn DVDs because it was so old. I wanted something inexpensive, but powerful enough to run most video applications. This card integrated perfectly with my computer, even though I only have a X-press 1.0 slot instead of a 2.0. I tested it on YouTube with an HD (1080) video running full resolution and full-screen the quality was flawless; the only lag and jitter was from my Internet connection. The GPU even works with BOINC and helps my computer crunch data. A great card for a wonderful price.

I liked the books storyline and the couple very much. Monique and Oliver were very likable and I really liked them being together. I did not like his friend Felicity and how he kept her around. They were great when they were together.

Watched this on Amazon streaming and enjoyed watching it. Not a movie that I would buy (I usually only buy movies I "love"), but it was worth the rental fee. It had an Interesting story, I would recommend watching it.

Used this on my lab for about three months and it's already falling apart. The stitching along the chest strap started fraying after just a few weeks, and now there's a noticeable tear near the buckle. For the price, I expected way better longevity. It fit fine at first and seemed well-made out of the box, but it just doesn't hold up to daily use. The padding has also compressed so much that it offers basically no protection anymore. Really disappointed considering how many good things I'd heard about this brand.

This was purchased for my 4 year old grandson who is getting interested in board games and we are trying to have him play more with games that you are inter active with friends and family. He is quite competitive so this was perfect.

I'm going to start this review with an honest confession: if I needed a wet/dry vac on a regular basis, I would probably rate this product much lower. But, I don't need one very often - consequently, this style is ideal and rates a four star as related to my needs. 1) It doesn't take up a lot of space. Because it just snaps onto the top of a bucket, there is no need to store a full apparatus. This simply stays in a plastic tub with several other resources, ready to be pulled out. 2) The needed bucket is a very commonplace one. You're not going to get this and be annoyed because you don't have just the right bucket - unless, of course, the bucket you own is a rather odd one in the first place. 3) It's very easy to use, Just snap the motor onto the bucket, put the hose in place, and you're ready to go. 4) The suction is good. Strong enough to suck a wet spot dry. So, are there negatives? Yes, even for my usage, there are a few negatives to this product. 1) The power cord is short. Either pull out an extension cord, or deal with limited access. The hose is also short, but that's only relevant if you have issues getting the bucket close enough to the mess needing to be cleaned up. 2) The hose needs to be attached before the motor is connected to the bucket. Not because that's order of operations, but because the two openings are not labeled. 3) They dry vac bag is rather small. Since this is considered useful for sucking debris that's a little too large for a normal vacuum, the collection bag could be a bit bigger. I can think of several past household situations - leaks, washer issues, plumbing problems, etc. - when this would have been a handy tool. Not enough to need a full-fledged wet vac, but enough that something like this would have been worth having around.
too long in the body, very very tight and prefer a higher cut leg. item fine, just my personal taste. item returned.

They arrived tossed in a thin plastic mailer with zero protection, so the shoe box was completely crushed and one side was split open. Honestly looked like somebody stepped on it. The shoes themselves were shoved flat inside, totally creased across the toe. They feel stiffer than I expected right out of the box and the arch support is basically nonexistent, which is frustrating since that's the main reason I picked these. Color is slightly off too, more of a dull grey than the white shown online. Disappointing first impression overall, still deciding if I want to bother returning them.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this little camera exceeded all my expectations. My four year old son carries it everywhere we go. The buttons are perfectly sized for small hands and the picture quality is way better than I thought it'd be. Totally worth it.

I bought this specific speaker because of the FM mode that way I can save some battery while listening at work. Many other reviewers mentioned the radio on the same exact model I have and it's not available on mine. I believe it was removed. Also the nasal voice informing you that the speaker is on, what mode it's on and that bluetooth is paired is bit annoying. Turning the volume all the way up will make a loud beeping sound letting you know you on max volume. The sound is really good though. Very loud and crisp.

This set is cut, but I don't understand why Maui has hard plastic hair while Moana has regular hair like the barbies. If you watch behind the scenes video, you'll see how the movie company's research found that Maui's hair was very important to the Demi God, so why make the hair fake? Anyway, my kid loves this set and it is very cute. Any little Moana Princess or lover will really enjoy this set.

Swapped out all the old can lights in my kitchen with these and what a huge improvement. The color is clean and bright without feeling harsh. They fired right up with no flickering and fit perfectly. My whole space feels more updated and inviting now. Really glad I went with these.

Bought this for chilly mornings and it's become my go-to. The material feels substantial without being bulky, and the adjustable neck is a nice touch. Runs slightly fitted, which I love. I'd definitely recommend it to anyone wanting a cozy layer that still looks put-together. Sized up as usual and it was perfect.

These are a perfect compliment to the S&W M&P. The stock sights on the M&P are very good but these made picking up the sight picture so much easier. The installation was easy and only took 15 minutes. The dots are bight and easy to pick up. The price was great, these are Trijicons. If you have an M&P you cannot go wrong getting these.
Long time needed product that replaced a regular mitt. I have no problem holding pans fresh out the oven but that does not mean they're burn resistant obviously.

I've had this sitting on my nightstand for about six months now and finally got around to finishing it last week. The paperback has held up surprisingly well considering I've been carting it back and forth to work in my bag, tossed it in the car, and even spilled coffee on the cover. Spine is still intact, no loose pages. The story itself is a lighter read compared to his heavier stuff. Took me a while to get into the groove of it, but once I stopped expecting some big twist everything clicked. Not his strongest work honestly, but entertaining enough for my lunch breaks. Would've liked more from the ending, felt a bit rushed. Still glad I picked it up.

King Hall is the first book in this paranormal romance series. If you like Elementals, vampires, mages and shifters this is the book for you. The four mystical prodigies Ezra, Pearl, Jack and Lily are the future kings and queens and they have some wicked powers. There is action, love, loss and an amazing friendship in this story. I loved the way they bonded always being there for each other no matter what. The story was easy to read. There were some great twists in the story keeping you on edge always wanting to find out what happens next. And Scarlett ends this first book with a great cliffhanger and I hope she doesn't keep us waiting to long for book two. I am definitely looking forward to continuing the story and finding out what happens next.
Interesting ideas throughout but it didn't quite come together for me. Some chapters really dragged and the main thesis felt underdeveloped. Gladwell fans might still enjoy it.

I'm a sucker for shifter romance and this one really delivered. What I liked most was the slow burn aspect, the male lead actually respects boundaries and waits instead of rushing in like a caveman. Too many books in this genre have the alpha going full possessive creep right away, so the restraint here was refreshing. The tension between the two rival packs builds nicely and the fight scenes near the end had me glued to my Kindle. My only tiny gripe is I wanted more page time for the couple actually together rather than apart, but that's a personal preference. The writing flows well and the world-building is solid without being overwhelming. Already grabbed the next book in the series. If you like mate bonds done right, pick this up.
Love it. Got it for the Note 10.1 2014. Love the many angles to adjust the screen. All ports and buttons are available while in the case. High quality and secure.
Strong construction, easy to use. Suggestion on use, make sure that when you insert the tip that you stay outside the tape. Taper the insertion at a slight angle away from the tape.
I have not used it much yet, however the well for catching juices is very deep which is what I was looking for.
Great when in the ocean and in the swimming pool. Phone stayed dry.

Book arrived in a padded mailer with no bent corners, which I always appreciate. The cover art caught my eye immediately and the premise sounded like a fun weekend read. Started it the same night it showed up and ended up staying way too late. Main character's dating misadventures had me laughing out loud more than once. Exactly the lighthearted escape I was hoping for. Would definitely recommend.
Bought these as stocking stuffers for my two indoor cats and they went absolutely nuts. The catnip potency is legit and the small size is perfect for batting around. Durable little toys too.
Fell apart after two weeks of regular use. Cheaply made and completely overpriced. Save your money.
Great MC romance with badass bikers and steamy scenes. Highly recommend!

my two cats LOVE these and i think the texture of the treat itself actually does "brush" their teeth some: each piece has a tight skin, like a sausage casing, so their teeth have to puncture the skin first, which i think is a great start and simulates natural tooth-cleaning textures they would find in nature. inside, the treat is dry and brittle, so as they chew, little flakes splinter apart perpendicular to the tooth surface, and i really imagine that this is as close to tooth-brushing as a treat can get. in addition to this effective texture, there are ingredients that are designed to reduce plaque enzymatically and (temporarily) increase oral pH to inhibit bacterial growth. the ingredients list for these treats is much shorter than other dental treats, and i think much more natural, safe, and healthy. my cats get one treat each, once after breakfast and once after dinner. they both go nuts at treat time and one of them runs all the way to the other side of the apartment to eat his treat so that the other can't steal it. the only problem is that now i have to deal with them milling around the cabinet where i keep the treats. i buy the poultry flavor because i don't like to give my cats a lot of fish, but these are a fish based treat regardless which flavor you buy, and they smell VERY fishy. i don't think there is much point in choosing a flavor, so if one is cheaper than the other or on sale then just buy the cheaper flavor.
Like the idea of putting treat inside the toy, but for bigger dogs (Rott) she chewed right threw it.

Bought this for my son's sports-themed bedroom. The stitching on the panels is surprisingly clean for the price, though the leather feels a bit slick. Displays nicely on his shelf either way. Good value overall.
Been using this strap three times a week for about two months now. No fraying or stretched-out stitches yet. Feels solid and holds up fine during heavy lifts.
Wore these straight out of the box with zero blisters. They go with everything from jeans to dresses and my feet didn't hurt after hours of walking. Absolutely worth every penny.

For some reason it seems almost impossible to find the old fashioned cut of Payback, all they seem to sell on Amazon is the director's cut. Anyway this is one of those movies that every once in a while I put in and watch all over, very entertaining. I liked the director's cut, but it loses a lot of the entertainment value to take some of the goofiness out (like Mel Gibson's gravelly voice over, and some of the actual jokes).
Great cheaper option then the fit bit, works great and also tracks your sleep
Quick shipping. So far it does a great job. Is does make some noise, as most of them do, but is quieter than most. Easy to clean, empty and operate.
I enjoyed this book very much. The story was well written. The characters were believable within the story. It was a nice read.
Smaller than I expected but honestly it fits my lunch perfectly. The dual sections keep my snacks and sandwich separated, which is super handy. Wish the strap was a bit longer though.

Bought this for my dad's birthday since he's loved this film since it came out. The transfer is honestly stunning, colors pop and the sound is crystal clear. Highly recommend for any film buff or anyone wanting to revisit an old favorite. Worth every penny and then some.
The forest scenes wash out in lighted areas and lack 1080p resolution. This production is probably made with cameras 2-3 years older than 2010 productions.

Binged this entire series over a long weekend and this installment is easily the strongest yet. The pacing never lets up. Highly recommend to anyone who loves fast-paced thrillers with real character development, just make sure you begin with book one.

Picked this up for some plumbing work behind my bathroom wall and honestly did not expect much for the price. Figured it'd be a cheap throwaway tool but man was I wrong. The double hinge thing is genius because you can actually get a decent bite on stuff way back in tight gaps where regular needle nose can't reach at all. Spring action is smooth, no wobble in the mechanism, and the rubber grip feels solid even with wet hands. I've used it on three projects now including fishing a dropped bolt out of my engine bay. For what these cost compared to the name brand versions, this is an absolute no brainer. Way better quality than I paid for.

This was a solid enough read but it never really grabbed me the way I wanted it to. The world-building is decent and the magic system has some fun moments, but I kept waiting for a spark that didn't quite come. Harry himself is fine, just not particularly memorable compared to other urban fantasy leads I've followed. That said, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who likes straightforward detective-style fantasy with a male protagonist and doesn't need everything to be life-changing. It's a good palette cleanser between heavier series. My brother actually read it after me and enjoyed it more than I did, so maybe I just wasn't the right audience. Three stars feels fair, not bad, not great, perfectly readable.

Picked this up on a whim and honestly couldn't put it down. The plot involving a severed arm and a disgraced cop is darkly hilarious start to finish. For under ten bucks in paperback, you're getting top-tier entertainment that'll last you a full weekend. Hiaasen's Florida madness is worth every penny. Grab a copy, head to the beach, and prepare to laugh out loud.
Not easy to grow anything in these small tubes. The plant didn't show roots and ended up rotting out and not really growing. Would not recommend.

Merc is made of hard, clunky plastic. He is a larger size toy, not typical action figure size, so that was nice to see. He is nice for smaller toddler hands, as well as older kids. Telecoping eyes work and he has 8 different sayings. Miles can ride on top of him, if you have him as well. He will stand on his own without falling over. My only worry with it is that it seems like if you would drop him on a hard surface, the hard plastic could crack. Other than that, I think and Miles from Tomorrowland fan will love him.
Loved every page of this. Finished it in one sitting, totally hooked.
Way better than I expected. The forensic details felt incredibly real and the pacing never dragged. Finished it in two sittings.

I have been addicted to using these during my glute workouts at the gym and have seen a big difference so I decided to order my own set. I plan to bring them with me when I travel. They are excellent quality, very durable. The resistance for each color is as specified and they come with a guide to teach you how to use them. If you hop onto Pinterest there is a large variety of resistance band workouts there as well.

So i will start out with i do LOVE the fox and the hound and it is one of my favorite disney movies so i was real excited when i got home, but then i open it and they put the two dvd's in the same slot and the blu ray in a seperate slot, ARE YOU KIDDING ME?? i wouldn't have payed the extra money to get the blu ray if i knew that they would end up having the dvds in the same slot, my dvd has a high risk of getting scratched now and there is nothing i can do too prevent it since there isn't even a sop for a swivel disk. HORRIBLE PACKAGING.
Watched this a bunch over six months and the disc still plays perfectly without any scratches. Decent program but pretty short overall.

For the price, this gravity filter is hard to beat. I picked it up before a three-night backpacking trip in the Sierras and it handled water for four of us without much fuss. The hang strap is super convenient and I like not having to manually pump anything. That said, the included squeeze bag feels pretty thin and I was nervous about how it would hold up around rocks. The main filter does the job but slows down noticeably after a couple days of murky lake water. I ended up having to swap in my own spare bladder because the original started leaking at the seam. Still, for what I paid, it gets the job done. Just don't expect premium build quality and maybe bring a backup reservoir.

This book reminded me of my college days which were many years ago but remain fondly in my memories. With a salute to social media, the author presents a loveable scoundrel who entertains one page after page. Nicely done.

Picked this up on a whim and ended up blowing through the whole series in about two months. The bond between Laurence and his dragon really carries the story, and the alternate history angle is handled well. Some of the battle scenes dragged a bit for me, but the character dynamics kept me coming back. Solid pick for anyone who likes military fantasy with a twist.

Ordered this DVD for my dad since he's big into WWII history. Shipping was pretty quick, arrived in about four days. The case came in one of those bubble mailers though, and the plastic was cracked on one corner. Disc itself seems fine, no scratches or anything. Popped it in last night and the picture quality is decent for an older film transfer. Nothing mind-blowing but watchable. The story itself is interesting, follows Tibbets leading up to the Hiroshima mission. My dad seemed to enjoy it more than I did honestly. I felt like it dragged in a few spots and some of the acting felt a little stiff. For the price it's an okay addition to the collection. Just wish they'd used better packaging.
I bought this for a gift. My husband was very happy with it. Nice size, worked as expected. Good price - I looked around and bought here.

I received this book free for review. I am not being compensated or influenced. I could not put this book down. I devoured it in a matter of an hour and a little bit, and it blew my mind. Devlin is by far one of my favorite male leads of anything Ive read this year. Hes strong, smart, sensitive and tough. Hes been held prisoner for years, but some seriously nasty villains, and despite torture and terrible things happening to him, he remains true to himselfa healer not a fighter. Which just makes me so happy. Jamie is another great character, she grew on me pretty steadily throughout the novel. I really love their chemistry together, and the fact that the female character was the stronger in the relationship. Devlin is not an alpha malebut it works so well with Jamie who pulls him out of everything and works to make their world better. This is the fourth book in a series, but it didn't feel like I was coming into the story mid-way. Characters from previous books show up and are mentioned but theres enough context to determine who is who without giving away their stories.

For the price, this cover is an attractive option for a larger crate. Installation is as easy as placing a drop cloth. My dog loves the coziness, and it helps with a minor draft that comes from a nearby window. Nothing will make a 48 inch crate look like typical furniture, but this looks much nicer than a metal cage in the corner of our living room.
Great pick for anyone who enjoys sweeping epics packed with real history. The timeline jumps threw me off a couple times, but once you settle in, it's a gripping read.

This was a Christmas gift to my 8 year old and he loves it. We set it up Christmas day and then left for a few days. When we came back one of the cars wouldn't operate as it did before we left. We did some switched batteries and tried some minor problem solving but the car just wouldn't work correctly. Contacted the company and received a prompt response back. Did the steps as was recommended to us from Tech Support and then gave them the results. They again responded promptly and advised that they would need to send out a calibration tool but with the holidays and such we wouldn't have it until after the 1st of the year. No problems here. Rec'd the calibration tool earlier than I expected and performed the steps that were supplied and everything works great! Couldn't be happier with the support we rec'd....and love this racetrack. Would definitely recommend.

I grabbed this as a quick holiday read and ended up finishing it in one sitting. The chemistry between the main characters is genuinely electric from their first encounter, and I loved how the author balanced the romance with just enough tension to keep me hooked. Jade is a relatable lead, her work frustrations felt real, and watching her unwind at the lodge made for a comforting escape. Dawson is exactly the kind of book boyfriend you want in a shifter romance: protective without being overbearing, and clearly carrying his own baggage. The lodge setting is cosy and atmospheric. My only complaint is it felt too short, I wanted more time with these two. Definitely checking out more from this author. Perfect weekend binge read.
Perfect for nervous beginners like me. The rounded tips give peace of mind when trimming around my poodle's face. Every dog owner needs these.
Unable to find this size in any stores, medium in the 45 piece package....My dogs teeth are beautiful....no need for doggie dentures....
Loved this movie! The picture quality on the disc is super sharp and the bonus features were a nice surprise. Arrived quickly and packaged well. Definitely worth adding to my collection.

OK so I've been flying RC helis for about three years now and this thing is an absolute unit. The first thing that hit me was the sound, those big blades move some serious air. It's not even close to my smaller models in terms of presence. What I really love though is how stable it hovers outdoors. Most RC helis this size fight you in any kind of breeze but this one just sits there like it doesn't care. I had it out in maybe 8 mph wind last weekend and it barely drifted. Battery life is decent, getting around 10 minutes of aggressive flying. Replacement parts are easy to find too which matters because, yeah, I've already clipped a fence post. Would buy again in a heartbeat.
We love these shoes. My kids wear them everywhere.

Used this for terrariums, nice dark rich color and it was a decent price I know there are other kinds and probably cheaper versions at Big box stores but it was nice to get all of my terrarium supplies from the comforts of home!!
Didn't expect much from such a tiny knife but the build quality blew me away. Solid lockup, razor sharp out of the box, and barely noticeable in my pocket. Totally exceeded my expectations.

I would give zero stars if I could. I put the collar on my cat leaving a finger width as suggested. 4 days later he looked as if he was having a seizure! Somehow the collar stretched out and became lodged in his mouth, and he was choking. I had to restrain him and cut the collar off. If I wasn't at home he would have died. Not worth it.
Arrived two days early in perfect condition with no dented corners. Opened the box and my toddler went straight for it. Bright colors, sturdy pieces, and way bigger than I expected. Total hit.
Not bad for the price. The angled snipper gets the most use from me. The other pieces feel a bit flimsy but work fine for light tasks.
My son wanted Cats these were a great compromise. They look the part and are great quality but are much more affordable
Decent watch for what I paid. Strap feels cheap and the clasp loosens throughout the day. Not bad overall though.
Perfect for anyone doing precision cuts. Highly recommend to crafters.

Picked up this paperback a few months back because I wanted a dense political thriller set somewhere other than New York or LA. The St. Louis angle hooked me right away, and Franzen definitely knows how to paint a crumbling Midwestern metropolis. Problem is, about halfway through the plot gets so tangled in police corruption and municipal scheming that I honestly lost track of who was double-crossing who. The Probst family drama grounds things somewhat, but even that storyline drifts by the final third. My copy is already showing serious wear too, the spine cracked after just a couple weeks of casual reading and the cover is peeling at the corners. Not a bad read overall, just way more convoluted than it needed to be.
Way better than I expected for the money. Solid build and super bright glow.

Picked this up for some shelving projects around the garage and it's been spot on every time. Solid construction, accurate readings, comfortable to hold. Would definitely recommend to any DIYer or weekend warrior who needs a reliable level without spending a fortune.

Honestly, I didn't finish reading this book. It was predictable (which is fine, but there wasn't much character building) and I lost interest halfway through the story. It wasn't horrible, it just didn't suit me and the mood I was in, I guess. I enjoyed the female MC but the male MC didn't seem very original and there were a lot of the same sexual descriptions used in all of his chapters--especially about her butt. However, I would say the title suits the story--fast, crass, and angry.

I knew nothing about Tammy Faye Bakker prior to seeing this film and I was surprised not only at how fascinating her life has been, but also just how fascinating she is period. The jovial tone of the documentary is really the key to the film for a couple of reasons. First, it allows us to have fun at Tammy Faye's expense (and besides her make-up, there is still much about her that is worth poking fun at -- the archival footage of the Bakkers hosting a show while Tammy Faye was hooked on prescription drugs is the film's highlight), and her participation in the fun makes it easier for the audience to laugh along. Secondly, to allow us to look back on her past hardships with so much humour, instead of bitterness, does give the impression that she is one hell of a survivor. My impression of Tammy Faye before seeing the documentary had been cemented by the mainstream media, which has made her out to be a rich, spoiled and corrupt witch. So you can imagine my shock as I realized that Tammy Faye had completely won me over by the end of the film. My immediate reaction to this was that I had been manipulated and I complained that the directors must have felt too much affection for Tammy Faye since the audience was never exposed to the evil side of her character. However, after considering the film a little more, I realized that Tammy Faye is likely to be too self-unaware and too much of an exhibitionist to actually hide the less pleasant aspects of her personality. This is what makes her the perfect documentary subject. Whether the camera is there or not, Tammy Faye's personality is as constant as her permanent eyelashes.

Smaller than I pictured, but honestly that worked out fine. Snug fit against my body and held my ID plus some cash without issues. Wish the opening was a touch wider for easy access, though. Solid for the price.
Downloaded this last December and reread it three times already. Still holds up perfectly on my Kindle. Dec and Holly's chemistry never gets old. Loved it.
Fun book, pretty much what you would expect from NR. Didn't disappoint but no surprises. A good summer dose of brain bubblegum.
For the price, this thing preps veggies fast. Carrots and zucchini slice perfectly.
Arrived two days early in a neat little garment bag, no wrinkles at all. Pulled it out and was instantly blown away by the fabric quality. Tried it on right away and it fit like a glove. So happy!

I've been following this series from the beginning and this latest installment does not disappoint. What I really love about Castillo's writing is how she weaves Amish culture into the mystery without it ever feeling forced or like a textbook. The dynamic between Kate and Tomasetti continues to be one of my favorite things, they feel like real people with actual baggage rather than just cookie cutter crime fiction leads. The opening with the abandoned baby hooked me immediately and the pacing stayed solid throughout. I finished it in two sittings because I genuinely couldn't put it down. My only tiny gripe is I wanted more page time with some of the recurring Painters Mill townsfolk, but that's just me being picky. If you're already a fan, grab it. If you're new to the series, go back to book one and thank me later.
Got this for my terrier and it's been a total lifesaver. For the price, you can't beat it. He goes nuts every time it turns on. Worth every penny.
Nice basic bar ends. They installed easily and seem sturdy. Time will tell if they are durable. Only fault is the plastic caps are a bit loose fitting and may not last long.
Arrived quickly in perfect condition. Kids were thrilled opening it, looks even better in person!

These were a fun addition to the goody bags for my son's birthday party last weekend. The kids camped out with their families and enjoyed using their fingerlights once the sun went down. Excellent price! Some reviews state that not all 40 worked, but the kids had so much fun with them, I didn't hear anyone complain that they had a broken one.

Party of Three: Sunday Night Dinner Club book 1 by Jess Dee is the beginning of a new series and what a terrific start. I loved the main characters of Spencer, Chelsea and Levi, but I actually found myself a bit torn at first on whether I wanted all three of them together. I adored Spencer right from the start, maybe it had something to do with him being an Accountant, lol:) Of course, that soon passed as I love when best friends share the same woman. The sex scenes were scorching hot and I enjoyed the fact that Spencer and Levi were able to discuss their feelings for Chelsea with each other. I also liked that this story introduced secondary characters who are long-time friends and I loved the close friendship that was portrayed and the fun bantering. I am really looking forward to all the stories in this series.
"trail" used instead of "trial" several times. Afford should have been affordable in that context. It could have been longer.

THE SOLOIST is a fine novel, interweaving three stories that all center on the narrator: the rise and fall of a child prodigy cellist, the sole member of a jury at a murder trial who finds meaning in a defendent's case, and a teacher of a budding, gifted young Korean cellist. Each story has its own cast of characters beautifully realized, but most important - each aspect of this tripartite novel is told with such informed authority that imagining the author in anything but an autobiographical mode is next to impossible. Just as in his previous novel LYING AWAKE which dealt with the inner thoughts of a cloistered nun, Salzman here shows us he has a thorough understanding of music, music making, and the sociology and philosophy of our court system and our education system. Not that he stops at reportage. Hardly! It is simply his depth of knowledge about everything he writes make his novels deeply committed and inspiring. The reason for writing THE SOLOIST is probably one of encouraging his readers to live in the moment. But it is the loving manner of relating his tale that gets us there, almost without knowing we've arrived. A fine book to encourage a whole town (Pasadena) to read and share as is the goal here. Well worth anyone's time.

Got these for my kids' birthday party back in June and they're still going strong three months later. My boys are rough on toys and these have been dropped on concrete, thrown in the yard, you name it. Lights and sound both still work perfectly. The batteries last a surprisingly long time too. Definitely worth picking up a few extra sets for gifts.
My husband and I really enjoyed this movie. Slow to start as characters are being developed but a really great tear jerker. Happy tears.
The Sparrow by Jason Mott is a good short story where you get a chance to read a sweet short story before you read the whole book, The Returned.

This fleece doesn't have that ugly bally look that most fleeces have. It's smooth and the "fur" on the inside is a little long but smooth and cute. I ordered the size I wear in all my tops and it for perfectly whether I had on just a t-shirt or layered sweaters under it. I love that it zips up high on the neck. I bought it for a ski trip and with it under my coat I was very warm and comfortable even after falling in the snow (multiple times lol). This fleece is perfect

I was a little hesitant to purchase glasses online, however these arrived perfectly wrapped! Don't let the photos fool you, these glasses are a sturdy set, feel great to hold with a medium weight and hold a lot. I am currently using them for water, or iced tea but really any beverage would work. I am very pleased with the quality. Although they are a bit large, they wash superbly in the dishwasher and store nicely. Even my husband who can't get excited about glasses loved them. We have them displayed in our cabinets behind glass and they look great. I think the value surpasses the price. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will buy from Amazon and the Libbey brand again in the future. Thank you Amazon for free shipping!
Planning on reading the next one because I'm still trying to find out what's going to happen with her and the Mountie and if she ends up staying in the tundra

I wanted to love this one based on the premise, but the pacing really killed it for me. The first half dragged so badly I almost gave up. Same conversations happening over and over with the characters refusing to actually communicate like adults. The miscommunication trope is worn out here and felt forced rather than organic. That said, I did genuinely enjoy the small town setting, the author painted a vivid picture of the community and I could picture every street and cafe. Those scenes were the highlight for me. But the side characters were way more interesting than the main couple, which is never a good sign. By the 60% mark I was just skimming to get to the end. Disappointing because the potential was definitely there.

I love military fiction and particularly those stories that are fast-paced and full of action. I just stumbled upon author Eric Meyer and was thrilled with the first of his books that I've had a chance to read, "Black Ops Heroes of Afghanistan". The story of an undercover rescue mission of a CIA operative, this is a harrowing tale behind enemy lines. The main character, Rafe Stoner, is both tough and likable and the action that he sees with his sidekick, Greg Blum, felt very real to me. A great read that has me wanting more. Recommended.

Got this to replace a little cheap video card that did not support my four computer monitors well. This video card is GREAT and my computer does not lag as it did before with the cheap alternative. This is still low-end but it's great quality for the buck!

Got this for my iPad Mini and it does the job pretty well. The anti-glare finish makes a noticeable difference when reading outside or under bright overhead lights. No more squinting at my own reflection. Application was straightforward, just take your time and do it in a bathroom after running hot water so the steam settles the dust. I messed up the alignment on my first try but was able to peel it back and reposition without ruining the adhesive. There's a very slight texture you can feel when scrolling, and it does soften the display sharpness a touch, but that's the tradeoff with matte protectors. I'd recommend this to anyone who reads outdoors or works under harsh office lighting. Good value for the price.

Picked this up for a college course and ended up reading way ahead of the syllabus. The characters grabbed me immediately and the world-building feels incredibly real. Genuinely emotional by the end. Couldn't put it down.

I have a dive camera that is good but too much trouble for day-to-day pool and kayak use. I really wanted the Olympus TG-810 but didn't want another $400 camera. Picked this up on a trial basis just based on price. I was pleasantly surprised. Took a bunch of pics in and around the pool and the quality was great. It's really slow to recycle between shots but all pics were in focus and the colors wonderful. Love that it has an auto white balance setting for underwater and I don't have to mess with filters. Will be perfect for kayaking and snorkeling.
Bought these for my dad who spends every weekend on the boat. Lightweight, dry super fast, and the fit is spot on. Perfect gift for any outdoorsy guy in your life.

JoJo Moyes really knows how to make me cry. Or maybe it is just Louisa Clark that makes me cry. I don't mean sobbing heartbreaking cry the way Me Before You did but I mean like just happy soul rending grief tinged cry. I really enjoyed that the author took the time out to heal Louisa in the slow painful way of humans. Grief is hard and especially hard when you aren't left a stipend and a way to remove yourself from the things that remind you most of the departed person. I just appreciated how - human- the author made Louisa. Its not like a whole book later she was magically healed. This was sticky and messy. In many ways i doubted her just as she doubted herself. It wasn't fair of me but thats life. Clark was remarkably human and beautiful for it. Im curious as to her next adventure however i don't know if i outright want to continue with the series.if this is series. In short the author gave us a beautifully heartbroken yet mending and learning story. I am proud of Louisa and her family. I am so proud of her. I loved this.

Book arrived two days later than expected and the corner was a little bent from the shipping process. Not a huge deal but kind of annoying when you order new. The packaging was one of those thin mailers with zero bubble wrap so honestly I'm not shocked. As for the book itself, I'm about fifty pages in and it's decent so far. Cannon definitely doesn't sugarcoat her time with Grant which I appreciate. The writing is pretty straightforward, nothing fancy. "There come a time Kemosabe when good man must wear mask." After trying to provide justice to the notorious outlaw Butch Cavendish, ranger John Reid (Hammer) is shot and left for dead. When he is rescued by a Comanche Indian named Tonto (Depp) he is told of his destiny and together they ride again to stop Cavendish, this time as Tonto and The Lone Ranger. Going into this I was not expecting much at all. I was really not excited to see this for a few reasons. One was because I am too young to remember the TV series and I am not a big Johnny Depp fan at all. One other reason is the preview made it look slap-sticky and campy and nothing that I thought looked good. Even with those low expectations this movie wasn't all that good. There were some pretty funny parts and I did laugh throughout but this is really only a one time watch at most. To be fair I did expect it to be worse but the movie could have been an hour shorter and I would have been fine with it. Overall, long and drawn out. To long for kids to stay interested in and to boring for adults to stay interested in. I give it a C+.

I had to get this for my marketing class and honestly, the content itself isn't terrible. The chapters on traditional media buying and brand positioning are actually pretty solid and well-explained. My problem is with the case studies. Every single example is from like 2007-2008, and if you know anything about advertising, that's basically the Stone Age. No mention of social media campaigns beyond some basic Facebook stuff, nothing about influencer marketing, and the digital advertising section is laughably thin. The textbook spends like forty pages on print advertising but barely touches mobile ads. I ended up having to do a ton of outside research just to understand current ad tech for my assignments. The fundamentals are there but good luck applying any of this to today's landscape.

Dickens, along with Dostoevsky, stands atop my list of novelists who could most accurately portray the subtleties of human emotion and passion. "Great Expectations" is simply a masterpiece of 19th-century fiction, and is pure Dickens. In this semi-autobiographical work (a trademark of Dickens' writings), the life of a poor young boy, Pip, is followed from his humble beginnings to his rise into the middle-class, due to the mysterious aid of an unknown benefactor. His pursuit of Estella, a beautiful young girl raised to break the hearts of men by her jilted caretaker, Ms. Havisham, is a classic of literature that has been repeated countless times since. The tragic, gradual break between Pip and his family (particularly the humble but caring Joe) is heartwrenching. Pip's eventual realization of the insincerity of the middle class, and his love for Joe, brought tears to my eyes. "Great Expectations" is a wonderful, moving book that has been copied and satired again and again, from Mishima's "Forbidden Colors" to South Park. An important and unforgettable novel!

This 2015 version of Mattel's My Password Journal has some significant improvements over the old version. For starters, and probably most importantly for people who had the old one, there is a major improvement in the voice recognition. Where before the password had to be said with EXACTLY the same tone (and background noise), the new version does a better (not perfect, but better) job of filtering background noise and is significantly more forgiving of the tone. Fore example, when my 7yo tried to open her old Password Journal, if it didn't open the first time or two she would get frustrated and that frustrated tone would ensure it would not open at all. This journal is more forgiving in the first place, and even if she gets frustrated it still responds about half of the time. Now let's be real, this isn't a real diary-type journal. It's definitely a gimmicky toy, so if your little one is looking for something more secure, an old-fashioned locking diary may be a better bet. For the gadget girl who likes to fiddle with tech this is a fun toy, complete with invisible(-ish) ink, a "hidden" (in the most obvious way) compartment, and the namesake verbal password. The journal book itself is small, but my 7yo took it out and keeps random notes to and from friends in there instead. When she pressed her friends to try to get into the journal, it says "intruder alert!" and they all giggled wildly, scheming of ways to keep secret notes from their nemesis: little brother. Of course there's a password bypass on the back, which means it's never really secure. Which is fine, a 7yo doesn't need to be keeping secrets from her parents anyway.;-).

The Princess guitar is a pretty in pink starter guitar for small hands and short arms; however, there are some reservations that other reviewers also mentioned. My 7 and 9 year old girls want to learn guitar. A full sized guitar is hard for them to manage. This is more their size. It does need constant tuning- probably the biggest drawback. My girls are learning off "Alfred's Complete Kids' Guitar Course". It starts with single finger chords: C-G7-G then a 3 finger chord D7, which are fine on this guitar since it only involves the high 3-4 stings(mostly G-B-E). For full 6 string strumming, there's usually a string that needs to be tuned or one can just ignore it, and let them strum and play to their imagination. Our strings have not broken yet. They have covers for the nuts and stickers to id the open string(which eventually fall off- not a biggie). It's opening is small and the resonance very limited. I find our girls use this for play, pretend and simple practice. For better sound, they mess around with our electric quitar on a mini-amp. For their age group, it takes time to get use to pressing the strings down and toughen and strenthen their little fingers up. It's all for fun and they're advancing quite well at their own pace. Overall, consider the cost and what you want out of a guitar- if it is just fun and goofing around with a little intro to the instrument- this one might suit you; otherwise, buy a better one.

I have worshiped Invader Zim ever since the day it was born and I have two tapes of recorded episodes that I use to draw the characters and decorate my room. When I found out that it was coming out on DVD (Only like a month ago), I almost cried with joy. This is truly a wonderful TV show, animated or not, and it's finally getting the attention it deserves. Zim, the overly determined and somewhat crazy invader who just wants to prove himself worthy in a world where he is isolated, can be compared to many of us who are just trying to make our mark on the world. Gir, the lovable and fun-loving little robot, is like the child that lives within each of us. Dib's obsessive beliefs and theories relate to the things that we try to hold on to in the chaos we call reality. And Gaz is the anti-social, shadow-loving girl who we can relate to on really annoying days when people won't leave us alone.

I swapped over to halogens to retain the dimmable range and save a bit of power, but be aware these won't work as well with CFL/LEDs as their certified dimmers will.

I'm only using 4 stars for now, but will update after I use it snow skiing [intended use] in a few weeks. I was looking for a "practical" clip-on watch that I could use snow skiing, to attach to an external zipper pull [so I could check the time without having to mess with my jacket sleeve]. My husband ordered it for me. Took it on a trial run biking the other day and had it clipped to my vest pocket zipper pull. SO FAR, I LIKE IT! It's just a tad larger [diameter] than I would like, but it's light-weight, not bulky, and lies flat. My biggest fear was that the numbers would be hard to see [old-lady eyes], but I could read it just fine even looking through sunglasses. The only issue was with the little seal ring -- it took some patience to get it re-seated. Also, I replaced the standard carabiner that comes with it -- I prefer the small, "S" carabiners. I'll update this review after I ski with it. Edit: OK, so 5 stars. It worked great as a time-piece/zipper pull for skiing! The size was an advantage as I could easily grab it with ski gloves on. Sometimes a button would get pushed accidently which put it in another mode, but easily fixed -- had to take ski gloves off, though, to fix it as they were too bulky to use for pushing buttons. No problems at all with the low temps. Good visibility. Sorry, but I didn't use any of the other functions -- was only interested in the watch.

Total waste of money. I bought this expecting a simple way to stream movies on long flights and back up photos from my phone, but it barely does either. The connection drops constantly, even when my phone is sitting right next to the thing. Tried loading a few MP4s onto a microSD card and the app couldn't find half of them. When it does actually play something, the buffering every 30 seconds makes it unwatchable. My old cheap flash drive transfers files faster than this.
