Had to go buy mounting clips to keep everything secured, which added time and cost to the project. The strip itself puts out even illumination across the counter, and cutting it to size was straightforward. Just do not trust the sticky tape to do the job long term. Plan on using extra fasteners and you will probably be satisfied with the results.
Loved the banter between the two leads, felt so natural and made the whole thing fly by. The ending caught me off guard too. Definitely grabbing the sequel.

For the price these are hard to beat. I put them in three different lamps around the house and they get the job done. The brightness is fine for everyday use but the beam is pretty narrow so you get darker spots depending on placement. They look a little cheap up close with the plastic base showing, but honestly at this cost I can't complain too much. Decent backup option if you need a bunch without spending much.

Kept this on hand for when I trim my dog's nails. Accidentally hit the quick last week and grabbed this stuff right away. It clotted the bleeding within maybe thirty seconds, which was a relief. Powder is fine and easy to apply with a cotton swab. Doesn't seem to sting much either based on her reaction. Glad I bought it.
Picked this up for my kid's birthday and honestly worth every penny. Picture quality surprised me for the price. Super easy to use right out of the box.

Elizabeth Hand is able to do what so many writers strive for -- to emulate Joseph Conrad when he says, "My task which I am trying to achieve is, by the power of the written word, to make you hear, to make you feel it is, before all, to make you see. That and no more, and it is everything." This is the most deeply *visual* prose I've read since...well, since Conrad. With this in mind, one line from the book struck me: "How many of us can say we've made a new world out of the things that terrify and move us?" Well,Elizabeth Hand can, anyway. There's not a lazy sentence in this entire book, which is one of the few out there that any writer can read and learn from, and any reader will find a powerful and moving experience. I can't recommend this one too highly.
Got this for my daycare kids and they go crazy over it every time. Great quality felt pieces that stick perfectly. Super engaging learning tool!
Perfect little case for my handgun and ammo. Sturdy build, great price, fast shipping. Totally satisfied.
I wish they had the gripping rubber on one side
Bought these for my twin boys' birthday and they haven't taken them off since. Perfect gift for any little Nintendo fan out there.
Perfect gift for any classic TV fan who loves gritty 70s cop dramas. Telly Savalas shines.

Expected typical historical fiction but this blew me away. The Venetian setting feels incredibly authentic, and watching the protagonist grow from orphan to celebrated musician gave me actual chills. Couldn't put it down.

I purchased a fixed blade Boker, and the seller sent me this by mistake. So consider this a review by a disinterested 3rd party who saw and handled it before returning it for a refund. Unless a menacing look to a knife is all you are after, I find little else that this knife would offer. The knife is very tight and hard to deploy one- handed. The blade itself seems very cheap. Part of that is due to the fact that this knife has a chisel grind, (ground only on one side. The back side of the knife in the photo is just flat steel. No grind at all to produce an edge). One sided grind lowers production costs. Throw in the fact that 2/3 of the blade edge is curved, so you will need a curved whetstone to sharpen the blade, and you end up with get a knife that is unlikely to hold an edge long and that is difficult to maintain. I have 1 Boker knife (Arbolito) and am purchasing another, so I like their quality. Boker Plus is a low end brand for Boker with this Boker Plus knife is being made Taiwan. Speaking for this particular knife, I am very unimpressed. My 21 yo son had a similar opinion when I showed it to him. Personally, I have other folding knives that are 1/2 the cost and 10 times better IMO.

Picked this up for a fraction of what similar attachments cost and honestly wasn't expecting much. Used it on some rusted patio furniture bolts last weekend and it ground right through them without any issues. The fitment on my Dremel was solid with zero wobble. For what I paid, this thing has already earned its spot in my toolbox.
For the price, you really can't beat this. Bought it as a gift for my brother who loves sci-fi stuff. It's small but looks awesome on the counter. Totally worth every penny.

Grabbed this on a Kindle deal and honestly it exceeded what I expected for under five bucks. The pacing moves right along and Val is a solid protagonist who keeps things interesting throughout. A couple plot twists felt slightly predictable but nothing that ruined the experience. For the price you really can't complain. Perfect beach or travel companion.
Decent fabric for the cost but torso runs short on me.

I really wanted to like this since the premise sounded great, but the dialogue killed it for me. Nobody talks like these characters do. Every conversation felt stiff and unnatural, like the author was checking boxes instead of letting real people interact. The male lead's lines were especially cringey and made me roll my eyes every few pages. I tried pushing through hoping it would improve, but gave up around the halfway mark. Definitely returning this one. Not worth the money or the time.
We are using it nearly every day to train our two year old Mixed Pit Bull rescue dog. We have a long way to go but we are very impressed with this book.

I bought a protective glove for when I use this because it is really sharp (and scary). It worked great for slicing the fresh ginger to make candied ginger. Love the different thickness adjustments. Small size to store in small kitchen.
Perfect for runners who hate tall socks but still want padding. Bought a second pack after my first wore through, great for gym days.
The product is very good, but just as other comment the case a bit bigger than 13inch MAC Book Pro, can live with it.

Ordered two of these for my Golden Retriever and they showed up two days later in a sturdy box with plenty of bubble wrap. No chips or scratches at all, which honestly surprised me because ceramic stuff usually arrives cracked when I order online. Pulled them out and immediately noticed how heavy and solid they feel. The glaze is gorgeous in person, way nicer than the pictures showed. My dog is a sloppy eater and constantly shoved his old plastic bowl across the kitchen floor. Not happening with these. They barely budge even when he gets going. Washed them in the dishwasher last night and they came out perfect. Already thinking about grabbing a second set in a different color for upstairs. Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging with no damage. Pulled it out and was impressed by the solid build quality. Tried it on my husky immediately and the amount of fur it grabbed was unreal.

Ok I say again WHO is writing these reviews. For $89 this is a total rip off. The candle holders are made of pressed aluminum. The stand is Saturday and in 3 screw together pieces. It's painted a fake gold or bronze color. I hope that Amazon puts a stop to these customer reviews that are false and miss leading. Had the price been $29.99 then it would be a great value.

I love the concept. I found some of the stories more engaging than others. The problem with short stories is that there's sometimes not enough time to care about the characters and really feel their despair and visceral urge for revenge. "Until Death Do Us Part" was most effective, because everybody can empathize with a bride on her wedding day. The BPD reception was something I'll never forget! Probably everyone can relate to the road rage sketch and will enjoy living vicariously (and laughing in shock) through the fantasy. "The Proposal" was a little too long--the least satisfying and most boring of the tales. Revolved mostly around greed and entitlement, which don't interest me. "Pasternak" was interesting but too unlikely to make a serious impact (no pun intended). "Rats" was pretty good. The one about the demolition guy was okay. Honestly, I might give this 3.5 stars. But I'm not at all sorry I rented it.
Got this for my mom who struggles with modern shows. She loves it. Perfect for older folks who want simple, wholesome entertainment.

Besides that, super quiet(is basically a laptop motherboard without a screen), low power consumption and more than powerful enough for office use.
Arrived tossed in a thin plastic mailer with no tags or packaging. Material felt decent but smelled strongly of chemicals straight out of the bag. Disappointing first impression overall.
Using it as part of my Religious Ed. 7th grad class. A wonderful and very moving video. Not perfect according to the Gospels but captures the "Spirit" of Christ's message.

The mystery kept me guessing all the way through, I actually stayed up way too late finishing it because I couldn't put it down. So it is pretty sturdy. My cats are not small and it doesn't wobble with their lard butts. However that ring..LOL no way one of my cats would fit in there. It really is designed for a kitten and to balance the box on top of it was not a good design, so I didn't. Plus the ring only had one hole drilled in it instead of two...so I couldn't. I needed this for a college history course and wasn't expecting much from such an old text, but honestly I got sucked in. Herodotus goes off on wild tangents about giant ants and gold-digging ants and it's somehow amazing. The translation reads super clean, no awkward archaic phrasing at all, which made getting through 700 pages way less painful than I feared. Footnotes are genuinely helpful for keeping track of who's who since everyone has similar Greek names. The maps in back saved me multiple times during class discussions. For around eight bucks you really can't go wrong here. Worth way more than I paid.
Bought this for my daughter's tablet and she loves the purple shade. Fit is slightly loose on one corner but it's held up well after several months of daily use.

I figure if verbatim makes a great dvd-r why not a great cd-r so I ordered it and I was not dissapointed. The hundred pack is just what I need and I haven't made a coaster out of one yet. When comparing prices I found it is cheaper to order the hundred pack which records just as good as the fifty pack of the more expensive ones.

This is SO lightweight--it's a pleasure to lift. A friend tried this litter and found her cats walked around the house with it stuck to their feet. While all litter sticks to feet, this is light enough to make the trek much farther from the litter box. My experience has been fine though. My cats don't care about it, they just use it. They DO seem to be able to 'toss' if farther when there's a lot of vigorous digging. The scent is just fine (I've read all the reviews about stinky litter and it smells the same to me as other Tidy Cats products.) My only problem is the cost (4 stars). It's litter. It gets pooped and peed in and then I toss it. I don't see the purpose of spending the money on this--UNLESS you have trouble lifting the litter and it's either expensive (light) litter or no cat! THEN I say, this does the job, AND it's light! Keep your cat!

My dog loves this toy - this is her second one. She treats it like her baby and carries it around the house in her mouth. The first one is still fine after almost 2 years, I just bought a second one for travel.
Really enjoyed this one from start to finish. The story pulled me in right away and kept my attention throughout. Finished it in two sittings. Great pick for Kindle readers!
Our 13 month old son LOVES this toy - can be used outdoors on a water table/pool & inside for bath time. Great for working on motor skills and water play!
Came quickly and well-protected, but looks a bit underwhelming in person.
This is one of those series that can take you back to when you were a kid. It's still just as funny as I remember it.

I wanted to revitalize my early 2011 MacBook Pro. The drive itself works mostly as expected (about 12% slower than its specs). But the installation was arduous and can be expensive. First, the drive is formatted for Windows and all the software provided is Windows only. So you need to use Disk Manager to erase the disk, rename it to something meaningful, and reformat it to Mac OS Extended Journaled. Then you need a piece of software like Carbon Copy Cloner to mirror your existing hard disk onto the new SSD. CCC is a great software package, which you should probably own anyway for various backup tasks, but if you don't already have it, buying it adds to the expense of the upgrade. The provided installation guide is a pamphlet of 8 pictures for installing on a desktop, 6 pictures for installing on a laptop, and 1 frame of cautions. All very generic and useless for my MacBook Pro. By the way, both sets of pictures show a SATA-to-USB adapter cable for cloning, which was not included and must be purchased separately. The installation requires a 7mm to 9.5mm space adapter for 2.5 drives. Again this is an additional purchase as the Samsung SSD is more shallow than the original drive. The actual physical installation involves removing the cover, removing the drive clamp and old drive, removing the 4 stud screws on the old drive and putting them onto the SSD, applying the spacer (be sure to orient the drive to the cable connector before adhering it), seating the drive (it still seemed a little loose), re-installing the drive clamp and replacing the cover. The studs are required on the new drive to make sure it seats into the clamp. Why Samsung couldn't spend an extra $.0005 and include these on the SSD is unknown. So, overall 4 stars for the drive, 0 stars for the lack of Mac installation support and the required accessory expenses, averaging out to 2 stars for this review.

I bought this about six months ago and it's held up way better than I expected. I've reread it three times already, dragging my Kindle through airports, beach trips, and bath nights, and the formatting still looks perfect every single time I open it. No weird glitches, no missing chapters, nothing. The story itself gets better with each reread too. You catch little details you missed the first go-around, especially in the dialogue between the two main characters. Their whole dynamic feels genuine, like people you actually know arguing and making up. I was worried it'd be one of those forgettable romances I delete after finishing, but nope, still sitting in my favorites folder. Definitely recommend if you want something that sticks with you long term.

I bought this messenger bag two years ago for commuting and the magnetic front closure is my favorite part. I can grab my laptop or keys without fumbling with zippers, and it still snaps shut securely every time. The shoulder strap hasn't frayed at all despite daily train rides. Honestly thought I'd need to replace it by now but everything still works perfectly. Great value for the price.

I've been using this dripper every single morning for about eight months now, and it still looks brand new. The build quality is seriously impressive. I was worried the plastic version might crack or stain over time, but mine has held up perfectly through countless brews and trips through the dishwasher. No discoloration, no warping, nothing. The flat bottom design gives me a really consistent cup, and I've found it way more forgiving than cone-style brewers when I'm half asleep and my pour technique gets sloppy. Still using the same stand I bought with it too, solid as day one. If you're on the fence, just get it.

We were lucky enough to receive the Fisher Price Little People City Skyway from Fisher Price for free to check out. My kids (3.5 yer old girl and 17 month old boy) were absolutely enthralled when they saw the box. I could not open it fast enough and then, I could not build it fast enough. Building took some time but overall was easy enough (just need a screw driver). Everything is labeled nicely. My husband says they need to include an extra screw (because he lost one). I will admit, I was skeptical about this toy. We had seen it in Target previously and my kids were attracted to it like moths to a flame. I remember thinking, "ummm, not going to happen. One trick pony toy." However, I'm happy to report, I was super wrong. My kids LOVE this. They've been playing with it everyday, multiple times during the day. Pros: -It's huge. Like nearly as tall as my 3.5 year old huge. Definitely taller than the boy. -It comes with two cars, Koby and Tessa. -You don't have to wait for one car to finish before you start the other (essential for the sharing challenged). -It fits other Little People cars. -You can slide other cars or things down the ramps (like Octonauts for example). -The cars can go to three separate exits and they can either go down the ramps on their own or the kids can switch them. -It really does inspire imaginative play with a fueling station, stop light, crane and gate. -It spans the ages nicely. -No batteries!!!! -Sturdy. Doesn't fall over easily and seems like it could take a pretty good beating at the hands of children. Cons: -It IS big so if space is limited this could take up precious space. If your kid is really into cars though, it's totally worth it. All in all, this is worth the asking price. Would make a fantastic holiday or just because present!
For the price this is wonderful, put it in my Wheler Scope insertion box.

Dropping to 3 stars as it is not really "non slip", the white dots are not scratchy whatever to keep you in place, they are just deeper pieces of plastic.... Definitely not a step stool you want to use if you are actually wet, like out of the swimming pool or bathtub wet... unfortunately it took a fall for us to look at it a little closer and see they were not slip grip things. Is still a great stool, just not safe non slip.... it is super sturdy and easy to use, just stay dry
Honestly can't beat the price. Keeps me surprisingly warm on early morning rides. Totally worth it.
This movie precedes "Lord of the Rings" movies...we really liked it. I think you would like it if you liked Lord of the Rings
Better than I expected for the price. Sizing runs slightly narrow compared to my usual size, but they broke in nicely after one round. Comfortable enough.
A very nice, clean (no sex but does have shootings) story.

Picked this up a few months ago when it was on sale and honestly can't believe how affordable it was compared to similar options. I was worried that the lower price might mean cheap construction or unreliable performance, but it's been completely solid. Paired it with my Home Assistant setup in about ten minutes, the inclusion process was painless and it hasn't dropped off the network once since day one. The range is better than I expected too, reaching across my garage without needing a repeater. For what I paid, I honestly expected to be troubleshooting every other week, but it's just been sitting there doing its job. Already ordered a second one for the back yard. Can't beat this at the current price point.

Leigh develops the world surrounding music well, allowing those without the background to understand whats going on, while also not bogging down those who are already in the know. The entire world is built in such a manner that you can easily follow the multiple different aspects of this well written novel. Unfortunately I had a hard time fully getting into the story. I enjoyed the characters in this novel. Leigh has developed them in a multifaceted manner, allowing readers to get to know them on many levels. There were times when I had a bit of difficulty merging them with their counterparts in the first novel of the series. The major transformations and character shifts were a little drastic, but were also very well & easily explained by the current events surrounding the characters. Although well written & enjoyable, I simply found this story difficult to fully get into. I fully understand why others can & will thoroughly enjoy it, it wasn't my cup of tea. Please note that I received a complimentary copy of this work in exchange for an honest review.
Arrived two days early in neat packaging. Opened it up and the fabric quality exceeded my expectations. So cute!

Ordered this on my Kindle last Tuesday and it downloaded instantly, no issues at all. The cover art caught my eye right away and the formatting looked clean on my Paperwhite, no weird spacing or typos like you sometimes get with cheaper indie titles. Started reading the first chapter during my lunch break and honestly didn't want to put it down. The opening hook with the stranger picked up on the road during that storm setup had me invested from page one. Characters feel like real people you might actually know. I'm about halfway through now and already planning to check out what else this author has written. Glad I took a chance on this one. Totally worth the couple bucks.

Dropped my Chromebook down a flight of stairs and the display was completely shattered with dead pixels everywhere. I'd never attempted any kind of laptop repair before, but figured I had nothing to lose. This replacement panel made the whole process surprisingly painless. The pre-mounted brackets lined up perfectly with the existing screw holes, so I didn't have to transfer anything over from the old screen. Just popped the bezel clips, disconnected the ribbon cable, swapped in the new panel, and booted it up. Colors look just as vibrant as the factory display and brightness is on par too. No dead spots, no flickering. Honestly took maybe twenty minutes with a basic screwdriver kit. Saved me from shelling out hundreds on a replacement laptop.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but these blew me away. Way better than the bulky electronic muffs I used before. They sit flush enough that my cheek weld isn't messed up on long guns, and muzzle blasts get dialed down nicely without making everyone sound muffled. Took them to an outdoor course all day and forgot they were in. Solid upgrade from what I thought I'd need to spend.

Yes, this is a new writing style for the talented MS EDWARDS. She has shown more talent than when she wrote as MS NICOLE EDWARDS. And, I didn't know that there ever was that much talent had existed. Being able to write books that are that good and being that different is phenomenal. We are talking like two completely different people. The book was great. I'm so excited about this series. And I can't wait for the next book. This review will have no spoilers as I don't include them. They can ruin a book if you include them in a review. The editing was good. The characterization was more than great. All the characters had a perfect role they played. Each of them could have their own unique story. The storyline was unique and not boring. You are always waiting for the next page. I gave it a 4.5 stars and then rounded it down. There was one or two chapters that was a little slow. But that was all. I RECOMMEND THIS BOOK. I URGE YOU TO READ THIS FIRST BOOK OF THE SERIES. I AM SURE YOU WILL NOT BE DISAPPOINTED AND YOU WILL WANT TO CONTINUE WITH THE SERIES. SO, GET THE BOOK AND ENJOY YOURSELF. HAPPY READING MY BOOK FRIENDS.......
So someone told me about this---and I wanted to get a quality dog food without a lot of corn or fillers and this product gets eaten by my precious pekes.
Great for sci-fi fans who love slow burns. Worth a watch.
Excellent packaging, Fast shipping, super quality for the right price.

Inexpensive,and works great. Very securely packed to prevent shipping damage. The instructions and data were spot on, including voltages at startup and at idle. It has multiple stage charging, going to an idle state when the battery is fully charged.

This is part of Alistair Horne's four remarkable books about the military history of France from 1870 to 1962. This volume chronicles the collapse of the French army and government in 1940. No matter how powerful your army, lack of political will ends in defeat.

I am never without a bottle of Weldbond close at hand in my work shop. I use it to bond everything and I especially like it's flexibility and stability in hot weather. All in a glue that's non-toxic and water cleanup without any fumes or even that urea smell from Elmers.
We got these to be part of a Halloween costume and they were perfect! Now we have an addition to our wardrobe for the rest of the year too!

I've loved Conn Iggulden's story telling since his first publication. He's got a wonderful talent for bringing intriguing perspectives to historical events and characters, and for drawing the reader into a very personal adventure through time. His War of the Roses series is his first to focus on a female protagonist. If you haven't yet read this author, do so. He's an excellent writer.
These are super comfortable and cool to wear. I bought them to have a cool long sleeve undershirt for our trip to Alaska and they have been perfect.
My cat loves it! He goes crazy every time he smells it. I have a toy that I add a little bit of it in it and he plays with it for hours!

Wasn't sure this would actually work for my hard-to-fit size, but it exceeded my expectations. Most wireless options give zero lift, but this one actually holds everything up nicely. The band stays put without digging in. Honestly shocked at how comfortable it is all day.

Got this for hiking and camping trips after returning a flimsier model. Build quality is no joke, dropped it on rocks twice and not a scratch. The band holds tight through sweat and rain, and the luminous markers actually stay visible past midnight. Button push feels solid, not mushy. Downside is the weight; after a full day my wrist needs a break, and it catches on jacket cuffs sometimes. Had to remove two links for a decent fit, and the clasp took some fiddling to get right. Battery life seems solid so far, three months without adjustment. Not something I'd grab for office days but for anything outdoors it does the job. Four stars because the heft takes getting used to, otherwise reliable gear.

As an avid reader stumbling onto something truly new and interesting is such a rare and welcome treat. I have read a few of Phil Rickmans stand alone older novels and loved them. This is the first in the Merrily Watkins series and it is a pleasure to read. Atmospheric and well written, the pace plot and charaters are all excellent. I won't go into yet another description of the story as many others have already done so..but I will say BUY THIS BOOK! You will be so happy that you did and won't be able to wait to read the next one. Here is a helpful hint on the order of books in the series: 1. Wine of Angels 2. Midwinter of the Spirit 3. A Crown of Lights 4. The Cure of Souls 5. The Lamp of the Wicked 6. The Prayer of the Night Shepard 7. The Smile of a Ghost 8. Remains of an Altar 9. The Fabric of Sin

Picked this up for my OM-D E-M10 and it's been fantastic. Tiny footprint fits right in my jacket pocket, yet throws plenty of light. Tilting head works great for bouncing off ceilings. Hard to beat at this price point.

Unlike some other reusable bags I have, you don't have to fold this a certain way to get it back together. You just wad it up to stuff it back into the flower pocket and pull it tight and it looks as good as when it arrived! It comes with a small clip if you want to clip it to a backpack, purse, or you can just put them all on one hood by their string to keep them all together when not in use. They are small and don't take up a lot of room. I always have one in my purse when I go to a festival just in case I decide to make some purchases. I like the different colors, and when you open it, it's just that plain color, but has one stem on it, keeping the rose theme. It's a great price, so I love throwing one in with a gift etc. Everyone really seems to like them and think they are clever and useful. As for size, like I said it is much smaller than anticipated. When I gave one to a friend, she said it was the perfect size for milk. I think getting a whole gallon in here might not be optimal, but it can definitely carry a half gallon easily... It has hooks on one surface like in Velcro, that was a surprise. Pretty sure it performed better than the other brand that has green & yellow sponge on magnets.

Just finished reading Close up and Personal in 3.5 hours. Loved it. This is your classic alpha male falls in love at first sight with beautiful young girl story. Taylor does an amazing job conveying the character's emotions and sexual tension. Can't wait for to see what happens next.

Bought this on a whim and totally worth every penny. The chemistry between Laura and her new boss had me hooked from chapter one. Super short but packs a serious punch. Perfect quick read for the price.
This is the first time I have read anything from this author, but it will not be my last! Her romance stories are so good! I can not wait to read more of her books!!!!!
