A good read which keeps you wondering until the end.

Bought this for my kayak trips and it's been exactly what I needed. The mesh is strong enough to handle decent-sized fish without tearing, and the handle has a good grip even when your hands are wet. I've dragged it through some brush and over rocks and there's barely a scratch on it. Folds down small enough to tuck behind my seat without being in the way. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who banks fishes or has a smaller kayak where space is tight. Honestly for the price I wasn't expecting much but it's held up way better than some of the pricier nets I've tried before. Going on six months of regular use and still going strong. Can't ask for much more than that.

Installed this Chamberlain smart hub about a month ago and honestly wish I'd done it sooner. The whole setup took maybe twenty minutes from unboxing to having both garage doors connected. The app walks you through everything and within ten minutes I was opening and closing the doors from my kitchen. What really sold me was being able to check if I left the garage open when I'm already in bed. Used to drive me crazy. Now I just glance at my phone. Notifications are quick, maybe a two second delay at most. Scheduling the lights to come on before I get home from work is a nice bonus too. No connectivity drops so far and the range seems solid. Definitely worth the money if you're on the fence.
the book goes to show how 150 students come to be a " family". it is amazing how the world can change for studets in their situation

Ordered this for my new puppy's crate and it arrived two days earlier than expected, nicely vacuum-sealed in compact packaging. Once I opened it, the pad fluffed up quickly and felt surprisingly plush. The material seems durable and the stitching looks solid. Way softer than I anticipated for the price. Haven't washed it yet but so far it's holding up great against my pup's claws. Really impressed with the quality right out of the bag.

These are ok, but just cheap plastic. I'm keeping them because the grand kids will enjoy them, but I bought better ones for the bug out bags. Not really pleased, just ok. Another review by Rick's wife:-)

Ordered this percolator on a Tuesday and it showed up two days later in a sturdy box with plenty of bubble wrap, so no dents or scratches to worry about. Pulled it out and was immediately impressed by how solid it feels. The stainless steel has a nice weight to it and the handle is attached securely. Washed it out, fired it up on the stove, and within minutes the kitchen smelled amazing. The basket fits perfectly and the whole thing just feels well made. I've already used it every morning since it arrived and cleanup is surprisingly easy. Honestly wasn't sure about switching from my old drip machine but this little pot has completely changed my mind. Genuinely glad I took the chance on this one.
Another great read hopefully more to come. Makes you feel sorry for the killers but that's not the answer. What's next.

This book gives you a very specific guide on how to do your own mini-farm, it's really detailed so this book is really for beginners. I've been trying several days to star my own mini farm and this book gave me the tips to be able to really do it! It's really easy to read and understand.
This is the best mouse I've ever owned. Hands down the best mouse for wireless gaming.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box, not crammed in a bag. Opened them up and the memory foam feels amazing right away. My kid immediately put them on and refused to take them off.
The racing footage is absolutely stunning. Watched it twice already and got goosebumps both times during the Belmont sequence.

I read this book and I really enjoyed it. A poignant, memorable, sad, moving and touching story of one of the most tragic events in the state of CT. I enjoyed all the old pictures, the stories, and the memories in this book about the fire. It told of the aftermath also. It was well written and Mr O' NAN spend a lot of time researching material for this great book. If anyone wants to read about this event, then this is the book for you. I bought this in hardcover also for keeps. I enjoyed this book immensely since I am a history buff. It also told about Little Miss 1565, and the trial. Mr. O'Nan goes into great depth about this subject making it easy to understand.

Got these for my son for school and they look awesome. The first week was rough, super stiff and gave him blisters on both ankles. We stuck with thick socks and they've broken in nicely now. I'd recommend these to anyone who already knows their Vans size and doesn't mind a short break-in period. Not ideal for wide feet though.

Got this to help with meal prep and it does the job well. The tare function is handy, I can put my plate on, zero it out, then add rice or chicken without doing any calculations. My only complaint is the buttons feel a little cheap and sometimes I have to press twice to get it to register. Accuracy seems solid though. I've checked it against my old scale and the readings match. For the price, can't really complain.

I really wanted to love these. The light output is fantastic, super bright and a clean white that makes my garage look way better than the old fluorescents. But two of the six I ordered started flickering after just three months, and one completely died last week. For LEDs that claim a long lifespan, that's pretty disappointing. At least they were cheap, but I expected more than a few months out of them. Probably won't buy again.

This watch is a real beauty, the red dial really sets it off. I like that it is very inexpensive, so I wear it daily with no worries. Be aware that it does not have a date function, nor does the bezel rotate. The chronograph is fully functional. The watch comes in a large plastic waterproof container which is really interesting. The case is odd, but I like it. The band length is enormous, I have a 9 inch wrist and still took out four links, so if you have a large wrist you are in luck. Don't forget to get a link remover when you order this, one is not included. Tip: One side of the pins look like screw heads...you want to tap the pins out from the other side. There are arrows on the back of the links that also indicate the correct direction for pin removal.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these are seriously bright. Way better than the bulky ones I had before. Cars actually slow down when I'm out cycling at night now. Totally worth every penny.
Couldn't put it down. The courtroom scenes were incredibly realistic and had me hooked from the very first page.

Ordered it from Amazon on Nov. 15 and it arrived promptly on Nov. 20 in a nice box with the item in excellent condition! I've owned the Makita BO5010 (non-variable) for several years and I love it. The fit and finish on the BO5012 is just as nice and it feels much lighter and better balanced than my new variable Porter Cable (which I'm going to sell to a friend ASAP). I was undecided between this unit and the highly rated Bosch variable, but after lifting the Bosch up, I felt it was also too bulky for me. Overal an excellent choice for me, sands extremely smooth and picks up most of the dust without the vacuum attached.

For twelve bucks I honestly wasn't expecting much, but these little panel lights genuinely surprised me. The output is way more powerful than the size suggests. I clipped one onto my camera bag strap for some late evening trail walking and it lit up a solid 15 feet ahead of me with an even, clean beam. No weird hot spots or blue tint like cheap LEDs usually have. The shoe mount clamp grips tight and hasn't slipped on me once. I also like that you can snap multiple units side by side if you need a bigger setup. Battery lasts a good while too, got about three hours of continuous use before it needed charging. You really can't beat this for the money. Grabbing a second one.

Our granddaughter loves to carry this radio around with her and has been playing with it since she was about 9 months old. She is 2 years old now and still enjoys it. It appears it could be something she will use through age 3 or 4. Good selection of tunes.
My daughter loves the doll and pets, so it's worth it for those alone. The accessories feel cheap and break easily. I'd recommend this for younger kids who won't care about the extra pieces.
worth renting for a night in and has some pee your pants funny parts but the preview shows too much
Bought this for movie night and the whole gang loved it. The bonus behind-the-scenes extras were surprisingly entertaining. Definitely keeping this one in our regular rotation.
Carol's storytelling feels like chatting with a close friend. Those bite-sized chapters made it perfect for reading during my morning commute.

I've been following this series from the beginning and honestly expected another gripping naval adventure. This one feels different. Don't get me wrong, the historical detail is still impressive and I actually learned a ton about daily shipboard routines, provisioning, and how the crew passed the time during long stretches between ports. But that's kind of the whole book. Where the earlier entries had real momentum and tension, this installment just drifts. I kept waiting for the plot to pick up and it never really did. The writing is still solid and the characters feel lived-in, so it's not a bad read exactly. Just temper your expectations. If you want action, you'll be disappointed. If you enjoy the slice-of-life stuff, you might actually like this one more than I did.
Great for travel if your kids don't mind some tiles not sticking together.
Sound quality is decent but the connector fits really loosely in the port.
Bought this for my 11-year-old's costume party and it was a hit. The dress is well-made and true to size. Only complaint is the gloves slip a bit, but nothing a little fashion tape can't fix.

Nothing special here. Good inexpensive headphones that are comfortable on your ears and head. These phones fit on top of your ears using foam covers. The fit is not too tight and yet do not fall off the head easily. Of course I am not exercising with these phones so maybe someone else can comment on their ability to stay on the head during a workout. A nice convenience is that the ear phone cups rotate flat if you would like to compact them or hang them around your neck when not in use. For the money, less than $12.00, they are adequate and if you walk on them or the dog eats them not much of a loss. Not a bad replacement for ear-buds if you prefer a descent set of portable headphones. On notice: a lot of ear-buds will actually reduce exterior noise better than these cups.
A little tacky, but on the shelf in the spare bathroom.

I would be tempted to give this a 3 1/2 if Amazon allowed that option. The short version is that I can see this for the lower age child if she has an interest in robots or computers. But kids want more from their electronic toys. Middle aged adults who don't care about electronic toys shouldn't receive this as a gift. (Not referring to myself by the way, I love electronic toys) I've bought severeal WowWee products over the years including the Robosapien and the Roboraptor. This is the first one that I had to download an app to fully appreciate-- It says in the product information that it works without the app but given the limitations I'm not sure that I would buy this without access to either an ipad or a smart phone. My ipad is a bit outdated and the app would not download to it, so I downloaded it to my Samsung III phone which worked ok. I think this is the oldest Samsung that it would work with by the way. Like all of the WowWee products I have bought it does not come with a battery so I had to supply them. It also has a compartment for the batteries that requires a tiny screw driver. I don't know if they plan to upgrade the app but it doesn't do a lot of different things-- makes noises, the face on the screen changes, and it can run through a simple routine of turns and straight movements. A ten year old lost interest in it pretty quick but a 7 year old was more intrigued. The most damning statement came from a 53 year old who said it was like a Furbee but more annoying.

We looked everywhere in stores for a product like this with no luck. Thankfully we found it online. It is precisely what we needed to give some more hanging space in the closet. The product is durable and priced reasonably.

I was provided a copy of this book in exchange for an honest review. I admit, that I was a little confused at first. The person who wrote the "Single Guy" column, was he Matthew Rhodes, or Ryan, or were they the same guy? After I figured that out, it was pretty smooth sailing. Ryan's column was a somewhat cynical view of Love, and the column Mia wrote, "Lonely Girl", was more about single women navigating the dating scene. When Ryan and Mia first met, they each had no idea they were with the person behind the column. Their focus was on the 'reality' of Love as they saw it. They had great chemistry going until Mia figured out that Ryan was Lonely Guy and bolted. They both end up on a Bachelor type dating show as contestants. They each have their own agenda for appearing, and it is not to fall in love. Both Ryan and Mia were shocked to find out they were both going to be on the show. I did love their back and forth teasing and wittiness in their conversations. One not believing in love. The other feeling unlovable. There was blackmail, corruption, deceit, manipulation, love, loyalty, and family throught this book. Let's not forget a few steamy sex scenes. There is a HEA, no worries there. This was a fun, romance read. My only regret was there was no detail on Mia's boss ever getting what was coming to her. I also wasn't 100% sure if Ryan got to write the article that he really wanted to and use some of the information against Mia's boss. I was left wanting more. Maybe that's a good thing....

Bought this for my Nikon D5600 and it's been a total lifesaver for outdoor shoots. The elastic band fits snugly around the body without blocking any buttons or dials, which was my biggest worry. I do real estate photography and constantly struggled seeing the screen in bright conditions. This blocks glare completely and folds flat in my bag. The magnetic closure is surprisingly strong too. Honestly worth every penny if you shoot outside regularly.

I wasn't sure what to expect with these building sets since my kid is super picky about his Transformers stuff, but honestly this blew me away. The quality is way better than I anticipated and the pieces actually stay together once you snap them in place. My eight year old had zero trouble following the instructions by himself, which was a nice surprise. The conversion feature works smoothly without parts flying off everywhere like cheaper sets we've dealt with. You get a solid main build plus a couple little figures that my son uses for his own made-up battles. For what these cost, I figured it would feel flimsy, but it's held up to daily play for three weeks now. Definitely buying more.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage. My toddler's face lit up immediately when she squeezed it and heard the voice. The doll is softer than I expected and feels well-made. Only wish the volume was a touch lower.

I've been using this rechargeable headlamp for night fishing and overall it's solid gear. The spot beam reaches way out there, I can easily pick out the far bank of the lake, which my old Energizer couldn't do. Battery lasts me through a full evening trip, maybe four hours on high. My one gripe is it runs hot after extended use and the strap could be wider for comfort. I'd absolutely recommend this to hunters, hikers, or anyone doing focused distance work where seeing far ahead matters more than lighting up a wide area. If you need a flood light for close-up tasks, look elsewhere. For trail walking and spotting stuff at range though, this thing punches well above its price point.
Fascinating! An inside look at the Lindberg family, warts and all. This is not only based on historical fact; it is an amazing love story.

I've had this book for about eight months now and it's been through everything with me. Thrown in my work bag, read at the beach, dropped in the bathtub (don't ask), and passed around to two of my coworkers who demanded it after I wouldn't shut up about it. The spine is still holding strong with no cracking, pages haven't loosened at all, and the cover barely shows wear despite all the abuse I've put it through. Quality binding matters when you reread a series this good. Asa's arc completely wrecked me in the best way possible. Going from honestly not caring much about his character early on to being fully invested by the final chapters was something else. Grabbed the whole set in paperback and they're built to last.
My husband likes the fit and that it is higher fit. He just wishes that the material was a little thicker. These are a lot better than other brands.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is built like a tank. Way heavier and more solid than the flimsy power strips I've bought at Walmart. My PC and monitor are safe.

Packed Well by Amazon and arrived undamaged. However, all 6 of my cats didn't like it. They picked at it and left if for the dogs to clean up! First Friskies Flavor I've found that NONE of my cats liked!
Way better than I expected. The plot twists caught me completely off guard.

I'd been hunting this one down for months after hearing how notorious it was on a bunch of horror podcasts. Finally got my hands on it and honestly? I don't get the hype at all. The picture quality looks like someone dubbed it off a worn-out VHS tape left in a hot garage. That might be forgivable if the movie itself delivered, but nothing ever happens. You sit through forty minutes of people walking around and talking about nothing before anything remotely interesting kicks in. Compared to other underrated 70s cult films I've tracked down, this is just boring. The transfer is inexcusable though, dark, grainy, and the audio drops out constantly. Save your money and watch literally anything else from the era. Total letdown.
This cable lock works fine. I use it on my bike for security. Read review before you purchase.

My Generation 4 Glock 23's take-down lever was so short, getting firm contact with it for disassembly was very difficult for me. The 'King Glock Competition Slide Lock' replacement was the answer. The serration cuts on the new lock are aggressive and protrude out from the frame just far enough so I now can get positive contact for easy disassembly. I had my local gun shop's armorer do the install which took him all of about 2 minutes and at no charge. After he installed my new slide lock he commented he that liked this part better than the factory lock on his G19 and was going to get one for his pistol as well. Finally, this new part does not interfere with holstering my G23 in or out which I thought you might like to know. All in all I'm very satisfied with my purchase and highly recommend the 'King Glock Competition Slide Lock'.

This was better than I expected. Well acted and directed! Sinister is definitely a good name for this one! I was not 'thrilled' with the ending.....but that is better than the usual 'lived happily ever after'.
Arrived quickly and packaging kept it in perfect shape. Opened it right up and the formatting is clean and easy to read. Really impressed with the quality so far. Exactly what I wanted.
Worked fine for about a month then the left speaker completely died. Cheap build quality, wouldn't recommend wasting your money.
These are fantastic! The adhesive is super strong and holds up great against my cat's claws. Zero bunching issues so far.
Great movie. In fact, I order the newest one, resurgence.
Kind of chunky, but great protection, great looking, and extremely functional. I highly recommend it.

Really solid backpack for what I paid. Padding is decent and the water bottle pockets actually hold a Nalgene without stretching out. My 15 inch laptop slides in easy with a little room to spare. Zippers feel a touch flimsy but haven't failed me yet after six weeks of daily use. Would buy again.
Sock was very long, over my knee. Like them otherwise, but returned for this reason and I'm 6'1" tall.

Couldn't believe the quality for what I paid. Assembly took maybe ten minutes with the included tool. Feels solid and looks way more expensive than it was. Fits perfectly in our guest bedroom. Very happy with this purchase.
Great ingredients list and my picky eater finishes every bowl. Will buy again.
Bought these for field day games and the kids went absolutely crazy for them.

Been using this raincoat for three months of daily walks and it's held up amazingly. No tears, velcro still sticks strong, and the leash opening is super convenient. Fits my cocker spaniel perfectly in large. Totally worth it.
Not as epic as his usual alternate history doorstoppers, but the tight format actually works well here. Solid quick read.
A lot better than expected. nice pace and full of action.
I liked Braydon much better than his brother. It was a good read.
Great short romance for a quick weekend read. Piston and Belle have solid chemistry. Perfect for motorcycle club romance fans who want something steamy but fast.
Thought these would feel dated, but the mysteries hold up surprisingly well. Glad I grabbed the set.
Perfect for anyone who travels or camps with their pup. Folds completely flat so I keep one in the car and one in my hiking pack. Would definitely recommend to other dog owners.

Honestly exceeded what I expected for the price. The inner pot feels a little thin and I was worried it wouldn't heat evenly, but everything I've made has turned out great. My only complaint is the lid can be finicky to lock into place properly before it pressurizes. Overall a solid buy.
This was a quick, smutty read that makes me want to read the rest of the series! I guess that's the point of short stories/novellas -- in that case, mission accomplished!

I have a Windows Surface Pro 2, a Kindle Fire, and an iPad. This Acer Iconia is a welcome addition. It's lightweight, easy to hold when I use it as an e-reader. It's fast and powerful. I am able to check work email and use the MS Office suite easily on this small form factor. For Windows users, this is a great tablet to have.

I picked this up on a whim and honestly couldn't put it down. The way the author weaves together the political turmoil of early 1900s Ireland with the deeply personal unraveling of the Carmody family is just brilliant. You really feel the tension building as loyalties get tested and siblings end up on completely different sides of the divide. What got me most was how the move from Dublin to London shifts everything, the characters have to rebuild themselves in a place that doesn't feel like home, and that sense of displacement comes through on every page. The historical detail never feels like a lecture either. It's just woven right into the story. Finished it in three days and immediately wanted more from this writer. Proper absorbing stuff.
My cat loves this toy. She'll run all the way from one end of the room then take a swing at the ball then sprint to the other side of the room. She love it.

Admittedly, casting Atlanta Braves' bad boy John Rocker as a serial killer was an inspired piece of casting. However, big John is hardly in the film at all. Which means we're left with a cast of really bad actors running around in their bathing suits and what not, and even with some innovative methods of offing the victims, THE GREENSKEEPER breaks no new ground in the art of film-making. There are, however, some priceless lines: having three of the boytoys named Chad, Chet and Chuck (or something like that); when one of the bimbos has to cancel her vacation because the island is being taken over by guerillas, she innocently says "I didn't even know they had a zoo." A lame, tired rip off of all the slasher movies you've ever seen.

Got this as a backup head for my studio kit and honestly it does the job for what I paid. The build feels solid enough and the quick release plate is convenient. That said, if you put any kind of heavier rig on it the tilt lock struggles to keep things steady. I'm using a small mirrorless with a compact lens and it holds okay most of the time but occasionally drifts. For the price point it's hard to complain too much. Would I trust it on a paid shoot? Not really but as a secondary option it gets the job done.

Ordered this for my niece's birthday and it showed up two days early in a rigid mailer with no bent corners or damage at all, which honestly is rare for paperback books these days. Pulled it out and the cover colors immediately popped, super bright and glossy, way nicer than I was expecting for the price. Flipped through a few pages before wrapping it and the inside art is just as stunning. Each page is packed with detail and the paper quality feels durable enough to survive a toddler handling it. My niece sat through the whole thing without getting distracted once, which says a lot. Genuinely impressed and will be grabbing more from this author for future gifts.

Bass is muddy but acceptable in a speaker set in this price range. If you can recall to take extreme care when assembling, disassembling, or moving this speaker set, and if you're not looking for high fidelity, this is probably a perfectly fine purchase. My wife moved the woofer to make room while vacuuming and bumped the back of the woofer against the wall. This broke the tweeter audio connector internally, making it so that I had to wiggle the tweeter connector cable in order to make a connection - and high volumes would shake it loose almost immediately. Being only invested for $40 and being fairly certain the connector was probably wired separately from the circuit board, I decided to disassemble the woofer and attempt a repair. I quickly discovered that every seam and component are glued into place - even those which are (also) screwed-down. I also then discovered that the audio connector is part of the circuit board rather than being a separate lead-out connector. The repair was beyond my soldering skills and though I could have taken it to a repair shop, the cost of doing so would have exceeded the purchase price of a new speaker set.
These are okay. Fit is right but quality feels cheaper than my last pair.

Picked up a handful of these for our warehouse storage units so multiple shifts can get in without tracking keys. Overall they do the job fine and programming new codes is pretty straightforward once you read through the instructions. Battery life has been decent, going on eight months with the original set. My only real complaint is the keypad buttons feel a little mushy after heavy use, and a couple of them stick in wet weather. A quick shot of lubricant fixes it, but still something to keep in mind. Solid choice for the price.

Works great. To address some negative reviews: 1. If the voltage of your battery drops below 0.89 volts it will not turn on at all. The flashlight is not broken. Put a new battery in it. I know this is not intuitive if you're used to filament bulb flashlights but this is a LED and that's the way they work. 2. Flashlight behaves erratically. It has an emergency strobe mode that can be engaged by pressing the button halfway down. That's the way it's supposed to work. If you don't want it to do that press the on/off switch all the way down.
Arrived quickly in a padded mailer so the cover wasn't dented. Flipping through, the photos look gorgeous and the recipes seem straightforward. Can't wait to dig in.

Switched to these after dealing with two other brands that clogged constantly. The flow rate is what really impressed me, fills a glass in seconds with no slowdown even after months of use. Water tastes clean and the build quality feels solid, not flimsy plastic like competitors. Installation took maybe two minutes with no leaks. Will definitely order again when this one runs out.
Got these to replace the flimsy ones on my dog's crate. Super sturdy and a steal for the price. Highly recommend.

Although this movie has a far bigger ambition than budget, it still manageed to delight and entertain me throughout all of its 89 minutes. It's by far the best movie THE ASYLUM has produced yet and while it certainly isn't up to the production standards of big budget hollywood stuff, it is often far more entertaining than the overblown hype Michael Bay and his ilk come up with. Honestly, the movie has a very striking, almost psychodelic look with loads of wild, garish lighting and lurid color schemes. The editing is fast and frantic and the visual effects are occasionally almost passable. The acting is over the top (and lots of fun) and the script is really out there. I truly enjoyed and appreciated this thing a lot. The DVD transfer is especially excellent and on an upconverting DVD player it often approaches bluray picture quality. The super aggressive Dolby 5.1 surround sound will also give your subwoofer a real workout (although dialog is sometimes a bit distorted). Plenty of surround effects as well for an emersive experience. The premise of this one is so goofy and it moves along with a giddy speed that kept me smiling from start to finish. I loved it.

This is a great knee brace for doing any lifting that requires bending your knee. It is way more secure than I thought it was going to be. I usually use a knee brace that has adjustable straps, since I've experienced a lot of slippage with knee sleeves. This however is an exception. I did size down one to ensure a tight fit. It is made of good material and is very sturdy. Most products from bear grips has great quality. They obviously put a lot into the products they sell to their consumers. I received this at a discount in exchange for an honest review.

Our 3 year old golden retriever has softer fur, unlike our female whose coat is shinier and sleeker, so he tends to need to be bathed on a weekly basis to keep him smelling fresh and clean. He's like a little boy, he loves to explore and especially loves to jump in every puddle, pond, any body of water he sees basically which leaves his fur smelling what can best be described as fishy so I'm always looking for a great shampoo that won't irritate his sensitive skin. This medicated dog shampoo has done absolute wonders for the dry, flaky skin both our goldens have on their front elbows. We had tried creams, sprays, even oral meds but nothing was helping but since we started using this the skin has softened and fur is growing back and they are no longer scratching themselves to death, thrilled with the results, highly recommend. This item was supplied to me at no cost during a promotion by the seller in order to evaluate and share my experience. All opinions are 100% my own and they reflect my honest & unbiased opinion. One may or may not have the same results as myself when using it. I hope this review helps anyone looking for a medicate pet shampoo that really works, if there are any questions please don't hesitate to ask and I'll do my best to help. If you found this review to be helpful to you please click the yes button to let me know, thanks.
We really liked this, but I didn't like mixing the paint.

As someone who had ignored the whole "Harry Potter" fever that enveloped the literary world years ago, I fell in love with the magical movies. Now I'm reading the novels and finding out thing and filling in gaps I never knew. Its great to suddenly understand why X did this, or Q did that! For instance, in the movies I always wondered why Kreacher was in Sirius' house and why he was so awful! In the books you get more insight.

I really liked this fun sexy read. When Charlotte Atkinson takes the job on her fathers cruise ship as a chef, she just wants to prove herself to him. While this seems like an impossible task, proving to the rest of the kitchen staff that she deserves the job is even harder. Jeremy Turner, the ship's chief security officer, has quite the reputation with the ladies. So who better to have a little fun with?? He's just trying to cruise through life until he figures out what he really wants to do so having a little fun with the captain's daughter may not be the best way to stay out of trouble!! As I said this is a light sexy read and I definitely recommend it.
right side of head phones just stopped working and the ear buds keep falling out.

Wasn't sure this would fit our entryway but decided to try it anyway. Turns out it's way more versatile than I expected. Caught a few mud tracks last week and you'd never know. Looks way pricier than what I paid. Honestly exceeded what I was hoping for.

Got this on sale for like six bucks and honestly would've paid double. The way Kyle walks you through each deployment with such plain-spoken honesty really pulls you in. You're not getting flowery war poetry here, you're getting the real grind of what these guys went through overseas and the brutal transition back home each time. The chapters from his wife's perspective hit surprisingly hard too. For the price of a fast food meal you get a firsthand account that sticks with you long after finishing. Plenty of books in this genre feel padded or overhyped but this one earns every page. Grab a copy, you won't regret it.

For under three bucks this is a total steal. I've been doing the palming exercises every morning and my eyes feel way less strained after staring at screens all day. The section on shifting and central fixation took me a minute to get the hang of but once it clicked it made a huge difference. Also the sunning technique is oddly relaxing. Honestly I paid way more for a single optometrist visit and got less practical advice. If your eyes are tired all the time grab this.

My MacBook Pro gets hot. I have to run it with a cooling fan or it will start slowing down. (In order to keep itself from overheating, Macs manage the temperature by adding more idle processes into the queue until it's cooled down!) I was using a different laptop cooling fan solution before this, but it was noisy and barely helping unless it was on high (extra loud mode). When I ordered this, I was expecting better cooling from a larger fan, but the other MAJOR benefit to a large fan, and the main reason I bought this item, is that it's almost silent. Smaller fans spin faster and therefore make more noise. This fan is almost as big as the 15" MacBook Pro. The stand itself, leaves about 1" around each side. You can use it with or without the stand. When sitting flat, it has a very clean and simple profile. Finally, I love the bamboo - it was a final selling point for me. BTW, they sell a "pro" version of this, with a nifty adjustable stand. I would have bought that, but it has two small fans, so it would be noisier than this one. I use this sitting flat with the lid closed and plugged into one monitor, so adjusting the angle is a moot point.
Verbs in finds trouble without looking. Between Ares family and stumbling into faire,Vervain is about to find more than she bargained for.
For the money I don't think you can beat this light. Very bright. Long battery life.
Thought it'd be flimsy but feels solid. Cable management finally sorted.
The length of the arms and legs were a little shorter than I expected a 6x to fit. But nice quality and great value.

Arrived two days early and was wrapped super securely in bubble wrap. As soon as I opened the box, I was blown away by how sturdy the wood feels. The painted chihuahua detail is crisp and clean with no smudges. Hung it right next to my front door and it looks amazing. Already getting compliments from neighbors!
Bought this for my daughter's birthday and she adores it. The galloping sound is surprisingly realistic. Only downside is the volume has no control, gets a little annoying after a while.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this completely over delivered. You get the full set of discs plus the nutrition guide and calendar all included, no extra purchases needed. I was paying $40 a month for a gym I never went to, so this paid for itself in like two weeks. The workouts are short enough that I can knock one out before work without dreading it, but intense enough that I'm dripping sweat by the end. I've been doing the classic track for about six weeks and already seeing definition in my shoulders and arms. The variety keeps things fresh so I haven't gotten bored once. For what you're getting here this is an absolute steal. Already told my brother to grab a copy.
Schleich toys are great quality and my kids love them.
Nice well-made frame. It's nothing special, but was what I needed. It looks sleek and nice with a colorful print in it. It's not high end wood, but still nice and glass not plastic.
Arrived fast in secure packaging. Watched it last night, fun action flick, decent story. Pretty solid overall.
I had to get all the Seasons of Everybody Loves Raymond, They are so funny, I watch them often with my kids, with some pop corn. Great Times.

Likes: Adding/removing the pound increments is easy and simple with very little effort. Dislikes: Sweat collects between the weights and the skin when the weights are worn directly on the skin. The fit is a little awkward because I have small writs and ankles.

Perfect size for organizing my spice packets and loose tea bags that were always a mess in my pantry. The clear plastic is thick and sturdy, not flimsy like some organizers I've tried. What I really appreciate is the slightly raised lip on the edges, it keeps round items from rolling off when I slide the tray out. Wipes clean easily with a damp cloth too. I ended up buying a second one for my bathroom drawer to hold cotton pads, q-tips, and small sample bottles. Fits perfectly side by side in a standard drawer. Honestly for the price these are hard to beat. Wouldn't hesitate to grab more if I find another area that needs tidying up.
My cat loves these she eats them all the time she bags for them if any one goes near where they are kept.
A really good reference book for easy access to all the conjugations of verbs. My constant companion at French class

I've had this on my outdoor cat for about five months now, and it's held up surprisingly well. No fading from the sun and the buckle still clicks securely. The bell is a little quieter than I expected, but honestly that's kind of nice. My only complaint is the printed info has started rubbing off slightly near the edges. Still totally readable though, and I'd buy it again.

Bought this for my nephew and the rubber started peeling off within a week. Feels hollow and flimsy, like it'll crack open if it hits concrete hard enough. Honestly only buy this if you need a prop for a photo shoot or want something for your dog to destroy in the backyard.
I liked this book. However, there was kind of a cliff hanger. I like this author's writing style and will definitely keep buying more.
I've had this on my Kindle for months now, rereading constantly, and the formatting still holds up perfectly. The story gets better every time. Totally worth keeping in your permanent library.

I was glad to buy this whole set together so I could read them from start to finish. I have to admit.katie's story got to me--I was surprised to find myself crying at the agony she faced when her father was so cruel to hear. Glad Jake finally found a way to be together with Katie!

Dug a hole, put in some gravel, drilled some holes in a 5 gallon bucket and set this thing in. Powerful and compact, it has worked great in my crawlspace. Not loud at all, and only runs for a few seconds to clear out the bucket. I did install the check valve of the same brand name, that has worked great also. I like the metal housing instead of the plastic of their cheaper models, and the vertical float allows it to fit in the 5 gallon bucket with room to spare.

One of my favorite baseball movies ever, and (if Wikipedia can be believed) closer to real life than many other 'based on a true story' flicks. Inspirational, with a solid performance from Quaid and the supporting cast also does a great job. Would rent it again, and recommend watching with younger kids who still think that baseball and their Dads are great.

Copy courtesy of Netgalley Stand alone -HEA Quick read - alternating points of view Let me start off by saying the story itself was ok. There were a few errors that were distracting/confusing. The reason why Robyn was kicked out at age 15. The whole family dynamics was off. There story in the beginning of the book was not what was revealed at the end. the relationship between Garrick and Robyn pretty much happened over night. Robyn was very independent and she worked hard to pay her bills and finance her degree. Garrick wanted to take care and protect her. He was possessive and bossy. They clashed a lot. But the make ups were hot and sexy. There was a lot of drama in a short period of time. Robyn became a magnet for trouble. Near rapes, stalkerish ex, drug dealers etc. Everything wrapped up nice and neat in the end.

Been wearing this cape almost daily for about three months now through rain, wind, and general Pacific Northwest nastiness, and it still looks practically new. The fabric hasn't pilled or faded at all, and the clasps are holding up way better than I expected, no bending or loosening. I was worried the stitching along the shoulders would start fraying since I load up the interior pockets pretty heavily, but everything's solid. Got caught in a downpour last week and water just rolled right off, didn't soak through even a little. Honestly feels like something that'll last me years. Fit runs a touch generous which works great for layering over sweaters. Wish it came in more colors because I'd buy another one immediately.

Wasn't expecting much for the price, but this little amp seriously delivers. I've got it pushing a pair of old bookshelf speakers in my workshop, and it gets plenty loud without breaking a sweat. The sound is surprisingly clean, no noticeable hum or hiss even at low volumes, which has been a problem with other cheap amps I've tried. Bass response is decent for something this small, and the mids and highs are crisp. It runs cool to the touch even after hours of use. Build quality feels solid for what it costs, and setup took about two minutes. Honestly, for what I paid, I figured I'd be replacing it within a month. Three months in and it's been rock solid. Can't really ask for more at this price point.

I bought my daughter 4 pairs of these little boots this winter. They're just so perfect. They are so warm and super comfy. She's excited to have boots just like mommy too! We went on a field trip with her preschool class to a farm today. It was VERY cold but she said her feet were toasty warm. She had enough traction walking around on uneven ground too. Love these little boots!

I grabbed this collection on a whim and honestly couldn't put it down. Read the whole thing over a weekend because I just needed to know what happened next. The chemistry between the two main characters is off the charts, and what I really appreciated was how the author handled Libby's personal struggles. It felt genuine, not glossed over or magically fixed overnight. Jax is exactly the kind of book boyfriend you want to root for, patient, hot, and totally devoted. The pacing across the set works well too; no weird lulls or filler scenes. If you're into steamy romance with actual emotional depth, this one delivers. Already checking out other books by this author because I'm hooked. Definitely worth the download.

For the price, this is a good deal. It's a very small box. Probably the size of a mini puzzle box. Definitely not worth the 16.00 it's listed for right now. I paid $8.00 for it and that's a decent price.
I don't know why the picture looks the way it does, the real necklace looks like your standard plastic crystal necklace, its very pretty and durable.
The windscreen on this thing is a game changer. Breezy morning at camp and my coffee still boiled in minutes. Solid build quality too.

Got this for my four-year-old's birthday after he saw the movie and honestly it's been a hit. The figures are a decent size for little hands and everything snaps together without too much fuss. Is it the heavy-duty plastic from thirty years ago? No, but what is anymore? For what I paid I feel like you get a fair amount of stuff in the box. The launcher works about as well as you'd expect and the small pieces do end up scattered across my living room daily. My kid has played with it almost every day for three weeks straight so I'd call that a win. Took maybe ten minutes to assemble. Would buy again for another kiddo into these characters.

These bags seemed small at first but once I put items in them, I found that they spread out a bit and I was pleasantly surprised at their actual capacity. I'm looking forward to using them this summer when I pickup my CSA share, as the produce is quite fresh and therefore still has dirt on it. This will allow for me to shake off the dirty and not get the insides of my normal grocery bags all dirty. They are nice and small so that I can easily always have one on hand too. I like that they are all natural cotton and free trade.

I've been following this series for years and grabbed this the day it came out. The story itself is decent and I did enjoy catching up with some familiar characters, but something definitely feels different here. The dialogue doesn't have that sharp punch the older books had and several plot points seemed rushed or underdeveloped. It's not a bad read overall and I don't regret buying it, just don't go in expecting the same quality as the earlier entries in the series. Took me about a week to finish when I used to devour these in a weekend. Three stars feels fair for what it is.
Install was easy enough but the deadband adjustment is useless. My unit kicks on and off constantly, wearing out my compressor way too fast.

Was hesitant spending this much on a drive but honestly it blew past what I thought I'd be getting. Boot times went from around 25 seconds down to barely 8 on my desktop. File transfers that used to crawl along now finish before I can grab my coffee. I figured the real world difference from my older SATA setup would be noticeable but not night and day like this. Samsung really delivered here. If you're on the fence about upgrading, just do it. You won't regret the extra cash.
Didn't hold my cat's scratching pad together at all. Fell apart within a day. Total waste of money.

This is a truly wonderful book. It's one that left me inspired when I first read it, and one that I have picked up and read a second and third time. Nicholls so effortlessly captures emotions, thought processes, and social intricacies that truly define the human experience. The characters are so real. I can't say enough good about One Day.

Worked okay for the first month or two. Nothing special, range was decent enough for my desk setup. Then the plastic housing started cracking around the USB connector. I always left it plugged into the same port and never moved it around much, so there's no reason it should have fallen apart like this. Now the connection drops constantly and I have to wiggle it to get my computer to recognize it at all. The antenna part also feels super loose compared to when it was new. For the price I honestly expected it to last longer than eight weeks. Going back to my old trusty adapter that's survived three years of actual abuse. Don't waste your money on this one, the build quality is just not there.

Swapped out the stock blade on my DeWalt and what a change. Plywood cuts like butter now with zero splintering. If you're doing trim work or cabinets, grab one of these. Way better than paying double at the hardware store.

Couldn't believe the quality for what we paid. The lid stays on tight during storms and the wood hasn't warped after a full year outside. My two kids play in it daily and there's still plenty of room. Honestly worth double the price. Best backyard purchase we've made.

I purchased 2 of these and gave one as a birthday gift to my daughters friend and one to my daughter. It's suer cute bag and is a washable type of material. The disney princesses are true to their looks and have good detail. Its a barrel type of purse that has a zipper closure. My daughter loves it and puts lots of different things in it. Currently she is keeping her play medical items in it. She [lays with it quite a bit audit seems to be holding up. Obviously she hasn't had it for that long but it seems to be made well. Again i really like that it is a washable canvas type of material. So why did i only give 4 stars? I was a little bit surprised as to how small it was, but my toddler uses it and it fits her well BUT the zipper top itself has a small opening. Its just odd.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Tried them out right away and they work great.

Arrived three days late and the plastic case was cracked open with bits scattered everywhere. Got everything rounded up and the shaft thickness is noticeably thinner than standard rotary tool bits. They wobble badly in my chuck. Cheap feel overall, wouldn't recommend.

These are gorgeous rings, a definite bargain for the price. I ordered them for a silent auction for a fundraiser for the National MS Society & they were a hit. I hated to let them go. I am purchasing another set for myself.
This is way too dangerous. It surges going up and down hills and get out of control quickly when it hits a bump.
Tried several brands before these and none fit right. These snapped onto my LED strips perfectly and you get a ton of them for way less than the hardware store charges.

Picked this up a few weeks ago and it's been solid for daily cleanup. The automatic height adjustment is my favorite part since my house is a mix of hardwood and area rugs. I just roll right through without stopping to flip switches. Suction is strong for how compact it feels. Knocking off a star because the power cord is shorter than I expected, so I'm constantly switching outlets. Overall a good buy for the price.

Have had this now for over a month and use it almost every day. Simple to program. Good quality units, each part of the controller can be changed out if damaged. Collars in lots of colors can be purchased as well. I purchased an additional collar and the unit was simple to reprogram to accommodate the additional collar.

Arrived two days earlier than expected, nicely wrapped in bubble wrap inside a sturdy box. No chips or scratches anywhere. The little frame feels solid and looks way pricier than what I paid. Got it on the counter immediately for our golden retriever who passed last month. Really sweet little memorial piece, couldn't be happier.

THANK YOU K&H for such an innovative, well-designed product! Your unique tabs, all four of them, slid into place in about three seconds, and seems like they will be totally secure in place (at least for my dog) until I should choose to pull them out for whatever reason. I struggled with my existing protector from Kurgo. The tabs just did not want to slide all the way down and STAY down on my new 2018 Lincoln MKX. I didn't have much of a problem with my previous vehicle (2013 Ford Taurus), but on my new car, they just didn't fit. Plus, there was a big "flap" that stuck up along the window, making it rather unsightly. The K&H product is literally flush with the top of the door. Plus, the price was much lower than the Kurgo, also! If you have struggled with the window tabs on your vehicle with other door protector products, at least give these a try. They may be the answer for you as they were for me.

Our first set was purchased here about 3 years ago, and we love it. But I wanted to give the boys a little more variety, so I bought another set with crazy slides and spinning things.. it was terrible. The marbles that it needed weren't "standard size", so you could only use what came with it, and the plastic was flimsy. I tried another set, from an expensive European company. That was horrible. So I'm back to this one again, and we can connect them all together to form a huge marble run. We're having a lot of fun with this. If you're looking for a good quality marble run, at a good price, this is the set I recommend.

I really recommend buy this headphone. Excellent sound output at this price. There are 2 reasons for me not giving this product a 5 star rating is.. 1) Little too bulky although collapsible. 2) There is no microphone built with it. Other products like Planotronics have microphones along with the headphone at the same price.

I bought this book months ago and have reread it three times since. My Kindle version has held up perfectly through all those reading sessions, plenty of highlighting, and being passed around to two friends who also devoured it. The story follows three sisters dealing with the fallout of one terrible choice, and honestly, it wrecked me in the best way. These women are messy and real, not some polished romance heroines. The author doesn't sugarcoat anything, which made every chapter hit harder. Yeah, there are some typos scattered throughout, but they didn't bother me much given how invested I was. If you want something gritty and emotionally raw that stays with you long after finishing, grab this one. It holds up on repeated reads too.

"Destroyer Angel" made me sad. It's not only the violent, depressing story, but also the fact that this may be the last Anna Pigeon novel I read. I have been reading Nevada Barr's books for many years now and have been disappointed in the dark turn this series has taken. I absolutely loved the earlier books in this series, which could never be accused of being "cozies", but included wonderful descriptions of National Parks and a variety of realistic characters. I thought the premise of this story being a story of survival sounded intriguing, so I gave it a try. After finishing the book, I can say I liked it better than recent installments such as "The Rope", but didn't like it nearly as well as earlier books in this series. I liked the vivid characterizations of the female characters and descriptions of the setting, but the male villains are interchangeable and their actions are appalling. Having the story told from different points of view added some interest, but also added redundancy and slowed the pace of the book. Some may enjoy this as a story of good vs. evil, but it's not my kind of story and even the great character of Anna Pigeon couldn't save it for me. The author has obviously chosen to take this series in a new direction, so it looks like we may be parting ways.
Thought it'd feel cheap but it's actually solid wood and fits perfectly.
Perfect for anyone short on laundry room space. Highly recommend!
Great pair of pants! He will be switching over to these from Dockers from now on!
Smaller than I remembered but the detail is way better than the ones I had as a kid. My son loves them.
Way more powerful than I expected. Found pet stains instantly that regular UV lights missed. Worth every penny for the price.

I needed a gift for someone I see socially and yet keep it light and kind of funny. Knowing she loves wine and has a great sense of humor...this was perfect. She loved it and it really does look a little more expensive than it is and also I love to personalize a gift and this fit into all categories.

I love paranormal books and this one made me feel so much!!! I was happy and mad and sad and then thrilled and then really overjoyed when I got the ending I wanted. I really look forward to reading more of this authors books!!!
Arrived next day in a padded mailer, no bent corners at all. Cracked it open immediately and was hooked by chapter two.

"Old Joy" is a movie about a dog named Lucy. Lucy has an owner named Mark who is about to become a father. With his wife about to give birth, Mark takes off for an overnight road trip. Lucy likes this because she gets to ride along. Mark goes and gets his old friend Kurt. Kurt likes to smoke hoochie-choochie weed, but this is okay with Lucy because Kurt will pet her head enthusiastically and throw a stick for her. Lucy runs in the forest and finds a nice big stick. Kurt is taking Mark to a natural spring. Kurt gets lost. The men sit on an abandoned sofa next to a fire and play with an air gun while Lucy looks over at them. Lucy is played by Lucy the dog. She has wonderful dog expressions and a very perky tail that wags wildly with enthusiasm. Her owner Mark is played by Daniel London who was in "Rent," "The Minority Report" & "Patch Adams. " London turns in a good subtle performance as he says the right things to his friend, while constantly talking with his wife on the phone and being critical of Kurt. It's obvious that Mark has moved beyond this old buddy relationship. Kurt the buddy is played by Will Oldham who was in "Junebug. " When they get to the sauna, the guys take off their clothes and Kurt tries to give Mark a massage. Mark is not comfortable with this. There are a lot of trees in the film. Kino International transferred it from 16 mm to 35 mm. It's being called artistic because it takes a long time to do very little. We get to watch sky and trees flicker by on the windshield for about four minutes. Actually, this is neither profound nor entertaining. It's a pretentious bit of cinema. That said, Lucy should have received a nomination as best animal in a movie.

This was a gift (I knew my neighbor wanted it), so I can't say for sure. My husband helped with the installation and it worked fine, so I'm assuming everything was as expected. Hard to rate something like a cable. What can I say? It looked perfectly stable, like a cable!

I bought this to replace an ancient netgear router. I should have replaced it a long time ago! This is a huge upgrade. It was easy to set up and between the 2g and 5g bands, we are getting a strong signal in all parts of the house. The wifi is faster and more reliable than ever. My only gripe is that the router itself is kind of a beast and has to sit out in the open, instead of tucking away. But at least it is sleek looking.
Got it used for cheap so can't complain too much. Some chapters dragged but the photos were worth it.
All around great film great top notch cast Anthony Franciosa really shines so does Carolyn Jones and Dean Martin in a rare dramatic turn.
Got all three books for way less than buying separately. Total steal.

Obviously you can't fail with a novel like this. I'd prefer Da Vinci s Code or Inferno, but this is a good one. Maybe the ending was too predictable and for my generation the side story was not two revealing (I'm 30 yo). If you want to have a good time reading a very well written story, then here you go!

Got this for my golden retriever thinking it would be like every other squeaky ball we've owned. It's definitely not. The sound it makes is bizarre - kind of an electronic warbling noise that caught us both off guard. Not unpleasant, just unexpected. My dog took a few minutes to warm up to it but now it's her go-to toy. She brings it everywhere. The rubber feels tougher than I anticipated and has held up to two weeks of serious chewing so far. My only complaint is the size - it's bigger than standard tennis balls so she struggles to pick it up cleanly. She ends up pushing it around with her nose half the time. Still, seeing her so entertained makes it worth the money. Would buy again.
Nice size. Fits perfectly. Love the added organization they provide.
These actually work pretty well. For the price I was expecting pretty poor quality and thought they would leak it not work. They all worked and didn't leak!
Awsome scope, worked well for my 7.62x39. Was shooting 2 inch groups at 100 yards. Not bad for an that caliber.

I've been using these clippers on my two Goldendoodles for about eight months now, and they still cut like the day I unboxed them. I was worried the blades would dull quickly given how thick my dogs' coats are, but no issues at all. I oil the blades regularly and clean them after each use, and they've held up beautifully. The motor hasn't slowed down or overheated even during longer grooming sessions. My previous clippers started smelling like burning plastic after a few months, but these have been rock solid. The cord is sturdy and hasn't frayed at the connection point like my last pair did. Honestly worth every penny if you're tired of replacing cheap clippers every year. These are built to last.

As far as shower heads go this one works well. I replaced just a stock circular shower head, and I would say this has as much water pressure as before, enough to get the shampoo and what not out of your hair, however, I do switch on the 'full blast' setting when rinsing my hair just to give it a reason for existing. I'm concerned about other reviews that say the toggle for this setting will eventually blow out within 6-12 months. I guess we'll see. It won't be the end of the world as I'll then get to test some of the other shower heads I was looking at before deciding on this one:D. I'm giving the product 4 stars instead of 5 just because as stated in another review, the design is a waste. It's a wider spray, which I like, but the curved aspect of it is totally pointless. They adjusted the nozzles inwards so that despite the curved designed, that would otherwise spray your whole body (making the head pretty awesome), it all just sprays straight like a normal flat head would. The curved design is aesthetic only, and therefore doesn't make any sense to me. I think it is wasted potential and somewhat misleading.

Picked this up on a whim and honestly enjoyed it way more than I expected. The thing I really loved was how the author handled the family dinner scenes, they felt incredibly tense and real, like you could cut the air with a knife. Kaitlin's internal struggle between loyalty and her feelings was written so well that I caught myself holding my breath during a few key moments. The only reason I'm knocking off a star is because the pacing drags a bit around the middle. There's a stretch where not much happens and I almost put it down. Glad I stuck with it though because the last few chapters totally pay off. If you like star-crossed romance with genuine emotional weight, this is worth your time.
Great film about Bobby Jones and Augusta's history. Grabbed it on sale and it's worth every penny.
When it arrived it was already broken and did not work I added new batteries and it did not work.

For starters the head phones worked and were way better in staying in the ear when doing laps and flip turns. The packaging was great, and they came with all sorts of swap out buds for all different size ears. The problem and the reason I'm writing this review, is I noticed that about 2 weeks after receiving them and using them in my daily 1 mile swim, that one of the headphones was barely working. I thought it may be due to water getting in my ear and drowning out the noise. This wasn't the problem because the very next day the ear bud stop working permanently. I found that i can get the broken side to work if i bend the wire that plugs into the Ipod. So all in all, I'm very disappointed in this product you would think that for $40 (usd) you would get a pair of water proof headphones that would be built to last. I do understand that even normal headphones don't last forever!!! but they are like $10. Hope to hear back from the company. I will write an update review in a few weeks, in response to company actions. I would also like to note that im also deployed overseas and received these headphones with amazon prime in under a week, it was amazing.
Perfect for picky eaters! My two seniors devoured these instantly. Highly recommend to anyone with older cats who turn their nose up at everything.
Arrived quickly with no dents in the bag. Switched my pup over and she gobbled it right down.

The item is exactly what is describe. So I am giving 5 stars. But, be aware, it will have to be placed on the item where you may want to use the item with the adhesive backing. Be sure to have a place that will be okay to attach with adhesive. I placed them on the back of my nightstand.
Really cute! Can't wait to give this to my 2.5 year old when I have his brother. I think it will make him feel super special:)
Perfect, exactly what I was looking for to attach to a wallet.

Grabbed this on a whim and honestly it delivered way more than I expected for the price. The chemistry between the leads had me hooked from chapter one. Plot got a little predictable near the end but still a fun, quick read.
Perfect bag for summer parades and the American flag print hasn't faded at all.

I would give this product more stars if there were any more to give. I had a TERRIBLE flea problem. Tried all kinds of things. It was basically ruining my life. Nobody would come to visit me. I didn't even want to visit me. Dog was miserable. Then I remembered using this years ago and found it at Amazon. Got it. Spread it around (very easy). A week later....not a single flea and they've never come back. This stuff is a miracle in a bottle.

The construction of this Mag-Lite Solitaire is really quite good. It's very sturdy and I've had one run over by my truck and had a 150 pound (68kg) Television drop on another without much visible damage (scratches). I have received this as a gift and as a corporate tchotchke as well as having bought one and they do come in handy. The problem is that it runs through batteries pretty quickly if you use this for anything more than looking for your keys on the ground or the deadbolt on your door when you forgot to leave on the porch light. The lens cap tends to turn itself on in your pocket or bag... draining away the power. I haven't ever used it as a keychain device as I don't like a lot of bulk. I haven't ever experienced the reported problem with the end cap loosening. The best task I've found for this light is to hang it on the keyring holder in my laptop bag. It's simply not well suited to a pocket or to a keychain, and I believe that was its intended purpose. I found the light, itself, to be fairly bright at full power, but with a more robust LED, it would probably be a better unit. It does have a better light distance than an LED would produce, though. All-in-all, a bit of a miss, but I'm a flashlight hound, so I still like it. If you are looking for a good keyring light, get a smaller LED with an on/off switch. This would probably make a good light for a purse or in a glove compartment. I would recommend pairing it with a Lithium Battery (Technuity L92BP4 Battery, Lithium Aaa Photo Battery for example) - especially if storing in car or bag for long periods. Make sure you tighten the lenscap well so it doesn't accidentally turn on.

This book came on my radar because Ms. Lowry recently visited our community ( and this book is being made into a feature movie!) Since I do a reading program w/ my service dog at my local elementary school, I like to read some of the books my 4th and 5th graders do. I can't believe none of my three 30 something children ever read this book when they were in school but I guess it was pretty controversial when it first came out. I found it very thought provoking w/ strong messages that young people need to hear today and have already recommended it to some of the children in my reading program as many of them have read Number the Stars to me and my dog - glad I bought it!
Installed these on my son's mountain bike over a year ago. They've survived crashes, mud, and daily rides to school. Still shifting crisp and smooth. Excellent quality for the price.
Present for my grandson who is a fanatic about Harry Potter.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy little box, no bent pins or scuffed housing. Pulled it out and the build quality immediately felt solid. Exactly what I needed for my amp hookup.
One of those things bought mostly because it LOOKS useful. Seldom use it but when I do it's as close to perfect as you can get for what it's made for.
Perfect upgrade for anyone doing fine detail work. The broad base prevents tipping, and the contoured handle feels great. Highly recommend.

DO NOT buy a Streamlight because you think there's a lifetime warranty, there really isn't. You have to read the fine print. I bought and received a genuine Streamlight Microstream (NOT an imported knock-off), and have loved it while it worked. The problem I have with the company is their misleading use of the term "LIMITED lifetime warranty". Let me explain. Streamlight's "LIMITED lifetime warranty" doesn't apply to electronics, bulbs, batteries, or switches, just to what they deem as manufacturer's defects. So, basically, their so-called warranty applies only to manufacturing defects in the aluminum body-tube of the light. NOT COOL, Streamlight... you want us to "Buy American", but you have a crappily designed switch that wreaks of designed obsolescence. Cost of a replacement tail cap/switch is $12 ($4 + $8 shipping), which is hardly worth it, especially considering that the LED emitter has been upgraded from 35 to 45 lumens.
Arrived fast and in perfect condition, no bent corners. Flipped through right away and already found stuff I didn't know. Great pickup.

My gelding has worn this sheet nonstop for three months of turnout and it's held up incredibly well. No rips, tears, or stretched straps despite his rolling habit. The fabric still looks practically new after multiple washes. Solid quality.

I received this book as an ARC for an honest review. I really enjoyed reading about Spencer, the bad boy that is taking the blame for his brother to avoid royal scandal. There is alot of drama and steamy scenes. I recommend this book!

I bought this for my 40 lb dog Cookie, but she wasn't the least bit interested because it was too hard for her. I ended up giving it to my friend who has a pitbull named Bertha who is 75 lbs. Bertha loves it & hasn't even put a dent in it... friend was so impressed, she'll be buying more for sure!!

Please, stay away from this product. Yes it has good reviews but those are reviews of people who barely got the tablet. I thought I made an awesome buy but I was wrong. After a couple of weeks it won't turn on regardless of what you do. Unfortunately I lost my receipt and it was a headache trying to get walmart to help me. I recommend buying the ASUS T100 just add a little bit more money and you will be getting a reliable product than this tablet. PLEASE DON'T BUY IT!!! SAVE YOUR MONEY AND BUY A DIFFERENT TABLET.
The oldest got this as a Christmas present. He was so excited he was out in the blistering cold, sick riding down the driveway Christmas day. Mom & Dad like to ride it too ^_^
my 10 year old siberian husky loved this toy. the hat didn't last long but the toy did
Got this for my daughter's birthday. For the price, you really can't beat it. She plays with it constantly. Wish the bassinet clicked in more securely though.

I am technologically challenged and need my son's help to do most everything electronics related. I bought this switch with the idea that if I could not make it work I would ask my son for help. I have a TV with only two HDMI ports and needed to connect it to a DVD and a Roku as well as my cable modem. Guess what! By following the advice in other reviews, I have a working setup. I still don't understand what the 5v charger input is supposed to do or why the "Select" button doesn't select. Also, I don't need to use the remote control (I already have a handful of remotes and don't want to juggle another). It seemed to take forever to get the switcher, but considering the price and the utility of the thing, I am a happy buyer.

This would be great if I wasn't going to be home and wanted lights going on and off at various times during the day and night. But what I want to use it for is to run a water distiller for exactly 5 hrs. The other type of timer was not accurate. This one is, but each time I want to run it, I have to set the time to go on and then off and verify the day and the schedule. The next day always at a different time than the previous day, when I want to run the distiller for five hours, I have to set the timer again as to what time it should go on and then off and also set the day for it to run and whether it should repeat everyday, every other day etc...all settings that are insignificant to me. I wish I could just set to run for five hours and have it turn off afterwards. It was a lot of money to pay for for what I needed: a simpler setup. I am sure it is great for turning lights on and off randomly, as it says it does. I have it plugged in an outlet under a wall cabinet which has a light under it but I have to use a flashlight to view the digital screen. It protrudes beyond where the light can shine on it. When setting the times, if you go past the number you wanted, you cannot reverse it, but have to go all the way around the 12 hrs to get back to the number you wanted. This goes for hours and minutes, days of the week etc, for each of the on and off settings. Kind of a hassle. Anyone know of a simpler timer?
Bought this for my tile floors and it hasn't disappointed. Glides around easily, suction is solid, and cleanup takes half the time now.

So in book 3 we find Chelsea struggling with her being a slut for the Partners. She is 3 weeks in and she finds herself at a loose end. She is used to being busy, to working and now she is unsure of herself. So she decides to work on herself while she is waiting for the next call.and that call is from Greg. I don't know why, but there are 2 of the Billionaires that I was most excited to read about. Tristan, the super hot partner who is the ultimate man candy for Chelsea and Greg. Greg was the one that brought her too the other partners and the first partner she was with. In this story we not only get to see Gregs kinky nature but his teasing one too. Chelseas character become even more developed and its exciting to see her grow. Executive Sweet 3 earns a solid 9 out of 10 from me.

Thought this would be another boring workout video gathering dust, but I was wrong. The routines are surprisingly doable and I actually broke a sweat without feeling completely wiped out. Been doing it every morning before work and already noticing a difference.

Got these for work and they've held up nicely so far. Sizing runs a little small, so definitely order up. They look great with jeans and stay comfortable through a full shift. Really happy with this purchase overall.

I am a big man at 6'2 tall. This hoodie is made for someone who is big and short. The hoodie doesn't come down past my waist I'll never wear it. It's trash. This is a true embarrassment to the Dickie's name brand.

What an absolutely delightful story! The plot revolves around a lonely schoolteacher, a troublemaker student who just lost his mother, and a widower father trying to be both parents. Melanie, Simon, and Hank are endearing characters. Their perseverance in deciphering the puzzle box was inspirational. This is a short story so obviously the romance will be at a rapid pace. But it is believable. I really felt the holiday spirit after reading this story. I will definitely continue with this series!
